They also allow for more open research and testing, to the extent that users can use them as checkpoints, fine-tune them according to their needs, and potentially redistribute them. In some cases, however, concerns on modifying these weights towards unauthorized uses may outweigh the pros of giving users such a freedom. Defending against such adaptation is non-trivial: since an adaptive attacker can observe all weights and architectures by definition, they can reverse simple structural defenses, and use optimization to defeat the simplest locking mechanisms. In this work, we exploit the inference-training asymmetry of automatic differentiation as a novel defense axis. We propose DLR-Lock, a method where the purveyor of the model purposely replaces each pretrained MLP in their model with a deep low-rank residual network (DLR-Net) of comparable parameter count, forcing activation memory that grows linearly with depth during backpropagation. DLR-Nets are efficiently trained via module-wise distillation. We show that, beyond this memory overhead, DLR-Lock results in architectural mismatches that complicate the optimization landscape of standard fine-tuning, and a backward pass that incurs disproportionately more overhead than the forward pass. Our defense succeeds in withstanding adaptive attackers with full knowledge of the defense strategy while preserving the original model's capabilities. Experiments on LLM validate these claims.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DLR-Lock方法，通过用深层低秩残差网络替换预训练MLP，利用自动微分的不对称性来锁定模型权重，防止未经授权的微调。
light_analysis.motivation: 开放权重的语言模型质量提升，共享权重便于使用和研究，但也带来了被恶意修改的风险。现有防御方法容易被自适应攻击者破解，因为他们可以观察到所有权重和架构，并通过优化手段绕过简单防御。因此，需要一种能够抵御自适应攻击者的防御机制，同时保留模型原始能力。
light_analysis.method: DLR-Lock方法用深层低秩残差网络（DLR-Net）替换预训练模型中的每个MLP，保持参数数量相当。DLR-Net通过模块级蒸馏高效训练。该方法利用自动微分在推理和训练中的不对称性：反向传播时激活内存随深度线性增长，且前向与后向计算开销不成比例，导致标准微调时出现架构不匹配和优化困难。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明DLR-Lock成功抵御具有完全防御知识的自适应攻击者，同时保持了原模型的能力。在LLM上验证了这些主张。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称防御有效。
light_analysis.conclusion: DLR-Lock通过利用自动微分的不对称性提供了一种新颖的防御轴，有效防止模型权重被未经授权修改。其价值在于保护开源模型的同时不损害性能。潜在局限性可能包括额外计算开销，未来可探索更高效的结构或扩展到其他模型类型。

title: DynaMiCS: Fine-tuning LLMs with Performance Constraints using Dynamic Mixtures
abstract: Multi-domain fine-tuning of large language models requires improving performance on target domains while preserving performance on constrained domains, such as general knowledge, instruction following, or safety evaluations. Existing data mixing strategies rely on fixed heuristics or adaptive rules that cannot explicitly enforce preservation of such capabilities. We propose DynaMiCS, a dynamic mixture optimizer that casts multi-domain fine-tuning as a constrained optimization problem. At each update, DynaMiCS performs short domain-specific probing runs to estimate a slope matrix of local cross-domain effects, capturing how training on each fine-tuning dataset affects each evaluation domain. These estimates are then used to compute mixture weights through optimization over the probability simplex, with the objective of improving target-domain performance while keeping constrained-domain losses below reference levels. Across multi-domain fine-tuning scenarios with varying numbers of target and constrained domains, DynaMiCS achieves stronger target-domain improvements and higher constraint satisfaction than fixed-mixture baselines, at lower computational cost and without reference models, per-example scoring, or manually tuned mixture weights.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DynaMiCS动态混合优化器，将多领域微调建模为约束优化问题，通过短探测估计跨域效应并动态调整数据混合权重，以提升目标域性能同时保证约束域能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多领域微调大语言模型需在提升目标域性能的同时，保持通用知识、指令遵循等约束域能力。现有数据混合策略依赖固定启发式或自适应规则，无法显式强制执行约束。该问题重要，因为模型微调中性能提升往往伴随其他能力的退化，需要一种可定量平衡的方法。
light_analysis.method: DynaMiCS将多领域微调配为约束优化问题。每次更新时，对每个领域执行短探测运行，估计一个局部跨域效应斜率矩阵，量化训练数据集对各评估域的影响。随后在概率单纯形上优化得到混合权重，目标函数为提升目标域性能，同时约束域损失低于参考水平。无需参考模型、逐样本评分或手动调权。
light_analysis.result: 在多种多领域微调场景下（不同数量的目标域和约束域），DynaMiCS相比固定混合基线方法，实现更强的目标域性能提升和更高的约束满足度，且计算成本更低。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明其优于固定混合基线，并无需额外资源。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了一种动态数据混合优化器，显式解决多领域微调中的性能约束问题。学术价值在于将约束优化引入数据混合策略，实际应用价值在于高效微调LLM同时保留关键能力。未来可探索更高效的斜率估计方法及扩展至更大规模场景。

title: Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation for Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) achieve strong performance through instruction tuning, yet real-world deployment often requires continual capability expansion across sequential tasks. In such scenarios, Multimodal Continual Instruction Tuning (MCIT) aims to acquire new capabilities while limiting catastrophic forgetting. Existing methods mainly follow a module-composition paradigm: they maintain task-level prompts or LoRA experts and dynamically route or aggregate a subset of them at inference. However, samples within the same task can still differ substantially in visual scenes, question intents, and reasoning demands. This motivates instance-level adaptation to individual query-image pairs rather than only selecting or combining task-level modules. To this end, we propose DRAPE (Dynamic Cross-Modal Prompt Generation), a prompt-learning framework that synthesizes continuous instance-specific soft prompts for MCIT. Instead of selecting prompts from a fixed pool, DRAPE derives prompt queries from the textual instruction and cross-attends to visual patch features, producing query-image conditioned prompts that are prepended to the frozen LLM. To mitigate forgetting during sequential updates, DRAPE applies null-space gradient projection to the shared projector and uses CLIP-based prototype routing for task-label-free generator selection at inference. Extensive experiments on MCIT benchmarks show that DRAPE achieves state-of-the-art performance among representative prompt-based and LoRA-based continual-learning baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出动态跨模态提示生成框架，实现多模态持续指令微调中的实例级自适应，缓解灾难性遗忘。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大模型在持续指令微调中常面临灾难性遗忘，现有方法采用任务级模块组合，但同一任务内样本在视觉场景、问题意图和推理需求上差异显著。因此需要实例级别的自适应，而非仅选择或组合任务级模块，以更灵活地适应每个查询-图像对。
light_analysis.method: 提出DRAPE框架，从文本指令生成提示查询，通过跨模态注意力与视觉补丁特征交互，合成实例特定的连续软提示，并预挂在冻结的LLM前。为防止遗忘，共享投影器采用零空间梯度投影，推理时使用CLIP原型路由实现无任务标签的生成器选择。
light_analysis.result: 在多个MCIT基准测试中，DRAPE在基于提示和LoRA的持续学习方法中达到最先进水平。具体性能指标如准确率提升或遗忘降低优于现有方法，摘要未提供详细数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: DRAPE通过实例级动态提示生成有效解决了多模态持续指令微调中的灾难性遗忘，提升了任务适应性。该方法具有重要学术价值，未来可探索更高效的投影或路由机制，以降低计算开销。

title: Reinforce Adjoint Matching: Scaling RL Post-Training of Diffusion and Flow-Matching Models
abstract: Diffusion and flow-matching models scale because pretraining is supervised regression: a clean sample is noised analytically, and a model regresses against a closed-form target. RL post-training aligns the model with a reward. In image generation, this makes samples compose objects correctly, render text legibly, and match human preferences. Existing methods rely on costly SDE rollouts, reward gradients, or surrogate losses, sacrificing pretraining's regression structure. We show that the structure extends to RL post-training. Under KL-regularized reward maximization, the optimal generative process tilts the clean-endpoint distribution towards samples with higher reward and leaves the noising law unchanged. Combining this with the adjoint-matching optimality condition and a REINFORCE identity, we derive Reinforce Adjoint Matching (RAM): a consistency loss that corrects the pretraining target with the reward. At each step, we draw a clean endpoint from the current model, evaluate its reward, noise it as in pretraining, and regress. No SDE rollouts, backward adjoint sweeps, or reward gradients are required. Like the pretraining objective, RAM is simple and scales. On Stable Diffusion 3.5M, RAM achieves the highest reward on composability, text rendering, and human preference, reaching Flow-GRPO's peak reward in up to $50\times$ fewer training steps.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Reinforce Adjoint Matching (RAM)，一种无需SDE rollout或奖励梯度的扩散模型RL后训练方法，显著提升训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有扩散模型RL后训练方法依赖昂贵的SDE rollout、奖励梯度或代理损失，破坏了预训练的回归结构，导致计算成本高且扩展性差。本文旨在保留预训练回归结构的同时，实现高效且可扩展的RL后训练，以对齐奖励。
light_analysis.method: RAM基于KL正则化奖励最大化推导，通过一致性损失修正预训练目标：从当前模型采样干净端点，计算奖励，按预训练方式加噪，然后回归。无需SDE rollout、反向伴随扫描或奖励梯度，保持了预训练的简洁性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在Stable Diffusion 3.5M上，RAM在组合性、文本渲染和人类偏好指标上达到最高奖励，且相比Flow-GRPO，达到峰值奖励的训练步骤减少高达50倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAM是一种简单、可扩展的扩散模型RL后训练方法，保留了预训练的回归结构，显著降低了计算开销。未来可推广至其他生成模型，并探索更复杂的奖励函数。

title: Provable Sparse Inversion and Token Relabel Enhanced One-shot Federated Learning with ViTs
abstract: One-Shot Federated Learning, where a central server learns a global model in a single communication round, has emerged as a promising paradigm. However, under extremely non-IID settings, existing data-free methods often generate low-quality data that suffers from severe semantic misalignment with ground-truth labels. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel Federated Model Inversion and Token Relabel (FedMITR) framework, which trains the global model by fully exploiting all patches of synthetic images. Specifically, FedMITR employs sparse model inversion during data generation, selectively inverting semantic foregrounds while halting the inversion of uninformative backgrounds. To address semantically meaningless tokens that hinder ViT predictions, we implement a differentiated strategy: patches with high information density utilize generated pseudo-labels, while patches with low information density are relabeled via ensemble models for robust distillation. Theoretically, our analysis based on algorithmic stability reveals that Sparse Model Inversion eliminates gradient instability arising from background noise, while Token Relabel effectively reduces gradient variance, collectively guaranteeing a tighter generalization bound. Empirically, extensive experimental results demonstrate that FedMITR substantially outperforms existing baselines under various settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FedMITR框架，通过稀疏模型反转和令牌重标记解决One-Shot联邦学习在非IID数据下的语义不对齐问题。
light_analysis.motivation: One-Shot联邦学习在单轮通信中学习全局模型，但在极端非独立同分布下，现有无数据方法生成的低质量数据存在严重语义不对齐，导致模型性能下降。因此需要一种能有效利用合成图像并解决语义偏差的方法。
light_analysis.method: FedMITR框架包含两个核心组件：稀疏模型反转在数据生成时选择性反转语义前景而停止背景反转，减少噪声；令牌重标记针对ViT中无意义令牌，对高信息密度补丁使用伪标签，低信息密度补丁通过集成模型重标记，实现鲁棒蒸馏。理论分析基于算法稳定性证明其能消除梯度不稳定并减小梯度方差。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，FedMITR在各种设置下显著优于现有基线方法，尤其在极端非IID场景中性能提升明显。摘要未报告具体数值，但强调其稳定性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: FedMITR通过创新的稀疏反转和令牌重标记策略，有效提升One-Shot联邦学习在非IID数据下的性能，理论保证紧致泛化界。该框架适用于隐私敏感的分布式学习场景，未来可探索更高效的通信或动态令牌策略。

title: AdaPaD: Adaptive Parallel Deflation for PEFT with Self-Correcting Rank Discovery
abstract: Fine-tuning large language models with LoRA requires choosing a rank r before training starts. Existing approaches either extract rank-1 components sequentially, freezing each component's error permanently into every subsequent residual, or optimize the full low-rank factorization jointly with guarantees that describe only the joint update, not individual rank-1 directions. We present AdaPaD (Adaptive Parallel Deflation), which trains all rank-1 components simultaneously: each worker refines its component against a deflation target built from the latest estimates of all predecessors, and as those estimates improve, the targets improve too. We call this property self-correction: deflation errors converge to zero over rounds rather than persisting as fixed residuals. On top of this backbone, AdaPaD adds advance learning (private pre-training before activation) and per-module dynamic rank discovery (importance-based growth until a shared budget is exhausted), making the rank distribution an output rather than an input. We prove that every component's error decays exponentially after a warm-up period, with a generalization bound that splits into a vanishing algorithmic term and an irreducible statistical floor. Empirically, AdaPaD is competitive with adaptive-rank LoRA baselines on GLUE with DeBERTaV3-base at matched parameter budgets, and competitive with fixed-rank LoRA on Qwen3-0.6B SQuAD/SQuAD v2 while deploying an adapter that is on average 30.7% smaller.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应并行消减方法AdaPaD，实现LoRA微调中秩的自动发现与自校正，同时训练所有秩-1分量，并动态分配参数预算。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有LoRA微调需要预先选择秩r，且顺序提取秩-1分量会永久冻结每个分量的误差，或联合优化但缺乏对单个方向的分析。这导致秩的选择成为输入而非输出，且误差累积。AdaPaD通过并行训练所有分量并引入自校正机制，使消减误差随轮次收敛至零，同时实现动态秩发现，解决固定秩和误差累积问题。
light_analysis.method: AdaPaD核心是并行消减框架：所有秩-1分量同时训练，每个工作器根据所有前驱的最新估计构建消减目标，并随估计改进而更新（自校正）。在此基础上增加预训练（激活前私有训练）和每模块动态秩发现（基于重要性的增长直至共享预算耗尽）。理论证明每个分量误差在热身期后指数衰减，泛化界分为可忽略的算法项和不可约的统计项。
light_analysis.result: 在GLUE基准上使用DeBERTaV3-base，AdaPaD在匹配参数预算下与自适应秩LoRA基线竞争力相当；在Qwen3-0.6B的SQuAD/SQuAD v2任务中，与固定秩LoRA竞争力相当，同时部署的适配器平均缩小30.7%。
light_analysis.conclusion: AdaPaD通过自校正并行消减和动态秩发现，实现了LoRA微调中秩的自动确定与参数高效分配，理论保证误差指数衰减。实验验证了其与现有方法竞争的性能和更小的适配器尺寸，为参数高效微调提供了新范式，未来可探索更复杂的增长策略或跨任务泛化。

title: XQCfD: Accelerating Fast Actor-Critic Algorithms with Prior Data and Prior Policies
abstract: For reinforcement learning in the real world online exploration is expensive A common practice in robotic reinforcement learning is to incorporate additional data to improve sample efficiency Expert demonstration data is often crucial for solving hard exploration tasks with sparse rewards While prior data is used to augment experience and pretrain models we show that the design of existing algorithms fails to achieve the sample efficiency that is possible in this setting due to a failure to use pretrained policies effectively We propose XQCfD which extends the sample-efficient XQC actor-critic to learn from demonstrations using augmented replay buffers pretrained policies and stationary policy architectures designed to avoid rapidly unlearning the strong initial policy like prior works We show our stationary network architecture enables policy improvement out-of-distribution better than standard network architectures due to its higher entropy predictions XQCfD achieves state of the art performance across a range of complex manipulation tasks with sparse rewards from the popular Adroit Robomimic and MimicGen benchmarks -- notably with a low update-to-data ratio and no ensemble networks

light_analysis.overview: 提出XQCfD算法，通过静态策略架构和预训练策略有效利用演示数据，加速强化学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界中在线探索成本高昂，而专家演示数据对解决稀疏奖励的困难探索任务至关重要。现有方法虽使用预训练策略，但因未能有效利用导致样本效率低下，无法充分发挥潜在性能。
light_analysis.method: 扩展样本高效的XQC演员-评论家算法，通过增强回放缓冲区、预训练策略和静态策略架构来学习演示。静态架构通过高熵预测实现分布外策略改进，避免像先前工作那样快速遗忘初始策略。
light_analysis.result: 在Adroit、Robomimic和MimicGen基准的复杂操纵任务中达到最先进性能，具有低更新数据比且无需集成网络，显著优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 验证了静态网络架构和预训练策略在稀疏奖励强化学习中的有效性，为样本高效在线学习提供了新思路。未来可推广至更复杂的现实世界任务。

title: Kernel-Gradient Drifting Models
abstract: We propose kernel-gradient drifting, a one-step generative modeling framework that replaces the fixed Euclidean displacement direction in drifting models with directions induced by the kernel itself. Standard drifting is attractive because it enables fast, high-quality generation without distilling a large pretrained diffusion model, but its theory is currently understood mainly for Gaussian kernels, where the drift coincides with smoothed score matching and is identifiable. Our gradient-based reformulation exposes this score-based structure for general kernels: the resulting drift is the score difference between kernel-smoothed data and model distributions, yielding identifiability for characteristic kernels and a smoothed-KL descent interpretation of the drifting dynamics. Since kernel gradients are intrinsic tangent vectors, the same construction extends naturally to Riemannian manifolds and to discrete data via the Fisher-Rao geometry of the probability simplex. Across spherical geospatial data, promoter DNA and molecule generation, kernel-gradient drifting enables state-of-the-art one-step generation beyond the Euclidean setting without distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出核梯度漂移模型，通过核诱导方向替代固定欧几里得位移，实现无需蒸馏的一步生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准漂移模型虽能快速高质量生成，但理论主要针对高斯核且依赖大型预训练扩散模型蒸馏。现有方法在非欧几里得空间（如流形、离散数据）的适用性有限，需要更通用的理论框架。核梯度漂移通过揭示漂移的分数匹配本质，为一般核提供了可辨识性和收敛解释。
light_analysis.method: 将漂移重构为核梯度形式，使漂移等于核平滑数据分布与模型分布的分数差，从而对特征核具有可辨识性。推导出平滑KL散度下降的解释，并利用核梯度的内蕴切向量性质，自然扩展到黎曼流形和通过Fisher-Rao几何的离散数据。该框架无需蒸馏，支持一步生成。
light_analysis.result: 在球面地理数据、启动子DNA和分子生成任务上，核梯度漂移实现了无需蒸馏的一步生成，达到最先进水平，超越了欧几里得设置下的现有方法。实验证明了模型在非欧几里得空间中的有效性和生成质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出一种通用的生成框架，统一了欧几里得和非欧几里得空间的一步生成，具有理论保证（可辨识性、KL下降）和实际性能优势。未来可探索其他核函数和更复杂的数据结构，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: AllocMV: Optimal Resource Allocation for Music Video Generation via Structured Persistent State
abstract: Generating long-horizon music videos (MVs) is frequently constrained by prohibitive computational costs and difficulty maintaining cross-shot consistency. We propose AllocMV, a hierarchical framework formulating music video synthesis as a Multiple-Choice Knapsack Problem (MCKP). AllocMV represents the video's persistent state as a compact, structured object comprising character entities, scene priors, and sharing graphs, produced by a global planner prior to realization. By estimating segment saliency from multimodal cues, a group-level MCKP solver based on dynamic programming optimally allocates resources across High-Gen, Mid-Gen, and Reuse branches. For repetitive musical motifs, we implement a divergence-based forking strategy that reuses visual prefixes to reduce costs while ensuring motif-level continuity. Evaluated via the Cost-Quality Ratio (CQR), AllocMV achieves an optimal trade-off between perceived quality and resource expenditure under strict budgetary and rhythmic constraints.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AllocMV框架，将音乐视频生成建模为多选择背包问题，实现最优资源分配。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成长时间音乐视频面临高昂计算成本和跨镜头一致性难以维持的挑战。现有方法通常忽略资源分配的优化，导致质量与效率失衡。AllocMV旨在通过结构化持久状态和分层规划，在严格预算和节奏约束下，实现感知质量与资源消耗的最优权衡。
light_analysis.method: AllocMV采用分层框架，全局规划器首先生成包含角色、场景和共享图的持久状态。根据多模态线索估计片段显著性，然后通过基于动态规划的组级MCKP求解器，在High-Gen、Mid-Gen和Reuse分支间最优分配资源。针对重复音乐动机，利用基于散度的分叉策略重用视觉前缀，降低计算成本并保证连续性。
light_analysis.result: 通过成本-质量比（CQR）评估，AllocMV在严格预算和节奏约束下，实现了感知质量与资源支出的最优权衡。与基线方法相比，在保持高视觉一致性的同时显著降低了计算开销，验证了资源分配策略的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: AllocMV将资源分配问题形式化为MCKP，为长时音乐视频生成提供了高效解决方案。其结构化持久状态和分叉重用策略在保证质量的同时大幅降低计算成本。未来可探索更复杂的全局规划器及动态约束场景下的扩展。

title: On Improving Graph Neural Networks for QSAR by Pre-training on Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints
abstract: Molecular Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are increasingly common in drug discovery, particularly for Quantitative Structure-Activity Relationship (QSAR) studies; yet, their superiority compared to classical molecular featurisation approaches is disputed. We report a general strategy for improving GNNs for QSAR by pre-training to predict Extended-Connectivity Fingerprints (ECFP). We validate our approach with statistical tests and challenging out-of-distribution (OOD) splits. Across five out of six Biogen benchmarks, we observed a statistically significant improvement in standard performance metrics over all evaluated baselines when using ECFP pre-trained GNNs. However, for more heterogeneous datasets and more complex endpoints, such as binding affinity prediction, pre-trained GNNs underperformed in OOD settings. Importantly, we investigated the impact of substructure-level data leakage during pre-training on downstream performance. While we identified scenarios where pre-training on ECFPs was less effective, our findings show that ECFP-based pre-training can enhance downstream OOD performance on a diverse set of practically relevant QSAR tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过预训练GNNs预测ECFP来改进QSAR任务，验证了其有效性并探讨了数据泄漏的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 分子图神经网络在药物发现中广泛应用，但相对于传统分子特征化方法的优势存在争议。现有GNNs在QSAR任务中性能不稳定，尤其是面对异质数据集和复杂终点时表现不佳。作者旨在开发一种通用策略提升GNNs的预测能力，并系统评估预训练方法在实际场景中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是利用ECFP作为预训练目标，训练GNNs学习分子指纹信息。然后在下游QSAR任务上进行微调。使用六个Biogen基准数据集，采用统计检验和挑战性分布外（OOD）划分进行评估。同时研究了预训练阶段子结构级数据泄漏对下游性能的影响。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准中的五个上，ECFP预训练GNNs在标准性能指标上获得统计显著提升，优于所有基线。但在更异质的数据集和复杂终点（如结合亲和力预测）的OOD设置中，预训练GNNs表现较差。此外，存在预训练效果不佳的场景，但总体上ECFP预训练能提升多种实际QSAR任务的OOD性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究证明了ECFP预训练能有效提升GNNs在多数QSAR任务中的表现，尤其对OOD性能有益。但方法存在局限性，复杂场景下可能不如基线。未来工作可探索更多样的预训练目标和泄漏缓解策略。该工作为分子GNN的预训练提供了实用指导。

title: Heteroscedastic Diffusion for Multi-Agent Trajectory Modeling
abstract: Multi-agent trajectory modeling traditionally focuses on forecasting, often neglecting more general tasks like trajectory completion, which is essential for real-world applications such as correcting tracking data. Existing methods also generally predict agents' states without offering any state-wise measure of heteroscedastic uncertainty. Moreover, popular multi-modal sampling methods lack error probability estimates for each generated scene under the same prior observations, which makes it difficult to rank the predictions at inference time. We introduce U2Diffine, a unified diffusion model built to perform trajectory completion while simultaneously offering state-wise heteroscedastic uncertainty estimates. This is achieved by augmenting the standard denoising loss with the negative log-likelihood of the predicted noise, and then propagating the latent space uncertainty to the real state space using a first-order Taylor approximation. We also propose U2Diff, a faster baseline that avoids gradient computation during sampling. This approach significantly increases inference speed, making it as efficient as a standard generative-only diffusion model. For post-processing, we integrate a Rank Neural Network (RankNN) that enables error probability estimation for each generated mode, demonstrating strong correlation with ground truth errors. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art solutions in both trajectory completion and forecasting across four challenging sports datasets (NBA, Basketball-U, Football-U, Soccer-U), underscoring the effectiveness of our uncertainty and error probability estimation.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI). Extended version of arXiv:2503.18589 (CVPR 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 提出U2Diffine扩散模型，实现多智能体轨迹补全与异方差不确定性估计，并通过RankNN提供误差概率估计，在多个体育数据集上取得SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统多智能体轨迹建模专注于预测，忽略轨迹补全等重要实际应用（如修正追踪数据）。现有方法缺乏状态异方差不确定性和生成场景的误差概率估计，导致推理时无法排序预测。因此需要统一模型同时完成补全、不确定性和概率估计。
light_analysis.method: 构建统一扩散模型U2Diffine，通过在标准去噪损失中添加预测噪声的负对数似然来学习异方差不确定性，并利用一阶泰勒近似将潜空间不确定性传播到真实状态空间。引入快速变体U2Diff避免采样时梯度计算，提升推理速度。后处理集成RankNN，为每个生成模式估计误差概率。
light_analysis.result: 在NBA、Basketball-U、Football-U、Soccer-U四个体育数据集上，U2Diffine在轨迹补全和预测任务中均超越现有SOTA方法。U2Diff在保持效率的同时性能相近。RankNN估计的误差概率与真实误差强相关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了一种统一的多智能体轨迹建模框架，能同时完成补全、预测并提供异方差不确定性和误差概率估计。该方法在实际应用中（如体育数据分析）有重要价值，为后续研究提供了不确定性量化新思路。未来可探索更高效的不确定性传播方式。

title: What should post-training optimize? A test-time scaling law perspective
abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed with test-time strategies: sample $N$ responses, score them with a reward model or verifier, and return the best. This deployment rule exposes a mismatch in post-training: standard objectives optimize the mean reward of a single response, whereas best-of-$N$ performance is governed by the upper tail of the reward distribution. Recent test-time-aware objectives partly address this mismatch, but typically assume that training can use the same per-prompt rollout budget as deployment, which is impractical when post-training must cover many prompts while deployment can allocate much larger per-prompt test-time compute. We study this budget-mismatch regime, where only $m\ll N$ per-prompt rollouts are available during training but the target objective is best-of-$N$ deployment. Under structural assumptions on the reward tails, we show that the policy gradient of the best-of-$N$ objective can be approximated from a much smaller rollout group by extrapolating upper-tail statistics. This yields a family of Tail-Extrapolated estimators for best-of-$N$-oriented post-training: a simple direct estimator, Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA), and a fixed-order debiased Prefix-TEA estimator based on moment cancellation. Experiments on instruction-following tasks show that TEA and Prefix-TEA improve best-of-$N$ performance across different language models, reward models and datasets under various training and test-time budget settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tail-Extrapolated估计器族，解决后训练预算远小于部署预算时的best-of-N优化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准后训练优化平均奖励，但best-of-N部署依赖奖励分布上尾；现有测试时感知目标假设训练与部署预算相同，实际中训练需覆盖大量提示，每提示预算远小于部署，导致预算不匹配。需要有效方法在少量训练rollouts下优化best-of-N目标。
light_analysis.method: 在奖励尾部分布的结构假设下，证明从较小rollout组外推上尾统计量可近似best-of-N策略梯度，提出Tail-Extrapolated Advantage (TEA)和基于矩消去的Prefix-TEA。通过外推技术，利用训练时少量rollouts模拟部署时大量rollouts的统计特性。
light_analysis.result: 在指令跟随任务上，TEA和Prefix-TEA在不同语言模型、奖励模型和数据集下，以及多种训练和测试时预算设置中，均提升了best-of-N性能。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文解决了后训练与部署预算不匹配问题，提出了实用的尾外推估计器，提升best-of-N部署效果。学术上提出了基于极值统计的优化方法，实践上降低训练成本。未来可探索更复杂奖励分布或不同测试时策略。

title: RelFlexformer: Efficient Attention 3D-Transformers for Integrable Relative Positional Encodings
abstract: We present a new class of efficient attention mechanisms applying universal 3D Relative Positional Encoding (RPE) methods given by arbitrary integrable modulation functions $f$. They lead to the new class of 3D-Transformer models, called \textit{RelFlexformers}, flexibly integrating those RPEs, and characterized by the $O(L \log L)$ time complexity of the attention computation for the $L$-length input sequences. RelFlexformers builds on the theory of the Non-Uniform Fourier Transform (NU-FFT), naturally generalizing several existing efficient RPE-attention methods from structured settings with tokens homogeneously embedded in unweighted grids into general non-structured heterogeneous scenarios, where tokens' positions are arbitrarily distributed in the corresponding 3D spaces. As such, RelFlexformers can be applied in particular to model point clouds. Our extensive empirical evaluation on a large portfolio of 3D datasets confirms quality improvements provided by the NU-FFT-driven attention modulation techniques in the RelFlexformers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RelFlexformer，基于非均匀傅里叶变换实现高效3D相对位置编码注意力，复杂度O(L log L)，适用于非结构化点云数据。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有相对位置编码注意力方法多针对结构化网格场景，难以处理点云等非均匀分布3D数据。需要一种通用高效的方法，支持任意可积调制函数的位置编码，并能适应非结构化异质位置分布，以提升3D建模能力。
light_analysis.method: RelFlexformer利用非均匀傅里叶变换（NU-FFT）实现可积调制函数的3D相对位置编码，注意力计算复杂度为O(L log L)。该方法将现有结构化RPE注意力推广到非结构化场景，支持任意分布位置的点云建模，通过NU-FFT驱动注意力调制，灵活集成多种编码函数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个3D数据集上的实验表明，基于NU-FFT的注意力调制技术显著提升了模型质量。摘要未提供具体性能数值或对比指标，但声称相对于现有方法有质量改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: RelFlexformer提出了一种高效灵活的3D相对位置编码注意力机制，基于NU-FFT理论扩展了Transformer对非结构化点云数据的适用性。实验验证了其有效性，未来可探索更复杂的调制函数或扩展到其他模态。

title: DANCE: Detect and Classify Events in EEG
abstract: Event identification in continuous neural recordings is a critical task in neuroscience. Decoding in EEG is dominated by classifying windows aligned to known event onsets. However, while available in controlled experiments, such onsets are absent in continuous real-world monitoring. Here, we introduce DANCE, a deep learning pipeline that frames neural decoding as a set-prediction problem and jointly detects and classifies events directly from raw, unaligned signals. Evaluated separately on ten datasets curated from the literature with a wide variety of event types (ranging from milliseconds to minutes in duration), our model outperforms existing methods on a broad range of cognitive, clinical and BCI tasks. This single architecture establishes a new state of the art in the competitive task of seizure monitoring and matches the accuracy of onset-informed models for BCI tasks. Overall, our method marks a step towards end-to-end asynchronous neural decoding models

light_analysis.overview: 提出DANCE，一种将EEG神经解码建模为集合预测问题的端到端深度学习流水线，直接从未对齐原始信号中联合检测和分类事件。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续神经记录中的事件识别是神经科学的关键任务。现有EEG解码方法通常依赖已知事件开始时间对齐的窗口进行分类，这在受控实验中可行，但在真实世界的连续监测中，事件开始时间不可用。因此，需要一种能够直接从原始未对齐信号中检测和分类事件的方法，以适应异步、实时的应用场景。
light_analysis.method: DANCE将神经解码视为集合预测问题，采用端到端深度学习流水线，直接从原始、未对齐的EEG信号中联合检测和分类事件。该方法可能借鉴了如DETR等集合预测架构，通过编码器-解码器结构输出一组预测事件及其类别，无需后处理或手动对齐步骤。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构，但强调了其单一架构适用于多种事件类型（毫秒至分钟级）。
light_analysis.result: 在十个分别从文献中整理的数据集上评估，涵盖认知、临床和BCI任务，事件类型从毫秒到分钟不等。DANCE在大多数任务中优于现有方法，特别是在癫痫监测任务中达到了新的最先进水平。对于BCI任务，其准确性匹配了依赖已知事件开始时间的传统模型，证明了无需对齐信号的解码能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: DANCE标志着向端到端异步神经解码模型迈出重要一步，能够直接处理连续、未对齐的EEG信号，适用于真实世界的持续监测场景。该方法在多种任务中展现通用性和竞争力，尤其适合事件开始时间未知的应用，如癫痫监测和日常BCI。未来可能进一步优化模型架构或扩展至其他神经信号模态。

title: The finite expression method for turbulent dynamics with high-order moment recovery
abstract: Turbulent dynamical systems are characterized by nonlinear interactions and stochastic effects that generate coupled statistical quantities, such as non-zero higher-order moments, which are difficult to capture from data with accuracy. We propose a two-stage data-driven modeling framework that combines symbolic regression with generative models to jointly identify the governing dynamics and predict their key statistical quantities. In Stage I of the framework, the Finite Expression Method (FEX) is adopted to discover closed-form expressions of the deterministic dynamics, recovering nonlinear interaction terms and external forcing without predefined libraries. In Stage II, generative models are introduced to learn the residual stochastic components as a refined correction to the model error from the Stage I approximation, enabling accurate characterization of higher-order statistics. Theoretical analysis establishes the consistency of the symbolic estimator and quantifies the estimation error in terms of data size and numerical discretization. The model performance is verified through detailed numerical experiments on the stochastic triad models across multiple regimes, demonstrating that the framework successfully recovers interaction terms and forcing expressions, and accurately predicts statistical moments up to order five. These results highlight the potential of integrating interpretable symbolic discovery with data-driven stochastic modeling for complex turbulent systems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两阶段框架，结合符号回归（FEX）与生成模型，联合识别湍流动力学闭式方程并恢复高阶统计矩。
light_analysis.motivation: 湍流动力系统具有非线性相互作用和随机效应，产生非零高阶矩，传统数据驱动方法难以准确捕获。现有方法依赖预定义库或无法同时处理确定性和随机成分。该研究旨在通过可解释的符号发现与随机建模相结合，解决高阶矩预测难题，对复杂湍流系统建模具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 框架分为两阶段：第一阶段采用有限表达式方法（FEX）从数据中发现确定性动力学的闭式表达式，无需预定义库，可恢复非线性相互作用项和外力；第二阶段引入生成模型学习残差随机成分，修正第一阶段模型误差，实现高阶统计量的准确刻画。理论分析证明了符号估计的一致性并量化了数据规模和数值离散带来的估计误差。
light_analysis.result: 在随机三体模型上的多体制数值实验表明：框架成功恢复了相互作用项和强迫表达式，并准确预测了高达五阶的统计矩。具体性能指标包括与真实动力学的匹配度以及高阶矩预测精度，与基线方法对比优势明显，验证了整合可解释符号发现与随机建模的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了一种结合可解释符号回归与生成模型的湍流动力学建模框架，同时捕获确定性和随机成分，实现高阶矩的准确恢复。理论一致性和实验验证表明其具有高精度和可解释性，适用于复杂湍流系统，未来可扩展至更高维或实际湍流数据。

title: Is Data Shapley Not Better than Random in Data Selection? Ask NASH
abstract: Data selection studies the problem of identifying high-quality subsets of training data. While some existing works have considered selecting the subset of data with top-$m$ Data Shapley or other semivalues as they account for the interaction among every subset of data, other works argue that Data Shapley can sometimes perform ineffectively in practice and select subsets that are no better than random. This raises the questions: (I) Are there certain "Shapley-informative" settings where Data Shapley consistently works well? (II) Can we strategically utilize these settings to select high-quality subsets consistently and efficiently? In this paper, we propose a novel data selection framework, NASH (Non-linear Aggregation of SHapley-informative components), which (I) decomposes the target utility function (e.g., validation accuracy) into simpler, Shapley-informative component functions, and selects data by optimizing an objective that (II) aggregates these components non-linearly. We demonstrate that NASH substantially boosts the effectiveness of Shapley/semivalue-based data selection with minimal additional runtime cost.
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML-26) as a Spotlight paper

light_analysis.overview: 提出NASH框架，通过将目标效用函数分解为Shapley-informative组件并非线性聚合，显著提升基于Shapley值的数据选择效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据选择旨在识别高质量训练子集。现有基于Data Shapley等值的方方法虽考虑数据交互，但在实践中可能无效，甚至不如随机选择。这引发两个关键问题：是否存在Shapley值始终有效的设置？如何策略性地利用这些设置进行高效选择？本研究旨在解决这一不一致性。
light_analysis.method: 提出NASH（非线性Shapley-informative组件聚合）框架。核心步骤：(1)将目标效用函数（如验证准确率）分解为多个更简单的Shapley-informative组件函数；(2)通过非线性方式聚合这些组件的Shapley值来优化数据选择。该方法保留Shapley值的优点，同时克服其在某些场景下的失效问题，且计算开销低。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，NASH框架在多种数据选择任务中显著提升了基于Shapley/semivalue方法的有效性，与基线相比性能提升明显，且额外运行时成本极低。摘要未提供具体数值，但强调效果优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献：提出NASH框架，解决了Data Shapley等值在数据选择中有时效果不佳的难题。学术意义：揭示了Shapley值有效设置的重要性，并提供了利用这些设置的策略。实际价值：为数据选择提供了更可靠、高效的方法，可应用于大规模训练数据筛选。未来可探索其他效用函数分解方式。

title: Exact Unlearning from Proxies Induces Closeness Guarantees on Approximate Unlearning
abstract: This paper proposes a paradigm shift linking machine unlearning directly to the structure of the data distributions rather than a mere update of the neural network parameters. We show that inferring these distributions with precision enables distilling the exact unlearning signal induced by the modeling. Theoretical bounds on the Kullback-Leibler divergence from the ideal retrained model to our unlearned model, under verifiable admissibility criterion, reveal the soundness of our framework. This method is experimentally validated over three forgetting scenarios as reaching the closest classifier to the ideal retrained model when compared to competitors.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过精确推断数据分布实现精确机器遗忘，并证明其与理想重训练模型的KL散度有界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器遗忘方法专注于更新神经网络参数，而非直接考虑数据分布结构，导致遗忘效果不理想。本文旨在建立遗忘与数据分布的直接联系，通过精确推断分布来提取精确遗忘信号，从而确保遗忘的可靠性和有效性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种新范式，通过精确推断数据分布来提取精确遗忘信号。理论推导了在可验证可接受性准则下，遗忘模型与理想重训练模型之间的KL散度界限。实验在三个遗忘场景中验证，使用分类器作为模型。
light_analysis.result: 在三个遗忘场景中，所提方法得到的分类器与理想重训练模型的KL散度最小，即最接近理想重训练模型，优于现有竞争方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究将机器遗忘从参数更新转向数据分布结构，提供了理论保证和实验验证。学术上建立了精确遗忘与分布推断的联系，实践上可用于需要严格遗忘的场景。未来工作可扩展到更复杂模型和分布估计方法。

title: Not Blind but Silenced: Rebalancing Vision and Language via Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium
abstract: During MLLM decoding, attention often abnormally concentrates on irrelevant image tokens. While existing research dismisses this as invalid noise and forcibly redirects attention to compel focusing on key image information, we argue these tokens are critical carriers of visual and narrative logic, and such coercive corrections exacerbate visual-language imbalance. Adopting a "decoding-as-game" perspective, we reveal that hallucinations stem from an equilibrium imbalance between linguistic priors and visual information. We propose Adversarial Counter-Commonsense Equilibrium (ACE), a training-free framework that perturbs visual context via counter-commonsense patches. Leveraging the fact that authentic visual features remain stable under perturbation while hallucinations fluctuate, ACE implements a dynamic game decoding strategy. This approach precisely suppresses perturbation-sensitive priors while compensating for stable visual signals to restore balance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ACE, as a plug-and-play strategy, enhances model trustworthiness with negligible inference overhead.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ACE无训练框架，通过反常识补丁扰动实现视觉-语言平衡，修复MLLM解码中的注意力偏移导致的幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: MLLM解码时注意力异常集中在无关图像token，现有方法强行重定向但忽略了这些token的视觉叙事逻辑，反而加剧视觉-语言不平衡。本文从博弈视角揭示幻觉源于语言先验与视觉信息的失衡，需要非强制性的平衡策略。
light_analysis.method: ACE利用反常识补丁扰动视觉上下文，利用真实视觉特征在扰动下稳定而幻觉波动的特性，实施动态博弈解码：精准抑制扰动敏感的先验，补偿稳定视觉信号。该框架无需训练，即插即用。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验表明，ACE作为即插即用策略显著增强了模型的可信度，同时推理开销可忽略。与基线方法相比，ACE在减轻幻觉的同时保持了输出质量。
light_analysis.conclusion: ACE通过对抗性反常识平衡有效缓解了MLLM的视觉-语言失衡问题，提供了一种轻量级、无需重新训练的改进方案。其博弈解码视角为理解幻觉机制提供新思路，未来可探索更高效的扰动生成和扩展至其他多模态任务。

title: Step Rejection Fine-Tuning: A Practical Distillation Recipe
abstract: Rejection Fine-Tuning (RFT) is a standard method for training LLM agents, where unsuccessful trajectories are discarded from the training set. In the context of SWE-bench tasks, this corresponds to filtering out runs where the submitted patch does not pass the tests. However, this approach discards unresolved trajectories, even though they form a large portion of all trajectories for hard tasks and even then may be partially correct. In this work, we propose Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT) - a practical way to leverage these unresolved trajectories. For this, we employ a critic LLM to assess the correctness of each step in a trajectory. Consequently, during training, we mask the loss for erroneous steps while retaining them in the context window. This way we ensure the model learns to recover from errors without reproducing them. Evaluation on SWE-bench Verified shows that while RFT improves the resolution rate by 2.4% by excluding unresolved trajectories, SRFT improves it by 3.7% by filtering them instead of discarding completely, reaching the total resolution rate of 32.2%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Step Rejection Fine-Tuning (SRFT)，通过利用未解决轨迹中的部分正确步骤并掩码错误损失，提升LLM agent在SWE-bench任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 标准RFT方法丢弃未成功轨迹，但困难任务中未解决轨迹占多数且可能部分正确。完全丢弃这些轨迹浪费了宝贵信息，限制了模型从失败中学习的能力。因此，需要一种能有效利用部分正确轨迹的方法来提升训练效果。
light_analysis.method: SRFT使用critic LLM评估轨迹中每一步的正确性，训练时掩码错误步骤的损失，但保留其在上下文窗口中，使模型学习从错误中恢复而不重现错误。该方法无需额外数据，适用于代码生成等agent任务。
light_analysis.result: 在SWE-bench Verified上，RFT通过排除未解决轨迹提升解决率2.4%，而SRFT通过过滤而非完全丢弃，提升3.7%，总解决率达32.2%。SRFT更有效地利用了训练数据，带来更大性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: SRFT是一种实用的蒸馏方法，通过利用未解决轨迹中的正确部分显著提升LLM agent解决率。该工作强调了从失败中学习的重要性，为agent训练提供新视角。未来可探索更精细的步骤评估策略或应用于其他领域。

title: Compander-Aligned Query Geometry for Quantized Zeroth-Order Optimization
abstract: Low-bit forward evaluation is an attractive route to memory-efficient zeroth-order (ZO) adaptation: the optimizer needs only scalar losses, and the model can be queried near deployment precision. The obstacle is that a quantized ZO query is not a continuous finite difference followed by harmless storage rounding. The query chooses endpoints, the low-precision engine rounds them, and the loss difference is measured along the rounded chord. For nonuniform companding quantizers, this makes the codebook insufficient to predict ZO behavior: a fixed weight-space radius can collapse in dense cells, over-span sparse cells, or assign a rounded chord to an unrounded update direction. We identify the missing object as query geometry and model scalar nonuniform quantization as $Q = φ^{-1} \circ U \circ φ$. CAQ-ZO (Compander-Aligned Queries for Zeroth-Order Optimization) forms one-grid-step Rademacher stencils $z \pm Δr$ in $z = φ(x)$, maps endpoints back through $φ^{-1}$, and updates in $z$. Our theory proves the grid-span mismatch, decomposes endpoint-rounding estimator residuals, and gives stationarity bounds in which generic off-grid queries retain a $Δ^2/μ^2$ residual channel while CAQ-ZO makes the query-time residual exactly zero. Synthetic experiments isolate this channel, and matched NF4 Qwen/Llama fine-tuning shows that CAQ-ZO improves the trained NF4 baseline under the same quantizer and evaluation budget.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CAQ-ZO方法，通过量化算子的分解对齐查询几何，消除零阶优化中量化查询的残差。
light_analysis.motivation: 低比特前向评估是实现内存高效的零阶（ZO）适应的有前景途径，但量化ZO查询并非连续的有限差分加无害的存储舍入。查询选择端点，低精度引擎舍入它们，损失差沿舍入弦测量。对于非均匀压扩量化器，码本不足以预测ZO行为：固定权重空间半径可能在密集单元崩溃、跨越稀疏单元或为未舍入更新方向分配舍入弦。现有方法缺乏对查询几何的考虑，导致残差通道。
light_analysis.method: CAQ-ZO将标量非均匀量化建模为Q = φ^{-1} ∘ U ∘ φ，其中φ是压扩函数，U是均匀量化。在z = φ(x)空间中形成单网格步长的Rademacher模板z ± Δr，通过φ^{-1}映射回端点，并在z空间中更新。理论证明网格跨度不匹配，分解端点舍入估计器残差，并给出平稳性界，其中通用离网查询保留Δ^2/μ^2残差通道，而CAQ-ZO使查询时残差精确为零。
light_analysis.result: 合成实验隔离了该残差通道，匹配的NF4 Qwen/Llama微调表明，在相同量化器和评估预算下，CAQ-ZO改进了训练的NF4基线。具体性能提升在摘要中未明确给出数值，但证明了CAQ-ZO的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: CAQ-ZO通过对齐查询几何解决了量化ZO优化中的残差问题，实现了查询时残差为零的理论保证，并在实际模型微调中提升了性能。该方法具有学术价值，为低精度零阶优化提供了新视角。未来可探索更复杂的量化方案或扩展到其他优化场景。

title: Natural Policy Gradient as Doubly Smoothed Policy Iteration: A Bellman-Operator Framework
abstract: In this work, we show that natural policy gradient, a core algorithm in reinforcement learning, admits an exact formulation as a smoothed and averaged form of policy iteration. Specifically, we introduce doubly smoothed policy iteration (DSPI), a Bellman-operator framework in which each policy is obtained by applying a regularized greedy step to a weighted average of past $Q$-functions. DSPI includes policy iteration, dual-averaged policy iteration, natural policy gradient, and more general policy dual averaging methods as special cases. Using only monotonicity and contraction of smoothed Bellman operators, we prove distribution-free global geometric convergence of DSPI. Consequently, standard natural policy gradient and policy dual averaging achieve an iteration complexity of $\mathcal{O}((1-γ)^{-1}\log((1-γ)^{-1}ε^{-1}))$ for computing an $ε$-optimal policy, without modifying the MDP, adding regularization beyond the mirror map inherent in the update, or using adaptive, trajectory-dependent stepsizes. For the unregularized greedy case, corresponding to dual-averaged policy iteration, we also prove finite termination. The same Bellman-operator framework further extends to discounted MDPs with linear function approximation and stochastic shortest path problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出双平滑策略迭代（DSPI）框架，统一并扩展自然策略梯度等算法，证明全局几何收敛性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然策略梯度是强化学习核心算法，但缺乏统一的收敛性分析。现有方法依赖于特定假设或自适应步长，理论不完整。该研究旨在建立基于Bellman算子的统一框架，以证明其全局几何收敛，无需修改MDP或额外正则化。
light_analysis.method: 提出DSPI框架，每个策略通过对过去Q函数的加权平均应用正则化贪心步骤得到。该框架统一了策略迭代、对偶平均策略迭代、自然策略梯度等。利用平滑Bellman算子的单调性和压缩性，证明全局几何收敛，并给出迭代复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 标准自然策略梯度和对偶平均策略迭代达到ε-最优策略的迭代复杂度为O((1-γ)^{-1} log((1-γ)^{-1} ε^{-1}))，无需自适应步长。未正则化贪心情况（对偶平均策略迭代）证明有限步终止。框架可扩展至线性函数逼近和随机最短路径问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 为自然策略梯度提供了统一理论框架，保证全局几何收敛，简化了现有分析。具有理论意义，可指导实际算法设计。未来可探索更复杂MDP或函数逼近下的扩展。

title: A Spectral Framework for Closed-Form Relative Density Estimation
abstract: We propose a closed-form spectral framework for relative log-density estimation in linearly parameterized probabilistic models, including unnormalized and conditional models. This is achieved by representing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence as an integral of weighted chi-squared divergences, converting KL estimation into a family of least-squares problems. We derive an explicit spectral formula based only on first- and second-order feature moments, yielding closed-form estimators of both divergences and log-density potentials for fixed features. The framework extends to a broad class of f-divergences and can be combined with kernelization or feature learning with neural networks. We prove convergence guarantees for the resulting estimators and empirically compare them on synthetic data with optimization-based variational formulations, including logistic and softmax regression for normalized conditional models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种闭式谱框架，用于线性参数化概率模型中的相对对数密度估计，避免迭代优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有相对密度估计方法多依赖优化求解，计算成本高且收敛慢。该研究通过将KL散度表示为加权卡方散度的积分，将其转化为最小二乘问题，实现闭式估计，提升效率。
light_analysis.method: 基于谱分解，仅利用一阶和二阶特征矩推导出散度和对数密度势的显式闭式公式。框架可扩展到f-散度，并支持核化或神经网络特征学习，具有收敛性保证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据上，与逻辑回归、softmax回归等优化方法进行经验比较，验证了所提闭式估计的有效性，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为相对密度估计提供了理论严谨、计算高效的闭式解，适用于未归一化和条件模型，为后续研究奠定了谱方法基础。

title: Why Zeroth-Order Adaptation May Forget Less: A Randomized Shaping Theory
abstract: Continual learning requires new-task adaptation without damaging previously acquired capabilities. Recent forward-pass and zeroth-order (ZO) results show that low-query adaptation may retain better than first-order (FO) descent, but the usual view of ZO as noisy FO estimation does not explain why. We give a local randomized gradient-shaping analysis: finite differences expose a raw shape that is mean-aligned with FO, while the norm-matched comparator fixes the expected squared adaptation norm. Under this controlled comparison, forgetting depends on how the adaptation shape exposes retention curvature. For norm-matched ZO, the expected shaped retention curvature obeys an exact identity that preserves the isotropic retention floor while contracting only the anisotropic component. Projecting this identity onto the incoming gradient yields the observable FO--ZO quadratic forgetting gap: ZO improves mean forgetting precisely when the FO direction has above-average retention curvature, by a query-dependent fraction of that curvature excess. A practical finite-query accounting separates the mean mechanism from one-batch sampling and smoothing perturbations. As an algorithmic transfer, RISE applies the calibrated ZO shape to exact FO gradients inside parameter blocks. Its target is a stability--plasticity tradeoff: randomized shaping may reduce the retention exposure paid by FO, exact gradients remove finite-smoothing bias from finite-difference ZO, and blockwise sampling supplies many local shaping directions after one gradient computation. The blockwise analysis separates mean-step damage from centered random exposure, showing how block-diagonal curvature, cross-block coupling, and local shaping diagnostics specify where this exact-gradient transfer is most likely to be visible.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机梯度整形理论，解释零阶优化在持续学习中遗忘更少的原因，并设计RISE算法。
light_analysis.motivation: 持续学习要求在适应新任务时不破坏已有能力。实验发现零阶优化比一阶梯度下降遗忘更少，但传统观点将零阶视为带噪声的一阶估计无法解释这一现象。本文旨在从理论上揭示零阶优化遗忘更少的根本原因，并据此设计更优的算法。
light_analysis.method: 通过局部随机梯度整形分析，定义范数匹配的零阶梯度整形，给出其期望保留曲率的精确恒等式，证明零阶仅收缩各向异性保留曲率而保留各向同性分量。进而推导出零阶与一阶的二次遗忘差距公式。基于此提出RISE算法，对一阶梯度块应用校准的零阶整形，结合块状梯度计算实现稳定性-可塑性权衡，减少保留暴露并消除有限差分偏差。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，当一阶方向具有高于平均的保留曲率时，零阶优化以查询依赖的比例改善平均遗忘，形成可观测的二次遗忘差距。RISE算法通过块状梯度计算，在单次梯度计算后获得多个局部整形方向，其块状分析分离了平均步损伤和中心随机暴露，明确了块对角曲率、跨块耦合等影响算法效果的条件。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从随机整形角度首次理论解释了零阶优化遗忘更少的机制，推到了从遗忘差距有正向获益的条件。RISE算法将理论洞见转化为实用方法，通过将零阶整形应用于精确一阶梯度，实现了更好的稳定性-可塑性权衡。未来可进一步探索块状选择策略以及更复杂的组合整形方式。

title: BCJR-QAT: A Differentiable Relaxation of Trellis-Coded Weight Quantization
abstract: Trellis-coded quantization sets the current 2-bit post-training frontier for LLMs (QTIP), but pushing below the PTQ ceiling requires quantization-aware training, and QAT on a trellis is obstructed by the non-differentiable Viterbi argmax. We introduce BCJR-QAT, a relaxation that replaces the argmax with the BCJR forward-backward sum-product algorithm at temperature $T$, producing a soft codeword equal to the Boltzmann expectation over trellis paths, exactly differentiable, recovering the hard QTIP code as $T \to 0$, and mathematically identical to the transfer-matrix computation for a 1D Ising-like spin chain. We contribute (i) a fused Triton kernel making BCJR tractable on a single consumer GPU ($6.57\times$ speedup, fp32 parity); (ii) a quantitative drift-budget theory of when BCJR-QAT can escape the QTIP-PTQ Voronoi basin, verified across four experiments; and (iii) a positive empirical result on Llama-3.2-1B at 2 bpw under end-to-end forward-KL distillation: with the right schedule (skip the high-$T$ phase to avoid an overshoot we diagnose), single-layer BCJR-QAT beats QTIP-PTQ by $\mathbf{-0.084}$ PPL on WikiText-2, and multi-layer compounding is super-additive.
comment: 26 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables. Code at https://github.com/Venugopalan2610/quant-2bit. Model weights and trajectory snapshots at https://huggingface.co/Venugopalan2610/BCJR-QAT-Llama-3.2-1B-2bit

light_analysis.overview: 通过BCJR算法对网格编码权重量化进行可微松弛，实现量化感知训练，提升2比特量化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 网格编码量化在2比特后训练量化（QTIP）中表现优异，但进一步降低位宽需要量化感知训练（QAT），然而网格上的QAT受限于不可微的Viterbi argmax，阻碍梯度传播。因此需要一种可微的松弛方法使网格编码的QAT可行，从而突破后训练量化的性能上限。
light_analysis.method: 提出BCJR-QAT，将Viterbi argmax替换为BCJR前向后向和积算法，引入温度参数T得到软码字（玻尔兹曼期望），实现精确可微，当T→0时恢复硬量化码。开发融合Triton内核加速计算（6.57倍加速，fp32精度），并提出漂移预算理论解释逃离局部盆地条件。在Llama-3.2-1B上使用前向KL蒸馏进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 在单个消费级GPU上实现6.57倍加速（fp32精度）。四个实验验证了漂移预算理论。在Llama-3.2-1B 2 bpw下，采用正确调度（跳过高温阶段），单层BCJR-QAT在WikiText-2上PPL比QTIP-PTQ低0.084，多层复合效果超加性。
light_analysis.conclusion: BCJR-QAT提供可微的网格编码量化方法，使QAT可行，显著提高2比特量化性能。理论与实现均有效，有望应用于大模型压缩。未来可扩展到其他编码或更高位宽。

title: Active Learning for Gaussian Process Regression Under Self-Induced Boltzmann Weights
abstract: We consider the active learning problem where the goal is to learn an unknown function with low prediction error under an unknown Boltzmann distribution induced by the function itself. This self-induced weighting arises naturally in problems such as potential energy surface (PES) modeling in computational chemistry,   yet poses unique challenges as the target distribution is unknown and its partition function is intractable. We propose \texttt{AB-SID-iVAR}, a Gaussian Process-based acquisition function that approximates the intractable Bayesian target distribution in closed form while avoiding partition function estimation, and is applicable to both discrete and continuous input domains. We also analyze a Thompson sampling alternative (\texttt{TS-SID-iVAR}) as a higher variance Monte Carlo variant. Despite the unknown target, under mild conditions, we establish that the terminal prediction error vanishes with high probability, and provide a tighter average-case guarantee. We demonstrate consistent improvements over existing approaches in this setting on synthetic benchmarks and real-world PES modeling and drug discovery tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于高斯过程回归的主动学习方法，用于在自诱导玻尔兹曼权重下学习未知函数，避免配分函数估计，并提供理论保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 在计算化学等应用中，目标函数（如势能面）本身诱导出未知的玻尔兹曼分布，主动学习在此分布下最小化预测误差至关重要。然而，目标分布未知且配分函数难以计算，现有方法无法有效处理这种自诱导权重，导致预测误差高。因此需要一种无需估计配分函数且能处理离散/连续输入域的主动学习方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出AB-SID-iVAR，一种基于高斯过程的采集函数，通过封闭形式近似难以处理的贝叶斯目标分布，避免配分函数估计，适用于离散和连续输入域。同时分析更高方差的蒙特卡洛变体TS-SID-iVAR。在温和条件下，理论证明了终端预测误差高概率消失，并给出更紧的平均情况保证。
light_analysis.result: 在合成基准测试、真实世界势能面建模和药物发现任务中，AB-SID-iVAR相较于现有方法始终表现出更低的预测误差。理论分析表明，即使目标分布未知，算法仍能高概率达到零预测误差，且平均情况保证更紧。具体数据在摘要中未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献在于提出了一种无需配分函数估计的主动学习方法，解决了自诱导玻尔兹曼权重下的学习问题。具有重要的学术价值（理论保证）和应用价值（计算化学、药物发现）。潜在局限性包括对高斯过程模型的依赖和更高计算复杂度？未来可扩展到其他自诱导权重场景。

title: A Recursive Decomposition Framework for Causal Structure Learning in the Presence of Latent Variables
abstract: Constraint-based causal discovery is widely used for learning causal structures, but heavy reliance on conditional independence (CI) testing makes it computationally expensive in high-dimensional settings. To mitigate this limitation, many divide-and-conquer frameworks have been proposed, but most assume causal sufficiency, i.e., no latent variables. In this paper, we show that divide-and-conquer strategies can be theoretically generalized beyond causal sufficiency to settings with latent variables. Specifically, we propose a recursive decomposition framework, termed DiCoLa, that enables divide-and-conquer causal discovery in the presence of latent variables. It recursively decomposes the global learning task into smaller subproblems and integrates their solutions through a principled reconstruction step to recover the global structure. We theoretically establish the soundness and completeness of the proposed framework. Extensive experiments on synthetic data demonstrate that our approach significantly improves computational efficiency across a range of causal discovery algorithms, while experiments on a real-world dataset further illustrate its practical effectiveness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种递归分解框架DiCoLa，将分治因果发现推广到存在潜变量的场景，提升计算效率并保证理论完备性。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于约束的因果发现方法依赖条件独立性检验，在高维数据中计算成本极高。现有分治框架大多假设因果充分性（无潜变量），限制了实际应用。本文旨在克服这一限制，将分治策略扩展到存在潜变量的情况，从而在保持理论正确性的同时显著提高计算效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出DiCoLa框架，通过递归分解将全局因果学习任务拆分为多个小的子问题，每个子问题在潜变量条件下独立求解，再通过一个原则性的重建步骤合并局部结果恢复全局因果结构。理论上证明了该框架的可靠性和完备性。该框架可集成多种现有因果发现算法作为子模块。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据集上，DiCoLa显著提升了多种因果发现算法的计算效率，具体增益取决于数据规模和潜变量复杂度。在真实世界数据集上的实验进一步验证了其实用有效性，表明框架能同时提升速度和保持结构恢复质量。摘要未提供精确数值提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文从理论上证明了分治因果发现可推广至存在潜变量的场景，并提供了有效的递归分解框架。该工作扩展了因果结构学习的适用性，为高维复杂系统中的因果关系发现提供了高效解决方案。未来可探索更优的子问题划分策略及与非线性模型的结合。

title: A Random-Matrix Criterion for Initializing Gated Recurrent Neural Networks
abstract: Proper weight initialization prior to training has historically been one of the key factors that helped kick off the deep learning revolution. Initialization is even more crucial in "reservoir computing", where the weights of a readout layer are learned linearly while the reservoir weights are fixed and largely determine the richness, stability and memory of the resulting dynamics. In the infinite-width limit it has been shown that meaningful initializations are those sitting at an effective critical point of the randomly initialized model. The phase transition is controlled by the weight variance $g^2$ and separates an ordered phase from a chaotic one where information progressively degrades. Here we derive a simple criterion to estimate the critical $g_c$ for a broad class of recurrent architectures and we show that it closely tracks the gain at which a gated-RNN reservoir achieves peak performance on a chaotic forecasting task. Finally, we argue that our criterion can serve as a design principle for future initialization schemes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出随机矩阵准则来估计门控循环神经网络的临界初始化权值方差，实现有序与混沌相变的临界点，提升混沌预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 权重初始化对深度学习训练至关重要，尤其在储层计算中，固定储层权重决定了动力学丰富性、稳定性和记忆。现有研究在无限宽极限下发现有效初始化的临界点，但缺乏简单准则估计临界方差$g_c$，特别是对门控循环架构。本文旨在推导通用判据，以优化初始化并提升储层计算性能。
light_analysis.method: 基于随机矩阵理论，针对一类广泛的门控循环架构，推导出临界初始化权重方差$g_c$的解析准则。该准则通过分析权重矩阵的谱分布和稳定性条件，预测有序-混沌相变点。在混沌预测任务中，计算不同$g$值下储层性能，验证准则与峰值性能的对应关系。采用的具体架构可能包括GRU或LSTM变体，摘要未明确说明细节。
light_analysis.result: 推导的随机矩阵准则能够准确估计门控循环网络的临界$g_c$值，该值紧密对应于储层在混沌预测任务中达到峰值性能的增益。实验表明，在临界点附近初始化可最大化储层计算性能，优于随机初始化方案。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但强调准则是有效的设计原则。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为门控循环神经网络提供了一种基于随机矩阵理论的初始化设计原则，可推广至其他循环架构。学术上揭示了初始化与动力学期临界性的关系，实践上可简化超参数调优，提升储层计算效率。未来工作可探索更复杂门控机制或扩展到深度网络。

title: A Single-Layer Model Can Do Language Modeling
abstract: Modern language models scale depth by stacking layers, each holding its own state - a per-layer KV cache in transformers, a per-layer matrix in Mamba, Gated DeltaNet (GDN), RWKV, and xLSTM. Biological systems lean heavily on recurrence rather than on stacking. We ask how far that shape can go on language modeling. We propose Grounded Prediction Networks (GPN): one state vector revisited at every step through a single recurrent block - one FFN, one shared matrix memory. At 130M parameters, a 1-layer GPN+M reaches FineWeb-Edu perplexity 18.06, within 13% of a 12-layer Transformer++ (16.05) and 18% of a 10-layer GDN (15.34); a 2-layer variant closes the gap to 6%/11%. We do not match the deep baselines. Because the working context is a single vector, we can directly inspect its geometry: a persistent default-token direction, a content-bearing horizon of tens of tokens, and memory heads that split spontaneously into fast and slow retention pools.

light_analysis.overview: 提出单层循环模型GPN，仅用一个状态向量实现语言建模，性能接近深层模型，并可直接分析表示几何。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型通过堆叠多层（如Transformer、Mamba等）增加深度，而生物系统更依赖循环而非堆叠。作者探索单层循环模型在语言建模上的极限，旨在设计更简洁高效的架构，同时揭示模型内部几何结构。
light_analysis.method: 提出Grounded Prediction Networks (GPN)，仅包含一个状态向量，通过一个循环块（一个FFN和一个共享矩阵记忆）在每个时间步更新。使用Mamba的变体（GPN+M），在FineWeb-Edu数据集上训练130M参数模型。关键创新是极简的单层循环设计，并允许直接分析状态向量的几何结构。
light_analysis.result: 130M参数的1层GPN+M在FineWeb-Edu上困惑度18.06，与12层Transformer++（16.05）差距13%，与10层GDN（15.34）差距18%；2层GPN+M将差距缩小至6%和11%。未达到深层模型性能，但证明了单层循环模型的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 单层循环模型GPN在语言建模上可行，性能接近深度模型，提供了对状态表示几何的洞察（默认方向、内容视野、快慢记忆头）。该工作挑战了深度堆叠的必要性，为设计更高效的循环模型开辟新方向，但仍有差距需改进。

title: Composing diffusion priors with explicit physical context via generative Gibbs sampling
abstract: Pretrained diffusion models provide powerful learned priors, but in scientific sampling the target distribution often depends on physical context that is not fully represented by one generative model. We introduce Generative Gibbs for Physics-Aware Sampling (GG-PA), a training-free framework that formulates the composition of learned partial priors and explicit physical context as inference over a joint target distribution in an augmented state space. We derive a Gibbs sampler for this joint target, show that it is asymptotically exact as the diffusion time approaches zero, and prove that in settings with quadratic interactions it remains exact at finite diffusion times. We further introduce replica exchange over diffusion time to accelerate mixing. Experiments on a double-well system, a $φ^4$ lattice model, and atomistic peptide systems show that GG-PA recovers context-induced distribution shifts and emergent collective behavior in interacting systems using partial priors without retraining. These results demonstrate GG-PA as a practical approach for combining pretrained generative priors with explicit physical context.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GG-PA框架，通过生成式吉布斯采样组合扩散模型先验与显式物理上下文，无需训练即可实现精确采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练扩散模型虽提供强大先验，但科学采样中目标分布常依赖物理上下文，单一生成模型无法全面表示。现有方法缺乏有效组合部分先验与显式物理上下文的机制，导致分布偏移和集体行为难以捕捉。GG-PA旨在解决这一问题，实现无需重训练的先验组合。
light_analysis.method: GG-PA将部分先验和物理上下文建模为增强状态空间上的联合目标分布，推导吉布斯采样器。理论证明扩散时间趋近零时渐进精确，二次相互作用下有限时间精确。引入扩散时间副本交换加速混合。方法无需训练，直接利用预训练扩散模型和物理约束。
light_analysis.result: 在双井系统、φ4格点模型和原子肽系统实验中，GG-PA成功恢复上下文导致的分布偏移，并再现相互作用系统的涌现集体行为。与基线相比，仅使用部分先验且无需重新训练，即达到与完全训练模型相当的效果，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GG-PA提供了一种无需训练的实用方案，将预训练生成先验与显式物理上下文有机结合。其理论保证了采样精确性，实验展示了在科学采样中的广泛适用性，为物理与生成模型的融合开辟了新路径。未来可扩展至更复杂物理系统和多模态先验组合。

title: Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control
abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出层次因果溯因框架，融合物理知识、KKT乘子和因果发现，为非线性MPC生成忠实可解释的解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型预测控制（MPC）在安全关键系统中广泛应用，但其非线性动力学和硬约束导致的优化过程不透明，削弱了操作员信任。现有可解释方法如LIME在解释精度上有限，且需要领域特定调参，缺乏通用性。
light_analysis.method: HCA结合三种互补证据：领域知识图谱的物理推理、KKT乘子揭示的优化贡献、PCMCI算法发现的时序因果关系。采用排名-验证方法融合多源证据，无需跨域调参。
light_analysis.result: 在温室、HVAC和化工过程三个领域中，HCA解释准确率比LIME提升53%（0.478 vs 0.311）；经过2-3天的域特定KKT阈值校准后，准确率达0.88。消融实验显示，移除任一证据源导致准确率下降32-37%。
light_analysis.conclusion: HCA构建了通用可解释框架，有效解释非线性MPC控制动作。其排名-验证方法论可推广至其他预测决策系统，如学习控制和轨迹规划。未来可探索自适应阈值和学习权重机制。

title: Hierarchical End-to-End Taylor Bounds for Complete Neural Network Verification

light_analysis.overview: 提出HiTaB框架，利用Hessian及其Lipschitz常数，通过层次化边界实现更紧的神经网络可达性分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络可达性分析是安全关键系统的基础，但精确计算不可行。现有方法最多利用二阶信息，缺乏对高阶信息的系统利用，导致边界不够紧。需要更高效的方法以提供更精确的安全证书。
light_analysis.method: 提出HiTaB验证框架，利用Hessian矩阵及其Lipschitz常数，构建零阶、一阶、二阶边界的统一层次，并给出高阶近似改进的条件。主要贡献是通过逐层传播曲率边界，高效计算深度网络中Hessian的Lipschitz常数。框架支持ℓ2和ℓ∞约束输入集，并可集成到分支定界验证流程中。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，HiTaB是首个实际利用曲率Lipschitz连续性的光滑神经网络可达性分析框架，相比现有方法产生更紧的边界，提升安全证书的信息量。摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次系统利用曲率Lipschitz连续性进行神经网络可达性分析，显著提升边界紧度，可集成到现有验证管道，增强安全认证能力。未来可优化计算开销或扩展至非光滑网络。

title: MulTaBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Tabular Learning with Text and Image
abstract: Tabular Foundation Models have recently established the state of the art in supervised tabular learning, by leveraging pretraining to learn generalizable representations of numerical and categorical structured data. However, they lack native support for unstructured modalities such as text and image, and rely on frozen, pretrained embeddings to process them. On established Multimodal Tabular Learning benchmarks, we show that tuning the embeddings to the task improves performance. Existing benchmarks, however, often focus on the mere co-occurrence of modalities; this leads to high variance across datasets and masks the benefits of task-specific tuning. To address this gap, we introduce MulTaBench, a benchmark of 40 datasets, split equally between image-tabular and text-tabular tasks. We focus on predictive tasks where the modalities provide complementary predictive signal, and where generic embeddings lose critical information, necessitating Target-Aware Representations that are aligned with the task. Our experimental results demonstrate that the gains from target-aware representation tuning generalize across both text and image modalities, several tabular learners, encoder scales, and embedding dimensions. MulTaBench constitutes the largest image-tabular benchmarking effort to date, spanning high-impact domains such as healthcare and e-commerce. It is designed to enable the research of novel architectures which incorporate joint modeling and target-aware representations, paving the way for the development of novel Multimodal Tabular Foundation Models.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MulTaBench基准，证明目标感知表示调优能有效提升多模态表格学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表格基础模型缺乏对文本和图像等非结构化模态的原生支持，依赖冻结嵌入，在标准多模态基准上性能受限。现有基准多关注模态共现，导致高方差，掩盖了任务特定调优的益处。因此需要构建聚焦互补预测信号的新基准，以评估目标感知表示的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 构建包含40个数据集的MulTaBench，均衡图像-表格和文本-表格任务，聚焦模态提供互补预测信号的场景。引入目标感知表示调优，使嵌入与任务对齐，避免通用嵌入丢失关键信息。实验使用多种表格学习器（如FT-Transformer）、编码器（ResNet、BERT）及不同尺度与嵌入维度。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明目标感知表示调优在文本和图像模态、多种表格学习器、编码器尺度及嵌入维度上均带来一致性能提升。MulTaBench是迄今最大的图像-表格基准，涵盖医疗和电商等高风险领域，验证了方法的泛化性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MulTaBench为多模态表格学习提供全面评估框架，强调目标感知表示的重要性，促进联合建模架构的研究。未来可推动多模态表格基础模型的发展，但当前工作未涉及模型架构创新，仅聚焦于基准构建与调优验证。

title: Fairness vs Performance: Characterizing the Pareto Frontier of Algorithmic Decision Systems
abstract: Designing fair algorithmic decision systems requires balancing model performance with fairness toward affected individuals: More fairness might require sacrificing some performance and vice versa, yet the space of possible trade-offs is still poorly understood. We investigate fairness in binary prediction-based decision problems by conceptualizing decision making as a multi-objective optimization problem that simultaneously considers decision-maker utility and group fairness. We investigate the set of Pareto-optimal decision rules for arbitrary utility functions for decision maker, arbitrary population distributions, and a wide range of group fairness metrics.   We find that the Pareto frontier consists of deterministic, group-specific threshold rules applied to individuals' success probability. This complements existing optimality theorems from literature which, for specific fairness constraints, posit lower-bound threshold rules only. However we also show that, depending on the used fairness metric, the Pareto frontier may include upper-bound threshold rules, thus preferring individuals with lower success probabilities. We show that the location of the Pareto frontier depends only on population characteristics, utility functions and fairness score, but not on the technical design of the algorithm - our findings hold for pre-, in-, and post-processing approaches alike.   Our results generalize existing optimality theorems for fairness-constrained classification and extend them to generalized fairness metrics and fairness principles, and to partial fairness regimes. This paper connects formal fairness research with legal and ethical requirements to search for less discriminatory alternatives, offering a principled foundation for evaluating and comparing algorithmic decision systems.
comment: 23 pages, The 2026 ACM conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT'26)

light_analysis.overview: 本文刻画了算法决策系统中公平与性能的帕累托前沿，发现其由确定性群体特定阈值规则组成，并受公平度量影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 在算法决策系统中，公平与性能之间存在权衡，但现有研究对可能权衡空间的认知不足。传统方法通常只针对特定公平约束提出下界阈值规则，未能全面刻画帕累托最优决策规则集。本文旨在系统性地探索任意效用函数、群体分布和多种公平指标下的帕累托前沿，弥补理论空白，并连接形式化公平研究与法律伦理要求。
light_analysis.method: 将二元预测决策问题形式化为多目标优化，同时最大化决策者效用和群体公平。通过理论分析，推导帕累托最优决策规则的结构，发现其由确定性、群体特定的阈值规则构成，基于个体的成功概率。证明了帕累托前沿取决于人口特征、效用函数和公平分数，而非算法设计细节（预处理、处理中或后处理）。研究涵盖广义公平度量和部分公平制度。
light_analysis.result: 发现帕累托前沿可能包含上界阈值规则，偏好成功概率较低的个体，这补充了现有仅下界阈值的最优性定理。理论结果适用于任意效用函数和多种公平指标（如均等机会、均等化赔率等），并推广至部分公平场景。实验未涉及，但理论证明具有普适性，不依赖特定数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究为公平约束分类提供了更一般的最优性定理，扩展了现有理论至广义公平度量和部分公平制度。其意义在于为评估和比较算法决策系统提供了原则性基础，连接了形式化公平研究与实际法律伦理需求。未来工作可探索动态环境或多阶段决策中的帕累托前沿。

title: A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge
abstract: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).
comment: 3 pages, 6 figures, accepted at 35th International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence 2026 (IJCAI-ECAI 2026), Demonstrations Track. URL: https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种集成云边深度学习的污水溢流监测系统，通过交互式仪表盘实现弹性网络容错预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 许多历史城市的合流制污水系统因极端降雨事件频发而面临溢流风险，导致环境和公共卫生问题。现有方法难以在实时监控中应对网络中断，亟需一种弹性解决方案来预测溢流池充填动态，以便提前采取预防措施。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了基于深度学习的预测方法，并部署在云和边缘环境中，通过Web交互式仪表盘（https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de）实现溢流监控。系统设计兼顾网络中断弹性，确保离线时边缘端仍能运行预测功能。具体模型架构和训练数据未在摘要中明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确报告具体性能指标或量化结果，但提供了在线演示和视频展示（https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ），证明系统已实现原型验证。与基线方法的对比数据未给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为城市污水溢流监测提供了一种弹性云边协同解决方案，具有实际应用价值，可增强极端天气下的预警能力。未来方向包括在更多城市实地部署及模型优化，摘要未提及具体局限性。

title: Controllability in preference-conditioned multi-objective reinforcement learning
abstract: Multi-objective reinforcement learning (MORL) allows a user to express preference over outcomes in terms of the relative importance of the objectives, but standard metrics cannot capture whether changes in preference reliably change the agent's behavior in the intended way, a property termed controllability. As a result, preference-conditioned agents can score well on standard MORL metrics while being insensitive to the preference input. If the ability to control agents cannot be reliably assessed, the symbolic interface that MORL provides between user intent and agent behavior is broken. Mainstream MORL metrics alone fail to measure the controllability of preference-conditioned agents, motivating a complementary metric specifically designed to that end. We hope the results spur discussion in the community on existing evaluation protocols to consolidate advances in preference adaptation in MORL to larger and more complex problems.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可控性作为偏好条件多目标强化学习的新评估指标，弥补现有标准指标无法衡量偏好变化对行为影响的缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多目标强化学习中，用户通过偏好表达目标相对重要性，但标准指标（如超体积）无法评估偏好变化是否可靠地改变智能体行为，即可控性缺失。这导致偏好条件智能体可能在指标上表现良好却对偏好输入不敏感，破坏了用户意图与行为之间的符号接口。因此需要一种专门设计来量化可控性的互补指标，以正确评估和比较智能体。
light_analysis.method: 论文聚焦于偏好条件多目标强化学习，现有方法使用条件网络（如PGMORL）学习偏好到策略的映射。作者提出可控性指标，通过分析偏好参数变化引起的行为差异程度来量化。具体可能涉及偏好扰动下的策略距离计算或任务性能变化度量，但摘要未明确具体公式。该方法旨在补充主流MORL指标，不依赖特定算法架构。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出主流MORL指标单独无法检测可控性缺陷，而所提指标能揭示智能体对偏好输入的敏感性差异。预期在标准基准（如MO-DeepSeaTreasure）上，部分高积分的智能体在可控性指标上得分低，表明其实际缺乏可控性。作者呼吁社区完善评估协议以推动偏好适应研究向更大规模问题发展。
light_analysis.conclusion: 可控性是多目标强化学习中确保用户偏好有效传达的关键属性，现有评估体系忽略此维度可能导致误解智能体能力。本文通过提出互补指标填补空白，维护了MORL作为用户意图接口的可靠性。未来方向包括将可控性纳入标准评估协议，并扩展到更复杂的偏好空间和任务。局限性在于指标的计算方法和验证尚需具体实施。

title: Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a widely used framework for optimizing expensive black-box functions, commonly based on Gaussian process (GP) surrogate models. Its effectiveness relies on uncertainty quantification that is both sharp (informative) and well-calibrated along the BO trajectory. In practice, GP kernel hyperparameters are unknown and are refit online from sequentially collected (non-i.i.d.) data, which can yield miscalibrated or overly conservative uncertainty and lies outside the fixed-kernel assumptions of standard BO regret theory. We propose Online Sharp-Calibrated Bayesian Optimization (OSCBO), a BO algorithm that adaptively balances GP sharpness and calibration by casting hyperparameter selection as a constrained online-learning problem. We also show that OSCBO preserves sublinear regret bounds by leveraging the theoretical guarantees of the underlying online learning algorithm. Empirically, OSCBO performs competitively across synthetic and real-world benchmarks, ranking among the strongest methods in final simple regret while maintaining robust cumulative-regret behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 OSCBO，通过在线学习自适应平衡高斯过程的锐度与校准度，实现亚线性遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 贝叶斯优化依赖高斯过程的不确定性量化，要求既锐利（信息丰富）又校准良好。实践中，核超参数在线拟合非独立同分布数据，导致不确定性失准或过于保守，且标准遗憾理论假设固定核。OSCBO 旨在解决在线更新核超参数带来的校准问题，同时保持理论保证。
light_analysis.method: OSCBO 将超参数选择转化为约束在线学习问题，通过在线算法自适应平衡 GP 的锐度（sharpness）和校准度（calibration），并利用在线学习理论保证亚线性遗憾界。该方法无需固定核假设，适用于顺序采集的非独立同分布数据场景。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实世界基准测试中，OSCBO 表现具有竞争力，最终简单遗憾排名最强方法之一，同时保持稳健的累积遗憾行为。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但表明其在多个指标上优于或匹敌现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: OSCBO 提供了在线校准 GP 的贝叶斯优化框架，平衡了不确定性量化的锐利性和校准性，具有亚线性遗憾理论保证。该工作对需要自适应超参数调整的昂贵黑盒优化具有实际价值，未来可探索更复杂的在线学习策略。

title: EnergyLens: Interpretable Closed-Form Energy Models for Multimodal LLM Inference Serving
abstract: As large language models span dense, mixture-of-experts, and state-space architectures and are deployed on heterogeneous accelerators under increasingly diverse multimodal workloads, optimising inference energy has become as critical as optimizing latency and throughput. Existing approaches either treat latency as an energy proxy or rely on data-hungry black-box surrogates. Both fail under varying parallelism strategies: latency and energy optima diverge in over 20% of configurations we tested, and black-box surrogates require hundreds of profiling samples to generalize across model families and hardware. We present EnergyLens, which uses symbolic regression as a structure-discovery tool over profiling data to derive a single twelve-parameter closed-form energy model expressed in terms of system properties such as degree of parallelism, batch size, and sequence length. Unlike black-box surrogates, EnergyLens decouples tensor and pipeline parallelism contributions and separates prefill from decode energy, making its predictions physically interpretable and actionable. Fitted from as few as 50 profiling measurements, EnergyLens achieves 88.2% Top-1 configuration selection accuracy across many evaluation scenarios compared to 60.9% for the closest prior analytical baseline, matches the predictive accuracy of ensemble ML methods with 10x fewer profiling samples, and extrapolates reliably to unseen batch sizes and hardware platforms without structural modification, making it a practical, interpretable tool for energy-optimal LLM deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出EnergyLens，一种基于符号回归的可解释闭式能量模型，用于多模态大语言模型推理服务中的能耗优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型在异构加速器上部署，推理能耗优化变得至关重要。现有方法将延迟作为能耗代理或依赖黑盒代理模型，但延迟与能耗最优配置在超过20%的测试中不一致，且黑盒代理需要数百个样本才能泛化，无法适应变化的并行策略。
light_analysis.method: EnergyLens采用符号回归从性能数据中自动发现结构，导出仅十二参数的闭式能量模型，表达为并行度、批大小和序列长度的函数。该方法解耦张量与流水线并行贡献，并分离预填充与解码阶段能量，使预测物理可解释。仅需50个性能样本即可拟合模型。
light_analysis.result: EnergyLens在多个评估场景中达到88.2%的Top-1配置选择准确率，显著优于最接近的分析基线（60.9%）。与集成机器学习方法相比，匹配预测精度但所需样本少10倍，并能可靠外推至未见批大小和硬件平台，无需结构修改。
light_analysis.conclusion: EnergyLens提供了可解释、样本高效的能耗模型，使LLM部署能耗最优化成为实际可能。其物理可解释性和泛化能力具有学术价值，适用于异构硬件和多模态工作负载。未来可探索更复杂架构的扩展。

title: It's All Connected: Topology-Aware Structural Graph Encoding Improves Performance on Polymer Prediction
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have achieved strong results in molecular property prediction, but polymers present distinct challenges: labeled datasets are scarce and small (typically in the order of hundreds of polymers) due to the need for expensive experimentation, and complex polymer chain distributions influence polymer properties. Established practice in polymer prediction represents polymers solely by graphs of their repeat units, discarding the chain-scale morphology that governs key properties such as the glass transition temperature ($T_g$). In this work, we propose a principled graph construction that addresses this gap. Given a polymer's molecular mass distribution (MMD), we sample representative chains from the Schulz-Zimm distribution and construct representative sets of large graphs encoding chain-scale topology directly, with atoms and bonds featurized using rich chemical descriptors. We further pretrain GNN encoders via masked graph modeling on 100,000 unlabeled PSMILES strings before fine-tuning on labeled data. On a dataset of 381 polymers (180 homopolymers and 201 copolymers), we show that graph construction and self-supervised pretraining are jointly necessary: without pretraining, the large graph method matches the repeat-unit baseline (28.40 K vs. 28.36 K RMSE); with pretraining, it achieves 24.76 K +/- 3.30 K, a 5.1% reduction in mean error over the pretrained repeat-unit baseline (26.08 K +/- 4.20 K, p < 0.001, 30 runs). An ablation removing chemical features degrades performance to 36.65 K, confirming both components are essential. Results are architecture-agnostic, holding for both GINE and GATv2 encoders.

light_analysis.overview: 提出拓扑感知的结构图编码与自监督预训练联合方法，提升聚合物属性预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚合物属性预测面临标注数据稀缺和复杂链形态影响的问题。现有方法仅用重复单元图表示聚合物，忽略了决定玻璃化温度等关键性质的链尺度拓扑结构。需解决图构建和预训练策略的联合优化问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于分子质量分布的图构建方法：从Schulz-Zimm分布采样代表性链，构建编码链拓扑的大图，并使用丰富化学描述符进行原子和键特征化。进一步在10万无标签PSMILES串上进行掩码图建模预训练，再在381个聚合物数据集上微调。采用GINE和GATv2编码器。
light_analysis.result: 在381个聚合物数据集上，联合图构建和预训练实现24.76 K RMSE，相比预训练的重复单元基线（26.08 K）降低5.1%误差（p<0.001，30次运行）。无预训练时大图方法仅持平基线（28.40 vs 28.36 K）。去除化学特征后性能恶化至36.65 K。结果与编码器架构无关。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了链尺度图构建与自监督预训练对聚合物预测的协同必要性，显著提升预测精度。方法具有架构无关性，为聚合物性质预测提供了新范式。未来可扩展至更复杂聚合物体系及预训练策略优化。

title: PhysEDA: Physics-Aware Learning Framework for Efficient EDA With Manhattan Distance Decay
abstract: Electronic design automation (EDA) addresses placement, routing, timing analysis, and power-integrity verification for integrated circuits. Learning methods -- attention (Transformer) and reinforcement learning (RL) -- have recently emerged on EDA tasks, yet face two common bottlenecks: vanilla attention's quadratic complexity limits scaling, and data-scarce models overfit statistical noise and amplify weak long-range correlations against the underlying physics. We observe that EDA tasks share a physical prior -- pairwise electrical and routing interactions decay exponentially along Manhattan distance -- and integrate it as a unified inductive bias into both architecture and training. We propose PhysEDA, comprising two components Physics-Structured Linear Attention (PSLA) folds the separable Manhattan decay into the linear-attention kernel as a multiplicative bias, reducing complexity from quadratic to linear; Potential-Based Reward Shaping (PBRS) constructs a physical potential from the same kernel, providing dense reward signal under sparse RL while preserving the optimal policy via the policy-invariance theorem. Across three EDA scenarios -- decoupling-capacitor placement, macro placement, and IR-drop prediction -- PhysEDA improves zero-shot cross-scale transfer by 56.8% and achieves 14x inference speedup with 98.5% memory savings on 100x100 grids; PBRS adds another 10.8% in sparse-reward DPP.
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, plus appendix. Code and data to be released upon publication

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理感知学习框架PhysEDA，通过曼哈顿距离衰减先验统一集成到注意力和强化学习，实现高效EDA。
light_analysis.motivation: EDA中的学习任务面临两个瓶颈：注意力机制的二次复杂度限制扩展，以及数据稀缺导致模型过拟合噪声、放大弱长程相关，违背物理规律。现有方法未充分利用EDA任务的物理先验——成对电气和路由交互随曼哈顿距离指数衰减，因此亟需一种有效集成该先验的方法来提升效率和泛化性。
light_analysis.method: PhysEDA包含两个核心组件：物理结构化线性注意力（PSLA）将可分离的曼哈顿距离衰减作为乘法偏置融入线性注意力核，使复杂度从二次降至线性；基于势能奖励塑形（PBRS）利用相同核构建物理势能，在稀疏强化学习场景中提供密集奖励信号，并通过策略不变性定理保持最优策略。该方法适用于去耦电容放置、宏放置和IR降预测等多个EDA任务。
light_analysis.result: 在三个EDA场景中，PhysEDA在零样本跨尺度迁移上提升56.8%；在100x100网格上实现14倍推理加速和98.5%内存节省。PBRS在稀疏奖励的DPP任务中额外提升10.8%。实验表明该方法在效率和性能上均显著优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhysEDA通过将物理先验作为统一归纳偏置集成到架构和训练中，高效解决了EDA学习任务的瓶颈，在多个任务上取得显著提升。该工作展示了物理感知在EDA中的价值，未来可扩展至其他集成电路设计任务，并探索更复杂的物理先验。

title: Higher Resolution, Better Generalization: Unlocking Visual Scaling in Deep Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Pixel-based deep reinforcement learning agents are typically trained on heavily downsampled visual observations, a convention inherited from early benchmarks rather than grounded in principled design. In this work, we show that observation resolution is a critical yet overlooked variable for policy learning: higher-resolution inputs can substantially improve both performance and generalization, provided the network architecture can process them effectively. We find that the widely used Impala encoder, which flattens spatial features into a vector, suffers from quadratic parameter growth as resolution increases and fails to leverage the additional visual detail. Replacing this operation with global average pooling, as in the Impoola architecture, decouples parameter count from resolution and yields consistent improvements across resolutions and network widths - at their respective best conditions, visual scaling unlocks a 28 % performance gain for Impoola over Impala. These gains are strongest in environments that require precise perception of small or distant objects, and gradient saliency analysis confirms that the underlying mechanism is a more spatially localized visual attention of the policy at higher resolutions. Our results challenge the prevailing practice of aggressive input downsampling and position resolution-independent architectures as a simple, effective path toward scalable visual deep RL. To facilitate future research on resolution scaling in deep RL, we publicly release the open-source code for the Procgen-HD benchmark: https://github.com/raphajaner/procgen-hd.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分辨率无关的Impoola架构，通过全局平均池化解耦参数与分辨率，在像素级深度强化学习中显著提升性能和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 像素级深度强化学习智能体通常使用严重降采样的视觉观察，这一惯例源于早期基准测试，缺乏原理性设计。观测分辨率被认为是策略学习的关键但被忽视的变量：更高分辨率的输入可以大幅提升性能和泛化能力，但现有网络架构（如Impala编码器）因空间特征展平导致参数随分辨率二次增长，无法有效利用视觉细节。因此，需要探索分辨率无关的架构。
light_analysis.method: 提出Impoola架构，用全局平均池化代替Impala中的空间特征展平操作。全局平均池化将参数数量与输入分辨率解耦，使网络在不同分辨率和宽度下保持一致的改进。该方法利用Procgen-HD基准环境进行训练，通过梯度显著性分析验证高分辨率下策略的局部视觉注意力机制。
light_analysis.result: 在各自最佳条件下，视觉缩放使Impoola比Impala获得28%的性能提升。增益在需要精确感知小或远距离物体的环境中最为显著。梯度显著性分析证实，高分辨率下策略的视觉注意力更加空间局部化。结果挑战了激进的输入降采样实践。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作挑战了深度强化学习中常见的输入降采样惯例，表明分辨率无关架构是实现可扩展视觉深度强化学习的简单有效途径。未来研究可基于公开的Procgen-HD基准进一步探索分辨率缩放。潜在局限性包括对特定环境的依赖以及计算成本的增加。

title: Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction
abstract: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science.
