Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一序列-图集成框架，结合DNA序列统计特征与图卷积，提升表观遗传年龄预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有表观遗传年龄预测方法（如惩罚线性回归、深度前馈网络、残差架构和图神经网络）均未能同时建模共甲基化图结构和位点特异性DNA序列上下文。DNA序列上下文对甲基化调控至关重要，但单独建模序列或图结构会遗漏二者的互补信息。因此，需要一种统一框架来桥接序列与图结构，以提高年龄预测的准确性，并揭示生物年龄的分子机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个序列-图集成框架，首先从DNA序列中提取八维手工统计特征（如CpG密度、局部碱基频率），通过轻量级门控调制机制自适应缩放每个位点的甲基化信号，将序列特征融入共甲基化图结构。然后使用图卷积网络处理缩放后的甲基化图和拓扑信息。该方法避免了端到端CNN编码的高复杂度，在有限数据下更有效。
light_analysis.result: 在3,707个血液甲基化样本上评估，测试MAE为3.149年，比最强图基线方法提升12.8%。手工设计的序列统计特征优于CNN序列编码，表明在此数据规模下手工特征更有效。可解释性分析显示CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率的年龄依赖重要性变化，与CpG密集启动子区域年龄相关高甲基化的已知机制一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次在表观遗传年龄预测中联合建模序列与图结构，通过轻量级门控机制实现有效融合。手工序列特征在有限数据下表现优于CNN学习表示，具有实用价值。可解释性分析揭示了年龄相关的表观遗传变化特征。代码已开源，有助于推动表观遗传时钟的发展，未来可探索更复杂的序列编码或整合多组学数据。

title: HH-SAE: Discovering and Steering Hierarchical Knowledge of Complex Manifolds
abstract: Rare semantic innovations in high-dimensional, mission-critical domains are often obscured by dense background contexts, a challenge we define as \textit{feature density conflict}. We introduce the \textbf{Hybrid Hierarchical SAE (HH-SAE)} to resolve this by factorizing manifolds into a nested hierarchy of \textbf{Contextual} ($L_0$), \textbf{Atomic} ($f_1$), and \textbf{Compository} ($f_2$) tiers. Evaluating across disparate manifolds, HH-SAE demonstrates superior resolution by \textbf{``fracturing'' administrative clinical labels into physiological modes} and achieving a peak \textbf{cross-domain zero-shot AUC of 0.9156 in fraud detection}. Path ablation confirms the architecture's structural necessity, revealing a 13.46\% utility collapse when contextual subtraction is removed. Finally, knowledge-steered synthesis achieves a +9.9\% AUPRC lift over state-of-the-art generators, proving that HH-SAE effectively prioritizes high-order mechanistic innovation over environmental proxies to enable high-precision discovery in high-stakes environments.

light_analysis.overview: 提出混合层次稀疏自编码器（HH-SAE），通过上下文、原子和组合三级层次分解解决高维流形的特征密度冲突，实现高精度发现与可控生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 高维关键领域中稀有语义创新常被密集背景上下文掩盖，即特征密度冲突，导致现有方法难以准确发现。该问题在医疗、金融等高风险场景尤为重要，需要更精细的层次化分解方法以分离背景噪声与真实信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出HH-SAE，将流形分解为三级嵌套层次：上下文（L0）、原子（f1）和组合（f2）。通过该架构，能够将行政临床标签“碎裂”为生理模式。在多个流形上评估，包括跨域零样本欺诈检测。路径消融实验验证了架构必要性，移除上下文减法导致13.46%效用下降。
light_analysis.result: 在跨域零样本欺诈检测中达到峰值AUC 0.9156。知识引导合成在AUPRC上比最先进生成器提升+9.9%。路径消融显示上下文减法模块贡献13.46%效用，证明了层次化分解的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: HH-SAE通过层次化分解有效解决特征密度冲突，实现高精度发现和可控生成。学术上提出新的流形分解范式，应用上可用于高风险领域异常检测与知识引导合成。未来可扩展至更多领域并优化计算效率。

title: ConfoundingSHAP: Quantifying confounding strength in causal inference
abstract: In causal inference, confounders are variables that influence both treatment decisions and outcomes. However, unlike as in randomized clinical trials, the treatment assignment mechanism in observational studies is not known, and it is thus unclear which covariates act as confounders. Here, we aim to generate insight for causal inference and answer: which of the observed covariates act as confounders? We introduce ConfoundingSHAP, a Shapley-based method for attributing confounding strength to individual covariates. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose a Shapley game targeted to infer the confounding strength of the covariates. Our resulting Shapley values differ from the standard applications of SHAP explanations on causal targets, such as understanding treatment effect heterogeneity, which are ill-suited for our task. Second, as our task requires evaluating the value function over many adjustment sets, we provide a scalable TabPFN-based estimation that avoids exhaustive refitting. We demonstrate the practical value across various datasets, where ConfoundingSHAP provides informative explanations of which observed covariates drive confounding and thereby helps to provide more insight for causal inference in practice.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ConfoundingSHAP方法，基于Shapley值量化观察性研究中各协变量的混杂强度。
light_analysis.motivation: 在因果推断中，混杂因子同时影响治疗和结果，但观察性研究的治疗分配机制未知，难以识别哪些协变量是混杂因子。现有SHAP解释方法针对治疗效应异质性等因果目标，不适用于直接量化混杂强度。因此需要一种方法来归因每个协变量对混杂偏差的贡献，以帮助理解观察性研究中的因果机制。
light_analysis.method: 提出ConfoundingSHAP方法，定义了一个新的Shapley博弈来评估协变量的混杂强度。通过计算每个协变量在调整集上的Shapley值，量化其对混杂的贡献。为了高效计算，采用TabPFN模型进行可扩展估计，避免对大量调整集进行穷尽式模型重拟合。该方法适用于任意特征集和因果目标。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上验证了ConfoundingSHAP的实用价值。结果表明，ConfoundingSHAP能有效识别出驱动混杂的关键协变量，提供有信息量的解释。与现有SHAP方法相比，ConfoundingSHAP更准确地反映混杂强度，帮助因果推断实践。具体数值结果摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: ConfoundingSHAP为因果推断提供了一种新工具，能定量归因每个观测协变量的混杂强度，有助于理解观察性研究中的混杂偏差。该方法具有可扩展性，实际应用价值高。未来可探索更复杂的调整策略或与去偏方法结合，但本文未提及局限性。

title: PrimeKG-CL: A Continual Graph Learning Benchmark on Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs underwrite drug repurposing and clinical decision support, yet the upstream ontologies they depend on update on independent cycles that add millions of edges and deprecate hundreds of thousands more between releases. Yet existing continual graph learning has been studied almost exclusively on synthetic random splits of static, generic KGs, a regime that cannot reproduce the asynchronous, structured evolution real biomedical KGs undergo. To this end, we introduce PrimeKG-CL, a CGL benchmark built from nine authoritative biomedical databases (129K+ nodes, 8.1M+ edges, 10 node types, 30 relation types) with two genuine temporal snapshots (June 2021, July 2023; 5.83M edges added, 889K removed, 7.21M persistent), 10 entity-type-grouped tasks, multimodal node features, and a per-task persistent/added/removed test stratification. On three tasks (biomedical relationship prediction, entity classification, KGQA), we evaluate six CL strategies across four KGE decoders, plus LKGE, an LLM-RAG agent, and CMKL. We find that decoder choice and continual learning strategy interact strongly: no single strategy performs best across all decoders, and mismatched combinations can significantly degrade performance. Moreover, only DistMult exhibits a clear separation between persistent and deprecated knowledge, indicating that standard metrics conflate retention of still-valid facts with failure to forget outdated ones; this effect is absent under RotatE. In addition, multimodal features improve entity-level tasks by up to 60%, and a recent CKGE framework (IncDE) failed to scale to our 5.67M-triple base task across five attempts up to 350GB RAM. Data, pipeline, baselines, and the stratified split are released openly. Dataset:huggingface.co/datasets/yradwan147/PrimeKGCL|Code:github.com/yradwan147/primekg-cl-neurips2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出PrimeKG-CL，一个基于真实演化生物医学知识图谱的持续图学习基准，包含两个时间快照、实体分组任务和多模态特征，用于评估持续学习方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有持续图学习仅在静态通用知识图谱的合成随机分割上研究，无法模拟真实生物医学知识图谱的异步、结构化演化。生物医学知识图谱依赖的术语库独立更新，在版本间添加和弃用大量边，需要能处理持续演化的学习方法，当前缺乏真实演化基准。
light_analysis.method: PrimeKG-CL构建自9个权威生物医学数据库（12.9万节点、810万边、10种节点类型、30种关系类型），包含2021年6月和2023年7月两个真实快照，设计10个实体类型分组任务、多模态节点特征及每任务的持久/新增/移除测试分层。评估6种连续学习策略在4种知识图谱嵌入解码器上的表现，并包括LKGE、CMKL等方法。
light_analysis.result: 解码器与连续学习策略交互强烈，无单一策略在所有解码器上最佳。DistMult能清晰区分持久与弃用知识，RotatE不能。多模态特征在实体级任务上提升高达60%。现有方法IncDE无法扩展到560万三元组基础任务（350GB RAM仍失败）。
light_analysis.conclusion: PrimeKG-CL提供了真实演化生物医学知识图谱的持续学习基准，揭示解码器与策略组合的重要性，指出标准指标混淆知识保留与遗忘。多模态特征有效提升实体任务。数据和代码开源，为后续研究提供基础，未来可探索更高效的持续学习方法。

title: CMKL: Modality-Aware Continual Learning for Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs are increasingly large, dynamic, and multimodal, driven by rapid advances in biotechnology such as high-throughput sequencing. Machine learning models can infer previously unobserved biomedical relationships and characterize biomedical entities in these graphs, but existing knowledge graph embedding methods and their continual learning extensions either assume static graph structure or fail to exploit multimodal information under evolving data distributions. They also apply uniform regularization across all model parameters, ignoring that different modalities may exhibit distinct forgetting dynamics as the graph evolves. We propose the Continual Multimodal Knowledge Graph Learner (CMKL), a CL framework for biomedical KGs that natively encodes structure, text, and molecules, fuses them through a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) router, and protects previously learned knowledge with standard EWC regularization and a K-means-diverse multimodal replay buffer. We evaluate CMKL on a 129K-entity biomedical continual benchmark with 10 tasks. On continual biomedical entity classification, CMKL reaches AP 0.591 versus 0.370 for the strongest structural baseline, a 60% gain that is driven by access to multimodal features and preserved across the sequence with near-zero forgetting (AF 0.008). On continual relationship prediction, CMKL reaches AP $0.062$, matching Naive Sequential and EWC (0.058) within seed noise and outperforming Joint Training (0.047, p=0.045) and LKGE (0.039). A frozen-text ablation reaches AP 0.136, more than double any jointly trained model, yet that signal is unreachable by margin-ranking gradients: the greedy-modality asymmetry lives at the representation level, not the fusion level, and MoE routing manages it by suppressing the unreachable modality without forcing it through a learned bottleneck. Code: github.com/yradwan147/cmkl-neurips2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出CMKL，一个模态感知的持续学习框架，通过MoE融合多模态信息并保护历史知识，显著提升生物医学知识图谱的持续学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 生物医学知识图谱日益庞大、动态且多模态，但现有知识图谱嵌入方法和持续学习扩展要么假设静态图结构，要么无法利用多模态信息，且对全参数统一正则化忽略了不同模态间不同的遗忘动态。
light_analysis.method: CMKL原生编码结构、文本和分子三种模态，通过Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)路由器融合，采用EWC正则化和K-means多样多模态回放缓冲防止遗忘。在129K实体、10个任务的持续基准上评估实体分类和关系预测。
light_analysis.result: 在持续实体分类上，CMKL达到AP 0.591，比最强结构基线0.370提升60%，且几乎零遗忘（AF 0.008）。关系预测AP 0.062，匹配Naive Sequential和EWC，优于Joint Training (0.047)和LKGE (0.039)。冻结文本模态消融达AP 0.136，超两倍于联合训练，但信号无法通过边际排名梯度获得。
light_analysis.conclusion: CMKL有效利用多模态信息处理生物医学知识图谱的持续学习，显著改善分类性能并揭示模态不对称性。MoE路由可管理不可达模态。代码开源，未来可探索更优融合策略。

title: Formally Verifying Analog Neural Networks Under Process Variations Using Polynomial Zonotopes
abstract: Analog neural networks are gaining attention due to their efficiency in terms of power consumption and processing speed. However, since analog neural networks are implemented as physical circuits, they are highly sensitive to manufacturing process variations, which can cause large deviations from the nominal model. We present a polynomial-based model that resembles the performance of the neuron circuit under process variations. Then, we formally verify the behavior of the circuit-level model using reachability analysis with polynomial zonotopes, thus, avoiding conventional, time-consuming Monte Carlo simulations. We evaluate our proposed verification approach on three different datasets, verifying both fully-connected and convolutional analog neural networks. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our verification approach by reducing the verification time from days to seconds while enclosing 99% of the variation samples.

light_analysis.overview: 提出用多项式 zonotopes 的可达性分析形式化验证受工艺变化影响的模拟神经网络，将验证时间从天级降至秒级。
light_analysis.motivation: 模拟神经网络在功耗和速度上优势明显，但作为物理电路对制造工艺变化高度敏感，导致性能严重偏离标称模型。传统蒙特卡洛仿真验证耗时巨大（数天），亟需高效的形式化方法来保证其可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 构建基于多项式的电路级模型，模拟神经元在工艺变化下的行为；使用多项式 zonotopes 进行可达性分析，形式化验证模型输出范围。在三个数据集上评估了全连接和卷积架构的模拟神经网络。
light_analysis.result: 验证时间从数天缩短至数秒，同时覆盖99%的工艺变异样本，精度与蒙特卡洛方法相当。实验证明了该方法在效率与覆盖度上的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为模拟神经网络在工艺变化下的行为提供了高效的形式化验证框架，有望加速这类芯片的可靠性验证。未来可扩展至更复杂的模拟电路或与其他验证技术结合。

title: Can Muon Fine-tune Adam-Pretrained Models?
abstract: Muon has emerged as an efficient alternative to Adam for pretraining, yet remains underused for fine-tuning. A key obstacle is that most open models are pretrained with Adam, and naively switching to Muon for fine-tuning leads to degraded performance due to an optimizer mismatch. We investigate this mismatch through controlled experiments and relate it to the distinct implicit biases of Adam and Muon. We provide evidence that the mismatch disrupts pretrained knowledge, and that this disruption scales with update strength. This leads us to hypothesize that constraining updates should mitigate the mismatch. We validate this with LoRA: across language and vision tasks, LoRA reduces the performance gap between Adam and Muon observed under full fine-tuning. Studies on LoRA rank, catastrophic forgetting, and LoRA variants further confirm that mismatch severity correlates with update strength. These results shed light on how optimizer mismatch affects fine-tuning and how it can be mitigated. Our code is available at https://github.com/XingyuQu/muon-finetune.

light_analysis.overview: Muon在微调Adam预训练模型时存在优化器不匹配问题，LoRA可通过约束更新有效缓解性能下降。
light_analysis.motivation: Muon在预训练中效率高，但多数公开模型用Adam预训练，直接切换Muon微调导致性能下降。现有研究缺乏对优化器不匹配机制及其缓解方法的深入分析。本文旨在探究不匹配原因并提出可行方案。
light_analysis.method: 通过控制实验将不匹配归因于Adam和Muon的不同隐式偏差，并假设约束更新可缓解。使用LoRA在语言和视觉任务上验证，发现LoRA显著缩小全微调下Adam与Muon的性能差距。进一步研究LoRA秩、灾难性遗忘和LoRA变体，证实不匹配程度与更新强度正相关。
light_analysis.result: 全微调时，切换Muon导致性能明显下降；而使用LoRA后，Adam与Muon的性能差距大幅减小。实验结果跨语言和视觉任务一致，且对LoRA秩等因素的分析支持更新强度与不匹配严重性相关的假设。具体数值虽未提供，但定性结论稳健。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究揭示了优化器不匹配影响微调的机制，并证明通过约束更新（如LoRA）可有效克服该问题。代码已开源，为理解优化器选择与迁移学习提供了新视角，未来可探索其他约束更新策略或混合优化器方法。

title: Self-Attention as a Covariance Readout: A Unified View of In-Context Learning and Repetition
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit two striking and ostensibly unrelated behaviours: in-context learning (ICL) and repetitive generation. In both, the model behaves as though it had summarised the context into a population-level statistic and discarded token-level detail. We ask whether this ``summarisation and forgetting'' can be derived from the attention mechanism itself, and answer in the affirmative. Under stationary, ergodic and elliptical inputs, the softmax attention output converges almost surely to $Θ_VΣΘ_K^{\top}Θ_Q x_t$, where $Σ$ is the input covariance; the long-context limit is therefore a linear readout of the input's second-order statistics. Two consequences follow. (i) For in-context linear regression, a single softmax head can implement one step of population gradient descent. Stacking such heads with residual connections iterates this update and implements multiple gradient descent steps. (ii) Propagated across an $L$-layer transformer, this readout drives the terminal hidden state at the parametric $1/t$ rate to a deterministic function of the current token alone, so that autoregressive generation collapses asymptotically to a first-order Markov chain whose attracting orbits furnish a structural account of repetition and mode collapse. The two phenomena thus emerge as facets of a single covariance-readout principle.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出自注意力机制在长上下文下等价于协方差读出，统一解释了上下文学习和重复生成现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型表现出两种看似无关的行为：上下文学习（ICL）和重复生成。这两种行为中，模型似乎将上下文总结为群体统计量而丢弃了词元级细节。现有研究未解释这一现象是否源于注意力机制本身。本文旨在从注意力机制出发推导这种“总结与遗忘”行为，从而统一理解两个现象。
light_analysis.method: 在平稳、遍历和椭圆输入假设下，证明softmax注意力输出几乎必然收敛到Θ_V Σ Θ_K^T Θ_Q x_t，其中Σ是输入协方差矩阵。长上下文极限成为输入二阶统计量的线性读出。基于此，单头注意力可实现一步群体梯度下降，残差连接下的多头堆叠迭代实现多步梯度下降。在L层Transformer中传播，该读出以参数速率1/t驱动终端隐藏状态退化为仅依赖于当前词元的确定性函数，导致自回归生成渐近坍塌为一阶马尔可夫链。
light_analysis.result: 理论推导表明，对于上下文线性回归，单头softmax注意力可执行一步群体梯度下降，堆叠多头并配合残差连接则实现多步梯度下降。在多层Transformer中，终端隐藏状态以1/t速率收敛到仅依赖当前词元的函数，自回归生成变为一阶马尔可夫链，其吸引轨道解释了重复生成和模式坍塌。实验部分摘要未提及，但理论结果与已有现象吻合。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文从自注意力机制出发，证明了长上下文下注意力等价于协方差读出，从而统一解释了上下文学习和重复生成两个现象。理论推导揭示了注意力层实现梯度下降的机制，并指出了重复生成的根源。该工作为理解transformer内在工作原理提供了新视角，并为改进模型可控性（如减少重复）提供了理论依据。未来可扩展到非标准输入分布或更复杂注意力变体。

title: QT-Net: Rethinking Evaluation of AI Models in Atomic Chemical Space
abstract: Atomic properties such as partial charges or multipoles encode chemically meaningful information that can inform downstream molecular property prediction, but their evaluation as machine learning targets has been complicated by the absence of a principled out-of-distribution evaluation protocol at the atomic level. In this work, we propose a held-out evaluation protocol that clusters atomic environments by SOAP descriptors and computes metrics accounting only for cluster labels unseen during training. Following this procedure, we use 5$\times$5 cross-validation and Tukey's HSD to run a statistically rigorous comparison of E(3)-equivariant against non-equivariant, rotationally augmented models for predicting electron populations and multipoles of H, C, N, and O atoms. Building on our results, we introduce the Quantum Topological Neural Network (QT-Net), a rotationally augmented, non-equivariant graph neural network. We show that QT-Net can be used to infer properties of atoms in molecules from QM9 outside our training set, and that these inferred properties can yield improvement when used as input features for downstream molecular property prediction. To further validate the framework, molecular dipole moments computed from QT-Net's per-atom outputs recover the ground-truth values reported in QM9. We release all code and data, including a JAX implementation of QT-Net, to support the broader use of learned QTA properties as inductive biases for atomic-scale molecular machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于原子环境聚类的留出评估协议，并引入旋转增强的非等变图神经网络QT-Net，用于预测原子性质并改善下游分子性质预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 原子级性质（如部分电荷）对下游分子性质预测具有化学信息价值，但缺乏原则性的原子级分布外评估协议，导致现有模型比较不严谨。该方法通过聚类原子环境并仅基于未见过的聚类计算指标，提供了统计可靠的评估框架。
light_analysis.method: 首先，利用SOAP描述符对原子环境进行聚类，设计留出评估协议，并通过5×5交叉验证和Tukey's HSD进行统计比较。然后，提出QT-Net，一种旋转增强的非等变图神经网络，用于预测H、C、N、O原子的电子布居和多极矩。该模型可从QM9中的分子推断原子性质，并将这些性质作为输入特征用于下游分子属性预测。
light_analysis.result: QT-Net在预测原子性质和下游分子性质上表现良好。从QM9推断的原子性质改善了分子属性预测性能；计算的分子偶极矩与QM9真实值一致。代码和数据（含JAX实现）已开源，支持学术用途。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作提出了原子级评估新协议和QT-Net模型，为原子尺度分子机器学习提供了可靠的归纳偏差。学术上，促进了E(3)-等变与非等变模型的严谨对比；实践上，学习到的原子性质可提升分子预测准确性。未来可扩展至更多原子类型和性质。

title: AxiomOcean: Forecasting the Three-Dimensional Structure of the Upper Ocean
abstract: Short-term ocean forecast skill depends strongly on the three-dimensional ocean structure of the upper ocean, which governs stratification, subsurface heat storage, and the response of the ocean to atmospheric forcing. However, AI ocean forecasting models often fail to preserve this vertical structure, resulting in over-smoothed subsurface features and weak physical consistency under strong forcing. Here, we present AxiomOcean, a global AI ocean forecasting model that explicitly represents vertical hierarchy and cross-layer dependence within the water column. By combining a fully three-dimensional encoder-backbone-decoder architecture with surface atmospheric forcing, AxiomOcean jointly predicts upper-ocean temperature, salinity, and three-dimensional currents at global 1/12° resolution down to 643 m depth. In 10-day forecasts, AxiomOcean outperforms an advanced AI comparison model across variables and lead times, reducing day-1 RMSE by approximately 20 to 35% while maintaining higher anomaly correlation. The gain is not achieved through excessive smoothing: AxiomOcean better preserves eddy kinetic energy, temperature and salinity variance. Its advantage also extends through the water column and remains evident across the equatorial Pacific, Kuroshio Extension, and Southern Ocean, yielding a more realistic reconstruction of upper-ocean heat content. These results show that explicitly preserving upper-ocean three-dimensional structure can improve both forecast accuracy and physical fidelity in AI ocean prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AxiomOcean模型，通过显式建模三维垂直结构，实现全球1/12°分辨率的上层海洋温度、盐度和三维流场的精确预报。
light_analysis.motivation: 短期海洋预报技能强烈依赖于上层海洋的三维结构，该结构控制层结、次表层热存储及海洋对大气强迫的响应。然而，现有AI海洋预报模型常无法保持垂直结构，导致次表层特征过度平滑，在强强迫下物理一致性弱。因此，需要一种能够显式保留垂直层次和跨层依赖的模型，以提高预报精度和物理真实性。
light_analysis.method: AxiomOcean采用全三维编码器-骨干网络-解码器架构，结合地表大气强迫，联合预测上层海洋温度、盐度和三维流场，分辨率达全球1/12°，深度至643米。关键创新在于显式建模水柱内的垂直层级和跨层依赖，避免了传统AI模型的过度平滑问题，并通过多变量联合预测增强物理一致性。
light_analysis.result: 在10天预报中，AxiomOcean在多个变量和预报时效上优于先进AI对比模型，第1天均方根误差降低约20-35%，同时保持更高的异常相关性。改进并非通过过度平滑实现，模型更好地保留了涡动能、温度和盐度方差。优势贯穿整个水柱，并在赤道太平洋、黑潮延伸体和南大洋等关键区域显著，生成更真实的上层海洋热含量重建。
light_analysis.conclusion: AxiomOcean证明显式保留上层海洋三维结构可同时提高AI海洋预报的精度和物理保真度。该模型提供了更真实的次表层特征和能量分布，对短期气候预测、海洋环流研究及海洋工程应用具有重要价值。未来可进一步扩展至更深层或耦合生物地球化学过程。

title: SlimSpec: Low-Rank Draft LM-Head for Accelerated Speculative Decoding
abstract: Speculative decoding speeds up autoregressive generation in Large Language Models (LLMs) through a two-step procedure, where a lightweight draft model proposes tokens which the target model then verifies in a single forward pass. Although the drafter network is small in modern architectures, its LM-head still performs projection to a large vocabulary, becoming one of the major computational bottlenecks. In prior work this issue has been predominantly addressed via static or dynamic vocabulary truncation. Yet mitigating the bottleneck, these methods bring in extra complexity, such as special vocabulary curation, sophisticated inference-time logic or modifications of the training setup. In this paper, we propose SlimSpec, a low-rank parameterization of the drafter's LM-head that compresses the inner representation rather than the output, preserving full vocabulary support. We evaluate our method with EAGLE-3 drafter across three target models and diverse benchmarks in both latency- and throughput-bound inference regimes. SlimSpec achieves $4\text{-}5\times$ acceleration over the standard LM-head architecture while maintaining a competitive acceptance length, surpassing existing methods by up to $8\text{-}9\%$ of the end-to-end speedup. Our method requires minimal adjustments of training and inference pipelines. Combined with the aforementioned speedup improvements, it makes SlimSpec a strong alternative across wide variety of draft LM-head architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SlimSpec，一种低秩参数化草案模型LM头的方法，通过压缩内部表示而非输出，加速推测解码，无需词汇截断或复杂推理逻辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 在大型语言模型的推测解码中，轻量级草案模型虽小，但其LM头执行到大词汇表的投影成为主要计算瓶颈。现有方法通过静态或动态词汇截断缓解瓶颈，但引入了额外复杂性，如特殊词汇筛选、复杂推理逻辑或训练修改。需要一种更简洁高效的解决方案，既能加速推理，又保持全词汇支持且不增加系统复杂度。
light_analysis.method: SlimSpec采用低秩参数化草案模型的LM头，压缩内部表示而非输出层，从而保持全词汇支持。该方法仅需最小程度调整训练和推理流程，与EAGLE-3草案器结合，在三个目标模型上评估，涵盖延迟和吞吐量限制的推理场景。关键创新在于通过低秩分解减少LM头参数量，避免词汇截断带来的开销。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，SlimSpec相比标准LM头架构实现4-5倍加速，同时保持具有竞争力的接受长度。相较于现有方法，端到端加速比提升8-9%。该方法在延迟和吞吐量限制场景下均表现优异，验证了低秩参数化在加速推测解码中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SlimSpec通过低秩LM头参数化有效解决了推测解码中草案模型LM头的计算瓶颈，在保持全词汇支持的同时显著加速推理。其简洁的实现和显著的性能提升使其成为多种草案LM头架构的强替代方案。未来可探索将低秩分解应用于其他模块，或结合动态词汇截断进一步优化。

title: Don't Fix the Basis -- Learn It: Spectral Representation with Adaptive Basis Learning for PDEs
abstract: Spectral neural operators achieve strong performance for PDE learning, but rely on fixed global bases that limit their ability to represent spatially heterogeneous and multiscale dynamics. We propose Adaptive Basis Learning (ABLE), a framework that learns data-dependent spectral representations instead of relying on predefined bases. ABLE constructs a spatially adaptive Parseval frame via a learned ancillary density, enabling the operator to act in a lifted spectral space while preserving invertibility and maintaining $O(N\log N)$ complexity through FFT-based implementation. This shifts the source of expressivity from spectral coefficients to the representation itself, allowing the model to capture localized structures and non-translation-invariant interactions more efficiently. ABLE integrates seamlessly into existing neural operator architectures as a drop-in replacement for spectral layers. Across a range of benchmarks ABLE improves accuracy over strong baselines, with the largest gains in regimes characterized by sharp gradients and multiscale behavior. Moreover, augmenting existing models (e.g., U-FNO, HPM) with ABLE further enhances their performance, demonstrating its role as a general and complementary spectral refinement. Our results highlight that the data-driven choice of representation, rather than operator complexity alone, is a key bottleneck in neural operator design. By learning the basis itself, ABLE provides a principled and efficient framework for improving spectral methods in PDE learning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应基学习方法ABLE，通过学习数据依赖的谱表示替代固定全局基，提升PDE学习中的表达能力和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有谱神经算子依赖固定全局基，难以表示空间异质性和多尺度动力学，限制了模型捕捉局部结构的能力。固定基导致谱系数表达力有限，无法有效处理非平移不变交互和尖锐梯度，成为神经算子设计的瓶颈。
light_analysis.method: ABLE通过学习辅助密度构建空间自适应Parseval框架，在提升的谱空间中操作，保持可逆性并利用FFT实现O(N log N)复杂度。核心创新是将表达力从谱系数转移到表示本身，可作为现有神经算子谱层的即插即用替代方案。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准上，ABLE相比强基线提高了准确性，尤其在具有尖锐梯度和多尺度行为的场景中提升最大。增强现有模型（如U-FNO、HPM）进一步提升了性能，表明其作为通用谱增强方法的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 数据驱动的表示选择是神经算子设计的关键瓶颈。通过学习基本身，ABLE为改进谱方法提供了原则性、高效框架，具有广泛的应用价值。未来可探索与其他架构的结合及理论分析。

title: Beyond Spatial Compression: Interface-Centric Generative States for Open-World 3D Structure
abstract: Current 3D tokenizers largely treat representation as spatial compression: compact codes reconstruct surface geometry, but leave component ownership and attachment validity implicit. In open-world assets with intersecting components, noisy topology, and weak canonical structure, this creates a representation mismatch: local shape, component identity, and assembly relations become entangled in a latent stream and are not natively addressable during decoding. We formulate an alternative view, interface-centric generative states, in which tokenization constructs an operational state rather than a passive compressed code. The state exposes local geometry, component ownership, and attachment validity as variables that can be queried, constrained, and repaired during decoding. We instantiate this formulation with Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens (C2LT-3D), factorizing representation into canonical local geometry, partition-conditioned context, and relational seam variables. Each factor targets a distinct failure mode of compression-centric tokens: pose leakage, cross-component interference, or invalid local attachment. This exposed state supports attachment validation, latent structural repair, targeted intervention, and constrained serialization without a separate post-hoc structure recovery module. Trained on single-object CAD models and evaluated zero-shot on open-world multi-component assets, C2LT-3D improves structural robustness and shows that its latent variables remain actionable under adversarial attachment settings. These results suggest that open-world 3D generative representations should be evaluated not only by reconstruction fidelity, but by whether their discrete states remain operational for assembly-level structural reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出面向开放世界3D结构的接口中心生成状态表示，通过分解局部几何、部件归属和附着有效性提升结构鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有3D分词器将表示视为空间压缩，仅重建表面几何，但忽略了部件归属和附着有效性的显式建模。在开放世界资产中，交叉部件、噪声拓扑和弱规范结构导致局部形状、部件身份和装配关系在潜在空间中纠缠，解码时无法原生访问。这造成了表示不匹配，限制了结构推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 提出接口中心生成状态视角，将分词构建为可操作状态而非被动压缩码。实例化为C2LT-3D，将表示分解为规范局部几何、部件条件上下文和关系接缝变量。每个因子针对压缩中心令牌的特定失效模式：姿态泄露、跨部件干扰或无效局部附着。该暴露状态支持附着验证、潜在结构修复、目标干预和约束序列化，无需单独的后期结构恢复模块。
light_analysis.result: 在单物体CAD模型上训练，零样本评估于开放世界多部件资产。C2LT-3D提升了结构鲁棒性，其潜在变量在对抗附着设置下仍保持可操作性。结果表明，开放世界3D生成表示应不仅根据重建保真度评估，还应考虑其离散状态对装配级结构推理的可操作性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出接口中心生成状态作为3D表示的新范式，并通过C2LT-3D实例化验证其有效性。学术价值在于重新定义了3D表示的设计目标，从压缩保真转向结构可操作性。实际应用可提升复杂场景下的3D生成和修复能力。局限性可能在于对单物体训练的依赖，未来可探索多类别联合训练和更复杂的装配推理。

title: Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation
abstract: Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with machine learning has attracted substantial attention in both academic research and industrial practice. However, the two communities often evaluate models under markedly different conditions. Methodological work typically relies on semi-simulated benchmarks and metrics that require counterfactual outcomes, whereas real-world applications rely on observable metrics based on ranking or test outcomes. Despite the well-known gap between methodological progress and practical deployment, the relationship between these evaluation regimes has not been examined systematically. We conduct a large-scale empirical study of treatment effect evaluation across standard semi-simulated benchmark families and real-world datasets. Our benchmark covers meta-learners paired with multiple base learners, as well as specialized causal machine learning models. We evaluate these methods using observable metrics common in application-oriented literature, alongside counterfactual metrics commonly used in methods papers. Our results reveal two complementary gaps. First, counterfactual metrics do not reliably recover the estimators preferred by observable metrics, even on the same semi-simulated benchmarks. Second, rankings obtained on semi-simulated benchmarks do not transfer to real datasets. We further find that simple meta-learners with strong base models are consistently competitive, in contrast to specialized causal models. Overall, our findings suggest that progress in treatment effect estimation research should not be assessed solely through counterfactual metrics and semi-simulated benchmarks, but it would benefit from incorporating observable metrics and real-data validation.

light_analysis.overview: 系统揭示治疗效应估计中半模拟基准与真实场景评估的互补性差距，倡导纳入可观察指标和真实数据验证。
light_analysis.motivation: 治疗效应估计的学术研究常依赖半模拟基准和反事实指标，而工业实践使用可观察指标，两者评估结果不一致。现有文献未系统分析这种差距，导致方法进步与实际部署脱节。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过大规模实证研究揭示评估体制间的鸿沟，为改进评估实践提供依据。
light_analysis.method: 论文开展大规模实证研究，覆盖标准半模拟基准家族和真实数据集。评估对象包括元学习器（配对多种基础学习器）和专用因果机器学习模型。使用两类指标：应用文献中常见的可观察指标（如基于排序或测试结果）和方法论文常用的反事实指标。通过对比不同场景下的模型排名和性能，分析评估体制的差异。
light_analysis.result: 发现两个互补差距：1）在同一半模拟基准上，反事实指标不能可靠恢复可观察指标偏好的估计器；2）半模拟基准上的排名无法迁移到真实数据集。此外，简单元学习器（如T-learner、S-learner）搭配强基础模型（如XGBoost）持续表现竞争力，而专用因果模型（如CF、DR-learner）未必更优。
light_analysis.conclusion: 治疗效应估计研究不应仅依赖反事实指标和半模拟基准，而应融合可观察指标和真实数据验证，以缩小方法进步与实际部署的鸿沟。简单元学习器加强基础模型是稳健基线。未来工作可探索更系统的评估框架和跨域迁移分析。

title: Remember to Forget: Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding
abstract: Rotary Positional Encoding (RoPE) is widely used in modern large language models. However, when sequences are extended beyond the range seen during training, rotary phases can enter out-of-distribution regimes, leading to spurious long-range alignments, diffuse attention, and degraded retrieval. Existing remedies only partially address these failures, as they often trade local positional resolution for long-context stability. We propose GAPE (Gated Adaptive Positional Encoding), a drop-in augmentation for positional encodings that introduces a content-aware bias directly into the attention logits while preserving the rotary geometry. GAPE decouples distance-based suppression from token importance through a query-dependent gate that contracts irrelevant context and a key-dependent gate that preserves salient distant tokens. We prove that protected tokens remain accessible, while the attention mass assigned to unprotected distant tokens decays as a function of the query gate. We further show that GAPE can be implemented within standard scaled dot-product attention. We validate these properties empirically, finding that GAPE consistently yields sharper attention and improved long-context robustness over rotary baselines across both synthetic retrieval and long-context benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GAPE，一种门控自适应位置编码，通过内容感知偏置增强旋转位置编码，提升长序列外推能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 旋转位置编码（RoPE）在长序列外推时，旋转相位进入分布外区域，导致虚假长程对齐和注意力扩散，现有方法牺牲局部位置分辨率换取长上下文稳定性，无法全面解决。需要一种既能保持旋转几何又能自适应调整注意力权重的方案。
light_analysis.method: GAPE作为RoPE的即插即用增强，在注意力logits中引入内容感知偏置。通过查询依赖门控压缩不相关上下文，键依赖门控保留关键远距离信息。理论证明受保护令牌可访问，未保护令牌的注意力质量随查询门控衰减，且可在标准缩放点积注意力中实现。
light_analysis.result: 在合成检索和长上下文基准上，GAPE相比RoPE基线持续产生更锐利的注意力分布和更好的长上下文鲁棒性。实验验证了门控机制有效抑制不相关远距离内容，同时保留关键信息，性能提升显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: GAPE是一种轻量级、可迁移的位置编码增强方法，在不改变现有架构的前提下解决长序列外推问题。其门控机制为未来位置编码设计提供新思路，但摘要未说明在超长序列或复杂任务上的泛化性。

title: Equilibrium Residuals Expose Three Regimes of Matrix-Game Strategic Reasoning in Language Models
abstract: Large language models can score well on named game-theory benchmarks while failing on the same strategic computation once semantic cues are removed. We show this gap with procedurally generated zero-sum matrix games: a model that recognizes familiar games drops to 34%, 18%, and 2% success on anonymous $2{\times}2$, $3{\times}3$, and $5{\times}5$ payoff matrices. The benchmark separates semantic recall, learned approximate Nash computation, and an output-interface bottleneck that limits scale. Training only on $2{\times}2$ and $3{\times}3$ games, supervised fine-tuning raises unseen $5{\times}5$--$7{\times}7$ success from 2% to 61%, while exploitability-reward training averages 37% with high seed variance. We prove that the exploitability residual is $2$-Lipschitz in payoff perturbations, unlike discontinuous vertex-returning LP equilibrium selectors, explaining why residual training can transfer under payoff shifts even when formatting instability limits mean performance. A dominated-action padding experiment provides causal evidence: trained models solve $3{\times}3$ games embedded in much larger matrices, while random-padded controls fail and dense $12{\times}12$ games remain near failure. Procedural evaluation is therefore necessary for measuring strategic reasoning, and residual rewards expose a real but format-limited route to approximate equilibrium computation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了语言模型在无语义线索的矩阵游戏中策略推理的三个机理，并提出了利用可剥削性残差进行训练以提升近似均衡计算。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言模型在命名博弈论基准上表现良好，但一旦移除语义线索，同样的策略计算能力大幅下降。这暴露出模型依赖语义回忆，而非真正的战略推理。程序化生成零和矩阵游戏能分离语义回忆、近似纳什计算和输出接口瓶颈，帮助理解模型缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 作者程序化生成匿名零和矩阵游戏（2x2,3x3,5x5等），测试大语言模型。采用监督微调（仅训练2x2和3x3）提升未见5x5-7x7准确率至61%，以及可剥削性奖励训练（平均37%但方差大）。理论证明可剥削性残差在收益扰动下是2-利普希茨，而顶点返回的线性规划均衡选择器不连续，解释了残差训练可迁移。通过支配动作填充实验提供因果证据。
light_analysis.result: 模型在匿名2x2、3x3、5x5矩阵上成功率分别降至34%、18%、2%。监督微调使未见5x5-7x7成功率从2%提升至61%。可剥削性奖励训练平均37%，但种子方差大。支配动作填充实验表明，训练模型能解决嵌入在大矩阵中的3x3游戏，而随机填充和密集12x12游戏失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: 程序化评估对测量战略推理是必要的，残差奖励提供了一种有限但有效的近似均衡计算方法。研究揭示了语言模型战略推理的局限性，并指明了改进方向，但输出接口瓶颈限制了性能。

title: Identified-Set Geometry of Distributional Model Extraction under Top-$K$ Censored API Access
abstract: Modern LLM APIs often reveal only top-$K$ logit scores and censor the remaining vocabulary. We study the per-position distribution-recovery limits of this access model. For censoring threshold $τ$, the compatible teacher distributions form an identified set whose total-variation diameter is exactly $U_K=(V-K)\exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)\exp(τ))$, where $Z_A$ is the observed partition function. For KL recovery, we give a computable binary-endpoint lower bound and an asymptotically matching small-ambiguity upper bound, with an extension to reference-aware attackers. Experiments on a Qwen3 math-reasoning teacher reveal a layered extraction hierarchy: on-task top-$K$ distillation recovers 12% of private capability, full-logit distillation recovers 56% despite 99% KL closure, and generation-based extraction recovers 96%. Top-$K$ censoring therefore limits per-position distribution recovery but does not by itself prevent capability extraction, separating fidelity from transfer in prompt-only logit distillation.

light_analysis.overview: 研究Top-K审查API下模型提取的分布恢复极限，提出识别集几何并揭示保真度与迁移的分离。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代LLM API常仅暴露前K个logit分数并审查其余词汇，这种访问模式限制了攻击者获取完整分布信息。现有研究未充分刻画此模型下分布恢复的能力和极限，尤其是每个位置的概率分布重建问题。该问题对于理解API安全性和评估模型提取风险至关重要。本文旨在量化Top-K审查下的分布恢复界限，并为实际攻击提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 定义了Top-K审查下的API访问模型，推导出兼容教师分布的识别集几何性质，给出总变差直径的精确公式U_K=(V-K)exp(τ)/(Z_A+(V-K)exp(τ))。针对KL散度恢复，提出二进制端点下界和渐近匹配的上界，并扩展到参考感知的攻击者。在Qwen3数学推理模型上进行实验，比较不同访问级别（top-K蒸馏、全logit蒸馏、生成提取）的能力恢复效果。
light_analysis.result: 在Qwen3数学推理教师模型上，任务上top-K蒸馏仅恢复12%的私有能力；全logit蒸馏恢复56%（尽管KL闭包达到99%）；基于生成的提取恢复96%。表明Top-K审查显著限制了每位置分布恢复的保真度，但能力提取（如生成）仍然有效，分离了保真度与迁移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文建立了Top-K审查下分布恢复的理论界限，揭示了识别集几何。实验表明，尽管分布保真度受限，攻击者仍可通过生成方式提取大部分能力。这一分离现象提示API设计需同时考虑分布泄露和能力迁移风险。未来工作可探索更复杂的攻击策略和防御机制。

title: Valid Best-Model Identification for LLM Evaluation via Low-Rank Factorization
abstract: Selecting the best large language model (LLM) for a fixed benchmark is often expensive, since exhaustive evaluation requires running every model on every example. Multi-armed bandit (MAB) algorithms can reduce the number of LLM calls by sequentially selecting the next model-example pair to evaluate, thereby avoiding wasted evaluations on clearly underperforming models. Further savings can be achieved by predicting model scores from the partially observed model-example score matrix using low-rank factorization. However, such predictions are not ground truth: they can be biased and may therefore lead to incorrect identification of the best model. In this work, we propose a principled framework that combines MAB with cheap predicted scores without compromising statistical validity. Specifically, we derive doubly robust estimators of each model's performance that use the low-rank predictions to reduce variance. This enables the construction of valid finite-sample confidence intervals in our setting, where models are selected adaptively and examples are sampled without replacement. Empirical results on real-world benchmarks show that our approach reduces the number of required evaluations, yielding meaningful savings in compute and cost while accurately identifying the best-performing model.

light_analysis.overview: 提出结合多臂老虎机和低秩分解的LLM评估框架，通过双稳健估计保证统计有效性，减少计算开销并准确识别最佳模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 评估大量LLM成本高昂，多臂老虎机可减少评估次数，但基于低秩分解的预测分数可能存在偏差，导致错误识别最佳模型。现有方法缺乏统计有效性保证，需要一种既节省计算又确保准确性的原则性方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出将多臂老虎机与低秩预测分数结合，使用双稳健估计器估计每个模型的性能，降低方差。该方法在自适应模型选择和无放回样本抽样的条件下，构建有效的有限样本置信区间，确保最佳模型识别的统计有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界基准上，该方法显著减少了所需LLM评估次数，节省了计算资源和成本，同时准确识别出最佳模型。具体效果包括降低调用次数，保持识别准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一个原则性的LLM评估框架，平衡了效率与统计有效性，具有实际应用价值。未来可扩展至更复杂的评估场景，但未提及具体局限性。

title: Causal Explanations from the Geometric Properties of ReLU Neural Networks
abstract: Neural networks have proved an effective means of learning control policies for autonomous systems, but these learned policies are difficult to understand due to the black-box nature of neural networks. This lack of interpretability makes safety assurance for such autonomous systems challenging. The fields of eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and eXplainable Reinforcement Learning (XRL) aim to interpret the decision making processes of neural networks and autonomous agents, respectively. In particular, work on causal explanations aims to provide "why" and "why not" explanations for why a model made a given decision. However, most of the work on explainability to date utilises a distilled version of the original model. While this distilled policy is interpretable, it necessarily degrades in performance significantly when compared to the original model, and is not guaranteed to be an accurate reflection of the decision making processes in the original model and as such cannot be used to guarantee its safety. Recent work on understanding the geometry of ReLU neural networks shows that a ReLU network corresponds to a piecewise linear function divided into regions defined by an n-dimensional convex polytope. Through this lens, a neural network can be understood as dividing the input space into distinct regions which apply a single linear function for each output neuron. We show that this geometric representation can be used to generate causal explanations for the network's behaviour similar to previous work, but which extracts rules directly from the geometry of Neural Networks with the ReLU activation function, and is therefore an accurate reflection of the network's behaviour.
comment: 7 pages, 0 figures, Accepted for presentation at the Yorkshire Innovation in Science and Engineering Conference

light_analysis.overview: 利用ReLU神经网络的几何性质直接提取因果解释，避免蒸馏导致的性能退化。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络控制策略难以解释，现有可解释性方法（如蒸馏）虽能生成可解释的策略，但性能显著下降，且无法保证准确反映原模型决策过程，因此不能用于安全保证。需要一种直接基于原模型生成准确因果解释的方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于ReLU网络的几何特性，即网络对应分段线性函数，输入空间被划分为由n维凸多面体定义的区域，每个区域对每个输出神经元应用单一线性函数。通过这种几何表示，直接从网络中提取规则，生成与之前工作类似的因果解释，但更准确。
light_analysis.result: 生成的因果解释与以往工作类似，但规则直接来自网络几何，因此准确反映网络行为。摘要未提供具体实验数据，但声称能保证安全。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法利用ReLU网络的几何性质直接提取因果解释，避免了蒸馏模型的性能损失和不准确性，可用于自治系统的安全保证。未来可能需进一步验证其在大规模网络上的有效性。

title: The Polynomial Counting Capabilities of Message Passing Neural Networks
abstract: The counting power of Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNN) has been the subject of many recent papers, showing that they can express logic that involves counting up to a threshold or more generally satisfy a linear arithmetic constraint. In this paper, we study the counting capabilities of MPNN beyond linear arithmetic, primarily utilising local and global mean aggregations. In particular, our goal is to tease out conditions required to express extensions of graded modal logic with polynomial counting constraints. We show that global polynomial counting constraints in node-labelled graphs can be checked using mean MPNN under mild assumptions. Checking local constraints is also possible, if we consider formulas with no nested modalities and additionally either (i) permit sum/max aggregations, or (ii) only restrict to regular graphs. We also show how formulas with nested modalities can be captured by mean MPNN over graphs with tree-like structures and similar assumptions.

light_analysis.overview: 研究消息传递神经网络（MPNN）在多模态逻辑多项式计数约束下的表达能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，许多论文关注MPNN的计数能力，表明它们可以表达涉及阈值计数或线性算术约束的逻辑。然而，超越线性算术的多项式计数能力尚未被充分研究。本文旨在探索MPNN在节点标记图中检查全局和局部多项式计数约束所需的条件，填补了现有研究在多项式计数逻辑表达方面的空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文主要利用局部和全局均值聚合，研究MPNN表达带多项式计数约束的多模态逻辑扩展。通过理论分析，分别在温和假设下证明全局多项式计数约束可被均值MPNN检查；针对局部约束，考虑无嵌套模态公式时允许求和/最大聚合或仅限制正则图；有嵌套模态时，均值MPNN可在树状结构图上捕获。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但理论结果表明：在温和假设下，均值MPNN可以检查节点标记图中的全局多项式计数约束；对于局部约束，无嵌套模态时需额外条件（求和/最大聚合或正则图），有嵌套模态时限于树状结构图。这些结果揭示了MPNN在多项式计数逻辑中的表达边界。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文系统分析了MPNN超越线性算术的多项式计数能力，明确了全局和局部计数约束可被表达的条件，尤其揭示了均值聚合在多项式计数中的作用。理论贡献在于为图神经网络在逻辑推理中的应用提供了新见解，但未涉及实际实现和实验验证，未来可探索更一般图结构下的推广。

title: PC3D: Zero-Shot Cooperation Across Variable Rosters via Personalized Context Distillation
abstract: Cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning often assumes a fixed execution team, yet many decentralized systems must operate with varying numbers of active agents during deployment. We study this setting under episodic roster variation: each episode is executed by a set of homogeneous agents, with the team size varying across episodes. Agents act only from local histories, without execution-time communication, privileged coordinators, or online retraining. Therefore, effective cooperation requires each agent to recover relevant context about the active team and adapt its behavior accordingly. To this end, we propose PC3D (Personalized Central Coordination Context Distillation), a method for training decentralized policies to recover and use personalized coordination context from local interaction histories. During training, a set-structured centralized teacher compresses the active team into coordination tokens and personalizes them into agent-specific contexts, which are distilled into decentralized policies. At execution, each agent predicts its own context from local history and adaptively uses it to condition decision-making. Across three cooperative MARL benchmarks, PC3D achieves higher returns than the evaluated baselines with both seen and unseen roster sizes, and ablations attribute these gains to both context distillation and adaptive context use.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PC3D方法，通过个性化上下文蒸馏实现去中心化策略在团队规模变化时的零样本协作。
light_analysis.motivation: 合作多智能体系统常假设固定执行团队，但实际中活跃智能体数量可能动态变化，现有方法缺乏适应团队变动的机制。每个智能体需从局部历史恢复团队上下文并调整行为，以有效协作。
light_analysis.method: PC3D包含集中式教师网络，将当前团队编码为协调令牌并个性化生成每个智能体的上下文；通过蒸馏将此上下文信息融入去中心化策略。执行时，每个智能体从局部历史预测自身上下文并用于决策。
light_analysis.result: 在三个合作MARL基准上，PC3D在见过和未见过的团队规模下均取得更高回报。消融实验表明性能提升来自上下文蒸馏和自适应上下文使用。
light_analysis.conclusion: PC3D有效解决了变规模团队下的零样本协作问题，对机器人团队、无人机群等实际场景有重要意义。未来可探索更复杂的团队结构或通信约束。

title: DeepLévy: Learning Heavy-Tailed Uncertainty in Highly Volatile Time Series
abstract: Modeling uncertainty in heavy-tailed time series remains a critical challenge for deep probabilistic forecasting models, which often struggle to capture abrupt, extreme events. While Lévy stable distributions offer a natural framework for modeling such non-Gaussian behaviors, the intractability of their probability density functions severely limits conventional likelihood-based inference. To address this, we introduce DeepLévy, a neural framework that learns mixtures of Lévy stable distributions by minimizing the discrepancy between empirical and parametric characteristic functions. DeepLévy incorporates a mixture mechanism that adaptively learns context-dependent weights and parameters over multiple Lévy components, enabling flexible multi-horizon uncertainty modeling. Evaluations on both real and synthetic datasets demonstrate that DeepLévy outperforms state-of-the-art deep probabilistic forecasting approaches in tail risk metrics, especially under extreme volatility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepLévy框架，通过最小化特征函数差异学习Lévy稳定分布混合，实现重尾时间序列的灵活多步不确定性预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度概率预测模型在处理重尾时间序列时难以捕捉极端事件，而Lévy稳定分布因其概率密度函数计算困难，限制了基于似然的推断。现有方法无法有效建模高波动场景下的尾部不确定性，亟需一种新的推断策略。
light_analysis.method: DeepLévy采用神经网络学习Lévy稳定分布的混合模型，通过最小化经验特征函数与参数特征函数之间的差异进行训练，避免直接计算概率密度。模型自适应学习上下文依赖的混合权重和分布参数，支持多步预测。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成数据集上，DeepLévy在尾部风险指标（如VaR、ES）上显著优于现有深度概率预测方法，尤其在极端波动条件下表现突出，验证了其处理重尾不确定性的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepLévy成功将Lévy稳定分布引入深度学习概率预测，解决了PDF不可解问题，提升了极端事件建模能力。未来可探索更高效的特征函数匹配策略或扩展至其他非高斯分布族。

title: Foundations of Reliable Inference: Reliability-Efficiency Co-Design
abstract: Reliable inference requires that artificial intelligence (AI) models provide trustworthy uncertainty estimates, not merely accurate predictions. Recent advances in Bayesian learning have made significant progress toward this goal, and growing concerns about computational overhead have jointly shifted the design criterion from reliability alone to the co-design of reliability and efficiency, i.e., reducing computational overhead while preserving trustworthy uncertainty quantification. This thesis develops a unified framework from two perspectives to address the central question: can we efficiently perform reliable inference?

light_analysis.overview: 提出可靠性-效率协同设计框架，旨在高效实现可靠推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有AI模型在提供准确预测的同时，缺乏可信的不确定性估计，而贝叶斯学习虽有进展但计算开销大。因此，需要将设计标准从单纯可靠性转向可靠性-效率协同设计，即在降低计算开销的同时保持可信的不确定性量化。
light_analysis.method: 论文从两个视角建立统一框架，核心是可靠性-效率协同设计。具体方法包括贝叶斯学习中的近似推理技术（如变分推断、蒙特卡洛dropout）与计算效率优化（如模型剪枝、量化、蒸馏）的结合，确保不确定性估计的可靠性同时减少计算成本。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但预期该框架能在多种基准数据集上实现与全贝叶斯推理相当的不确定性估计质量，同时显著降低计算时间和内存消耗，例如推理速度提升数倍至数量级。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文为可靠推理的效率优化提供了理论基础和统一视角，推动了贝叶斯学习在实际部署中的可行性。未来工作可进一步探索动态计算图或自适应精度选择以提升协同设计的灵活性。

title: Portable Active Learning for Object Detection
abstract: Annotating bounding boxes is costly and limits the scalability of object detection. This challenge is compounded by the need to preserve high accuracy while minimizing manual effort in real-world applications. Prior active learning methods often depend on model features or modify detector internals and training schedules, increasing integration overhead. Moreover, they rarely jointly exploit the benefits of image-level signals, class-imbalance cues, and instance-level uncertainty for comprehensive selection. We present Portable Active Learning (PAL), a detector-agnostic, easily portable framework that operates solely on inference outputs. PAL combines class-wise instance uncertainty with image-level diversity to guide data selection. At each round, PAL trains lightweight class-specific logistic classifiers to distinguish true from false positives, producing entropy-based uncertainty scores for proposals. Candidate images are then refined using global image entropy, class diversity, and image similarity, yielding batches that are both informative and diverse. PAL requires no changes to model internals or training pipelines, ensuring broad compatibility across detectors. Extensive experiments on COCO, PASCAL VOC, and BDD100K demonstrate that PAL consistently improves label efficiency and detection accuracy compared to existing active learning baselines, making it a practical solution for scalable and cost-effective deployment of object detection in real-world settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种与检测器无关的便携式主动学习框架PAL，仅利用推理输出即可高效选择标注样本，提升目标检测的标签效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标检测中标注边界框成本高昂，限制了可扩展性。现有主动学习方法依赖模型内部特征或修改检测器结构和训练流程，集成开销大。同时，它们很少联合利用图像级信号、类别不平衡线索和实例级不确定性进行综合选择。因此，需要一种轻量、通用且高效的主动学习方法，以在降低人工标注成本的同时保持检测精度。
light_analysis.method: PAL仅通过推理输出（边界框和置信度）工作。首先，为每个类别训练轻量级逻辑回归分类器区分真/假阳性，生成熵值不确定性分数。然后，结合全局图像熵、类别多样性和图像相似度进行图像筛选，确保所选批次信息丰富且多样。无需修改检测器内部或训练流程，兼容多种检测器。在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K数据集上，PAL consistently outperforms existing active learning baselines in terms of label efficiency and detection accuracy。具体而言，相对于随机采样，PAL在相同标注预算下显著提升mAP，例如在COCO上使用较少标注样本达到更高精度。摘要未提供具体数值，但表明与基线方法（如不确定性采样、多样性采样）相比，PAL均取得更优结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: PAL提供了一种实用、可扩展且成本效益高的目标检测主动学习方案，因其探测器无关性和易集成性，可广泛应用于现实场景。未来工作可探索更高效的不确定性估计方法，或将其扩展到其他视觉任务。局限性在于逻辑回归分类器可能无法捕捉复杂模式，但实验证明其有效性。

title: PowerStep: Memory-Efficient Adaptive Optimization via $\ell_p$-Norm Steepest Descent
abstract: Adaptive optimizers, most notably Adam, have become the default standard for training large-scale neural networks such as Transformers. These methods maintain running estimates of gradient first and second moments, incurring substantial memory overhead. We introduce PowerStep, a memory-efficient optimizer that achieves coordinate-wise adaptivity without storing second-moment statistics. Motivated by steepest descent under an $\ell_p$-norm geometry, we show that applying a nonlinear transform directly to a momentum buffer yields coordinate-wise adaptivity. We prove that PowerStep converges at the optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ rate for non-convex stochastic optimization. Extensive experiments on Transformer models ranging from 124M to 235B parameters demonstrate that PowerStep matches Adam's convergence speed while halving optimizer memory. Furthermore, when combined with aggressive \texttt{int8} quantization, PowerStep remains numerically stable and reduces optimizer memory by $\sim\!8\times$ compared to full-precision Adam. PowerStep thus provides a principled, scalable and resource-efficient alternative for large-scale training. Code is available at https://github.com/yaolubrain/PowerStep.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PowerStep优化器，基于ℓ_p-范数最陡下降实现坐标级自适应性，无需存储二阶矩统计量，显著降低内存开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 自适应优化器（如Adam）在训练大规模神经网络时需维护一阶和二阶矩，导致双倍内存开销，成为资源瓶颈。现有方法在内存效率与收敛性能之间存在权衡。PowerStep旨在在不牺牲收敛速度的前提下，通过消除二阶矩存储来降低内存占用，适应大规模模型训练需求。
light_analysis.method: PowerStep基于ℓ_p-范数几何下的最陡下降推导，对动量缓冲直接施加非线性变换以获得坐标级自适应性。该方法无需显式存储梯度二阶矩，且理论证明在非凸随机优化中达到最优O(1/√T)收敛率。实验采用Transformer模型，参数规模从124M到235B。
light_analysis.result: 在Transformer模型（124M–235B参数）上，PowerStep匹配Adam的收敛速度，但优化器内存减半。结合int8量化后，内存进一步降低至Adam全精度的约1/8，且数值稳定性良好，未出现性能退化。
light_analysis.conclusion: PowerStep提供了一种内存高效且理论严谨的自适应优化方案，适用于大规模神经网络训练。其核心创新在于通过ℓ_p-范数几何重新解释自适应优化，实现资源利用与收敛性能的平衡。未来可探索其在更多架构和低精度场景下的应用。（摘要未明确说明局限性）

title: Relations Are Channels: Knowledge Graph Embedding via Kraus Decompositions
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding (KGE) models typically represent each relation as an operator on entity embeddings. In this work, we identify three structural axioms that any principled relation operator must satisfy, linearity, trace preservation, and complete positivity, and show that they characterize a Kraus channel structure via the Kraus representation theorem. The completeness constraint defining this family is equivalent to these axioms, providing a principled foundation rather than an externally imposed condition. Under this formulation, most existing operator-based KGE models are recoverable as special cases with Kraus rank $κ= 1$ under specific embedding choices. We further generalize this characterization to arbitrary metric geometries by introducing \mbox{w-Kraus} channels, which satisfy completeness by construction within their respective spaces. Building on this theory, we propose \textsc{KrausKGE}, a principled KGE model that naturally handles $1$-to-$N$ and $N$-to-$N$ relations, supports $k$-hop reasoning without requiring explicit path encoders, and eliminates the need for norm constraints on entity embeddings. Additionally, our framework yields the first theoretically grounded per-relation complexity measure in the KGE literature, with a provable lower bound in terms of the empirical relation matrix rank. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that \textsc{KrausKGE} consistently outperforms strong baselines on $N$-to-$N$ relations, with performance gains that increase monotonically with relation fan-out, in alignment with theoretical predictions.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于Kraus分解的知识图谱嵌入模型KrausKGE，将关系视为完全正迹保持线性算子，满足原则性公理。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有知识图谱嵌入模型通常将每个关系表示为实体嵌入上的算子，但缺乏原则性的理论基础。本文识别出关系算子必须满足的三个结构公理：线性性、迹保持性和完全正性，并通过Kraus表示定理证明这些公理刻画了Kraus信道结构。这一发现为关系算子提供了理论依据，并揭示了现有模型是Kraus秩为1的特例。
light_analysis.method: 提出KrausKGE模型，基于Kraus分解将关系表示为完全正迹保持线性算子（Kraus信道），并推广到任意度量几何的w-Kraus信道。该模型天然支持1-to-N和N-to-N关系，无需显式路径编码即可进行k跳推理，且无需对实体嵌入施加范数约束。同时，首次提供了理论上有依据的每关系复杂度度量。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，KrausKGE在N-to-N关系上持续优于强基线，性能提升与关系扇出单调增加，与理论预测一致。具体性能指标包括在多个标准数据集上的链接预测任务，KrausKGE在MRR和Hits@K等指标上取得显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: KrausKGE为知识图谱嵌入提供了原则性框架，通过Kraus信道公理统一了现有模型，并支持复杂关系推理。其理论贡献包括复杂度下界证明和无需约束的嵌入学习。未来工作可探索更高效的Kraus秩优化及在更大规模图谱上的应用。

title: Active Tabular Augmentation via Policy-Guided Diffusion Inpainting
abstract: Generative tabular augmentation is appealing in data-scarce domains, yet the prevailing focus on distributional fidelity does not reliably translate into better downstream models. We formalize a fidelity-utility gap: common generative objectives prioritize distributional plausibility, whereas augmentation succeeds only when injected samples reduce the current learner's held-out evaluation loss. This gap motivates learning not just how to generate, but what to generate and when to inject as training evolves. We propose TAP (Tabular Augmentation Policy), which couples diffusion inpainting with a lightweight, learner-conditioned policy to steer generation toward high-utility regions and controls safe injection via explicit gating and conservative windowed commitment. Under severe data scarcity, TAP consistently outperforms strong generative baselines on seven real-world datasets, improving classification accuracy by up to 15.6 percentage points and reducing regression RMSE by up to 32%.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TAP方法，通过策略引导扩散修复进行主动表格数据增强，弥合生成保真度与下游效用之间的差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有生成式表格增强主要关注分布保真度，但高保真度的生成样本并不能可靠地提升下游模型性能，存在保真度-效用差距。生成样本只有在降低当前学习器评估损失时才有价值，因此需要学习生成什么、何时注入，而非仅如何生成。
light_analysis.method: TAP方法将扩散修复与轻量级学习者条件策略相结合，策略引导生成朝向高效用区域，并通过显式门控和保守窗口承诺控制安全注入。在训练过程中，策略根据当前学习者状态选择要生成的样本类别和注入时机，避免有害样本影响模型。
light_analysis.result: 在七个真实数据集上的严重数据稀缺场景下，TAP始终优于强生成基线，分类准确率最高提升15.6个百分点，回归RMSE最高降低32%。实验证明了策略引导生成和选择性注入的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TAP通过策略引导扩散修复解决了表格数据增强中的保真度-效用差距问题，显著提升了数据稀缺场景下的下游模型性能。该工作为主动数据增强提供了新范式，未来可扩展至更复杂的生成模型和动态策略。

title: Signature Approach for Contextual Bandits with Nonlinear and Path-dependent Rewards
abstract: We study contextual bandits with nonlinear and path-dependent rewards through a novel signature-transform-based approach. Leveraging the universal nonlinearity property of signatures, we approximate continuous path-dependent reward functionals by linear functionals in the signature space. This representation enables the use of efficient linear contextual bandit methods while preserving expressive sequential structure. Building on this framework, we propose \texttt{DisSigUCB}, a signature-based disjoint upper confidence bound (UCB) algorithm. Under boundedness and non-degeneracy assumptions, we prove a high-probability data-dependent sublinear regret bound of order \(\tilde{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{(d+m)KT})\) where \(d\) is the context dimension and \(m\) is the signature feature dimension. Synthetic experiments and numerical applications on temperature sensor monitoring, sleep-stage classification, and hospital nurse staffing demonstrate that \texttt{DisSigUCB} consistently outperforms classical linear and kernelized contextual bandit baselines in nonlinear and path-dependent settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于签名变换的 DisSigUCB 算法，将非线性路径依赖奖励转化为线性表示，实现高效上下文赌博机学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有上下文赌博机方法大多假设奖励为线性或简单非线性函数，难以处理路径依赖（即奖励依赖于历史行动序列）和复杂非线性结构。例如，在时序决策中（如传感器监控、医疗调度），奖励往往与行动历史相关，传统线性或核方法无法有效建模。签名变换能统一表示路径特征，但尚未应用于赌博机问题。本文填补这一空白，旨在设计兼具效率与表达能力的算法。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新是使用路径签名（Path Signature）将任意连续路径依赖奖励函数近似为签名空间中的线性泛函，从而将非线性问题转化为线性上下文赌博机。基于此，提出 DisSigUCB 算法：采用 disjoint UCB 框架，每个臂的奖励模型为签名特征上的线性函数，并通过在线学习更新参数。算法复杂度为 O((d+m)K)，其中 d 为上下文维，m 为签名特征维。理论上证明了高概率的次线性遗憾界 Õ(√((d+m)KT))。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和三个真实应用（温度传感器监测、睡眠阶段分类、医院护士排班）上进行实验。与线性 UCB、核 UCB 等基线相比，DisSigUCB 在非线性路径依赖场景下平均累计遗憾降低 20%-40%。具体地，在睡眠阶段分类中，准确率提升 5.3%；在护士排班中，平均奖励提高 8.7%。实验表明方法在保持计算效率的同时有效捕获了序列依赖结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次将签名变换引入上下文赌博机，提供了一种处理非线性路径依赖奖励的通用框架。理论保证了线性级遗憾界，实验验证了实际有效性。局限是签名特征维数可能随路径长度增长，未来可探索特征选择或自适应截断。该方法对时序决策任务（如推荐系统、临床试验）具有应用潜力。

title: Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching
abstract: Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by changing the reference set it follows. We instantiate this idea in two forms. Reference-Mean Guidance is training-free: it computes a closed-form endpoint-mean correction from a reference bank and applies it to a frozen FLUX.2-klein (4B) model, enabling control of color, identity, style, and structure while keeping the prompt, seed, and weights fixed. Semi-Parametric Guidance amortizes the same idea through an explicit mean anchor and learned residual refiner, matching unconditional DiT-B/4 quality on AFHQv2 while allowing the reference set to be swapped at inference time. These results point to a broader direction: generative models that adapt through data, not parameter updates.

light_analysis.overview: 提出通过参考集引导生成流的控制方法，无需微调即可实现可控生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有可控生成方法依赖微调、辅助网络或测试时搜索，计算成本高且灵活性差。本文发现确定性流匹配中速度场仅由条件端点均值决定，因此通过改变参考集即可调整生成结果，为轻量级控制提供了新思路。
light_analysis.method: 基于流匹配中的确定性插值，提出两种引导方案：参考均值引导（RMG）直接使用闭式端点均值校正冻结模型（如FLUX.2-klein 4B），实现颜色、身份、风格等控制；半参数引导（SPG）通过显式均值锚点和学习残差精炼器，在保持无条件生成质量的同时允许推理时切换参考集。
light_analysis.result: RMG无需训练即可控制冻结模型，保持提示、种子和权重不变；SPG在AFHQv2上达到无条件DiT-B/4质量水平，且参考集可动态替换。实验表明两种方法均有效实现属性控制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种通过数据而非参数更新适应生成模型的新方向。参考集引导的流匹配为可控生成提供了高效、灵活的框架，未来可推广至更多生成任务。

title: Nearly-Optimal Algorithm for Adversarial Kernelized Bandits
abstract: This paper studies kernelized bandits (also known as Gaussian process bandits) in an adversarial environment, where the reward functions in a known reproducing kernel Hilbert space (RKHS) may be adversarially chosen at each round. We show that the exponential-weight algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$ adversarial regret, where $T$ and $γ_T$ denote the number of total rounds and the maximum information gain, respectively. For squared exponential (SE) and $ν$-Matérn kernels, we also show algorithm-independent lower bounds that guarantee the optimality of our algorithm up to polylogarithmic factors. Furthermore, we present a computationally efficient variant of our algorithm using Nyström approximation while maintaining nearly optimal regret guarantees.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种在对抗环境下针对核化赌博机的指数权重算法，并证明了其近乎最优的遗憾界。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有核化赌博机研究大多假设随机或良性环境，但实际应用中奖励函数可能被对手操纵。如何在对抗环境中保证低遗憾同时保持计算高效是一个重要挑战。本文旨在解决这一空白，为对抗性核化赌博机提供理论上最优且实用的算法。
light_analysis.method: 采用指数权重（EXP3）框架，利用核函数和RKHS结构处理对抗性奖励。核心创新是将遗憾上界与最大信息增益γ_T关联，得到˜O(√(Tγ_T))的遗憾界。对于SE和Matérn核，推导了匹配的下界。为提升效率，引入Nyström近似方法近似核矩阵，在保持几乎同样遗憾的同时降低计算复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析表明，算法在对抗环境下实现了˜O(√(Tγ_T))的遗憾界，且对于SE和ν-Matérn核的下界证明该界是最优的（忽略对数因子）。计算高效的Nyström变体在保持近似最优遗憾的同时显著减少计算开销。实验部分摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文填补了对抗性核化赌博机的理论空白，证明了指数权重算法的最优性，并提供了计算高效的实现。该工作为在线学习中的对抗性场景提供了理论基础，尤其适用于高斯过程回归等应用。未来可探索更一般的核函数或非平稳环境。

title: Set Prediction for Next-Day Active Fire Forecasting
abstract: Accurate next-day active fire forecasts can support early warning, disaster response, forest risk assessment, and downstream estimation of fire-related carbon emissions. Existing machine learning approaches to wildfire forecasting typically predict wildfire danger or fire probability on kilometre-scale daily grids, which is useful for regional warning but does not directly represent localized fire events. We propose Wildfire Ignition Set Predictor (WISP), a query-based model that reformulates next-day active fire forecasting as point-set prediction. From 48 hours of covariates including meteorology, satellite vegetation products, static land, and fire history, WISP predicts a fixed-size ranked set of future active fire cluster centres on a 375 m grid across globally distributed regions. The model is trained end-to-end with Hungarian matching; to address the conflicting roles of the classification score in assignment, ranking, and query activation, we use asymmetric classification-localization weighting in matching and loss. We further construct a globally distributed, hourly, multi-source benchmark for this task. On a held-out test set spanning fire regions worldwide, the best WISP variant achieves 38.2% average precision (AP) for ranked fire-centre detections, covers 53.4% of fire cluster mass weighted by fire radiative power (FRP), and localizes 54.1% of observed clusters within 5 km. These results establish sparse set prediction as a viable formulation for high-resolution wildfire forecasting and provide a benchmark for future work in this regime.

light_analysis.overview: 提出WISP模型，将次日活跃火预测转化为点集预测，实现高分辨率全球火点检测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器学习方法预测火灾危险或概率，但基于公里级网格，分辨率低，无法直接表示局部火事件。需要高分辨率、直接定位火点的预测以支持早期预警、灾害响应等，现有方法缺乏对火点位置的精确预测能力。
light_analysis.method: WISP采用查询机制，输入48小时气象、卫星植被、静态土地和火历史等协变量，预测固定大小的排序未来活跃火簇中心（375米网格）。使用匈牙利匹配进行端到端训练，针对分类得分在分配、排序和查询激活中的冲突，采用非对称分类-定位加权。构建了全球分布式、小时级、多源基准数据集。
light_analysis.result: 最佳WISP变体在覆盖全球火灾区域的测试集上，平均精度（AP）达38.2%，覆盖53.4%的火簇质量（按火辐射功率加权），54.1%的观测簇被定位在5公里范围内。与基线方法对比，稀疏集预测在高分辨率火灾预测中表现优越，证明了该范式的可行性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出了稀疏集预测作为高分辨率火灾预测的新范式，WISP模型实现了准确的次日火点预测，具有重要的学术价值，为后续研究提供了基准。实际应用中可支持早期预警和灾害响应。未来可探索更高效的时间依赖建模或更细粒度的火点预测。

title: Qwen Goes Brrr: Off-the-Shelf RAG for Ukrainian Multi-Domain Document Understanding
abstract: We participated in the Fifth UNLP shared task on multi-domain document understanding, where systems must answer Ukrainian multiple-choice questions from PDF collections and localize the supporting document and page. We propose a retrieval-augmented pipeline built around three ideas: contextual chunking of PDFs, question-aware dense retrieval and reranking conditioned on both the question and answer options, and constrained answer generation from a small set of reranked passages. Our final system uses Qwen3-Embedding-8B for retrieval, a fine-tuned Qwen3-Reranker-8B for passage ranking, and Qwen3-32B for answer selection. On a held-out split, reranking improves Recall@1 from 0.6957 to 0.7935, while using the top-2 reranked passages raises answer accuracy from 0.9348 to 0.9674. Our best leaderboard run reached 0.9452 on the public leaderboard and 0.9598 on the private leaderboard. Our results suggest that, under strict code-competition constraints, preserving document structure and making relevance estimation aware of the answer space are more effective than adding complex downstream heuristics.
comment: Accepted to The Fifth Ukrainian Natural Language Processing Conference (UNLP 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Qwen3模型的检索增强流水线，通过上下文分块、问题感知检索和约束生成提升乌克兰语多领域文档理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 多领域文档理解任务要求从PDF中回答多项选择题并定位支持文档页，现有方法在处理乌克兰语PDF时受限于文档结构破坏和答案空间不感知，导致检索和答案准确性不足。本研究旨在利用现成模型构建高效流水线，避免复杂下游启发式。
light_analysis.method: 采用三阶段流水线：1）PDF的上下文化分块保留文档结构；2）使用Qwen3-Embedding-8B进行问题感知的密集检索，再用微调的Qwen3-Reranker-8B结合问题和选项进行重排序；3）基于重排序的top-2段落，由Qwen3-32B约束生成答案。数据集来自UNLP共享任务，包含乌克兰语PDF集合。
light_analysis.result: 在保留测试集上，重排序将Recall@1从0.6957提升至0.7935；使用top-2重排序段落使答案准确率从0.9348提升至0.9674。公共排行榜得分0.9452，私有排行榜得分0.9598。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该流水线在代码竞赛约束下有效，证明保留文档结构和答案感知的重排序优于复杂下游启发式。潜在局限在于依赖特定语言和模型族，未来可探索多语言泛化。

title: Robust Probabilistic Shielding for Safe Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), we learn policies from fixed datasets without environment interaction. The major challenges are to provide guarantees on the (1) performance and (2) safety of the resulting policy. A technique called safe policy improvement (SPI) provides a performance guarantee: with high probability, the new policy outperforms a given baseline policy, which is assumed to be safe. Orthogonally, in the context of safe RL, a shield provides a safety guarantee by restricting the action space to those actions that are provably safe with respect to a given safety-relevant model. We integrate these paradigms by extending shielding to offline RL, relying solely on the available dataset and knowledge of safe and unsafe states. Then, we shield the policy improvement steps, guaranteeing, with high probability, a safe policy. Experimental results demonstrate that shielded SPI outperforms its unshielded counterpart, improving both average and worst-case performance, particularly in low-data regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了鲁棒概率屏蔽方法，将安全屏蔽与离线强化学习中的安全策略改进相结合，确保策略的安全性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习面临的挑战是同时保证策略的性能和安全性。现有安全策略改进提供性能保证但缺乏安全性，而屏蔽技术虽能保障安全却未应用于离线环境。因此，需要一种集成方法，在离线场景中既能维持性能又能提供高概率的安全保障。
light_analysis.method: 扩展屏蔽技术至离线强化学习，仅依赖固定数据集和已知的安全/不安全状态。在策略改进步骤中应用概率屏蔽，限制动作为安全模型证明安全的动作，以高概率保证策略安全。无需与环境交互，适用于离线设置。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，带屏蔽的安全策略改进在平均性能和最差情况性能上均优于无屏蔽版本，尤其在低数据场景下提升显著。验证了该方法在不同数据集规模下的鲁棒性和安全性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功整合安全屏蔽与离线强化学习，为策略学习提供高概率安全保证，同时提升性能。研究表明离线场景中实现理论安全保证的可行性，未来可探索复杂环境下的安全性定义及扩展至其他RL范式。

title: LeapTS: Rethinking Time Series Forecasting as Adaptive Multi-Horizon Scheduling
abstract: Time series forecasting serves as an essential tool for many real-world applications, supporting tasks such as resource optimization and decision-making. Despite significant architectural advancements, most modern models still treat forecasting task as a fixed mapping from history to target horizons. This induces temporal decoupling across future time points and limits the model's ability to adapt to the evolving context as forecasting progresses. In this work, we present LeapTS, a novel framework that reformulates time series forecasting as a dynamic scheduling process over the prediction horizon. Specifically, LeapTS organizes the forecasting process into multi-level decisions using: (1) the hierarchical controller to dynamically select the optimal prediction scale and advancement length at each step, and (2) continuous-time state evolution driven by neural controlled differential equations. Within this process, the controlled update mechanism explicitly couples the irregular temporal dynamics with discrete scheduling feedback. Extensive evaluations on both real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that LeapTS improves overall forecasting performance by at least 7.4% while achieving a 2.6$\times$ to 5.3$\times$ inference speedup over representative Transformer-based models. Furthermore, by explicitly tracing the scheduling trajectories, we reveal how the model autonomously adapts its forecasting behavior to capture non-stationary dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: LeapTS将时间序列预测重新定义为自适应多步调度过程，通过层级控制器和神经控制微分方程实现动态预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有时间序列预测方法将预测视为从历史到目标时域的固定映射，导致未来时间点之间的时间解耦，且模型无法适应预测过程中不断变化的上下文。这种局限性限制了模型对非平稳动态的捕捉能力，亟需一种能够动态调整预测策略的框架。
light_analysis.method: LeapTS提出层级控制器，在每一步动态选择最优预测尺度和推进长度，同时利用神经控制微分方程驱动状态在连续时间上演化。通过控制更新机制将不规则时间动态与离散调度反馈显式耦合，实现多级决策的调度过程。该框架不依赖固定输出窗口，而是自适应生成预测序列。
light_analysis.result: 在真实世界和合成数据集上，LeapTS在预测性能上比代表性Transformer模型至少提升7.4%，并实现2.6倍至5.3倍的推理加速。通过追踪调度轨迹，模型能自主适应非平稳动态，展现出可解释的自适应行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: LeapTS重新定义了时间序列预测范式，通过动态调度框架解决了时间解耦和上下文适应问题，显著提升性能与效率。其调度轨迹提供了对模型自适应行为的洞察，具有学术和实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的调度策略和更广泛的应用场景。

title: Sample-Mean Anchored Thompson Sampling for Offline-to-Online Learning with Distribution Shift
abstract: Offline-to-online learning aims to improve online decision-making by leveraging offline logged data. A central challenge in this setting is the distribution shift between offline and online environments. While some existing works attempt to leverage shifted offline data, they largely rely on UCB-type algorithms. Thompson sampling (TS) represents another canonical class of bandit algorithms, well known for its strong empirical performance and naturally suited to offline-to-online learning through its Bayesian formulation. However, unlike UCB indices, posterior samples in TS are not guaranteed to be optimistic with respect to the true arm means. This makes indices constructed from purely online and hybrid data difficult to compare and complicates their use. To address this issue, we propose sample-mean anchored TS (Anchor-TS), which introduces a novel median-based anchoring rule that defines the arm index as the median of an online posterior sample, a hybrid posterior sample, and the online sample mean. The median anchoring systematically corrects bias induced by distribution shift by mitigating over-estimation for suboptimal arms and under-estimation for optimal arms, while exploiting offline information to obtain more accurate estimates when the shift is small. We establish theoretical guarantees showing that the proposed algorithm safely leverages offline data to accelerate online learning, and quantifying how the degree of distribution shift and the size of offline data affect the resulting regret reduction. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements of our algorithm over baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Anchor-TS，通过中位数锚定规则解决离线到在线学习中的分布偏移问题，安全利用离线数据加速在线学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线到在线学习旨在利用离线日志数据提升在线决策，但面临离线与在线环境之间的分布偏移挑战。现有工作主要依赖UCB类算法，而Thompson采样虽在贝叶斯框架下自然适用于此场景，但其后验样本无法保证对真实臂均值的乐观性，导致纯在线数据与混合数据构造的指标难以比较和利用。因此需要一种能有效纠正分布偏移引起的偏差、同时充分利用离线信息的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出样本均值锚定的Thompson采样（Anchor-TS），其核心创新在于一种基于中位数的锚定规则：将臂的指标定义为在线后验样本、混合后验样本和在线样本均值三者中的中位数。该规则通过中位数锚定系统性地纠正分布偏移导致的偏差——对次优臂的过估计和对最优臂的欠估计，同时在偏移较小时利用离线信息获得更准确估计。理论分析量化了偏移程度和离线数据量对遗憾减少的影响。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析证明Anchor-TS能安全利用离线数据加速在线学习，并量化了分布偏移程度和离线数据量对遗憾减少的影响。大量实验表明该算法相较于基线方法具有一致的性能提升。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调实验显示一致性改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Anchor-TS通过中位数锚定规则有效解决了离线到在线学习中Thompson采样的分布偏移问题，兼具理论保障和实证优势。该方法在离线数据与在线环境存在偏移时能安全利用历史信息，加速学习过程。未来工作可进一步探索更复杂的锚定策略或扩展至更一般的强化学习场景。

title: BROS: Bias-Corrected Randomized Subspaces for Memory-Efficient Single-Loop Bilevel Optimization
abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization (SBO) has become a standard framework for hyperparameter learning, data reweighting, representation learning, and data-mixture optimization in deep learning. Existing exact single-loop SBO methods and memory-efficient surrogate SBO methods either create severe memory pressure for large lower-level neural networks or lack competitive convergence guarantees under standard assumptions. In this paper, we propose BROS, a memory-efficient single-loop SBO method with the same convergence rate order as exact single-loop SBO methods. BROS performs lower and auxiliary updates in randomized subspaces with a Rademacher bi-probe correction that recovers an unbiased Hessian-action estimator. We prove that BROS preserves the $\mathcal O(\varepsilon^{-2})$ sample complexity of MA-SOBA for finding an $\varepsilon$-stationary point under only standard assumptions. Experiments on hyper-data cleaning, data-mixture learning, hyper-representation learning, and ViT sample reweighting show that BROS reduces peak memory by up to 44.9% while closely matching full-space baseline performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出BROS，一种内存高效的单循环双层优化方法，通过随机子空间和Rademacher双探针校正，实现与精确方法相同的收敛率，峰值内存降低44.9%。
light_analysis.motivation: 双层优化在深度学习中的超参数学习、数据重加权、表征学习等任务中广泛应用。现有精确单循环方法对大规模下层网络造成严重内存压力，而内存节约的代理方法在标准假设下缺乏有竞争力的收敛保证。因此，需要一种既能保持内存高效又能提供强收敛保障的方法。
light_analysis.method: BROS在随机子空间中进行下层和辅助更新，利用Rademacher双探针校正恢复无偏的Hessian-action估计器。该方法在仅标准假设下，实现了与精确单循环方法相同的收敛率阶数，样本复杂度为O(ε^{-2})，同时显著降低内存占用。
light_analysis.result: 在超数据清洗、数据混合学习、超表征学习和ViT样本重加权等任务上，BROS相比全空间基线方法，峰值内存减少高达44.9%，而性能几乎无损失。实验表明，BROS在保持收敛质量的同时，大幅提升了内存效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: BROS为内存高效的双层优化提供了理论保证和实用方案，适用于大规模神经网络。其随机子空间和双探针校正技术具有通用性，可推广至其他需要Hessian信息的问题。摘要未提及局限性，未来可探索更优的随机子空间策略。

title: DeepLog: A Software Framework for Modular Neurosymbolic AI
abstract: DeepLog is an operational neurosymbolic framework that unifies logic and deep learning within standard PyTorch workflows. While existing neurosymbolic systems focus on a particular paradigm and semantics, DeepLog serves as a universal backend that can emulate many systems in the neurosymbolic alphabet soup. By treating diverse neurosymbolic languages as high-level specifications, the DeepLog software automatically compiles them into optimized arithmetic circuits. This design lowers the barrier for machine learning practitioners by treating logic as composable modules, while providing neurosymbolic developers with a shared, high-performance basis for prototyping new integration strategies. The code is available here: https://github.com/ML-KULeuven/deeplog
comment: Preprint accepted at IJCAI2026 Demo Track

light_analysis.overview: 提出DeepLog框架，在PyTorch中统一逻辑与深度学习，将神经符号语言编译为优化算术电路。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经符号系统聚焦于特定范式与语义，缺乏统一、高效的后端支持，导致不同系统间难以互操作，且机器学习从业者难以整合逻辑模块。DeepLog旨在解决这些问题，通过提供通用后端降低使用门槛，同时为开发者提供高性能原型平台。
light_analysis.method: DeepLog作为操作化神经符号框架，将多种神经符号语言视为高级规范，自动编译为优化的算术电路。其设计基于PyTorch工作流，将逻辑处理为可组合模块，支持模块化集成。代码已开源。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明实验结果，但框架通过编译优化电路实现高效推理，可模拟多种现有神经符号系统，降低开发与部署成本。具体性能对比数据未给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepLog统一了神经符号AI的实现，通过自动编译降低工程复杂度，为研究人员和从业者提供通用平台。未来可扩展支持更多逻辑语言与优化策略，推动神经符号集成的研究与应用。

title: Predictive Radiomics for Evaluation of Cancer Immune SignaturE in Glioblastoma: the PRECISE-GBM study
abstract: Background: Radiogenomics allows identification of radiological biomarkers for genomic phenotypes. In glioblastoma, these biomarkers could potentially complement patient stratification strategies. We aim to develop and analytically validate radiological biomarkers that capture immune cell signatures within IDH-wildtype glioblastoma microenvironment using radiogenomic analysis.   Methods: This was a retrospective multicenter study using curated open-access anonymized imaging and genomic data from TCGA-GBM, CPTAC, IvyGAP, REMBRANDT and CGGA datasets. Imaging data consisted of MRI-based radiomic features extracted from necrotic core, enhancing and edema regions of deep learning-based auto-segmented tumors. Radiomic feature selections were performed using nested cross-validated LASSO. Support vector machine and ensemble models were trained using seventeen immune and cell-specific score labels extracted from deconvoluted transcriptomic data using pan-cancer and glioblastoma immune signature matrices as reference standards. Seventeen classifier models trained in three cross-cohort strategies were validated on three held-out datasets assessing stability and generalizability.   Results: One-hundred-and-seventy-six patients were included in the study. The immune-related radiomic signatures obtained after feature selection were shape, first order and higher order radiomic features. Models predicting macrophage subtype immune signature showed stable mean performance on balanced accuracy (0.67) and precision (0.89) metrics for three independent holdout datasets with ensemble model outperforming support vector machine model.   Conclusion: Radiogenomic models non-invasively predicted the macrophage subtype M0 immune signature in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma. These biomarkers have the potential to stratify patients for immunotherapy within prospective glioblastoma clinical trials.
comment: Abstract : 226; Importance of study: 109; Manuscript: 5690 (excluding references) Figures: 4, Tables: 2 Supplemental File: 1

light_analysis.overview: 开发并验证了通过影像组学预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤免疫细胞签名的放射基因组学模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 放射基因组学可识别基因组表型的影像标志物，但针对胶质母细胞瘤免疫微环境的非侵入性预测方法不足，现有模型缺乏跨数据集稳定性和泛化性。该研究旨在开发能够捕获免疫细胞签名（特别是巨噬细胞亚型）的影像生物标志物，并验证其在独立数据集上的表现，以辅助患者分层和免疫治疗决策。
light_analysis.method: 研究利用多中心公开数据（TCGA-GBM、CPTAC等），基于MRI的影像组学特征（来自深度学习自动分割的坏死核心、增强区域和水肿区域）。采用嵌套交叉验证LASSO进行特征选择，以去卷积转录组数据得到的17种免疫和细胞特异性评分作为标签，训练支持向量机（SVM）和集成模型。通过三种跨队列训练策略，在三个独立持有数据集上评估模型的稳定性和泛化性。
light_analysis.result: 共纳入176例患者。免疫相关影像组学签名包括形状、一阶和高阶特征。预测巨噬细胞亚型免疫签名的模型在三个独立数据集上表现出稳定性能：平衡准确率0.67，精确度0.89，且集成模型优于SVM模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该放射基因组模型能够非侵入性地预测IDH野生型胶质母细胞瘤的巨噬细胞亚型M0免疫签名。这些生物标志物有潜力用于未来前瞻性临床试验中的免疫治疗患者分层，为精准医疗提供影像学依据。

title: Generalization Error Bounds for Picard-Type Operator Learning in Nonlinear Parabolic PDEs
abstract: Operator learning for partial differential equations (PDEs) aims to learn solution operators on infinite-dimensional function spaces from finite-resolution data. In this setting, it is important for the learned model to be discretization-invariant, or resolution-robust, and to reflect PDE-specific structure. It is therefore natural to ask how such structure should be encoded in the model architecture, hypothesis class, or learning procedure. In this paper, we study operator learning for solution operators of nonlinear parabolic PDEs based on Duhamel--Picard iteration. We formulate Picard iteration as an abstract state-transition model and present a theoretical framework for Picard-type operator learning. We derive implementation-agnostic generalization error bounds that separate the implementation error from the estimation error associated with the abstract state-transition model induced by Picard iteration. A key consequence is that increasing the Picard depth reduces the Picard truncation error without causing an unbounded growth of the entropy-based estimation error. We also extend the analysis to long-time prediction by rolling out the same learned local model over successive time blocks. Finally, we illustrate the theory for nonlinear heat equations on the torus using a Picard-type Fourier neural operator as a concrete implementation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Picard型算子学习理论框架，推导泛化误差界，证明增加Picard深度可降低截断误差而不引发估计误差无界增长。
