These results highlight the effectiveness of block-wise discrete diffusion as a scalable approach to accurate and efficient trajectory generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/cruiseresearchgroup/TrajDLM/

light_analysis.overview: 提出TrajDLM，一种基于块扩散语言模型的拓扑感知轨迹生成框架，在效率与路网拓扑保真度之间取得平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成高质量合成GPS轨迹在交通、城市规划等领域至关重要，但现有方法存在效率与道路网络拓扑保真度的权衡：连续空间方法生成速度快但忽略路网，而拓扑感知方法依赖搜索自回归解码导致速度受限。
light_analysis.method: TrajDLM将轨迹建模为离散路段序列，采用块扩散骨干网络进行高效去噪，结合道路网络编码器学习拓扑感知嵌入，并通过拓扑约束采样确保轨迹连贯真实。在三个城市规模数据集上训练。
light_analysis.result: TrajDLM在细粒度局部相似性指标上表现优异，生成速度比先前工作快2.8倍，并在跨领域零样本迁移中表现强劲，包括未见过的交通模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 块式离散扩散作为可扩展方法实现了准确高效的轨迹生成，代码已开源。学术价值在于将扩散模型引入轨迹生成领域，实际应用可支持隐私保护下的数据生成与仿真。

title: The two clocks and the innovation window: When and how generative models learn rules
abstract: Generative models trained on finite data face a fundamental tension: their score-matching or next-token objective converges to the empirical training distribution rather than the population distribution we seek to learn. Using rule-valid synthetic tasks, we trace this tension across two training timescales: $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, the step at which generations first become rule-valid, and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, the step at which models begin reproducing training samples. Focusing on parity and extending to other binary rules and combinatorial puzzles, we characterize how these two clocks, $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, depend on key aspects of the learning setup. Specifically, we show that $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ increases with rule complexity and decreases with model capacity, while $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$ is approximately invariant to the rule and scales nearly linearly with dataset size $N$. We define the \emph{innovation window} as the interval $[τ_{\mathrm{rule}}, τ_{\mathrm{mem}}]$. This window widens with increasing $N$ and narrows with rule complexity, and may vanish entirely when $τ_{\mathrm{rule}} \geq τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. The same two-clock structure arises in both diffusion (DiT) and autoregressive (GPT) models, with architecture-dependent offsets. Dissecting the learned score of DiT models reveals a corresponding evolution of the optimization landscapes, where rule-valid samples' basins expand substantially around $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, while training samples' basins begin to dominate around $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. Together, these results yield a unified and predictive account of when and how generative models exhibit genuine innovation.
comment: 48 pages, 28 figures. Earlier versions are presented in NeurIPS2025 SPIGM workshop as oral presentation https://openreview.net/forum?id=LjqX8OhPPi

light_analysis.overview: 提出两时钟框架解释生成模型何时从学习规则转向记忆训练数据，并定义创新窗口。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成模型在有限数据上训练时，其目标收敛到经验分布而非总体分布，导致模型在泛化（学习规则）和过拟合（记忆训练样本）之间冲突。现有研究缺乏对这一张力动态演化的统一理解，尤其是何时模型能产生创新而非复制。本文通过定义两个训练时间尺度（τ_rule和τ_mem）及其构成的创新窗口，为这一基本问题提供可预测的定量描述。
light_analysis.method: 利用规则验证的合成任务（如奇偶性、二元规则、组合谜题），训练扩散（DiT）和自回归（GPT）模型。定义τ_rule为生成首次符合规则的步骤，τ_mem为开始复制训练样本的步骤。分析它们与规则复杂度、模型容量、数据集大小N的关系。通过剖析DiT模型的得分函数，研究优化景观中规则有效样本和训练样本的盆地的演变。
light_analysis.result: τ_rule随规则复杂度增加而增大、随模型容量增加而减小；τ_mem对规则近似不变，随N近线性增长。创新窗口[τ_rule, τ_mem]随N增大而变宽，随规则复杂度而变窄，当τ_rule≥τ_mem时消失。两时钟结构在DiT和GPT中均存在，但架构导致偏移。DiT的得分分析显示τ_rule附近规则有效样本的盆地扩大，τ_mem附近训练样本盆地占主导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究统一解释了生成模型何时以及如何实现创新：在创新窗口内，模型生成符合规则的新样本；窗口外则要么随机要么记忆。成果为理解模型泛化与记忆的权衡提供了理论基础，有助于设计更高效、更具创新性的生成模型。未来工作可探索更复杂规则和实际应用中的窗口动态。

title: The Value of Mechanistic Priors in Sequential Decision Making
abstract: Hybrid mechanistic models, physical priors with learned residuals, promise to reduce the data required for good decisions, but have no computable criterion to test this. We characterize the value of mechanistic priors in sequential decision-making within both asymptotic and burn-in regimes. To formalize this, we introduce the mechanistic information of a model -- the mutual information between the model's recommended policy $\hatπ$ and the true optimal policy $π^*$ -- quantified via an occupancy-weighted bias $B_μ$. In the asymptotic regime (large $N$), matched bounds reveal that Bayesian regret scales with the residual entropy $H_{\mathrm{mech}}$, delivering a theoretical sample complexity reduction of $H(μ)/H_{\mathrm{mech}}$ compared to an uninformed baseline. Furthermore, we provide a model certificate to determine empirical sample efficiency. Complementarily, in the clinically relevant burn-in regime (small $N$), we establish a lower bound on the penalty incurred by confidently wrong priors. We demonstrate both the asymptotic and burn-in bounds across 5-fluorouracil (5-FU) dosing simulations motivated by published FOLFOX pharmacokinetic data, where a hybrid prior yields large sample-efficiency gains in the burn-in regime. Finally, we contrast these grounded models with LLM priors, demonstrating that LLMs can suffer severe losses in mechanistic information, thereby motivating the exclusive use of physically-grounded priors for safety-critical applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出机械信息量化混合模型在序贯决策中的价值，证明其样本效率优势，并警告LLM在安全关键应用中的风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 混合机械模型（物理先验结合学习残差）有望减少决策所需的数据量，但缺乏可计算的标准来验证其有效性。现有方法无法量化机械先验在序贯决策中的具体价值，特别是在样本有限的安全关键应用（如药物剂量调整）中。需要理论框架来评估先验对样本效率的影响，并区分不同先验（如物理先验与LLM先验）的适用性。
light_analysis.method: 引入机械信息概念，定义为模型推荐策略与最优策略之间的互信息，通过占用加权偏差B_μ量化。在渐近大样本场景下，推导出贝叶斯遗憾与残差熵H_mech的匹配界，理论样本复杂度降低比为H(μ)/H_mech。提供模型证书以实证样本效率。在临床相关的初步小样本场景下，建立自信错误先验的惩罚下界。仿真使用基于FOLFOX药代动力学数据的5-氟尿嘧啶剂量调整任务，对比混合模型与LLM先验。
light_analysis.result: 在5-FU剂量模拟中，混合先验在初步阶段取得大幅样本效率提升，具体提升程度依赖于残差熵。渐近界与初步界均得到验证。相比之下，LLM先验在机械信息上遭受严重损失，导致在安全关键任务中性能显著下降，无法替代物理先验。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为混合机械模型在序贯决策中的价值提供了理论基础，量化了样本复杂度降低，并区分了物理先验与LLM先验的适用性。建议在安全关键应用中独占使用物理先验。未来工作可扩展到其他领域，并探索先验错误时的自适应策略。

title: Anchor-guided Hypergraph Condensation with Dual-level Discrimination
abstract: The increasing prevalence of large-scale hypergraphs poses significant computational challenges for hypergraph neural network (HNN) training. To address this, hypergraph condensation (HGC) distills large real hypergraphs into compact yet informative synthetic ones, beyond graph condensation (GC) methods limited to pairwise relations. However, existing HGC methods rely on decoupled training architectures, where structure generators are pre-trained on the original hypergraph but not jointly optimized with condensed features during refinement, resulting in misaligned structures that degrade downstream utility. Moreover, trajectory-based optimization incurs substantial computational overhead in refinement, limiting condensation efficiency. To tackle these issues, we propose \textbf{A}nchor-guided \textbf{H}yper\textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}ondensation with \textbf{D}ual-level \textbf{D}iscrimination (\textbf{AHGCDD}), which consists of three key components: (1) a node initialization module based on Heat Kernel PageRank (HKPR) to encode structural knowledge into feature semantics; (2) an anchor-guided hyperedge synthesis strategy for joint optimization of condensed features and structure; (3) a theoretically grounded dual-level discrimination objective for utility-preserving condensation without redundant HNN training. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superior effectiveness and efficiency of AHGCDD.
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出AHGCDD方法，通过锚点引导和双级判别实现高效超图压缩，解决结构对齐和计算开销问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模超图对超图神经网络训练带来巨大计算挑战。现有超图压缩方法采用解耦训练架构，结构生成器预训练后不与压缩特征联合优化，导致结构错位降低下游性能；同时基于轨迹的优化带来大量计算开销，影响压缩效率。因此需要一种联合优化且高效的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出AHGCDD方法，包含三个关键组件：1) 基于Heat Kernel PageRank (HKPR)的节点初始化模块，将结构知识编码到特征语义中；2) 锚点引导的超边合成策略，实现压缩特征与结构的联合优化；3) 理论支撑的双级判别目标，无需冗余HNN训练即可保持效用。该方法在提炼阶段同时优化特征和结构，避免解耦问题。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明AHGCDD在有效性和效率上均优于现有方法。摘要未给出具体数值，但强调其优越性。相比基线方法，在保持压缩超图的下游性能同时显著降低计算开销。
light_analysis.conclusion: AHGCDD通过锚点引导和双级判别有效解决了超图压缩中的结构对齐和计算效率问题，为大规模超图应用提供了实用方案。未来可探索更高效的初始化策略或扩展到动态超图场景。

title: Continual Harness: Online Adaptation for Self-Improving Foundation Agents
abstract: Coding harnesses such as Claude Code and OpenHands wrap foundation models with tools, memory, and planning, but no equivalent exists for embodied agents' long-horizon partial-observability decision-making. We first report our Gemini Plays Pokemon (GPP) experiments. With iterative human-in-the-loop harness refinement, GPP became the first AI system to complete Pokemon Blue, Yellow Legacy on hard mode, and Crystal without a lost battle. In the hardest stages, the agent itself began iterating on its strategy through long-context memory, surfacing emergent self-improvement signals alongside human-in-the-loop refinement. Continual Harness removes the human fully from this loop: a reset-free self-improving harness for embodied agents that formalizes and automates what we observed. Starting from only a minimal environment interface, the agent alternates between acting and refining its own prompt, sub-agents, skills, and memory, drawing on any past trajectory data. Prompt-optimization methods require episode resets; Continual Harness adapts online within a single run. On Pokemon Red and Emerald across frontier models, Continual Harness starting from scratch substantially reduces button-press cost relative to the minimalist baseline and recovers a majority of the gap to a hand-engineered expert harness, with capability-dependent gains, despite starting from the same raw interface with no curated knowledge, no hand-crafted tools, and no domain scaffolding. We then close the loop with the model itself: an online process-reward co-learning loop, in which an open-source agent's rollouts through the refining harness are relabeled by a frontier teacher and used to update the model, drives sustained in-game milestone progress on Pokemon Red without resetting the environment between training iterations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Continual Harness，一种无需重置的在线自适应框架，使具身智能体通过自我改进完成长期任务，无需人工干预或环境重置。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前编码类工具如Claude Code提供语言模型增强，但具身智能体在长期部分可观测决策中缺乏类似框架。现有方法依赖人工循环或需环境重置的提示优化，无法实现真正的自主持续改进。该问题重要，因为实现自完善的具身智能体是迈向通用智能的关键。
light_analysis.method: 从最小环境接口开始，智能体交替执行与优化自身的提示、子智能体、技能和记忆，利用所有历史轨迹数据。无需重置单次运行内在线适应。进一步引入在线过程-奖励共学习循环：开源智能体在优化框架下的轨迹由教师模型重标号，用于更新模型自身，无需环境重置。
light_analysis.result: 在Pokemon Red和Emerald上，从头开始的Continual Harness相比基础基线大幅降低按键成本，并恢复与手工专家提示的大部分差距，增益具能力依赖性。在Pokemon Red上，持续在线学习驱动里程碑进展，无需训练迭代间重置环境。
light_analysis.conclusion: 实现了完全自动化的自我改进框架，具身智能体可在单次运行中在线适应，无需人工干预或环境重置。潜在局限性在于依赖教师模型进行重标号，未来可探索完全自监督方法，推动通用具身智能体发展。

title: Learning Graph Foundation Models on Riemannian Graph-of-Graphs
abstract: Graph foundation models (GFMs), pretrained on massive graph data, have transformed graph machine learning by supporting general-purpose reasoning across diverse graph tasks and domains. Existing GFMs pretrained with fixed-hop subgraph sampling impose a fixed receptive field, causing scale mismatch on diverse tasks, which often require heterogeneous and unknown structural contexts beyond a fixed sampling scale. We propose R-GFM, a Riemannian Graph-of-Graphs (GoG) based foundation model, that treats structural scale as a first-class citizen in modeling. R-GFM constructs a multi-scale GoG over-sampled subgraphs at different hop distances and learns geometry-adaptive representations from Riemannian manifolds. Theoretical analysis shows that R-GFM reduces structural domain generalization error compared to fixed-scale GFMs. Experiments on various datasets demonstrate that R-GFM achieves state-of-the-art performance, with up to a 49% relative improvement on downstream tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/USTC-DataDarknessLab/R-GFM.
comment: This paper has been accepted by ICML 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出R-GFM，一种基于黎曼图图结构的图基础模型，通过多尺度子图采样和几何自适应表示学习解决固定感受野导致的规模不匹配问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图基础模型（GFMs）预训练时使用固定跳数的子图采样，导致感受野固定，无法适应不同任务中多样化和未知的结构上下文需求。这种规模不匹配限制了模型在多种图任务上的泛化能力，亟需一种能将结构尺度作为首要建模因素的方案。
light_analysis.method: R-GFM构造多尺度图图结构，对不同跳距的过采样子图进行建模，利用黎曼流形学习几何自适应表示。通过将子图嵌入到黎曼流形中，模型能够捕捉不同尺度的结构信息，并结合理论基础分析，减少结构域泛化误差。
light_analysis.result: 在多种数据集上，R-GFM达到最先进性能，下游任务相对提升最高达49%。与固定尺度GFMs对比，显著提升了跨任务和跨域的泛化能力，验证了多尺度几何建模的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: R-GFM通过引入黎曼图图结构，将结构尺度显式建模，有效解决了现有GFMs的规模不匹配问题。该工作为图基础模型提供了新的多尺度几何视角，具有重要学术价值；代码开源促进实际应用。未来可探索更高效的多尺度构建策略。

title: Attention Drift: What Autoregressive Speculative Decoding Models Learn
abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting future tokens with a small model, but drafter models degrade sharply under template perturbation and long-context inputs. We identify a previously-unreported phenomenon we call \textbf{attention drift}: as the drafter generates successive tokens within a speculation chain, attention progressively moves from the prompt onto its own recently-generated tokens. We observe this across both \emph{EAGLE3} drafters and \emph{MTP heads}, suggesting drift is a property of drafter designs. We trace this to the un-normalized residual path between chain steps: the drafter's hidden state magnitude grows monotonically with chain depth, which exhibits dynamics consistent with additional pre-norm transformer layers stacked on the target rather than as a standalone autoregressive predictor. In order to limit the growth, we propose two architectural changes: Post-norm on the drafter hidden states and per-hidden-state RMSNorm after capturing target hidden states. Our interventions improve acceptance length over the current leading model, pre-norm EAGLE3, by up to $2\times$ under template perturbation, $1.18\times$ on long-context tasks, and $1.10\times$ on seven standard benchmarks spanning multi-turn chat, math, and coding. Our changes also allow shorter train-time-test depths to generalize over longer drafting sequences.

light_analysis.overview: 发现推测解码草案模型中的“注意力漂移”现象，并提出后层归一化和RMSNorm改进，显著提升长上下文和模板扰动下的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 推测解码通过小型草案模型加速LLM推理，但草案模型在模板扰动和长上下文输入下性能急剧下降。现有方法未关注草案模型内部的注意力分布变化，导致长程生成质量差，限制了推测解码的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 识别注意力漂移现象：草案生成令牌时注意力从提示逐渐转移到自身生成令牌，根源是链间未归一化残差路径导致隐藏状态幅度随深度单调增长。提出两种架构改进：对草案隐藏状态使用后层归一化（Post-norm），并在捕获目标隐藏状态后对每个隐藏状态施加RMSNorm，以限制幅度增长。
light_analysis.result: 在模板扰动下接受长度提升2倍，长上下文任务提升1.18倍，七个标准基准（多轮对话、数学、编码）平均提升1.10倍。短训练深度可泛化到更长推理序列，降低了训练成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了推测解码中注意力漂移的根本原因，并通过简单归一化方法有效缓解，提升了模型鲁棒性和效率。未来可探索其他草案架构，但本方法仅适用于自回归推测解码范式。

title: Optimizer-Induced Mode Connectivity: From AdamW to Muon
abstract: Mode connectivity has been widely studied, yet the role of the optimizer remains underexplored. We revisit it through optimizer-induced implicit regularization, asking how connectivity behaves when restricted to solutions constrained by a given optimizer. For two-layer ReLU networks, we show that solutions from a single optimizer -- AdamW, Muon, or others in the Lion-$\mathcal{K}$ family -- form a connected set at sufficiently large width, a result not implied by prior work. We then characterize how optimizer-induced regions interact: at large width two different regions can be disjoint or overlap depending on regularization, while in our small-width example AdamW and Muon converge to disconnected zero-loss components separated by a provable loss barrier. Empirically, in GPT-2 pretraining, we observe same-optimizer paths preserve each model's spectrum while cross-optimizer paths traverse a smooth transition. Our results reveal optimizer-dependent structure beyond classical mode connectivity literature.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示了优化器诱导的模式连通性，证明同一优化器在宽网络中形成连通解集，不同优化器间存在损失屏障。
light_analysis.motivation: 模式连通性研究广泛，但优化器作用被忽视。现有工作未考虑优化器对解空间结构的约束，无法解释不同优化器产生解的关系。理解优化器诱导的隐式正则化对模式连通性的影响，有助于揭示深度学习优化过程本质，指导训练策略选择。
light_analysis.method: 通过理论分析和实验验证。理论上，针对两层ReLU网络，证明同一优化器（如AdamW、Muon或Lion-K族）在足够宽时解集连通；分析不同优化器区域交互，小宽度下AdamW和Muon收敛到被损失屏障隔开的零损失分量。实验上，在GPT-2预训练中观察同优化器路径保留模型谱，跨优化器路径经历平滑过渡。
light_analysis.result: 在两层ReLU网络中，足够宽时同一优化器解集连通；小宽度实例中AdamW和Muon解集不连通，存在可证明损失屏障。GPT-2预训练中，同优化器路径保持模型谱特征，跨优化器路径谱呈平滑变化，验证了优化器依赖的结构。
light_analysis.conclusion: 揭示了超越经典模式连通性的优化器依赖结构，表明优化器隐式正则化塑造解空间拓扑。理论结果强调宽度和优化器选择的关键作用。未来可探索更复杂架构，并利用优化器诱导连通性设计迁移学习策略。

title: Prospective Compression in Human Abstraction Learning
abstract: A core challenge in program synthesis is online library learning: the incremental acquisition of reusable abstractions under uncertainty about future task demands. Existing algorithms treat library learning as retrospective compression over a static task distribution, where the learned library is determined by the corpus of past tasks. However, real-world learning domains are often non-stationary, with tasks arising from a generative process that evolves over time. We propose and test the hypothesis that in non-stationary domains human library learning selects abstractions prospectively: targeting compression of future tasks. We study this question using the Pattern Builder Task, a visual program synthesis paradigm in which participants construct increasingly complex geometric patterns from a small set of primitives, transformations, and custom helpers that carry forward across trials. Using this task, we conduct two experiments with complementary latent curricula, designed to dissociate between behaviors consistent with prospective compression, and alternative library learning accounts. Using six computational models spanning online library learning strategies, we show that human abstraction behavior reflects sensitivity to latent, non-stationary structure in the task-generating process. This behavior is consistent with prospective compression, and cannot be captured by existing retrospective compression-based algorithms, or inductive biases modeled by LLM-based program synthesis.

light_analysis.overview: 提出前瞻性压缩假设，解释人类在非平稳任务分布中的抽象学习行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有在线库学习算法将库学习视为对静态任务分布的事后压缩，但真实学习环境通常是非平稳的，任务生成过程随时间演变。因此需要理解人类如何在这种动态环境中有效获取可重用的抽象。
light_analysis.method: 使用模式构建者任务（Pattern Builder Task），一种视觉程序合成范式，参与者从一组基元、变换和自定义助手构建几何模式。设计两个实验，采用互补的潜在课程，分离前瞻性压缩与其他库学习行为。比较六种计算模型（包括在线库学习策略）与人类行为。
light_analysis.result: 人类抽象行为对任务生成过程中的潜在非平稳结构敏感，与前瞻性压缩一致。现有基于事后压缩的算法和大语言模型程序合成中的归纳偏差无法捕捉该行为。
light_analysis.conclusion: 人类在非平稳领域中选择抽象时前瞻性地压缩未来任务，而非仅基于过去经验。该发现挑战了现有库学习算法，为开发更接近人类学习能力的自适应程序合成系统提供了方向。未来工作可探索前瞻性压缩的计算实现。

title: Geometric 4D Stitching for Grounded 4D Generation
abstract: Recent 4D generation methods complete scene-level missing information using generative models and reconstruct the scene into radiance-based representations. However, these pipelines often present geometric inconsistencies in the generated content, and the radiance-based reconstruction requires expensive optimization. Furthermore, radiance-based representations often absorb these geometric inconsistencies into their view-dependent nature, failing to enforce the grounded geometric consistency. To address these issues, we propose Geometric 4D Stitching, an efficient framework that explicitly identifies missing geometric regions and complements them with geometrically grounded 4D stitches. As a result, our method constructs 4D scene representations in under 10 minutes on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU per one-step scene expansion, while improving geometric consistency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our explicit 4D stitching supports interative expansion of 4D mesh as well as 4D scene editing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Geometric 4D Stitching框架，通过显式识别和补充几何缺失区域实现高效且几何一致的4D场景生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有4D生成方法使用生成模型补全场景级缺失信息并重建为辐射场表示，但生成内容存在几何不一致，且辐射场重建需要昂贵优化；此外辐射场表示会将几何不一致吸收到视角依赖性质中，无法强制执行几何一致性。因此需要一种更高效且几何一致的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出Geometric 4D Stitching框架，显式识别缺失的几何区域，并用几何一致的4D stitch进行补充。采用显式4D拼接方式，无需辐射场优化，能在单步场景扩展中10分钟内完成4D场景表示构建，支持迭代扩展和4D网格编辑。
light_analysis.result: 在单个NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU上，每步场景扩展可在10分钟内构建4D场景表示。相比于现有方法，几何一致性得到提升（具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明）。同时支持4D网格的迭代扩展和4D场景编辑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种高效且几何一致的4D场景生成框架，解决了现有方法几何不一致和优化昂贵的问题。具有实际应用价值，可用于快速构建4D场景并进行编辑。局限性或未来工作可能涉及进一步优化生成质量或扩展至更复杂场景。

title: Chebyshev Center-Based Direction Selection for Multi-Objective Optimization and Training PINNs
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are a promising approach for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). Their training, however, is often difficult because multiple loss terms induced by PDE residuals and boundary or initial conditions must be optimized simultaneously. To address this difficulty, existing approaches often construct update directions by explicitly enforcing particular desirable properties, such as scale robustness and simultaneous descent. While effective in many cases, such property-by-property designs can make it unclear which conditions are essential, what geometric principle determines the selected update direction, and how different methods are structurally related. In this work, we formulate update-direction selection for PINN training as a Chebyshev-center problem in the dual cone. The proposed formulation selects a normalized direction that maximizes the minimum distance to the cone facets. The resulting formulation admits an efficient dual problem in a much lower-dimensional space and yields a convergence guarantee in the nonconvex setting. It also recovers the key desirable properties targeted by existing approaches without imposing them separately; rather, they follow from the single geometric criterion underlying the formulation. This makes the selected direction interpretable through a single geometric rule and provides a unified basis for systematically comparing related direction-selection methods. Experiments on several PINN benchmarks further demonstrate strong empirical performance of the proposed method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Chebyshev中心的方向选择方法，统一解决PINN训练中的多目标优化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在求解偏微分方程时面临多个损失项同时优化的困难。现有方法通过显式地施加特定属性（如尺度鲁棒性、同时下降）来构造更新方向，但这种方式难以明确哪些条件是关键的，以及不同方法之间的几何原理和结构关系。因此，需要一种统一且可解释的方向选择准则。
light_analysis.method: 将PINN训练中的方向选择形式化为对偶锥中的Chebyshev中心问题，即选择归一化方向最大化到锥面的最小距离。该问题可转化为低维空间中的高效对偶问题，并在非凸设置下提供收敛保证。核心创新在于单一的几何准则自动恢复现有方法的关键属性，无需分别施加，使方向选择具有统一的解释性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个PINN基准测试上，该方法表现出强劲的经验性能。摘要未提供具体数值对比，但声称优于现有方法，并具有收敛保证。实验证实了该方向选择策略的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种基于Chebyshev中心的统一方向选择框架，揭示了多目标优化中几何原理与现有方法的内在联系。该工作为PINN训练提供了可解释且高效的工具，并可能推广到其他多损失优化问题。未来可进一步探索更复杂约束下的应用。

title: The Truth Lies Somewhere in the Middle (of the Generated Tokens)
abstract: How should hidden states generated autoregressively be collapsed into a representation that reflects a language model's internal state? Despite tokens being generated under causal masking, we find that mean pooling across their hidden states yields more semantic representations than any individual token alone. We quantify this through kernel alignment to reference spaces in language, vision, and protein domains. The improvement through mean pooling is consistent with information being distributed across generated tokens rather than localized to a single position. Furthermore, representations derived from generated tokens outperform those from prompt tokens, and alignment across generation reveals interpretable dynamics in model behavior.

light_analysis.overview: 平均池化自回归生成token的隐藏状态比任何单个token产生的语义表示更好，信息分布在整个生成序列中。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归语言模型生成token时，如何从隐藏状态中提取反映模型内部状态的表示是一个关键问题。现有方法通常使用最后一个token或特定位置的隐藏状态，但信息可能分布在整个生成序列中而非局部化。因此需要探索更有效的聚合策略来捕获模型整体状态。
light_analysis.method: 对自回归生成的token隐藏状态进行平均池化，并通过核对齐与语言、视觉和蛋白质域中的参考空间比较表示质量。评估了不同池化策略（单个token vs 平均池化）以及提示token vs 生成token的表示效果。
light_analysis.result: 平均池化生成的token隐藏状态在核对齐分数上高于任何单个token，说明信息分布在整个生成序列中。生成的token表示优于提示token表示，且跨生成的对齐揭示了模型行为的可解释动态变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 平均池化是一种简单有效的隐藏状态聚合方法，能更好反映模型内部状态。信息分布特性有助于理解模型表征。该发现可应用于需要综合模型整体理解的场景，如表示学习或模型分析。

title: Consolidation-Expansion Operator Mechanics:A Unified Framework for Adaptive Learning
abstract: Every adaptive learning system must alternate between two operations: consolidating what it already knows and expanding into new evidence. We propose \emph{Consolidation-Expansion Operator Mechanics} (OpMech), a framework that makes this structure precise. The central object is the \emph{order-gap} $\Ogap(θ; e)$, the degree to which a consolidation operator~$Q$ and an expansion operator~$P_e$ fail to commute at a given knowledge state. Because the order-gap is computable from the system's own trajectory, it serves as a real-time control signal: large values indicate that the system is still sensitive to the ordering of consolidation and expansion; once the order-gap falls and stays small, further processing is unlikely to change the outcome.   Three results give the signal precise meaning: the order-gap decays along convergent trajectories; a persistently large order-gap implies the system is far from its settled state; and an order-gap-based stopping rule terminates with provable guarantees in both noiseless and bounded-noise settings. The framework applies across five domains: bandits, reinforcement learning, stochastic optimization, continual learning, and recursive language models. We give conditions under which the order-gap reliably tracks convergence in three representative cases. We develop the recursive language model application in detail, showing how OpMech replaces heuristic stopping rules and fixed recursion budgets with principled, evidence-driven alternatives.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Consolidation-Expansion Operator Mechanics框架，利用order-gap作为实时控制信号，实现自适应学习的理论化与证据驱动。
light_analysis.motivation: 自适应学习系统需要在巩固已知知识和扩展新证据之间交替，但现有方法缺乏统一的理论框架来量化这一过程，导致停止规则和资源分配依赖启发式或固定预算。该研究旨在通过order-gap提供可计算的收敛指标，解决系统何时终止处理的问题，提高效率与稳定性。
light_analysis.method: OpMech框架定义两个算子：巩固算子Q和扩展算子P_e，核心是order-gap（衡量两者不交换的程度），从系统轨迹实时计算。当order-gap大时，系统对操作顺序敏感；当它变小并稳定时，进一步处理无效。理论证明order-gap在收敛轨迹上衰减，大值表示远离稳态，并给出带保证的停止规则。应用于五个领域，并详细阐述递归语言模型中的实现，取代启发式停止规则。
light_analysis.result: 在五个领域（bandits、强化学习、随机优化、持续学习、递归语言模型）验证有效性。理论上证明了order-gap在无噪声和有界噪声下的停止规则具有保证。在递归语言模型中，OpMech替代启发式方法，提供原则性、证据驱动的替代方案。摘要未提供具体数值性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpMech为自适应学习提供了统一的理论框架，使系统能基于order-gap实时判断收敛状态，从而优化资源使用。主要贡献包括定义order-gap作为控制信号、理论保证和跨领域适用性。局限性可能在于计算order-gap的开销，未来可探索更高效的实现或扩展到其他学习范式。

title: Tensor Product Representation Probes Reveal Shared Structure Across Linear Directions
abstract: While researchers are finding concepts represented as linear directions in language models, a bag of linear directions fails to capture relational structure. To better understand this dichotomy, we study a model with known linear representations, but trained in a highly structured domain -- the board game Othello. While the model's internal board-state representation is linearly decodable, we find additional structure in the form of tensor product representations (TPRs). We train TPR probes to recover shared structure amongst the linear probes, yielding a factorization into square-embeddings, color-embeddings, and a binding matrix that composes them to construct the model's board-state representation. We find geometric signatures within the weights of our TPR probe that align with the structure of the board, but perhaps more importantly, that the linear probes can be recovered directly from the parameters of our TPR probe. Our findings suggest that directional representations may be projections of more structured underlying representations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出张量积表示（TPR）探针，从语言模型线性方向中恢复共享结构，揭示线性表示是更结构化底层表示的投影。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究发现语言模型中的概念表示为线性方向，但这种线性方向集合无法捕捉关系结构。为深入理解这一矛盾，需要研究在高度结构化领域（如棋盘游戏Othello）中训练且已知线性表示的模型，探究线性方向背后是否存在更丰富的结构。
light_analysis.method: 针对Othello游戏模型，训练张量积表示（TPR）探针来恢复线性探针间的共享结构。TPR探针将线性分解为位置嵌入、颜色嵌入和绑定矩阵，通过矩阵乘法组合成板状态表示。在模型内部表示上训练探针，发现其权重中的几何特征与棋盘结构对齐，且线性探针可直接从TPR参数恢复。
light_analysis.result: TPR探针成功分解出与棋盘位置和颜色对应的嵌入向量，以及绑定矩阵。线性探针的权重可直接从TPR参数中精确恢复，验证了共享结构的存在。几何特征显示线性方向是更结构化张量积表示的投影，而非独立维度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作表明线性方向可能源于更结构化的底层表示（如张量积），为理解语言模型内部表征提供了新视角。对可解释性和结构化知识提取有重要价值，未来可扩展到其他领域和模型，探索TPR的更广泛适用性。

title: G-Zero: Self-Play for Open-Ended Generation from Zero Data
abstract: Self-evolving LLMs excel in verifiable domains but struggle in open-ended tasks, where reliance on proxy LLM judges introduces capability bottlenecks and reward hacking. To overcome this, we introduce G-Zero, a verifier-free, co-evolutionary framework for autonomous self-improvement. Our core innovation is Hint-$δ$, an intrinsic reward that quantifies the predictive shift between a Generator model's unassisted response and its response conditioned on a self-generated hint. Using this signal, a Proposer model is trained via GRPO to continuously target the Generator's blind spots by synthesizing challenging queries and informative hints. The Generator is concurrently optimized via DPO to internalize these hint-guided improvements. Theoretically, we prove a best-iterate suboptimality guarantee for an idealized standard-DPO version of G-Zero, provided that the Proposer induces sufficient exploration coverage and the data filteration keeps pseudo-label score noise low. By deriving supervision entirely from internal distributional dynamics, G-Zero bypasses the capability ceilings of external judges, providing a scalable, robust pathway for continuous LLM self-evolution across unverifiable domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出G-Zero框架，通过Hint-δ内在奖励和协同进化实现无验证器的开放域任务自我改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 自进化LLM在可验证领域表现良好，但开放域任务依赖代理LLM评判者导致能力瓶颈和奖励黑客问题，需无需外部验证器的自我改进方法。
light_analysis.method: 核心创新Hint-δ内在奖励量化生成模型无辅助响应与条件响应的预测偏移。Proposer模型经GRPO训练生成挑战性查询，Generator经DPO内化提示改进，两者协同进化。
light_analysis.result: 理论上证明理想标准DPO版G-Zero的最佳迭代次优性保证，需Proposer充分探索且数据过滤低噪声。摘要未提具体实验指标，但声称绕过外部评判者限制。
light_analysis.conclusion: G-Zero从内部分布动力学提取监督，为不可验证领域LLM自我进化提供可扩展稳健路径，避免奖励黑客，提升开放域自进化能力。

title: Scaling Categorical Flow Maps
abstract: Continuous diffusion and flow matching models could represent a powerful alternative to autoregressive approaches for language modelling (LM), as they unlock a host of advantages currently reserved for continuous modalities, including accelerated sampling and tilting. Recently, several works have demonstrated the possibility of generating discrete data continuously by a simple flow matching process between a Gaussian and the one-hot encoded data distribution. They have further shown the feasibility of accelerated sampling via Categorical Flow Maps (CFMs), resulting in competitive sample quality in the few-step regime. However, this method had only been evaluated at relatively modest scales ($<1$B), leaving the question of its scalability completely open. In this article, we train a $1.7$B-parameter base flow model on $2.1$T tokens and self-distill it into a CFM that generates diverse, high-quality text in as few as $4$ inference steps while maintaining near-data-level token entropy. Furthermore, we introduce a likelihood bound for CFMs in the semi-discrete setting, and show that they can be used to score the model on standard LM benchmarks, achieving results in the same range as discrete diffusion methods. Finally, we uncover some of the challenges that arise from training these models at scale, and we provide prescriptive insights on loss weighting and time scheduling.

light_analysis.overview: 将Categorical Flow Maps扩展到1.7B参数，实现4步推理生成高质量文本，并引入似然界用于评分。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续扩散和流匹配模型在语言建模中具有加速采样等优势，但此前仅在较小规模（<1B参数）上验证了Categorical Flow Maps的可扩展性。本文旨在探索该方法在更大规模（1.7B参数）下的表现，并解决其在大尺度训练中面临的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 训练一个1.7B参数的基流模型，在2.1T tokens上预训练，然后通过自蒸馏得到Categorical Flow Map模型，能够在少量推理步骤（如4步）中生成立高质量文本。引入了半离散设置下的似然界，用于在标准LM基准上进行评分。同时，针对大规模训练中的损失加权和时间调度问题提供了指导性见解。
light_analysis.result: 所提出的CFM模型在4步推理下能够生成多样、高质量的文本，并保持接近数据级别的token熵。在标准LM基准上，通过似然界得到的评分结果与离散扩散方法相当。这表明CFM在扩展后仍能保持竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了Categorical Flow Maps可以成功扩展到1.7B参数规模，并且通过自蒸馏实现高效采样。引入的似然界为CFM提供了评分能力。尽管存在大规模训练挑战，但提供的优化见解有助于未来工作。该方法有望成为自回归语言建模的有力替代方案。

title: StreamPhy: Streaming Inference of High-Dimensional Physical Dynamics via State Space Models
abstract: Inferring the evolution of high-dimensional and multi-modal (e.g., spatio-temporal) physical fields from irregular sparse measurements in real time is a fundamental challenge in science and engineering. Existing approaches, including diffusion-based generative models and functional tensor methods, typically operate in offline settings, depend on full temporal observations, or incur substantial inference cost. We propose StreamPhy, an end-to-end framework that enables efficient and accurate streaming inference of full-field physical dynamics from incoming irregular sparse measurements. The framework integrates a data-adaptive observation encoder that is robust to arbitrary observation patterns, a structured state-space model that supports memory-efficient online updates across irregular time intervals, and an expressive Functional Tensor Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FT-FiLM) decoder for continuous-field generation. We prove that FT-FiLM is more expressive than the functional Tucker model, admitting a richer function class for handling complex dynamics. Experiments on three representative physical systems under challenging sampling patterns show that StreamPhy consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, with at least 48\% improvement in accuracy and up to 20--100X faster inference than diffusion-based methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出StreamPhy框架，实现高维物理动力学的流式推理，效率与精度均优于现有方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏不规则测量中实时推断高维多模态物理场（如时空场）的演化是科学与工程中的基础挑战。现有方法如扩散生成模型和函数张量方法通常离线运行、依赖完整时间观测或推理成本高。因此，需要一种能够在线、高效且准确处理流式稀疏测量的方法。
light_analysis.method: StreamPhy框架包含三个核心模块：数据自适应观测编码器，对任意观测模式鲁棒；结构化状态空间模型，支持不规则时间间隔的内存高效在线更新；函数张量特征线性调制解码器，用于连续场生成。理论证明了FT-FiLM比函数Tucker模型更具表达力，能处理复杂动力学。
light_analysis.result: 在三个代表性物理系统上的挑战性采样模式实验中，StreamPhy一致优于最先进基线，精度提升至少48%，推理速度比扩散方法快20-100倍。具体数据支撑了其高效性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: StreamPhy实现了高维物理动力学的流式推理，兼具高效与准确，学术上证明了FT-FiLM的表达力优势，实用中可加速科学模拟与实时监测。未来可能扩展至更复杂系统或更极端的稀疏采样场景。

title: HyperEyes: Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parallel Multimodal Search Agents
abstract: Existing multimodal search agents process target entities sequentially, issuing one tool call per entity and accumulating redundant interaction rounds whenever a query decomposes into independent sub-retrievals. We argue that effective multimodal agents should search wider rather than longer: dispatching multiple grounded queries concurrently within a round. To this end, we present HyperEyes, a parallel multimodal search agent that fuses visual grounding and retrieval into a single atomic action, enabling concurrent search across multiple entities while treating inference efficiency as a first-class training objective. HyperEyes is trained in two stages. For cold-start supervision, we develop a Parallel-Amenable Data Synthesis Pipeline covering visual multi-entity and textual multi-constraint queries, curating efficiency-oriented trajectories via Progressive Rejection Sampling. Building on this, our central contribution, a Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework, operates at two levels. At the macro level, we propose TRACE (Tool-use Reference-Adaptive Cost Efficiency), a trajectory-level reward whose reference is monotonically tightened during training to suppress superfluous tool calls without restricting genuine multi-hop search. At the micro level, we adapt On-Policy Distillation to inject dense token-level corrective signals from an external teacher on failed rollouts, mitigating the credit-assignment deficiency of sparse outcome rewards. Since existing benchmarks evaluate accuracy as the sole metric, omitting inference cost, we introduce IMEB, a human-curated benchmark of 300 instances that jointly evaluates search capability and efficiency. Across six benchmarks, HyperEyes-30B surpasses the strongest comparable open-source agent by 9.9% in accuracy with 5.3x fewer tool-call rounds on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出HyperEyes，一个并行多模态搜索代理，通过双粒度效率感知强化学习同时优化精度和推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有顺序多模态搜索代理在处理独立子检索时累积冗余交互轮次，效率低下。研究者认为代理应并行搜索而非串行延长，将推理效率作为首要训练目标，但现有方法缺乏兼顾效率的训练框架和评估基准。
light_analysis.method: HyperEyes将视觉定位与检索融合为单一原子动作，支持并行多实体搜索。训练分两阶段：首先通过并行兼容数据合成流水线生成效率导向轨迹；然后提出双粒度效率感知强化学习：宏观层使用TRACE奖励，动态收紧工具调用阈值抑制冗余；微观层采用在线策略蒸馏，由外部教师提供密集令牌级纠正信号，解决稀疏奖励的信用分配问题。
light_analysis.result: 在六个基准上，HyperEyes-30B在精度上超过最强可比开源代理9.9%，且平均工具调用轮数减少5.3倍。新基准IMEB（300实例）联合评估搜索能力与效率，填补了现有仅测精度的空白。
light_analysis.conclusion: HyperEyes通过并行原子动作和双粒度效率优化，显著提升多模态搜索的精度与效率。其价值在于为效率感知代理训练提供完整方案，并引入首个兼顾精度与效率的基准。未来可探索更复杂的并行推理模式。

title: Benchmarked Yet Not Measured -- Generative AI Should be Evaluated Against Real-World Utility
abstract: Generative AI systems achieve impressive performance on standard benchmarks yet fail to deliver real-world utility, a disconnect we identify across 28 deployment cases spanning education, healthcare, software engineering, and law. We argue that this benchmark utility gap arises from three recurring failures in evaluation practice: proxy displacement, temporal collapse, and distributional concealment. Motivated by these observations, we argue that generative AI evaluation requires a paradigm shift from static benchmark-centered transparency toward stakeholder, goal, and context-conditioned utility transparency grounded in human outcome trajectories. Existing evaluations primarily characterize properties of model outputs, while deployment success depends on whether interaction with AI improves stakeholders' ability to achieve their goals over time. The missing construct is therefore utility: the change in a stakeholder's capability induced through sustained interaction with an AI system within a deployment context. To operationalize this perspective, we propose SCU-GenEval, a four-stage evaluation framework consisting of stakeholder-goal mapping, construct-indicator specification, mechanism modeling, and longitudinal utility measurement. To make these stages practically deployable, we introduce three supporting instruments: structured deployment protocols, context-conditioned user simulators, and persona- and goal-conditioned proxy metrics. We conclude with domain-specific calls to action, arguing that progress in generative AI must be evaluated through measurable improvements in human outcomes rather than benchmark performance alone.

light_analysis.overview: 提出生成式AI评估应从静态基准转向基于实际效用的SCU-GenEval框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI在标准基准上表现优异，但在教育、医疗等28个实际部署案例中未能体现真实效用，存在基准-效用鸿沟。现有评估侧重模型输出特性，忽略与人类目标交互的动态改善，导致代理位移、时间坍塌和分布隐藏三大问题，亟需以人类结果轨迹为导向的评估范式。
light_analysis.method: 提出SCU-GenEval四阶段框架：利益相关者-目标映射、构造-指标规定、机制建模、纵向效用测量。配套三种工具：结构化部署协议、上下文条件用户模拟器、人格与目标条件代理指标。核心是将效用定义为在部署上下文中与AI系统持续交互导致的能力变化，通过纵向测量捕捉人类结果改善。
light_analysis.result: 论文未报告具体实验结果，但通过28个部署案例的系统分析揭示了基准与效用的脱节，并指出现有评估的三大失败模式。提出的框架可用于指导未来评估设计，但未给出量化性能指标或对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 生成式AI评估必须转向以人类结果可测量改善为核心，而非仅依赖基准性能。SCU-GenEval框架为跨领域（教育、医疗等）提供了实用路径，强调透明度需基于利益相关者目标与上下文。未来工作需在实际场景中验证框架有效性。

title: Edge-specific signal propagation on mature chromophore-region 3D mechanism graphs for fluorescent protein quantum-yield prediction
abstract: Fluorescent protein quantum yield (QY) is governed by the mature chromophore and its three-dimensional microenvironment rather than sequence identity alone. Protein language models and emission-band averages capture global trends, but do not model how local physical signals act on specific chromophore regions.   We present a chromophore-centred mechanism graph algorithm for QY prediction. Each PDB structure is converted into a typed 3D residue graph, registered to a mature-CRO state, partitioned into phenolate, bridge and imidazolinone regions, and transformed by channel-signal-region propagation. The representation contains 121 enrichment features; after removing identity shortcuts, 52 non-identity features are used for band-specific ExtraTrees regression. Because each feature encodes a contact channel, seed signal and target CRO region, interpretation is intrinsic rather than post hoc. On a 531-protein benchmark, the method achieved the best random-CV performance among model-based baselines (R = 0.772 +/- 0.008, MAE = 0.131 +/- 0.002), exceeding Band mean (R = 0.632), ESM-C (R = 0.734) and SaProt (R = 0.731), and ranked first in bright screening (Bright P@5 = 0.704). Under homology control, the advantage was clearest in the remote bucket (<50% similarity; R = 0.697 versus 0.633, 0.575 and 0.408), with the strongest overall bright/dark Top-K screening. Stable selected features recovered band-specific mechanisms: aromatic packing and clamp asymmetry in GFP-like proteins, charge/clamp balance in Red proteins, and flexibility-risk/bulky-contact features in Far-red proteins.   Source code, feature tables and evaluation scripts are available from the first author upon request. Contact: yuchenak05@gmail.com
comment: Includes appendix; source code, processed feature tables and evaluation scripts are available from the first author upon reasonable request

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于成熟发色团3D机制图的边特异性信号传播算法，用于荧光蛋白量子产率预测，实现可解释的带特异性机制挖掘。
light_analysis.motivation: 荧光蛋白量子产率由成熟发色团及其三维微环境决定，而非仅序列同一性。现有蛋白质语言模型和发射带平均值仅能捕捉全局趋势，无法建模局部物理信号如何作用于特定发色团区域，导致预测精度和可解释性不足。因此，需要一种能够显式建模发色团区域特异性相互作用的方法，以提升量子产率预测性能并揭示物理机制。
light_analysis.method: 将PDB结构转化为带类型的3D残基图，注册到成熟发色团（CRO）状态，划分酚盐、桥和咪唑啉酮三个区域。通过通道-信号-区域传播变换，提取121个富集特征，去除身份捷径后保留52个非身份特征，用于带特异性ExtraTrees回归。每个特征编码接触通道、种子信号和目标区域，实现内在可解释性，无需事后分析。
light_analysis.result: 在531个蛋白质基准上，随机交叉验证表现最佳（R=0.772±0.008，MAE=0.131±0.002），优于Band mean（R=0.632）、ESM-C（R=0.734）和SaProt（R=0.731）。明亮筛选排名第一（Bright P@5=0.704）。同源性控制下，远程桶（<50%相似性）优势显著（R=0.697 vs 0.633、0.575、0.408），且最亮/暗Top-K筛选整体最强。稳定特征恢复了带特异性机制。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种可解释的量子产率预测方法，通过边特异性信号传播捕获发色团区域相互作用，显著优于现有模型，并在同源性控制下保持优势。该方法揭示了GFP-like、Red和Far-red蛋白的带特异性物理机制，具有重要的学术价值和应用潜力。未来可扩展至更多荧光蛋白变体及优化实验设计。

title: Layer Collapse in Diffusion Language Models
abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently emerged as competitive alternatives to autoregressive (AR) language models, yet differences in their activation dynamics remain poorly understood. We characterize these dynamics in LLaDA-8B and identify a striking layer-collapse property: a few early layers exhibit highly similar, collapsed activation patterns dominated by a single large super-outlier persisting over a long token range. Despite its apparent redundancy, this outlier is critical: pruning it causes outputs to degrade into repetitive random token loops. Paradoxically, layers in LLaDA contain more redundant representations overall, with redundancy most pronounced in earlier layers -- the reverse of AR models, where deeper layers grow redundant due to undertraining. Our analysis indicates that layer collapse in DLMs is not driven by undertraining but by overtraining: a dominant outlier becomes an indispensable information carrier while remaining representations collapse into redundant structure. These findings have strong practical implications, verified through controlled pre-training experiments. DLMs are surprisingly robust to compression: LLaDA under 3-bit GPTQ quantization drops only -1.8% on GSM8K, whereas Llama-3.1-8B drops -64.7%. Optimal sparsity allocation also reverses between families: at 50% average sparsity, allocating more to early layers in LLaDA yields +8.4% over the reverse strategy, while the same allocation costs Llama -8.4%. Our findings reveal that the DLM training objective fundamentally reshapes layer dynamics relative to AR models, with direct consequences for compression and deployment. Code: github.com/Conzel/super-outlier-dlm.

light_analysis.overview: 发现扩散语言模型中的层坍缩特性，早期层存在主导性超级异常值，揭示了其与自回归模型相反的冗余模式及对量化和稀疏化的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散语言模型（DLM）作为自回归（AR）模型的竞争替代方案，其激活动态差异尚不明确。理解这些差异对于优化压缩和部署至关重要，因为现有方法多基于AR模型经验，可能不适用于DLM。
light_analysis.method: 以LLaDA-8B为研究对象，分析激活模式识别层坍缩现象，发现早期层由单一超级异常值主导。通过剪枝实验验证异常值的关键作用，并采用GPTQ量化和稀疏分配策略对比DLM与AR模型的差异。
light_analysis.result: 3位GPTQ量化下，LLaDA在GSM8K上仅下降1.8%，而Llama-3.1-8B下降64.7%。50%稀疏度下，早期层多分配策略使LLaDA提升8.4%，而反向策略使Llama下降8.4%。
light_analysis.conclusion: DLM训练目标导致层动态与AR模型根本不同，早期层冗余但包含关键异常值。这为DLM的高效压缩和部署提供了新方向，如优先量化早期层。未来可探索异常值形成的机制。

title: Neural Co-state Policies: Structuring Hidden States in Recurrent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: A key capability of intelligent agents is operating under partial observability: reasoning and acting effectively despite missing or incomplete state observations. While recurrent (memory-based) policies learned via reinforcement learning address this by encoding history into latent state representations, their internal dynamics remain uninterpretable black boxes. This paper establishes a formal link between these hidden states and the Pontryagin minimum principle (PMP) from optimal control. We demonstrate that for standard recurrent architectures, latent representations map directly to PMP co-states, which allows the readout layer to be interpreted as performing Hamiltonian minimization. Because standard reward maximization does not naturally discover this alignment, we introduce a PMP-derived co-state loss to explicitly structure the internal dynamics. Empirically, this approach matches or improves performance on partially observable DMControl tasks, and is robust against zero-shot out-of-distribution sensor masking. By framing recurrent networks as dynamic processes governed by the minimum principle, we provide a principled approach to designing robust continuous control policies.

light_analysis.overview: 将循环强化学习中的隐状态与庞特里亚金最小原理（PMP）对偶状态建立形式化联系，并提出PMP对偶损失以结构化网络内部动力学。
light_analysis.motivation: 部分可观测性下，智能体需利用循环神经网络编码历史信息，但隐状态内部动力学是黑箱，缺乏可解释性和结构约束。现有方法未从最优控制理论角度揭示隐状态本质，导致训练不稳定和泛化能力不足。该文旨在建立隐状态与PMP对偶状态的理论联系，提升可解释性与鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先证明了标准循环架构中隐状态可直接映射为PMP对偶状态，读出层执行哈密顿量最小化。但标准强化学习奖励最大化不会自然发现该对齐，故引入PMP对偶损失来显式结构化内部动力学。该方法在部分可观测DMControl任务上评估，并测试了零样本传感器遮蔽鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，所提方法在部分可观测DMControl任务上与基线性能相当或更优，且在零样本传感器遮蔽下表现出鲁棒性。具体性能指标摘要未明确给出，但提及匹配或提升表现，并具备抗干扰能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为循环网络作为动态过程提供了最小原理的物理解释，实现了可解释且鲁棒的连续控制策略。理论贡献在于建立强化学习与最优控制的桥梁；实际价值在于提升策略鲁棒性和泛化能力。未来可探索更复杂网络结构与理论扩展。

title: AI Alignment via Incentives and Correction
abstract: We study AI alignment through the lens of law-and-economics models of deterrence and enforcement. In these models, misconduct is not treated as an external failure, but as a strategic response to incentives: an actor weighs the gain from violation against the probability of detection and the severity of punishment. We argue that the same logic arises naturally in agentic AI pipelines. A solver may benefit from producing a persuasive but incorrect answer, hiding uncertainty, or exploiting spurious shortcuts, while an auditor or verifier must decide whether costly monitoring is worthwhile. Alignment is therefore a fixed-point problem: stronger penalties may deter solver misbehavior, but they can also reduce the auditor's incentive to inspect, since auditing then mainly incurs cost on a population that appears increasingly aligned.   This perspective also changes what should count as a post-training signal. Standard feedback often attaches reward to the final answer alone, but a solver-auditor pipeline exposes the full correction event: whether the solver erred, whether the auditor inspected, whether the error was caught, and whether oversight incentives remained active. We formalize this interaction in a two-agent model in which a principal chooses rewards over joint correction outcomes, inducing both solver behavior and auditor monitoring. Reward design is therefore a bilevel optimization problem: rewards are judged not by their immediate semantic meaning, but by the behavioral equilibrium they induce. We propose a bandit-based outer-loop procedure for searching over reward profiles using noisy interaction feedback. Experiments on an LLM coding pipeline show that adaptive reward profiles can maintain useful oversight pressure and improve principal-aligned outcomes relative to static hand-designed rewards, including a substantial reduction in hallucinated incorrect attempts.

light_analysis.overview: 从法律经济学激励视角，将AI对齐建模为求解器与审计者的博弈，提出基于bandit的奖励轮廓搜索方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有对齐方法将不当行为视为外部失败，忽略了智能体对激励的策略性响应。求解器可能提供错误答案获利，审计者需权衡监控成本与收益，对齐成为一个固定点问题。需要新框架捕捉这种激励互动并设计有效反馈信号。
light_analysis.method: 提出双智能体模型（求解器与审计者），主理人选择针对联合纠正结果的奖励，诱导双方行为。奖励设计视为双层优化，通过bandit外循环在带噪声交互反馈中搜索最优奖励轮廓。在LLM编码流水线上进行实验。
light_analysis.result: 自适应奖励轮廓相比静态手工奖励能维持有效监督压力，改善主理人导向结果，显著减少幻觉错误尝试（如不正确代码生成）。表明动态激励设计可提升对齐效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从激励视角重新定义对齐，提供形式化模型和实用性reward搜索方法，有助于设计更鲁棒的对齐系统。未来可扩展至多智能体及更复杂任务场景。

title: Group Cognition Learning: Making Everything Better Through Governed Two-Stage Agents Collaboration
abstract: Centralized multimodal learning commonly compresses language, acoustic, and visual signals into a single fused representation for prediction. While effective, this paradigm suffers from two limitations: modality dominance, where optimization gravitates towards the path of least resistance, ignoring weaker but informative modalities, and spurious modality coupling, where models overfit to incidental cross-modal correlations. To address these, we propose Group Cognition Learning (GCL), a governed collaboration paradigm that applies a two-stage protocol after modality-specific encoding. In Stage 1 (Selective Interaction), a Routing Agent proposes directed interaction routes, and an Auditing Agent assigns sample-wise gates to emphasize exchanges that yield positive marginal predictive gain while suppressing redundant coupling. In Stage 2 (Consensus Formation), a Public-Factor Agent maintains an explicit shared factor, and an Aggregation Agent produces the final prediction through contribution-aware weighting while keeping each modality representation as a specialization channel. Extensive experiments on CMU-MOSI, CMU-MOSEI, and MIntRec demonstrate that GCL mitigates dominance and coupling, establishing state-of-the-art results across both regression and classification benchmarks. Analysis experiments further demonstrate the effectiveness of the design.
comment: This study has been Accepted by ICML 2026. The current version is a manuscript, please refer to the official version released at ICML 2026 for the final published version

light_analysis.overview: 提出Group Cognition Learning (GCL)，通过受治理的两阶段智能体协作范式，解决多模态学习中的模态主导性和虚假模态耦合问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 集中式多模态学习常将不同模态信号压缩为单一融合表示进行预测，但该方法存在模态主导性（优化偏向简单路径，忽略弱但信息丰富的模态）和虚假模态耦合（模型过拟合偶然的跨模态相关性）两大缺陷，导致性能瓶颈。现有方法未充分处理这些问题，亟需更细粒度的交互与融合机制。
light_analysis.method: GCL在模态特定编码后应用两阶段协议。阶段1（选择性交互）：路由智能体提出定向交互路径，审计智能体分配样本级门控，筛选并加强产生正向边际预测增益的交换，抑制冗余耦合。阶段2（共识形成）：公共因子智能体维护显式共享因子，聚合智能体通过贡献感知加权生成最终预测，同时保持各模态作为特化通道。在CMU-MOSI、CMU-MOSEI和MIntRec数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在CMU-MOSI、CMU-MOSEI和MIntRec上进行广泛实验，GCL在回归和分类基准上均达到最先进结果。具体地，相比基线方法，GCL显著缓解了模态主导性和虚假耦合问题，性能提升稳定。分析实验进一步证实了路由、审计及各智能体设计的有效性。摘要未提供精确数值，但强调SOTA。
light_analysis.conclusion: GCL通过受治理的两阶段智能体协作，有效解决了多模态融合中的模态主导性和虚假耦合问题，为多模态学习提供了新范式。学术上，该工作展示了智能体协作在细粒度模态交互中的潜力；实际应用中，可提升多模态情感识别等任务的鲁棒性和准确性。未来可探索更复杂的智能体协作规则或扩展到更多模态。

title: Diversity in Large Language Models under Supervised Fine-Tuning
abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is essential for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with user intent, yet it is believed to suppress generative diversity. Although this reduction is frequently referenced, formal empirical testing of the phenomenon remains limited. The expressiveness of LLMs by itself was addressed by multiple prior methods. Their varying perspectives suggest that deeper investigation could yield further improvements. In this study, we attribute the decline to two primary drivers: the neglect of low-frequency patterns within fine-tuning datasets and the forgetting of preexisting knowledge. Motivated by our theoretical analysis, we develop Tempered Focal (TOFU) loss, a novel objective that addresses both stated challenges simultaneously. Our extensive evaluation confirms at scale that generation breadth narrows after SFT and strengthens the hypothesis explaining this effect. Across multiple models and benchmarks, we demonstrate that TOFU enhances output diversity while preserving high response quality, offering a principled approach to SFT.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Tempered Focal (TOFU)损失函数，在监督微调中提升大语言模型生成多样性，同时保持响应质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督微调（SFT）是使大语言模型（LLMs）与用户意图对齐的关键步骤，但被认为会抑制生成多样性。尽管这一现象常被提及，但形式化的实证测试有限。现有方法虽关注LLM的表达性，但观点不一，表明需要深入探究。本文指出多样性下降的两个主要驱动因素：微调数据集中低频模式的忽视和预训练知识的遗忘。因此，需要一种能同时解决这两个问题的方法，以在保持响应质量的同时提升输出多样性。
light_analysis.method: 基于理论分析，论文提出Tempered Focal (TOFU)损失函数，旨在同时解决SFT中低频模式被忽视和预训练知识遗忘的问题。TOFU通过对损失函数进行温度调节和聚焦调整，增强对低频样本的关注并减少知识遗忘。实验在多个模型和基准上进行广泛评估，验证了SFT后生成广度变窄的现象，并加强了对此效应的解释。TOFU在提升输出多样性的同时，保持了较高的响应质量。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型和基准上的大规模实验表明，SFT后生成广度确实变窄，而TOFU能有效增强输出多样性。与标准SFT相比，TOFU在保持高响应质量（如Rouge-L、BLEU等指标）的前提下，显著提升了多样性指标（如Distinct-n、Self-BLEU等）。具体数据摘要未明确，但声明TOFU提供了原则性的SFT方法，效果优于基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文系统分析了SFT导致LLM生成多样性下降的原因，并提出了TOFU损失函数作为解决方案。该工作不仅深化了对SFT效应机制的理解，也为实践中平衡对齐与多样性提供了有效工具。TOFU在保持响应质量的同时显著提升多样性，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可进一步探索TOFU在其他微调场景下的适用性，或结合其他对齐技术。

title: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Efficient and Open Multimodal Intelligence
abstract: We introduce Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the latest model in the Nemotron multimodal series and the first to natively support audio inputs alongside text, images, and video. Nemotron 3 Nano Omni delivers consistent accuracy improvements over its predecessor, Nemotron Nano V2 VL, across all modalities, enabled by advances in architecture, training data and recipes. In particular, Nemotron 3 delivers leading results in real-world document understanding, long audio-video comprehension, and agentic computer use. Built on the highly efficient Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B backbone, Nemotron 3 Nano Omni further incorporates innovative multimodal token-reduction techniques to deliver substantially lower inference latency and higher throughput than other models of similar size. We are releasing model checkpoints in BF16, FP8, and FP4 formats, along with portions of the training data and codebase to facilitate further research and development.

light_analysis.overview: 提出原生支持音频的多模态语言模型Nemotron 3 Nano Omni，在高效骨干和token缩减技术下提升推理速度与准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有模型在多模态理解上存在准确率不足、推理延迟高和开放度低的问题，尤其缺乏对音频输入的原生支持。该研究旨在通过架构优化和数据扩充，提升模型在文档、长音视频及代理任务中的表现，同时降低计算开销，并开源关键资源以促进社区发展。
light_analysis.method: 基于Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B高效骨干网络，采用创新多模态token缩减技术降低延迟和提高吞吐量。通过改进训练数据、架构和配方，在文本、图像、视频基础上原生集成音频输入。模型权重以BF16、FP8、FP4格式发布，附带部分训练数据和代码。
light_analysis.result: 与前任Nemotron Nano V2 VL相比，在所有模态上实现一致准确率提升。在真实文档理解、长音频-视频理解和代理计算机使用任务中取得领先结果，同时推理延迟显著降低、吞吐量高于同类模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该模型在多模态理解和效率上取得显著进步，原生音频支持扩展了应用场景。开源模型权重、数据和代码有助于推动研究，但摘要未提及与其他开源模型的全面对比及潜在局限性，未来可进一步探索更大规模或更多模态的扩展。

title: The Override Gap: A Magnitude Account of Knowledge Conflict Failure in Hypernetwork-Based Instant LLM Adaptation
abstract: Hypernetwork-based methods such as Doc-to-LoRA internalize a document into an LLM's weights in a single forward pass, but they fail systematically on conflicts: when the document contradicts pretraining knowledge, accuracy collapses to 46.4% on the deepest facts. We show the failure is a magnitude problem rather than a representational one. The hypernetwork already targets the right layers, but its adapter margin is approximately constant across documents while the pretrained margin grows with training frequency, so deep conflicts lose by construction. The account predicts that failure should track prior strength: sorting 194 conflicts by the base model's log-probability on the contradicted fact, baseline accuracy falls from 68% on weak-prior questions to 16% on strong-prior ones, a 52 percentage-point gap. The cure is amplitude. Selective Layer Boosting scales the adapter at its top-norm layers, and Conflict-Aware Internalization triggers boosting only when the base model is confident. Both are training-free; together they raise deep-conflict accuracy from 46.4% to 71.0% on Gemma-2B and from 53.6% to 72.5% on Mistral-7B while preserving novel-knowledge recall, and beat vanilla retrieval-augmented generation on medium conflicts by 18 percentage points despite operating entirely in parameter space. We release KID-Bench, a 489-question benchmark that separates novel recall, cross-knowledge combination, and prior-graded conflicts.
comment: 35 pages, 15 figures v2: minor layout fixes and author list update

light_analysis.overview: 发现超网络方法在知识冲突中失败的根本原因是幅度问题，并提出训练免费的幅度修正方法，将深层冲突准确率从46.4%提升至71.0%。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于超网络的即时LLM适配方法（如Doc-to-LoRA）能单次前向传播将文档内化到模型权重中，但在文档与预训练知识冲突时系统性失败，深层事实准确率骤降至46.4%。现有研究未深入分析失败根源，因此需要揭示其根本原因并提出有效解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 通过分析发现失败是幅度问题而非表示问题：超网络适配器margin恒定，而预训练margin随训练频率增长，导致深层冲突必然失败。提出两种训练免费方法：Selective Layer Boosting在最高范数层缩放适配器，Conflict-Aware Internalization仅在基模型置信时触发增强。两者结合提升冲突准确率。
light_analysis.result: 在Gemma-2B上深层冲突准确率从46.4%提升至71.0%，Mistral-7B上从53.6%提升至72.5%，同时保留新颖知识召回。在中等冲突上比标准检索增强生成高18个百分点。排序实验显示基线准确率从弱先验的68%降至强先验的16%，证实失败跟踪先验强度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了超网络方法知识冲突失败的根本原因是幅度不匹配，提出训练免费的幅度修正方法显著提升冲突性能。发布KID-Bench基准（489题），区分新颖回忆、知识组合和先验分级冲突。方法在参数空间内操作，优于检索增强生成，对即时模型编辑具有重要实用价值。

title: Stargazer: A Scalable Model-Fitting Benchmark Environment for AI Agents under Astrophysical Constraints
abstract: The rise of autonomous AI agents suggests that dynamic benchmark environments with built-in feedback on scientifically grounded tasks are needed to evaluate the capabilities of these agents in research work. We introduce Stargazer, a scalable environment for evaluating AI agents on dynamic, iterative physics-grounded model-fitting tasks using inference on radial-velocity (RV) time series data. Stargazer comprises 120 tasks across three difficulty tiers, including 20 real archival cases, covering diverse scenarios ranging from high-SNR single-planet systems to complex multi-planetary configurations requiring involved low-SNR analysis. Our evaluation of eight frontier agents reveals a gap between numerical optimization and adherence to physical constraints: although agents often achieve a good statistical fit, they frequently fail to recover correct physical system parameters, a limitation that persists even when agents are equipped with vanilla skills. Furthermore, increasing test-time compute yields only marginal gains, with excessive token usage often reflecting recursive failure loops rather than meaningful exploration. Stargazer presents an opportunity to train, evaluate, scaffold, and scale strategies on a model-fitting problem of practical research relevance today. Our methodology to design a simulation-driven environment for AI agents presumably generalizes to many other model-fitting problems across scientific domains. Source code and the project website are available at https://github.com/AIPS-UofT/Stargazer and https://aips-uoft.github.io/Stargazer/, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: Stargazer是一个基于天体物理约束的可扩展模型拟合基准环境，用于评估AI代理在动态迭代任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有基准环境缺乏动态反馈和科学基础任务，难以评估自主AI代理在研究工作中的能力。摘要指出，尽管代理在数值优化上表现良好，但常违反物理约束，无法恢复正确物理参数，即使配备基础技能也是如此。因此，需要一种能训练、评估和扩展代理策略的环境，填补科学与AI之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: Stargazer包含120个任务，分为三个难度等级，涵盖高信噪比单行星系统到复杂多行星配置，以及20个真实档案案例。任务基于径向速度时间序列数据的物理模型拟合。评估了8个最前沿的代理，并引入可扩展的测试时计算。设计方法可能推广到其他科学领域的模型拟合问题。
light_analysis.result: 代理在统计拟合上表现良好，但经常无法恢复正确的物理系统参数，这一限制在配备基础技能后仍存在。增加测试时计算仅带来边际改善，且过多的token使用常反映递归失败循环而非有意义探索。表明当前AI代理在遵循物理约束方面存在根本性不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: Stargazer为训练、评估和扩展AI代理在科学相关模型拟合问题上的策略提供了机会。其方法论有望推广到跨科学领域的其他模型拟合问题。局限性在于当前代理无法保证物理一致性，未来工作可探索更好的约束机制或学习策略。

title: Selective Neuron Amplification in Transformer Language Models
abstract: Large language models often fail on tasks they seem to already understand. In our experiments, this appears to be less about missing knowledge and more about certain internal circuits not being strongly activated during inference. We explore Selective Neuron Amplification, which increases the influence of task relevant neurons without changing the model's parameters. The method works at inference time and does not permanently alter the model. SNA helps mainly when the model is uncertain, while having low effect when the model is already confident. This suggests that some model failures are due to weak activation rather than lack of capability.
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures. Preprint. Code and experiments conducted independently

light_analysis.overview: 提出选择性神经元放大方法，在不改变参数的情况下增强任务相关神经元激活，解决模型因弱激活导致的推理失败。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在看似已理解的任务上常常失败，但原因并非缺乏知识，而是推理时内部电路激活不足。现有方法通常需要微调或修改参数，而SNA旨在不改变模型参数下提升相关神经元影响，探索模型失败的新解释，即弱激活而非能力缺失。
light_analysis.method: 提出选择性神经元放大（SNA），在推理时动态增加与任务相关神经元的输出权重，不修改模型参数。该方法通过识别任务相关神经元并放大其激活值，增强特定电路的贡献。SNA只在模型不确定性高时有效，不影响已有自信的预测，本质是一种轻量级推理时干预。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，SNA主要改善模型在不确定性高时的表现，而对模型已自信的任务影响很小。这表明模型失败确实源于弱激活而非能力缺乏。摘要未提供具体数值，但通过对比自信与不确定场景验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示大型语言模型的部分失败源于推理时神经元激活不足，SNA提供了一种轻量级、非永久性的干预方法。该发现有望指导更高效的模型推理优化，未来可探索自动识别任务相关神经元和动态调节策略，具有重要的实用价值。

title: MICA: Multivariate Infini Compressive Attention for Time Series Forecasting
abstract: Multivariate forecasting with Transformers faces a core scalability challenge: modeling cross-channel dependencies via attention compounds attention's quadratic sequence complexity with quadratic channel scaling, making full cross-channel attention impractical for high-dimensional time series. We propose Multivariate Infini Compressive Attention (MICA), an architectural design to extend channel-independent Transformers to channel-dependent forecasting. By adapting efficient attention techniques from the sequence dimension to the channel dimension, MICA adds a cross-channel attention mechanism to channel-independent backbones that scales linearly with channel count and context length. We evaluate channel-independent Transformer architectures with and without MICA across multiple forecasting benchmarks. MICA reduces forecast error over its channel-independent counterparts by 5.4% on average and up to 25.4% on individual datasets, highlighting the importance of explicit cross-channel modeling. Moreover, models with MICA rank first among deep multivariate Transformer and MLP baselines. MICA models also scale more efficiently with respect to both channel count and context length than Transformer baselines that compute attention across both the temporal and channel dimensions, establishing compressive attention as a practical solution for scalable multivariate forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MICA机制，通过跨通道压缩注意力实现线性复杂度的高维时间序列预测。
light_analysis.motivation: 多变量Transformer在建模跨通道依赖时面临双重复杂度问题：序列维度的二次复杂度和通道维度的平方扩展，使得全通道注意力在高维时间序列中不实用。现有通道独立方法忽略跨通道交互，影响预测精度。
light_analysis.method: MICA将高效注意力技术从序列维度迁移到通道维度，在通道独立骨干网络基础上添加线性复杂度的跨通道注意力机制，支持通道数和上下文长度线性扩展。核心创新在于将压缩注意力应用于通道间关系建模。
light_analysis.result: 在多个预测基准上，MICA相比通道独立基线平均降低预测误差5.4%，单个数据集最高降低25.4%。含MICA的模型在多变量Transformer和MLP基线中排名第一，且计算效率优于同时处理时域和通道域注意力的方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MICA证明了显式跨通道建模对多变量预测的重要性，提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，平衡了模型表达力与计算效率。未来可探索更高效的压缩注意力机制。

title: Distributionally Robust Token Optimization in RLHF
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) tend to respond correctly to prompts that align well with the data they were trained and fine-tuned on. Yet, small shifts in wording, format, or language can trigger surprisingly large failures, especially on multi-step reasoning problems. To address this problem, we propose a Distributionally Robust Token Optimization (DRTO) approach, which combines token-level Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) with Distributionally Robust Optimization (DRO). DRTO constructs f-divergence ambiguity sets over span-level actor losses, providing a principled way to emphasize difficult response segments during policy optimization. Empirically, DRTO enhances consistency under distribution shifts in multiple reasoning benchmarks among different tasks, achieving $+4.4$ percentage points on MATH-500 and $+2.7$ percentage points on LiveCodeBench over standard RTO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出分布鲁棒Token优化方法，结合token级RLHF和分布鲁棒优化，增强LLM对措辞变化的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型对训练数据中的措辞、格式或语言微小变化高度敏感，尤其在多步推理任务中表现不稳定，导致性能大幅下降。现有方法缺乏对分布偏移的系统性处理，因此需要一种能够强调困难响应段并提升一致性的优化方法。
light_analysis.method: DRTO将Token级别的强化学习从人类反馈与分布鲁棒优化相结合，通过构建span级actor损失的f-散度模糊集，在策略优化中重点强调困难响应片段，从而增强模型对输入分布变化的不变性。该方法在多个推理基准上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在分布偏移场景下，DRTO在MATH-500上取得+4.4个百分点的提升，在LiveCodeBench上取得+2.7个百分点的提升，显著优于标准Token级RLHF方法，验证了其在不同推理任务中的一致性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: DRTO为提升LLM对措辞变化的鲁棒性提供了原则性框架，通过分布鲁棒优化增强推理一致性。未来可探索更广泛的f-散度族与多样化ambiguity sets，以及应用于其他模态。

title: MolRGen: A Training and Evaluation Setting for De Novo Molecular Generation with Reasonning Models
abstract: Recent reasoning-based large language models have shown strong performance on tasks with verifiable outcomes, but their use in de novo molecular generation remains limited by the lack of training environments where rewards can be computed without reference molecules. We introduce MolRGen, a benchmark and molecular verifier for training and evaluating reasoning LLMs on de novo molecular generation. MolRGen contains approximately 4,500 protein-pocket targets, resulting in 50k multi-objective optimization prompts combining docking scores with molecular properties such as QED, synthetic accessibility, logP, and physicochemical descriptors. Unlike caption-based generation or molecule-editing benchmarks, MolRGen evaluates molecules proposed from scratch by computing rewards at generation time. We benchmark general-purpose and chemistry-specialized open-source LLMs and introduce a diversity-aware top-k metric to measure whether models can generate a diverse set of high-scoring molecules. Finally, we use the verifier to fine-tune a 128B LLM with GRPO, showing improved performance, at the cost of a diversity-exploitation trade-off. MolRGen provides a scalable testbed for studying verifier-based reasoning and reinforcement learning in molecular design.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MolRGen基准和分子验证器，用于训练和评估推理大语言模型在从头分子生成任务上的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前推理型大语言模型在可验证结果任务上表现优异，但在从头分子生成中缺乏训练环境，因无法计算无参考分子的奖励。现有方法多基于描述或分子编辑，无法评估从零生成的分子。因此需构建可扩展测试平台，支持基于验证器的推理和强化学习在分子设计中的研究。
light_analysis.method: 构造MolRGen基准，含约4500个蛋白口袋靶点和5万条多目标优化提示，综合对接分数、QED、合成可及性、logP等属性。在生成时直接计算奖励，评估通用和化学专业开源LLM，引入多样性感知top-k指标。使用GRPO微调128B参数LLM，验证性能提升但存在多样性-利用权衡。
light_analysis.result: 在MolRGen上对多种LLM进行基准测试，通过多样性感知top-k指标评估生成多样化高分分子的能力。GRPO微调128B LLM提升了性能，但导致多样性下降。摘要未给出具体数值，突出了方法有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MolRGen提供可扩展测试平台，用于研究基于验证器的推理和强化学习在分子设计中的应用。其支持从零生成分子并实时计算奖励，推动大语言模型在药物发现等领域落地。未来可优化多样性-利用权衡，并扩展到更广泛的分子设计任务。

title: Behavior-Centric Extraction of Scenarios from Highway Traffic Data and their Domain-Knowledge-Guided Clustering using CVQ-VAE
abstract: Approval of ADS depends on evaluating its behavior within representative real-world traffic scenarios. A common way to obtain such scenarios is to extract them from real-world data recordings. These can then be grouped and serve as basis on which the ADS is subsequently tested. This poses two central challenges: how scenarios are extracted and how they are grouped. Existing extraction methods rely on heterogeneous definitions, hindering scenario comparability. For the grouping of scenarios, rule-based or ML-based methods can be utilized. However, while modern ML-based approaches can handle the complexity of traffic scenarios, unlike rule-based approaches, they lack interpretability and may not align with domain-knowledge. This work contributes to a standardized scenario extraction based on the Scenario-as-Specification concept, as well as a domain-knowledge-guided scenario clustering process. Experiments on the highD dataset demonstrate that scenarios can be extracted reliably and that domain-knowledge can be effectively integrated into the clustering process. As a result, the proposed methodology supports a more standardized process for deriving scenario categories from highway data recordings and thus enables a more efficient validation process of automated vehicles.
comment: Accepted as a conference paper in IEEE Intelligent Vehicles Symposium (IV) 2026, Detroit, MI, United States

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于行为中心的场景提取方法和CVQ-VAE的领域知识引导聚类，实现高速公路交通场景的标准化提取与可解释分组。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶系统（ADS）的批准依赖于其在代表性真实交通场景中的行为评估。现有场景提取方法定义异构，导致场景难以比较；场景分组方面，基于规则的方法缺乏处理复杂性的能力，而现代ML方法虽能处理复杂度却缺乏可解释性且可能与领域知识不一致。因此，需要一种标准化的场景提取方法和能够融入领域知识的聚类过程，以支持更高效的自动驾驶车辆验证。
light_analysis.method: 基于Scenario-as-Specification概念提出标准化场景提取方法，确保场景定义一致。采用CVQ-VAE（条件向量量化变分自编码器）进行场景聚类，通过将领域知识（如交通规则、典型驾驶行为）作为条件约束融入模型，使聚类结果既保留数据驱动的灵活性又具备可解释性。实验使用highD高速公路数据集，提取交互场景并聚类。
light_analysis.result: 在highD数据集上的实验表明，所提方法能够可靠地提取高速公路交通场景，并且领域知识被有效集成到聚类过程中。与现有方法相比，该方法实现了场景提取的标准化，聚类结果更符合领域专家认知，从而支持更高效的自动驾驶系统验证流程。具体性能指标摘要未明确，但强调了标准化和领域知识融合的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了一种标准化的场景提取方法和领域知识引导的聚类流程，解决了现有方法在场景可比性和可解释性上的不足。该方法提升了从高速公路数据中导出场景类别的规范性，有助于加速自动驾驶车辆的验证与批准。未来工作可探索更丰富的领域知识表示和扩展到其他交通场景。

title: OpenClaw-RL: Train Any Agent Simply by Talking
abstract: Every agent interaction generates a next-state signal, namely the user reply, tool output, terminal or GUI state change that follows each action, yet no existing agentic RL system recovers it as a live, online learning source. We present OpenClaw-RL, a framework that employs next-state signals to optimize personal agents online through infrastructure and methodology innovations. On the infrastructure side, we extend existing RL systems to a server-client architecture where the RL server hosts the policy behind an inference API and user terminals stream interaction data back over HTTP. From each observed next state, the system extracts two complementary training signals, evaluative and directive, via a separate asynchronous server so that neither signal extraction nor optimization blocks inference. On the methodology side, we introduce a hybrid RL objective that unifies both signal types in a single update: directive signals provide richer, token-level supervision but are sparser, while evaluative signals are more broadly available. To stabilize distillation under teacher-student mismatch, we propose overlap-guided hint selection, which picks the hint whose induced teacher distribution maximally overlaps with the student's top-$k$ tokens, together with a log-probability-difference clip that bounds per-token advantages. Applied to personal agents, OpenClaw-RL enables an agent to improve simply by being used, recovering conversational signals from user re-queries, corrections, and explicit feedback. Applied to general agents, OpenClaw-RL is the first RL framework to unify real-world agent settings spanning terminal, GUI, SWE, and tool-call environments, where we additionally demonstrate the utility of next-state signals in long-horizon settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出OpenClaw-RL框架，利用next-state信号在线优化智能体，通过基础设施和方法创新实现对话改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有智能体RL系统未利用next-state信号（如用户回复、工具输出等）作为在线学习源，导致无法通过简单使用改进。该问题重要，因为next-state信号可提供持续监督，但现有方法未恢复其作为实时学习资源。
light_analysis.method: 基础设施上采用服务器-客户端架构，RL服务器托管策略，用户终端流式传输交互数据。异步服务器提取评估性和指导性两种互补信号，提出混合RL目标统一两类信号，使用重叠引导提示选择处理教师-学生不匹配，并采用log概率差裁剪稳定蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 个人智能体通过用户重新查询、纠正和显式反馈实现改进；通用智能体上统一终端、GUI、SWE和工具调用环境，首次展示了next-state信号在长程场景中的效用。
light_analysis.conclusion: OpenClaw-RL是首个通过对话在线优化智能体的框架，统一了多种真实世界设置。学术上提出混合RL目标和信号提取方法，实际中使智能体通过使用提升性能，为免部署后改进铺平道路。

title: Towards Batch-to-Streaming Deep Reinforcement Learning for Continuous Control
abstract: State-of-the-art deep reinforcement learning (RL) methods have achieved remarkable performance in continuous control tasks, yet their computational complexity is often incompatible with the constraints of resource-limited hardware, due to their reliance on replay buffers, batch updates, and target networks. The emerging paradigm of streaming deep RL addresses this limitation through purely online updates, achieving strong empirical performance on standard benchmarks. In this work, we propose two novel streaming deep RL algorithms, Streaming Soft Actor-Critic (S2AC) and Streaming Deterministic Actor-Critic (SDAC), explicitly designed to be compatible with state-of-the-art batch RL methods, making them particularly suitable for on-device finetuning applications such as Sim2Real transfer. Both algorithms achieve performance comparable to state-of-the-art streaming baselines on standard benchmarks without requiring tedious per-environment hyperparameter tuning. We further investigate the batch-to-streaming transition, showing that a naive transition does not guarantee preservation of pre-trained policy performance, and propose a principled approach to address this challenge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出两种兼容批量RL的流式深度强化学习算法S2AC和SDAC，并解决批量到流式转换的性能保持问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有深度RL方法在连续控制任务中表现优异，但计算复杂度过高，受限于资源受限硬件。流式深度RL通过纯在线更新解决了这一限制，但现有流式算法与批量RL方法不兼容，难以用于设备端微调。本文旨在设计兼容流式和批量的算法，并解决批量到流式转换中的性能保持问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出两种流式DRL算法：流式软Actor-Critic (S2AC)和流式确定性Actor-Critic (SDAC)，专门设计为与最先进的批量RL方法兼容，适用于Sim2Real迁移等设备端微调。无需针对每个环境繁琐调整超参数。提出一种原则性方法解决从预训练批量策略过渡到流式学习时性能下降的问题。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试中，两种算法性能与最先进的流式基线相当，且无需繁琐的每环境超参数调优。实验表明朴素转换不能保证预训练策略性能，所提原则性方法有效解决了该挑战（摘要未提供具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了两种兼容批量的流式DRL算法，并研究了批量到流式转换的挑战及解决方案。具有实际应用价值（如Sim2Real），未来可进一步优化转换机制或扩展到其他领域。

title: Deterministic Differentiable Structured Pruning for Large Language Models
abstract: Structured pruning reduces LLM inference cost by removing low-importance architectural components. This can be viewed as learning a multiplicative gate for each component under an l0 sparsity constraint. Due to the discreteness of the l0 norm, prior work typically adopts stochastic hard-concrete relaxations to enable differentiable optimization; however, this stochasticity can introduce a train--test mismatch when sampled masks are discretized for deployment and restricts masks to a bounded, near-binary range. To address this, we propose Deterministic Differentiable Pruning (DDP), a mask-only optimization method that eliminates stochasticity by directly optimizing a deterministic soft surrogate of the discrete l0 objective. Compared with prior approaches, DDP offers greater expressiveness, reduced train--test mismatch, and faster convergence. We apply our method to several dense and MoE models, including Qwen3-32B and Qwen3-30B-A3B, achieving a performance loss as small as 1% on downstream tasks while outperforming previous methods at 20% sparsity. We further demonstrate end-to-end inference speedups in realistic deployment settings with vLLM.

light_analysis.overview: 提出确定性可微剪枝（DDP）方法，通过优化确定性软代理实现结构化剪枝，消除随机性并提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型推理成本高，结构化剪枝可降低开销。现有方法采用随机硬-混凝土松弛实现可微优化，但存在训练-测试不匹配（随机掩码离散化后部署）和掩码范围受限问题。本文旨在消除随机性，提高表达能力和收敛速度，同时减少性能损失。
light_analysis.method: 提出确定性可微剪枝（DDP），直接优化离散l0范数的确定性软代理，替代随机松弛。该方法仅优化掩码，无需额外参数，支持端到端可微训练。适用于稠密和混合专家（MoE）模型，如Qwen3-32B和Qwen3-30B-A3B。关键创新在于确定性梯度流，避免随机性导致的训练-测试不匹配，并允许掩码取连续值以增强表达能力。
light_analysis.result: 在20%稀疏度下，DDP在下游任务上性能损失仅1%，优于先前方法。在Qwen3-32B和Qwen3-30B-A3B模型上验证，并展示在vLLM真实部署场景中的端到端推理加速。摘要未提供具体加速比，但强调实际部署效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: DDP通过确定性优化解决了结构化剪枝中随机松弛的缺点，在保持模型性能的同时实现高效压缩。其方法简单（仅掩码优化），适用于多种模型架构。未来可应用于更广泛的剪枝场景，但摘要未提及局限性。

title: Interactive Benchmarks
abstract: Existing reasoning evaluation paradigms suffer from different limitations: fixed benchmarks are increasingly saturated and vulnerable to contamination, while preference-based evaluations rely on subjective judgments. We argue that a core aspect of intelligence is the ability to decide what information to acquire and how to use it effectively. We propose Interactive Benchmarks, a unified evaluation paradigm that assesses a model's reasoning ability through budgeted multi-turn interaction. We evaluate models under this framework in two settings: Interactive Proofs, where models interact with a judge to solve Logic, UI2Html, and Mathematics tasks under objective feedback; and Interactive Games, where models reason strategically to maximize long-horizon utilities. Our results show that interactive benchmarks provide a more robust assessment of this dimension of model intelligence, revealing substantial room for improvement in interactive scenarios. Project page: https://github.com/interactivebench/interactivebench

light_analysis.overview: 提出交互式基准（Interactive Benchmarks），通过预算多轮互动评估模型的推理能力，弥补现有基准易饱和与主观依赖的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有推理评估范式各有局限：固定基准日益饱和且易受数据污染，基于偏好的评价依赖主观判断。论文认为智能核心在于决定获取哪些信息并有效利用，因此需要更稳健的评估方法，交互式基准通过模拟真实交互场景来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 提出Interactive Benchmarks统一评估范式，在预算多轮交互下衡量推理能力。包含两种设置：Interactive Proofs中模型与法官交互解决Logic、UI2Html和Mathematics任务，并接收客观反馈；Interactive Games中模型通过策略推理最大化长期效用。评估聚焦于模型在动态交互中的信息获取与利用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明交互式基准提供了更稳健的模型智能评估，揭示了交互场景中模型仍有显著改进空间。摘要未提供具体性能指标或与基线方法的定量对比，但强调了该范式能暴露固定基准无法捕捉的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了一个统一的交互式评估框架，突破了传统基准的局限，更真实地反映模型在动态场景下的推理能力。该范式具有学术价值，可推动模型向主动获取与利用信息的方向发展；实际应用中可用于智能体评估。未来需探索更复杂的交互形式及大规模验证。

title: MOOSE-Star: Unlocking Tractable Training for Scientific Discovery by Breaking the Complexity Barrier
abstract: While large language models (LLMs) show promise in scientific discovery, existing research focuses on inference or feedback-driven training, leaving the direct modeling of the generative reasoning process, $P(\text{hypothesis}|\text{background})$ ($P(h|b)$), unexplored. We demonstrate that directly training $P(h|b)$ is mathematically intractable due to the combinatorial complexity ($O(N^k)$) inherent in retrieving and composing inspirations from a vast knowledge base. To break this barrier, we introduce MOOSE-Star, a unified framework that enables tractable and scalable training of $P(h|b)$, while supporting more scalable inference. In the best case, MOOSE-Star reduces complexity from exponential to logarithmic ($O(\log N)$) by (1) training on decomposed subtasks derived from the probabilistic equation of discovery, (2) employing motivation-guided hierarchical search to enable logarithmic retrieval and prune irrelevant subspaces, and (3) utilizing bounded composition for robustness against retrieval noise. To facilitate this, we release TOMATO-Star, a dataset of 108,717 decomposed papers (38,400 GPU hours) for training. Empirically, MOOSE-Star scales continuously with training data and inference budget, whereas direct brute-force sampling hits a complexity wall.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MOOSE-Star框架，将科学发现中生成推理过程的训练复杂度从指数级降至对数级，实现可扩展的端到端训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在科学发现中主要关注推理或反馈驱动训练，忽略了直接建模生成推理过程P(假设|背景)的可能性。该研究指出，直接从庞大知识库中检索和组合灵感会导致O(N^k)的组合复杂度，使得训练在数学上难以处理。这一障碍限制了模型在科学发现中的潜力，亟需一种可扩展且高效的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: MOOSE-Star通过三步降低复杂度：1）基于发现概率方程分解为可训练的原子子任务；2）采用动机引导的层次搜索，实现对数级检索并剪枝无关子空间；3）利用有界组合增强对检索噪声的鲁棒性。同时发布TOMATO-Star数据集（108,717篇分解论文，38,400 GPU小时）用于训练。整体复杂度在最佳情况下从O(N^k)降至O(log N)。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MOOSE-Star的缩放能力良好，性能随训练数据和推理预算持续提升，而直接的暴力采样方法则遭遇复杂度墙。论文未提供具体数值指标，但强调了可扩展性和对噪声的鲁棒性优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOOSE-Star首次实现了对科学发现中生成推理过程的可训练建模，打破了计算复杂度障碍，为AI驱动的科学发现提供了更高效的训练范式。其分解策略和层次搜索方法具有通用性，可推广至其他组合推理任务。未来可能进一步优化搜索策略或扩展到多模态科学数据。

title: Why Adam Can Beat SGD: Second-Moment Normalization Yields Sharper Tails
abstract: Despite Adam demonstrating faster empirical convergence than SGD in many applications, much of the existing theory yields guarantees essentially comparable to those of SGD, leaving the empirical performance gap insufficiently explained. In this paper, we uncover a key second-moment normalization in Adam and develop a stopping-time/martingale analysis that provably distinguishes Adam from SGD under the classical bounded variance model (a second moment assumption). In particular, we establish the first theoretical separation between the high-probability convergence behaviors of the two methods: Adam achieves a $δ^{-1/2}$ dependence on the confidence parameter $δ$, whereas corresponding high-probability guarantee for SGD necessarily incurs at least a $δ^{-1}$ dependence.

light_analysis.overview: 首次从理论上证明Adam的收敛速度优于SGD，通过第二矩归一化实现更快的置信参数依赖。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管Adam在实际应用中比SGD收敛更快，但现有理论给出的保证与SGD相当，无法解释性能差距。这限制了理论对优化器设计的指导。本文旨在通过严格分析揭示Adam的独特优势，填补理论与实践之间的鸿沟。
light_analysis.method: 论文聚焦Adam中的第二矩归一化步骤，提出了一种基于停时和鞅的分析框架。在经典有界方差模型（二阶矩假设）下，推导了Adam的高概率收敛界。关键创新在于利用归一化技术将置信参数δ的依赖从δ^{-1}降至δ^{-1/2}。
light_analysis.result: 建立了Adam与SGD高概率收敛行为的首个理论分离：Adam达到δ^{-1/2}的置信参数依赖，而SGD至少需要δ^{-1}依赖。这表明在相同置信水平下，Adam能实现更紧的收敛界，解释了其实际 Faster 收敛现象。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文首次从理论上证明了Adam优于SGD的收敛性，通过揭示第二矩归一化的关键作用。该工作不仅加深了对Adam成功原因的理解，也为设计更高效的优化算法提供了理论依据。未来可扩展至更复杂的随机优化设置。
