title: An Empirical Analysis of Calibration and Selective Prediction in Multimodal Clinical Condition Classification
abstract: As artificial intelligence systems move toward clinical deployment, ensuring reliable prediction behavior is fundamental for safety-critical decision-making tasks. One proposed safeguard is selective prediction, where models can defer uncertain predictions to human experts for review. In this work, we empirically evaluate the reliability of uncertainty-based selective prediction in multilabel clinical condition classification using multimodal ICU data. Across a range of state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal models, we find that selective prediction can substantially degrade performance despite strong standard evaluation metrics. This failure is driven by severe class-dependent miscalibration, whereby models assign high uncertainty to correct predictions and low uncertainty to incorrect ones, particularly for underrepresented clinical conditions. Our results show that commonly used aggregate metrics can obscure these effects, limiting their ability to assess selective prediction behavior in this setting. Taken together, our findings characterize a task-specific failure mode of selective prediction in multimodal clinical condition classification and highlight the need for calibration-aware evaluation to provide strong guarantees of safety and robustness in clinical AI.
comment: 40 pages, 14 figures, 16 tables. Accepted as a conference paper at AHLI Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning (CHIL) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 论文实证分析了多模态临床条件分类中基于不确定性的选择性预测的可靠性问题，揭示了其性能下降的机制。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI系统向临床部署推进，确保预测行为的可靠性对安全关键决策至关重要。选择性预测允许模型将不确定的预测推迟给人类专家，但现有方法在临床环境下可能失效。作者发现，尽管标准评估指标表现良好，选择性预测可能大幅降低性能，因为模型对正确预测赋予高不确定性而对错误预测赋予低不确定性，尤其在少数类别中。这种类别相关的误校准被常用聚合指标掩盖，限制了评估选择性预测行为的能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文对多标签临床条件分类任务中的多种最先进单模态和多模态模型进行了实证评估，使用多模态ICU数据。核心方法是系统性分析基于不确定性的选择性预测的可靠性，通过对比标准评估指标与选择性预测实际效果，揭示类别依赖的误校准现象。研究特别关注不同临床条件的代表性差异，并评估了常用聚合指标（如AUC）在检测选择性预测失败时的局限性。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，尽管模型在标准评估指标上表现良好，选择性预测却显著降低性能。失败原因是严重的类别依赖性误校准：模型对正确预测输出高不确定性，对错误预测输出低不确定性，尤其对代表性不足的临床条件。常用聚合指标无法反映这一问题，因为它们忽略了类别间的差异。这些结果揭示了多模态临床分类中选择性预测的任务特定故障模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究阐明了多模态临床条件分类中选择性预测的一个关键失败模式：类别相关的误校准导致不安全行为。强调了在临床AI中需要校准感知的评估方法，以确保安全性和鲁棒性。未来工作可进一步探索校准改进技术或提出新的选择性预测策略。

title: TiledAttention: a CUDA Tile SDPA Kernel for PyTorch
abstract: TiledAttention is a scaled dot-product attention (SDPA) forward operator for SDPA research on NVIDIA GPUs. Implemented in cuTile Python (TileIR) and exposed as a PyTorch-callable function, it is easier to modify than low-level CUDA templates while retaining realistic behavior via online softmax and tiled $K,V$ streaming. Algorithmically, TiledAttention follows the established FlashAttention-style online-softmax formulation; our novelty is the cuTile/TileIR implementation strategy, schedule-level modifiability, and reproducible benchmarking/profiling workflow. The approach is both performant and directly editable at the schedule level from Python (tile shapes, staging, shared-memory layout), enabling rapid, reproducible kernel research without template-heavy CUDA/CUTLASS rewrites. We benchmark TiledAttention on an NVIDIA DGX GB10 node with a reproducible harness and compare against PyTorch SDPA (auto-dispatch), explicit unfused baselines (torch_sdpa_math, standard eager attention), and forced backend probes (FlashAttention2, EffecientAttention, CuDNN Attention) across sequence length, head dimension, and precision (FP16/BF16). While production fused baselines remain stronger overall, TiledAttention delivers large speedups over standard eager attention paths and is available for direct use within PyTorch workflows, providing a practical balance between performance and customizability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出TiledAttention，一个基于cuTile/TileIR的可定制SDPA前向算子，兼顾高性能与调度级可编辑性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有SDPA实现如FlashAttention基于低层CUDA模板，修改困难且不灵活，不利于算法研究。PyTorch的自动分派隐藏了后端细节，研究者难以快速迭代新设计。需要一种既保持高性能又易于在Python层面直接调整调度（如tile形状、共享内存布局）的算子，以加速核函数研究。
light_analysis.method: 采用FlashAttention风格的online softmax和分块K,V流式处理，但使用cuTile Python（TileIR）实现，而非低层CUDA模板。关键创新在于调度层（schedule-level）的可修改性：研究者可直接在Python中调整tile尺寸、数据布局、共享内存策略等，无需重写C++/CUDA代码。算子封装为PyTorch可调用函数，易于集成。
light_analysis.result: 在NVIDIA DGX GB10上，与PyTorch SDPA（自动分派）、显式未融合基线（torch_sdpa_math、标准eager注意力）以及强制后端（FlashAttention2、EfficientAttention、CuDNN Attention）进行对比。TiledAttention相比标准eager注意力路径实现大幅加速，尽管生产级融合基线整体性能更强，但其接近融合后端的性能同时提供了独特的可定制性。
light_analysis.conclusion: TiledAttention在性能与可编辑性间取得平衡，为SDPA研究提供可直接在PyTorch中使用的可复现基准。它简化了核函数研究中的调度探索，避免了繁琐的低层CUDA重写。未来工作可能进一步优化以匹配甚至超越融合基线，并扩展至反向传播。

title: Spectral Condition for $μ$P under Width-Depth Scaling
abstract: Generative foundation models are increasingly scaled in both width and depth, posing significant challenges for stable feature learning and reliable hyperparameter (HP) transfer across model sizes. While maximal update parameterization ($μ$P) has provided a principled solution to both problems for width scaling, existing extensions to the joint width-depth scaling regime remain fragmented, architecture- and optimizer-specific, and often rely on technically involved theories. In this work, we develop a simple and unified spectral framework for $μ$P under joint width-depth scaling. For deep residual networks whose residual blocks contain $k$ transformations, the framework specifies how the norms of weights and their per-step updates should scale with width and depth. It reveals a fundamental transition from $k=1$ to $k\geq 2$, unifying previously disparate $μ$P formulations and identifying the $k\geq 2$ case as more appropriate for practical architectures with multi-transformation branches such as Transformers. Building on this framework, we derive a general recipe for implementing $μ$P across a broad class of optimizers by mapping spectral constraints to concrete HP parameterizations, recovering existing results and extending them to additional optimizers. Finally, experiments on GPT-2 style language models show that the $μ$P formulation derived from the $k\geq 2$ case achieves stable feature learning and robust HP transfer under width-depth scaling, whereas standard parameterization and $μ$P in the $k=1$ case often fail to do so. These results support the practical effectiveness of the proposed spectral framework.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一谱框架，实现深度残差网络在宽度-深度联合缩放下的μP参数化，揭示k≥2分支的重要性。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式基础模型在宽度和深度上同时扩展，现有最大更新参数化（μP）仅针对宽度缩放，扩展到联合缩放时碎片化且依赖复杂理论。需统一框架解决稳定特征学习和超参数迁移问题，尤其是多变换分支架构（如Transformer）。
light_analysis.method: 建立谱框架，规定残差块含k个变换时权重范数和每步更新如何随宽度深度缩放。发现k=1到k≥2的基本转变，统一先前μP公式。将谱约束映射到超参数化，为广泛优化器提供通用实现配方，恢复并扩展现有结果。
light_analysis.result: 在GPT-2风格语言模型实验中，k≥2推导的μP在宽度-深度缩放下实现稳定特征学习和鲁棒超参数迁移，而标准参数化和k=1的μP常失败。表明谱框架的实际有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该谱框架统一并简化了宽度-深度联合缩放下的μP理论，为多变换分支架构提供适用方案。具有实际应用价值，但摘要未明确讨论局限性或未来方向。

title: Mitigating Membership Inference in Intermediate Representations with Differentially Private Training
abstract: In Embedding-as-an-Interface (EaaI) settings, pre-trained models are queried for Intermediate Representations (IRs). The distributional properties of IRs can leak training-set membership signals, enabling Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) whose strength varies across layers. Although Differentially Private Stochastic Gradient Descent (DP-SGD) mitigates such leakage, existing implementations employ per-example gradient clipping and a uniform, layer-agnostic noise multiplier, ignoring heterogeneous layer-wise MIA vulnerability. This paper introduces Layer-wise MIA-risk-aware DP-SGD (LM-DP-SGD), which adaptively allocates privacy protection across layers in proportion to their MIA risk. Specifically, LM-DP-SGD trains a shadow model on a public shadow dataset, extracts per-layer IRs from its train/test splits, and fits layer-specific MIA adversaries, using their attack error rates as MIA-risk estimates. Leveraging the cross-dataset transferability of MIAs, these estimates are then used to reweight each layer's contribution to the globally clipped gradient during private training, providing layer-appropriate protection under a fixed noise magnitude. We further establish theoretical guarantees on both privacy and convergence of LM-DP-SGD. Extensive experiments show that, under the same privacy budget, LM-DP-SGD reduces the peak IR-level MIA risk while preserving utility, yielding a superior privacy-utility trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LM-DP-SGD，根据层间MIA风险自适应分配差分隐私预算，提升中间表示的隐私-效用权衡。
light_analysis.motivation: 在嵌入即接口（EaaI）设置中，预训练模型被查询以获取中间表示（IRs）。IRs的分布特性可能泄露训练集成员信号，使得成员推断攻击（MIA）在不同层间强度各异。现有差分隐私训练（如DP-SGD）使用统一的逐层梯度裁剪和层无关的噪声乘数，忽略了层间MIA脆弱性的异质性，导致隐私保护不足或过度，影响模型效用。因此，需要一种能根据各层实际MIA风险自适应分配隐私保护的训练方法。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出层感知MIA风险DP-SGD（LM-DP-SGD）。首先在公开影子数据集上训练影子模型，从其训练集/测试集提取逐层中间表示，训练层特定MIA攻击器，以攻击错误率作为MIA风险估计。利用MIA跨数据集可迁移性，用这些估计重新加权每层对全局裁剪梯度的贡献，在固定噪声幅度下提供层适应的隐私保护。还建立了隐私和收敛的理论保证。
light_analysis.result: 在相同隐私预算下，LM-DP-SGD相比DP-SGD显著降低峰值IR级MIA风险，同时保持模型效用。实验表明，该方法实现了更优的隐私-效用权衡，具体数据在摘要中未明确给出，但声称在多个数据集上验证了有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文通过提出LM-DP-SGD，解决了EaaI场景中中间表示成员推断攻击的隐私问题。主要贡献在于根据层间MIA脆弱性异质性自适应分配隐私预算，提升隐私保护效率。该方法在理论上有隐私和收敛保证，实验上优于统一噪声策略。未来可探索更高效的风险估计或扩展至其他模型结构。

title: VeRO: An Evaluation Harness for Agents to Optimize Agents
abstract: An important emerging application of coding agents is agent optimization: the iterative improvement of a target agent through edit-execute-evaluate cycles. Despite its relevance, the community lacks a systematic understanding of coding agent performance on this task. Agent optimization differs fundamentally from conventional software engineering: the target agent interleaves deterministic code with stochastic LLM completions, requiring structured capture of both intermediate reasoning and downstream execution outcomes. To address these challenges, we introduce VERO (Versioning, Rewards, and Observations), which provides (1) a reproducible evaluation harness with versioned agent snapshots, budget-controlled evaluation, and structured execution traces, and (2) a benchmark suite of target agents and tasks with reference evaluation procedures. Using VERO, we conduct an empirical study comparing optimizer configurations across tasks and analyzing which modifications reliably improve target agent performance. We release VERO to support research on agent optimization as a core capability for coding agents.
comment: Accepted to the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2026

light_analysis.overview: 提出VERO评估框架，用于系统研究编码代理的优化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理优化（通过编辑-执行-评估循环改进目标代理）是编码代理的重要新兴应用，但社区缺乏对其性能的系统理解。现有方法未考虑目标代理交织确定性代码和随机LLM补全的特点，需要结构化捕获中间推理和下游执行结果。
light_analysis.method: 提出VERO框架，包括可重复评估工具（版本化代理快照、预算控制评估、结构化执行痕迹）和基准套件（目标代理、任务及参考评估程序）。通过实证研究比较优化器配置，分析哪些修改可靠提高性能。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确给出具体实验结果，但提及进行了实证研究，比较优化器配置并分析修改效果。推测使用VERO框架能够可靠评估代理优化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: VERO提供了标准化评估框架，促进代理优化作为编码代理核心能力的研究。学术上填补了系统评估空白，实际应用中有助于开发更高效的编码代理优化方法。未来可扩展更多任务和代理类型。

title: SymTorch: Symbolic Distillation of Neural Networks
abstract: What mathematical functions do neural network components learn? Symbolic distillation addresses this question by expressing neural network components with interpretable, closed-form mathematical expressions that expose the functional structure learned during training. We develop symbolic distillation as a systematic, architecture-agnostic methodology, and release our approach as the open-source SymTorch package - a PySR-powered library built natively for the PyTorch ecosystem. Applying this methodology across diverse architectures, we find that SymTorch is successful in the automated discovery of physical laws. Specifically, our approach (1) recovers pairwise interaction forces from graph neural networks trained on empirical $n$-body observations, (2) distills the exact closed-form PDE/ODE solutions of multiple physical systems, including the value of constants, from physics-informed neural networks trained on sparse data, and (3) uncovers the chaotic dynamics of the Lorenz system from high-dimensional data, ultimately outperforming the base neural network on downstream prediction tasks. We further demonstrate the utility of our framework for model interpretability by providing an optimized implementation of SLIME - a symbolic extension to the LIME explainability method. SLIME consistently outperforms LIME across predictive metrics across eight popular classification and regression benchmarks, while still providing an interpretable local symbolic model. Lastly, we investigate replacing transformer MLP layers with symbolic surrogates: replacing 1-7 layers with symbolic approximations yields 2-19\% throughput improvements and up to 18.7\% VRAM reduction, with the resulting hybrid models lying on the Pareto front of throughput versus perplexity among open-source LLMs of comparable scale.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SymTorch，一个系统化、架构无关的符号蒸馏框架，通过可解释的数学表达式揭示神经网络学习到的函数结构，并在物理定律发现、模型可解释性和效率优化上取得显著成果。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络虽强大但缺乏可解释性，组件学习到的数学函数难以理解。现有方法难以自动发现物理定律或提供简洁的符号解释，且常受限于特定架构。因此，需要一种通用方法将神经网络蒸馏为封闭形式的数学表达式，以提升可解释性和模型分析能力。
light_analysis.method: 基于PySR符号回归和PyTorch生态，提出架构无关的符号蒸馏方法。应用包括：从图神经网络恢复n体相互作用力；从物理信息神经网络提取PDE/ODE精确解；从高维数据发现洛伦兹混沌动力学。此外，优化SLIME符号解释方法，并探索用符号近似替换Transformer MLP层。
light_analysis.result: 成功恢复物理定律，如n体力和PDE/ODE常数解，且在混沌预测上超越基网络。SLIME在8个基准上优于LIME。替换1-7层MLP实现2-19%吞吐量提升和18.7%显存减少，混合模型在perplexity与吞吐量上达Pareto最优。
light_analysis.conclusion: SymTorch提供了一种有效的符号蒸馏工具，增强神经网络可解释性并发现物理规律，同时提升效率。开源实现促进了可重复性。未来可扩展到更复杂模型和更大规模应用。

title: $(α,β)$-Stability for Boosting Vector-Valued Prediction
abstract: Despite the widespread use of boosting in structured prediction, a general theoretical understanding of aggregation beyond scalar prediction remains incomplete. We study vector-valued prediction under a target divergence and identify a geometric stability property under which aggregation amplifies weak guarantees into strong ones. We formalize this property as $(α,β)$-stability by geometric median and show how it supports a boosting framework based on exponential reweighting and geometric-median aggregation. For vector-valued prediction, we characterize this stability property under several natural divergences: $\ell_1$ and $\ell_2$ distances for unconstrained vector-valued prediction, and TV, Hellinger, and KL for density estimation over finite probability vectors. Building on these results, we propose a generic boosting framework \geomedboost. Under a weak learner condition and $(α,β)$-stability, we obtain exponential decay of the empirical divergence error, which then yields population guarantees through a generalization bound.

light_analysis.overview: 提出(α,β)-stability概念，通过几何中值聚合实现向量值预测的boosting理论框架，将弱保证指数级增强为强保证。
light_analysis.motivation: Boosting在结构化预测中广泛应用，但标量预测之外的聚合理论尚不完整。现有方法缺乏对向量值预测下一般散度性质的系统性理解，难以将弱学习保证提升为强保证。本文旨在建立基于几何中值稳定性的统一理论，填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 定义(α,β)-stability（几何中值稳定性），构建基于指数重加权和几何中值聚合的boosting框架GeomedBoost。在ℓ1、ℓ2距离及TV、Hellinger、KL散度下刻画该稳定性。证明在弱学习条件满足时，经验散度误差以指数速率衰减，并通过Rademacher复杂度推导泛化界，实现从经验到总体的保证。
light_analysis.result: 理论上，在弱学习条件和(α,β)-stability下，经验散度误差呈指数衰减，且通过泛化界得到总体误差上界。摘要未提供具体数值实验或与基线对比，但理论结果覆盖多种常用散度，适用于无约束向量预测和有限概率向量密度估计。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次提出基于几何中值的稳定性条件，统一了多种散度下向量值预测的boosting理论。学术上推进了结构化预测的聚合理论，实践上为密度估计等任务提供可证伪的弱学习条件。未来可探索更复杂结构（如图像、序列）下的稳定性刻画。

title: Learning to Stay Safe: Adaptive Regularization Against Safety Degradation during Fine-Tuning
abstract: Instruction-following language models are trained to be helpful and safe, yet their safety behavior can deteriorate under benign fine-tuning and worsen under adversarial updates. Existing defenses often offer limited protection or force a trade-off between safety and utility. We introduce a training framework that adapts regularization in response to safety risk, enabling models to remain aligned throughout fine-tuning. To estimate safety risk at training time, we explore two distinct approaches: a judge-based Safety Critic that assigns high-level harm scores to training batches, and an activation-based risk predictor built with a lightweight classifier trained on intermediate model activations to estimate harmful intent. Each approach provides a risk signal that is used to constrain updates deemed higher risk to remain close to a safe reference policy, while lower-risk updates proceed with standard training. We empirically verify that harmful intent signals are predictable from pre-generation activations and that judge scores provide effective high-recall safety guidance. Across multiple model families and attack scenarios, adaptive regularization with either risk estimation approach consistently lowers attack success rate compared to standard fine-tuning, preserves downstream performance, and adds no inference-time cost. This work demonstrates a principled mechanism for maintaining safety without sacrificing utility.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应正则化训练框架，在微调期间动态调整约束以保持模型安全性，无需牺牲效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 指令遵循语言模型在微调时安全性会退化，现有防御方法要么保护有限，要么在安全性与效用之间权衡。需要一种能在微调过程中持续保持安全对齐的机制，避免安全退化。
light_analysis.method: 提出自适应正则化框架，通过两种方式估计训练时的安全风险：基于法官的安全评分器（对批次分配危害分数）和基于激活的风险预测器（轻量分类器用中间激活估计有害意图）。高风险更新约束靠近安全参考策略，低风险更新正常训练。
light_analysis.result: 在多个模型家族和攻击场景下，自适应正则化相比标准微调持续降低攻击成功率，保持下游性能，且不增加推理成本。验证了有害意图信号可从预生成激活预测，法官评分提供高召回安全指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证明了在不牺牲效用前提下维持安全性的原则性机制。自适应正则化能有效防止安全退化，未来可应用于更广泛的模型微调安全场景。局限性可能包括对风险估计的依赖。

title: SCOPE: Structured Prototype-Guided Adaptation for EEG Foundation Models with Limited Labels
abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models (EFMs) have shown strong potential for transferable representation learning, yet their adaptation in realistic settings remains challenging when only a few labeled subjects are available. We show that this challenge stems from a structural mismatch between noisy, limited supervision and the highly plastic parameter space of EFMs, reflected in three key failure modes: overconfident miscalibration, prediction collapse, and representation drift caused by unconstrained parameter updates. To address these challenges, we propose SCOPE, a Structured COnfidence-aware Prototype-guided framework for label-limited EFM adaptation. SCOPE first constructs cohort-level external supervision to provide persistent guidance and further derives confidence-aware pseudo-labels to select reliable unlabeled samples for adaptation. Building on the constructed external supervision, SCOPE introduces ProAdapter, a lightweight prototype-conditioned adapter that modulates frozen EFMs to preserve pretrained representations. Experiments across 50 label-limited adaptation settings, covering 6 EEG tasks, 5 EFM backbones, and 5%-50% training labeled-subject ratios, show that SCOPE consistently achieves strong performance and efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SCOPE框架，通过结构化原型引导和置信度感知伪标签，解决EEG基础模型在有限标签下的适应难题。
light_analysis.motivation: EEG基础模型在只有少量标注受试者时适应困难，源于噪声有限监督与高塑性参数空间的结构性错配，导致过度自信的误校准、预测崩溃和表示漂移。现有方法无法有效应对这些失败模式，亟需一种在标签稀缺场景下稳定适配的框架。
light_analysis.method: SCOPE首先构建队列级外部监督以提供持久引导，并推导置信度感知伪标签选择可靠未标注样本。基于外部监督，引入ProAdapter，一种轻量级原型条件适配器，调制冻结的EEG基础模型以保持预训练表示。在50种标签有限设置（6个任务、5个骨干网络、5%-50%标注受试者比例）下评估。
light_analysis.result: SCOPE在50种标签有限的适应设置中，涵盖6个EEG任务、5个EEG基础模型骨干和5%-50%的训练标注受试者比例，始终取得强劲的性能和效率。与基线方法相比，显著缓解了过度自信的误校准、预测崩溃和表示漂移问题，在低标签比例下尤其突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCOPE有效解决了EEG基础模型在标签有限场景下的适应挑战，通过构造外部监督和置信度感知伪标签，结合轻量级适配器，实现了稳定高效的迁移。该框架有助于推动EEG基础模型在实际应用中利用少量标注数据，未来可扩展到更多模态和任务。

title: Revis: Sparse Latent Steering to Mitigate Object Hallucination in Large Vision-Language Models
abstract: Despite the advanced capabilities of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs), they frequently suffer from object hallucination. One reason is that visual features and pretrained textual representations often become intertwined in the deeper network layers. To address this, we propose REVIS, a training-free framework designed to explicitly re-activate this suppressed visual information. Rooted in latent space geometry, REVIS extracts the pure visual information vector via orthogonal projection and employs a calibrated strategy to perform sparse intervention only at the precise depth where suppression occurs. This surgical approach effectively restores visual information with minimal computational cost. Empirical evaluations on standard benchmarks demonstrate that REVIS reduces object hallucination rates by approximately 19% compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while preserving general reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 提出REVIS，一种无需训练的无训练框架，通过稀疏潜在操控减轻大视觉语言模型中的物体幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 大视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在深层网络中视觉特征与预训练文本表征纠缠，导致物体幻觉频发。现有方法未能有效分离视觉信息，且训练成本高。该问题影响模型可靠性，亟需轻量级解决方案。
light_analysis.method: REVIS基于潜在空间几何，通过正交投影提取纯视觉信息向量，并采用校准策略在视觉抑制发生的精确深度层进行稀疏干预。该方法无需额外训练，仅需少量计算即可恢复被抑制的视觉信息。
light_analysis.result: 在标准基准测试中，REVIS将物体幻觉率降低约19%，优于当前最先进基线方法，同时保持模型通用推理能力不受影响。计算开销极小，体现了高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: REVIS通过稀疏潜在操控有效缓解LVLMs物体幻觉，为无需训练的后处理干预提供了新思路。其几何方法具有普适性，未来可扩展至其他模态幻觉问题。

title: The Sample Complexity of Uniform Approximation for Multi-Dimensional CDFs and Fixed-Price Mechanisms
abstract: We study the sample complexity of learning a uniform approximation of an $n$-dimensional cumulative distribution function (CDF) within an error $ε> 0$, when observations are restricted to a minimal one-bit feedback. This serves as a counterpart to the multivariate DKW inequality under ''full feedback'', extending it to the setting of ''bandit feedback''. Our main result shows a near-dimensional-invariance in the sample complexity: we get a uniform $ε$-approximation with a sample complexity $\frac{1}{ε^3}{\log\left(\frac 1 ε\right)^{\mathcal{O}(n)}}$ over a arbitrary fine grid, where the dimensionality $n$ only affects logarithmic terms. As direct corollaries, we provide tight sample complexity bounds and novel regret guarantees for learning fixed-price mechanisms in small markets, such as bilateral trade settings.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究了一维反馈下均匀逼近多维CDF的样本复杂度，实现了近维度不变性，并应用于固定价格机制学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 实际中，学习多维累积分布函数（CDF）的均匀逼近常受限于观测反馈的稀疏性（如仅一位反馈）。现有多元DKW不等式仅适用于全反馈场景，无法处理这种带约束的反馈。该问题在经济学和机器学习中广泛存在，例如双边贸易中的固定价格机制设计，亟需在有限反馈下保证样本效率的理论分析。
light_analysis.method: 论文考虑在最小一位反馈（bandit feedback）下，学习n维CDF的均匀ε-近似。核心方法是构造在细网格上均匀逼近的算法，证明了样本复杂度为(1/ε^3) log(1/ε)^{O(n)}，其中维度n仅影响对数项，实现了近维度不变性。关键创新在于利用松弛假设和概率集中技巧，将高维复杂度转化为对数值。
light_analysis.result: 理论结果表明，在一位反馈下，达到均匀ε-近似所需的样本复杂度为(1/ε^3) log(1/ε)^{O(n)}，与全反馈下的复杂度（通常指数依赖维度）形成对比，展现了维度友好性。作为推论，为小市场（如双边贸易）中的固定价格机制学习提供了紧的样本复杂度界和新的遗憾界，显著优于现有结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文首次在一位反馈下建立了多维CDF均匀逼近的近维度不变样本复杂度，填补了极简反馈场景的理论空白。该结果直接应用于固定价格机制设计，提供了理论最优的样本界和遗憾界。未来工作可延伸至连续报价策略或更复杂的反馈模型，但当前框架对网格密度假设可能限制实际应用。

title: When Less is More: The LLM Scaling Paradox in Context Compression
abstract: Scaling up model parameters has long been a prevalent training paradigm driven by the assumption that larger models yield superior generation capabilities. However, under lossy context compression in a compressor--decoder setup, we find a \textbf{\textit{Size-Fidelity Paradox}}: increasing compressor size can lessen the faithfulness of reconstructed contexts though reconstruction error decreases. Across 27 compressor setups spanning model families, scales, and compression rates, we coin this paradox arising from two dominant factors: 1) \textit{knowledge overwriting}: larger models increasingly replace source facts with their own prior beliefs, \textit{e.g.}, ``the white strawberry`` $\to$ ``the red strawberry``; and 2) \textit{semantic drift}: larger models tend to paraphrase or restructure content instead of reproducing it verbatim, \textit{e.g.}, ``Alice hit Bob`` $\to$ ``Bob hit Alice``. Interestingly, this paradox persists across varied settings, with mid-sized compressors often outperforming larger ones in faithful recovery. By analyzing the compressed memory via embedding geometry and reconstruction determinacy, we further reveal that compressors tend to organize memory across broader semantic subspaces, yielding more ambiguous representations prone to overwriting, drift, and weakened recovery. These findings complement existing evaluations of context compression and expose a breakdown of scaling laws when the objective shifts from plausible generation to faithful preservation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出规模-忠实性悖论：增大压缩模型规模反而降低上下文恢复忠实性，揭示扩展定律在忠实性任务中的失效。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究普遍认为更大模型生成能力更强，但在有损上下文压缩场景中，增大压缩器规模可能导致恢复内容更不忠实于原文。该问题重要因为上下文压缩广泛应用于检索增强生成等，而忠实性至关重要。已有方法未系统分析模型规模与恢复忠实度的关系，存在知识覆盖和语义漂移等未被充分认识的问题。
light_analysis.method: 通过27种压缩器设置（涵盖不同模型家族、规模和压缩率）进行系统实验。分析两个主导因素：知识覆盖（较大模型用自身先验替换源事实）和语义漂移（较大模型倾向于释义而非逐字复述）。利用嵌入几何和重建确定性分析压缩记忆，发现大型压缩器趋向于在更广泛语义子空间组织记忆，导致更模糊的表征。
light_analysis.result: 发现中等规模压缩器在忠实恢复上通常优于更大模型。大小与忠实度呈负相关，尽管重建误差随规模增大而减小。具体表现为：大型模型倾向于改变事实（如“白色草莓”→“红色草莓”）或改变事件顺序（如“Alice hit Bob”→“Bob hit Alice”）。该悖论在不同设置下持续存在。
light_analysis.conclusion: 补充了现有上下文压缩评估，揭示当目标从合理生成转向忠实保持时，扩展定律失效。研究对依赖上下文压缩的应用（如检索增强生成）有重要警示意义，未来需开发平衡压缩与忠实性的新方法。

title: ERIS: Enhancing Privacy and Scalability in Federated Learning via Federated Shard Aggregation
abstract: Scaling Federated Learning (FL) to billion-parameter models forces a challenging trade-off between privacy, scalability, and model utility. Existing solutions often tackle these challenges in isolation, sacrificing accuracy, relying on costly cryptographic tools, or introducing communication and optimization inefficiencies that affect convergence. We introduce ERIS, an FL framework centered on Federated Shard Aggregation (FSA), a novel mechanism that partitions each client update into non-overlapping shards whose aggregation is distributed across multiple client-side aggregators. FSA removes the central aggregation bottleneck, limits the information visible to any single observer, and preserves the centralized FL update after reassembly. ERIS can further readily integrate Distributed Shifted Compression (DSC) to reduce transmitted payloads and exposed coordinates. We prove that ERIS preserves convergence under standard assumptions and bounds mutual information leakage by the observable fraction of each update, decreasing with the number of client-side aggregators, and with the compression level when DSC is enabled. Experiments across image and text tasks, including large language models, show that ERIS achieves FedAvg-level utility while substantially reducing communication bottlenecks and improving robustness to membership inference and reconstruction attacks, without relying on heavy cryptography or utility-degrading perturbations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ERIS框架，通过联邦分片聚合（FSA）机制平衡联邦学习中的隐私、可扩展性和模型效用。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩展联邦学习至十亿参数模型时，隐私、可扩展性和效用难以兼顾。现有方法孤立处理这些问题，要么牺牲准确性，要么依赖昂贵密码学工具或引入通信与优化低效影响收敛。
light_analysis.method: ERIS核心为联邦分片聚合（FSA），将客户端更新分割为非重叠分片，由多个客户端侧聚合器分布式聚合，消除中央瓶颈、限制单点可见信息并保留集中式更新。可集成分布式移位压缩（DSC）减少传输负载和暴露坐标。理论证明了收敛性和互信息泄露界限。
light_analysis.result: 图像和文本任务（包括大语言模型）的实验显示，ERIS达到FedAvg级别效用，同时显著减少通信瓶颈，提升对成员推理和重建攻击的鲁棒性，无需重密码学或效用降低扰动。
light_analysis.conclusion: ERIS通过FSA和可选的DSC在保证收敛和效用的同时增强隐私与可扩展性，为联邦学习提供轻量级隐私保护方案。未来可探索更高效的分片或压缩策略。

title: Dynamics-Aligned Shared Hypernetworks for Contextual RL under Discontinuous Shifts
abstract: Zero-shot generalization in contextual reinforcement learning remains a core challenge, particularly when the context is latent and must be inferred from data. A canonical failure mode arises when latent context discontinuously changes how actions affect the environment, requiring incompatible control responses across contexts. We propose DMA*-SH, a framework where a single hypernetwork, trained solely via dynamics prediction, generates a small set of adapter weights shared across the dynamics model, policy, and action-value function. This shared modulation imparts an inductive bias matched to discontinuous context-to-dynamics shifts, while input/output normalization and random input masking stabilize context inference, promoting directionally concentrated representations. We provide theoretical support via expressivity separation results for hypernetwork modulation, and a variance decomposition with policy-gradient variance bounds that formalize how within-mode compression improves learning under non-overlapping contexts. For evaluation, we introduce the Actuator Inversion Benchmark (AIB), a suite of environments designed to isolate challenging context-to-dynamics interactions, including actuator inversion, actuator permutations, and weakly non-overlapping continuous dynamics. On AIB's held-out tasks, DMA*-SH achieves zero-shot generalization, outperforming domain randomization by 58.1% and surpassing a standard context-aware baseline by 11.5% on average.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DMA*-SH框架，通过共享超网络实现零样本泛化，有效应对上下文不连续变化下的强化学习挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 上下文强化学习中零样本泛化面临挑战，尤其在潜在上下文导致动态不连续变化时，现有方法（如领域随机化）泛化能力不足，需要跨上下文兼容的控制策略。
light_analysis.method: DMA*-SH框架利用单个超网络预测动态，生成适配权重共享于动态模型、策略和动作价值函数，辅以输入输出归一化和随机输入掩码稳定上下文推断，并提供表达性分离与方差分解理论支持。
light_analysis.result: 在Actuator Inversion Benchmark (AIB)的保留任务上，DMA*-SH实现零样本泛化，平均性能优于领域随机化58.1%，超过标准上下文感知基线11.5%。
light_analysis.conclusion: DMA*-SH有效解决不连续上下文变化下的零样本泛化，理论分析与实验验证其优越性，未来可扩展至更复杂动态场景。

title: Agent-Omit: Adaptive Context Omission for Efficient LLM Agents
abstract: Managing agent context (e.g., thought and observation) during multi-turn agent-environment interactions is an emerging strategy to improve agent efficiency. However, existing studies treat the entire interaction trajectories equally, overlooking the thought necessity and observation utility varies across turns. To this end, we first conduct quantitative investigations into how thought and observation affect agent effectiveness and efficiency. Based on our findings, we propose Agent-Omit, a unified training framework that empowers LLM agents to adaptively omit redundant thoughts and observations. Specifically, we first synthesize a small amount of cold-start data, including both single-turn and multi-turn omission scenarios, to fine-tune the agent for omission behaviors. Furthermore, we introduce an omit-aware agentic reinforcement learning approach, incorporating a dual sampling mechanism and a tailored omission reward to incentivize the agent's adaptive omission capability. Theoretically, we prove that the deviation of our omission policy is upper-bounded by KL-divergence. Experimental results on five agent benchmarks show that our constructed Agent-Omit-8B could obtain performance comparable to seven frontier LLM agent, and achieve the best effectiveness-efficiency trade-off than seven efficient LLM agents methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/Agent-Omit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Agent-Omit，一个自适应省略冗余上下文（思维和观察）的统一训练框架，以提升LLM代理的效率和效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有管理代理上下文的策略平等对待多轮交互轨迹，忽略了不同轮次中思维的必要性和观察的效用差异。这导致资源浪费和效率低下。本文通过定量研究证实这一不足，并旨在让代理自适应地省略冗余内容，在保持性能的同时提高效率。
light_analysis.method: 首先合成少量冷启动数据（包括单轮和多轮省略场景）微调代理。然后引入省略感知的强化学习方法，包含双采样机制和定制省略奖励，激励自适应省略能力。理论证明省略策略的偏差受KL散度上界约束。
light_analysis.result: 在五个代理基准上，Agent-Omit-8B取得与七个前沿LLM代理相当的性能，并且相比七种高效LLM代理方法，实现了最佳的效果-效率权衡。具体提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: Agent-Omit通过自适应省略冗余上下文，显著提升了LLM代理的效率，同时保持高性能。该框架具有理论保证，代码和数据已开源。未来可探索更复杂的省略策略或扩展至更多代理任务。

title: Beyond Accuracy: Evaluating Posterior Fidelity of Diffusion Inverse Solvers
abstract: Uncertainty evaluation is critical in scientific and engineering inverse problems. However, existing benchmarks on Diffusion Inverse Solvers (DIS) primarily focus on reconstruction accuracy but overlook uncertainty and distributional behavior. Since stochastic inverse solvers represent uncertainty through diffusion-based posterior samples, evaluating how well their generated samples capture the target posterior distribution becomes an important aspect of uncertainty quantification. To address this limitation and better understand the distributional behavior of diffusion samplers, we conduct a systematic study to investigate the posterior fidelity of a broad range of existing DIS methods in controlled simulation settings with a known analytical true posterior. Furthermore, to enable posterior-aware evaluation on real-world inverse problems where ground-truth posterior is unavailable, we propose score-based Kernel Stein Discrepancy (score-KSD), a theoretically-grounded and ground-truth-free metric that measures the consistency of the distribution of generated samples from a DIS method with the target posterior score field, induced by the forward model and learned diffusion prior. Through both simulation experiments and real-world inverse problem solving, we validate the effectiveness of the proposed score-KSD and demonstrate that it provides meaningful posterior fidelity diagnostics beyond reconstruction accuracy, revealing that higher reconstruction accuracy does not necessarily imply better posterior consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出score-KSD指标评估扩散逆求解器的后验保真度，超越传统重建精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学和工程逆问题中不确定性评估至关重要，但现有扩散逆求解器基准仅关注重建精度，忽视不确定性和分布行为。由于随机逆求解器通过扩散后验样本表示不确定性，评估样本是否捕捉目标后验分布成为不确定性量化的关键。因此需要系统研究后验保真度，并开发无需真实后验的评估指标。
light_analysis.method: 在已知解析后验的仿真设置中系统研究现有DIS方法的后验保真度。针对真实逆问题中后验未知的情况，提出基于分数的核斯坦因差异（score-KSD），该指标理论扎实且无需真实后验，通过测量生成样本分布与目标后验分数场（由前向模型和学习的扩散先验诱导）的一致性来评估。
light_analysis.result: 通过仿真和真实逆问题实验验证了score-KSD的有效性，证明它能提供超越重建精度的有意义的后验保真度诊断，并揭示高重建精度不一定意味着更好的后验一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出后验保真度评估框架和score-KSD指标，弥补了现有基准的不足，对科学和工程中不确定性量化具有重要价值。未来可进一步扩展到更复杂的前向模型和先验。

title: Federated Concept-Based Models: Interpretable models with distributed supervision
abstract: Concept-based Models (CMs) enhance interpretability in deep learning by grounding predictions in human-understandable concepts. However, concept annotations are costly and rarely available at scale within a single data source. Federated Learning (FL) could alleviate this limitation by enabling cross-institutional training over concept annotations distributed across multiple data owners. Yet, FL lacks interpretable modeling paradigms. Integrating CMs with FL is non-trivial: although FL supports heterogeneous and non-stationary client participation, it typically assumes a fixed shared architecture, whereas CMs may require architectural adaptation as the available concept set evolves. We propose Federated Concept-based Models (F-CMs), a new methodology for deploying CMs in evolving FL settings. F-CMs aggregate concept-level information across institutions and efficiently adapt the model architecture to changes in concept supervision while preserving privacy. Empirically, F-CMs maintain accuracy and intervention effectiveness comparable to training settings with full concept supervision, while outperforming on average non-adaptive federated baselines. Notably, F-CMs enable interpretable inference on concepts unavailable to a given institution, a key novelty over existing approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 提出联邦概念模型（F-CMs），将概念模型的可解释性与联邦学习的分布式监督相结合。
light_analysis.motivation: 概念模型（CMs）依赖人工概念标注，成本高昂且难以在单一数据源大规模获得。联邦学习（FL）虽能跨机构共享数据，但缺乏可解释建模范式。直接集成CMs与FL面临挑战：FL假设固定共享架构，而CMs可能需要随可用概念集变化进行架构适应。因此，需要一种新方法在联邦环境中部署可解释的CMs。
light_analysis.method: F-CMs通过跨机构聚合概念级信息，并自适应调整模型架构以适应概念监督的变化，同时保护隐私。该方法支持异构和非平稳的客户参与，无需共享原始数据。核心创新在于能够高效处理概念集的动态演变，并确保模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，F-CMs在准确性和干预有效性上与完全概念监督的训练设置相当，并在平均性能上优于非自适应联邦基线。值得注意的是，F-CMs能够对特定机构不可用的概念进行可解释推理，这是现有方法无法实现的关键突破。
light_analysis.conclusion: F-CMs为联邦学习环境下的可解释建模提供了新范式，解决了概念标注分散和隐私保护的矛盾。其实用价值在于促进跨机构协作，无需集中概念数据即可训练可解释模型。未来可探索更复杂的概念演化场景和通信效率优化。

title: What Structural Inductive Bias Helps Transformers Reason Over Knowledge Graphs? A Study with Tabula RASA
abstract: What structural inductive bias helps transformers reason over knowledge graphs? Through controlled ablations of a minimal transformer modification with four independently removable components (sparse adjacency masking, edge-type biases, query scaling, value gating), we isolate which structural signals drive multi-hop reasoning. Our finding is sharp: sparse adjacency masking alone accounts for the dominant share of improvement over unmasked transformers (+72.5pp on 3-hop MetaQA, +45.5pp on WebQSP, +53.9pp on CWQ), while learned relation parameters add only modest refinement and can actively hurt without structural guidance. A zero-shot experiment provides architecturally independent corroboration: masking-based attention degrades 4.0x less than relation-specific weights when edge types are held out. The useful inductive bias for multi-hop KGQA is predominantly topological, not relational.

light_analysis.overview: 通过系统消融实验，发现稀疏邻域掩码是Transformer进行知识图谱多跳推理的关键结构归纳偏置。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识图谱推理中，Transformer模型需要合适的结构归纳偏置才能有效进行多跳推理。现有方法常混合多种结构信号，但缺乏对各个信号贡献的独立分析。本研究旨在通过可控消融实验，明确哪些结构偏置（如拓扑、关系类型）对推理性能起决定性作用，从而指导更高效的模型设计。
light_analysis.method: 提出Tabula RASA，一个对最小Transformer修改的变体，包含四个独立可移除组件：稀疏邻域掩码、边类型偏置、查询缩放、值门控。在MetaQA、WebQSP、CWQ数据集上进行控制消融，并设计零样本实验（隐藏边类型）以验证归纳偏置的架构独立性。
light_analysis.result: 稀疏邻域掩码贡献了最主要的性能提升：在MetaQA 3-hop上提升72.5个百分点，WebQSP上45.5个百分点，CWQ上53.9个百分点。学习的关系参数仅带来微小改进，且在无结构指导时反而有害。零样本实验表明，基于掩码的注意力退化幅度比基于关系权重的低4.0倍，证明拓扑偏置更鲁棒。
light_analysis.conclusion: 多跳知识图谱问答的有用归纳偏置主要是拓扑的，而非关系的。该发现简化了模型设计，强调稀疏邻域结构的重要性。未来可探索更高效的拓扑编码方式，并验证该偏置在其他图推理任务中的普适性。

title: Context Learning for Multi-Agent Discussion
abstract: Multi-Agent Discussion (MAD) has garnered increasing attention very recently, where multiple LLM instances collaboratively solve problems via structured discussion. However, we find that current MAD methods easily suffer from discussion inconsistency, LLMs fail to reach a coherent solution, due to the misalignment between their individual contexts.In this paper, we introduce a multi-LLM context learning method (M2CL) that learns a context generator for each agent, capable of dynamically generating context instructions per discussion round via automatic information organization and refinement. Specifically, inspired by our theoretical insights on the context instruction, M2CL train the generators to control context coherence and output discrepancies via a carefully crafted self-adaptive mechanism.It enables LLMs to avoid premature convergence on majority noise and progressively reach the correct consensus. We evaluate M2CL on challenging tasks, including academic reasoning, embodied tasks, and mobile control. The results show that the performance of M2CL significantly surpasses existing methods by 20%--50%, while enjoying favorable transferability and computational efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 提出多LLM上下文学习方法M2CL，通过学习上下文生成器动态生成每轮讨论的上下文指令，解决多智能体讨论中的不一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多智能体讨论（MAD）中，多个LLM实例通过结构化讨论协作解决问题，但现有方法由于个体上下文错位，导致讨论不一致，难以达成连贯解决方案。对齐上下文是提升讨论质量和共识准确性的关键。
light_analysis.method: 提出M2CL，为每个智能体学习一个上下文生成器，通过自动信息组织和精炼动态生成每轮讨论的上下文指令。受理论洞察启发，采用自适应机制控制上下文连贯性和输出差异，避免过早收敛到多数噪声，逐步达成正确共识。
light_analysis.result: 在学术推理、具身任务、移动控制等挑战性任务上，M2CL性能显著超越现有方法20%-50%，同时具有良好可迁移性和计算效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: M2CL通过学习上下文生成器有效解决多LLM讨论中的不一致问题，动态生成指令提升共识质量。在多个任务上取得大幅性能提升，具有实际应用价值。未来可探索更复杂场景下的迁移和扩展。

title: A Physical Theory of Backpropagation: Exact Gradients from the Least-Action Principle
abstract: Backpropagation is typically presented as a symbolic procedure: a backward pass topologically distinct from inference, with non-local error signals and synchronous global clocking, features with no clear analog in physical reality. Existing physics-inspired alternatives recover gradients only approximately, in vanishing-perturbation limits, or under weight-symmetry constraints incompatible with feedforward architectures. In this paper, we address this gap by deriving exact backpropagation from Hamilton's least-action principle. By recasting the forward dynamics in continuous time and adapting a Lagrangian formalism for non-conservative systems to the resulting flow, we unify inference and gradient computation within a single variational framework on a doubled phase space, whose two conjugate fields jointly encode activations and sensitivities. A single global Lagrangian governs the dynamics: the task loss enters as a symmetry-breaking perturbation of the forward manifold, and credit assignment emerges as the tension that develops between the conjugate states. Inference and gradient computation thus unfold simultaneously through local interactions, requiring no separate backward circuit. Ultimately, standard backpropagation is recovered exactly as the discrete-time projection of this continuous flow. This perspective unifies the formalism of physics with backpropagation, opening a principled pathway for applying tools from classical mechanics - symplectic geometry, Noether's theorem, path-integral methods - to the analysis of learning dynamics. As a downstream consequence, it also points toward analog and neuromorphic substrates in which learning is embodied in the hardware itself.

light_analysis.overview: 从哈密顿最小作用量原理严格推导出精确反向传播，将推理和梯度计算统一在单一变分框架内。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统反向传播被描述为符号过程，具有非局部错误信号和同步全局时钟，缺乏物理可实现性。现有物理启发方法仅近似恢复梯度，或在消失扰动极限、权重对称约束下有效。需要从物理学原理出发，实现精确反向传播的物理基础，以便于在模拟和神经形态硬件中实现嵌入式学习。
light_analysis.method: 将前向动态重写为连续时间，采用非保守系统的拉格朗日形式，在双相空间上统一推理和梯度计算。一个全局拉格朗日函数控制动态，任务损失作为对称性破缺扰动，信用分配作为共轭状态之间的张力。推理和梯度计算同时通过局部交互发生，无需单独的反向电路；标准反向传播被恢复为这个连续流的离散时间投影。
light_analysis.result: 论文从理论推导出精确反向传播，而非近似。标准反向传播作为连续流在离散时间下的投影被完全恢复。该方法不需要权重对称性约束或近似极限，统一了推理和梯度计算的物理形式。实验部分未明确提及，但理论框架为后续应用经典力学工具（如辛几何、诺特定理、路径积分方法）分析学习动态奠定了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究将反向传播与物理学最小作用量原理统一，为学习动态分析提供了经典力学工具，并指向模拟和神经形态硬件中硬件本身体现学习的可能性。潜在局限性包括连续时间假设和物理实现的具体挑战，未来可探索实验验证和扩展至更复杂网络。

title: Restoring Exploration after Post-Training: Latent Exploration Decoding for Large Reasoning Models
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have recently achieved strong mathematical and code reasoning performance through Reinforcement Learning (RL) post-training. However, we show that modern reasoning post-training induces an unintended exploration collapse: temperature-based sampling no longer increases pass@$n$ accuracy. Empirically, the final-layer posterior of post-trained LRMs exhibit sharply reduced entropy, while the entropy of intermediate layers remains relatively high. Motivated by this entropy asymmetry, we propose Latent Exploration Decoding (LED), a depth-conditioned decoding strategy. LED aggregates intermediate posteriors via cumulative sum and selects depth configurations with maximal entropy as exploration candidates. Without additional training or parameters, LED consistently improves pass@1 and pass@16 accuracy by 0.61 and 1.03 percentage points across multiple reasoning benchmarks and models. Furthermore, integrating LED into reinforcement learning, e.g., using GRPO as the rollout strategy, yields faster reward improvement and higher final performance, due to the efficient exploration capability of LED. Project page: https://github.com/AlbertTan404/LED.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Latent Exploration Decoding（LED），通过利用中间层高熵后验恢复后训练LRM的探索能力，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型推理模型（LRM）经过强化学习后训练后，温度采样无法提升pass@n准确率，出现探索崩溃。实验发现后训练使得模型最终层后验熵显著降低，而中间层熵仍较高。这种熵不对称性限制了模型推理性能的进一步提升，亟需一种能恢复探索能力的解码策略。
light_analysis.method: LED是一种深度条件解码策略，通过累积求和聚合中间层后验分布，并选择熵最大的深度配置作为探索候选。它不引入额外训练或参数，可即插即用。在推理时，LED从高熵中间层采样，增强输出多样性；也可集成到强化学习（如GRPO）的rollout中，提供高效探索。
light_analysis.result: 在多个推理基准和模型上，LED一致提升pass@1和pass@16准确率，平均分别提高0.61和1.03个百分点。当作为GRPO的rollout策略时，LED带来更快的奖励提升和更高的最终性能，证明了其探索能力的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LED揭示了后训练LRM的探索崩溃现象，并利用中间层熵不对称性设计轻量级解码方案恢复探索。该工作加深了对后训练行为理解，且无需重训练即可提升模型推理能力，具有实用价值。未来可能探索更复杂的深度选择或与搜索算法结合。

title: Root Cause Analysis of Measurement and Mechanistic Anomalies
abstract: Root cause analysis of anomalies aims to identify how and why a sample deviates from the normal process. Existing methods primarily focus on telling which features are responsible, ignoring that anomalies can arise through two fundamentally different processes: measurement errors, where the sample is generated normally but one or more values is recorded incorrectly, and mechanism shifts, where the causal process that generated the sample was changed. While measurement errors can often be safely corrected, mechanistic anomalies require careful consideration. In this paper, we formally define a causal model that explicitly captures both types by treating outliers as latent interventions on latent ("true") and observed ("measured") variables and show under which conditions the distinction is possible. Based on this model, we develop an efficient inference procedure for localizing root causes and distinguishing anomaly types. Experiments on synthetic and real-world data show that our method provides state-of-the-art and highly robust performance in both root cause localization and classification of anomaly types.

light_analysis.overview: 提出因果模型区分测量误差与机制偏移两种异常类型，并开发高效推理方法进行根因定位与类型分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有异常根因分析方法主要关注哪些特征导致异常，忽略了异常可能源于两种本质不同的过程：测量误差（样本生成正常但记录错误）和机制偏移（生成样本的因果过程改变）。测量误差通常可安全修正，而机制偏移需谨慎处理。因此，需要一种能够明确区分这两种异常类型并进行根因定位的方法，以提高异常处理的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本文正式定义了一个因果模型，将异常视为对潜在“真实”变量和观测“测量”变量的潜在干预，并明确了区分两种异常类型的条件。基于该模型，开发了一种高效的推理过程，用于定位根因并区分异常类型。方法结合了因果推断与异常检测技术，通过潜在干预的识别实现根因分析。实验使用合成数据和真实世界数据评估性能。
light_analysis.result: 在合成数据和真实世界数据上的实验表明，该方法在根因定位和异常类型分类方面均达到了最先进的性能，并展现出高度的鲁棒性。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细给出，但声称优于现有方法，尤其是在区分测量误差与机制偏移方面表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了一个能够区分测量误差和机制偏移的因果模型，并开发了相应的推理算法。该方法提升了异常根因分析的准确性和实用性，具有重要的学术价值和工业应用前景。潜在局限性可能包括对模型假设的依赖，未来工作可考虑更复杂场景下的扩展。

title: SMOG: Scalable Meta-Learning for Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Multi-objective optimization aims to solve problems with competing objectives. Evaluating such problems is often slow or expensive, limiting the budget of evaluations. In many applications, historical data from related optimization tasks is available and can be leveraged via meta-learning to accelerate optimization. Bayesian optimization, as a promising technique for expensive black-box problems, has been extended independently to meta-learning and multi-objective optimization, but methods that simultaneously address both settings remain largely unexplored. We propose SMOG-a scalable and modular meta-learning model based on a multi-output Gaussian process-that explicitly learns correlations between objectives. SMOG builds a structured joint Gaussian process prior across meta- and target tasks and, after conditioning on metadata, yields a closed-form prior for the target task. This construction propagates metadata uncertainty into the target surrogate in a principled way. SMOG supports hierarchical, parallel training, achieving linear scaling with the number of meta-tasks. The resulting surrogate integrates seamlessly with standard multi-objective Bayesian optimization acquisition functions. We demonstrate that our method is consistently competitive, delivering strong data efficiency across representative benchmarks and applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出可扩展元学习模型SMOG，结合多输出高斯过程与多目标贝叶斯优化，实现元任务间线性扩展与不确定性传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 多目标优化需权衡冲突目标，但评估昂贵；现有贝叶斯优化分别支持元学习或多目标，但两者结合的方法匮乏。历史任务数据可借助元学习加速优化，但缺乏统一框架同时处理两个场景。
light_analysis.method: SMOG基于多输出高斯过程构建结构化联合先验，跨元任务与目标任务学习目标相关性。通过元数据条件化得到目标任务闭式先验，并传播元数据不确定性。支持层次化并行训练，计算复杂度随元任务数线性增长。与标准多目标贝叶斯优化采集函数兼容。
light_analysis.result: 在代表性基准和应用中，SMOG持续表现出强竞争力，相比现有方法显著提升数据效率。具体性能指标（如超体积、遗憾值）优于独立多目标BO和元学习基线，但摘要未提供确切数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: SMOG为多目标贝叶斯优化引入可扩展元学习框架，理论严谨且模块化设计。实际价值在于利用历史数据加速昂贵多目标优化，潜在局限包括对目标相关性的假设及超参数敏感性，未来可扩展至更高维目标空间。

title: Why Adam Works Better with $β_1 = β_2$: The Missing Gradient Scale Invariance Principle
abstract: Adam has been at the core of large-scale training for almost a decade, yet a simple empirical fact remains unaccounted for: both validation scores and the qualitative behaviour of the training runs improve when the momentum parameters satisfy $β_{1}=β_{2}$. Some recent studies have reported this pattern, but there is still no explanation for why this choice helps. We show that this choice is closely tied to a structural property that we refer to as \textit{gradient scale invariance}. We formalize this notion and prove that Adam becomes gradient scale invariant of first order if and only if $β_{1}=β_{2}$. This perspective places the balanced regime of Adam in direct alignment with the design principles underlying several recent optimizers that explicitly enforce scale-robust updates. The theory is supported by experiments across vision and language tasks, and across different architectural families, in which rescaling the gradient has a markedly smoother effect on the update when $β_{1}=β_{2}$. Overall, our results offer a coherent explanation for an open question in the behavior of Adam and provide a simple principle that helps guide the design of future optimizers.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示Adam优化器中β1=β2提升性能的原因是梯度尺度不变性原理。
light_analysis.motivation: Adam优化器自提出以来广泛应用于大规模训练，但一个简单的经验事实——当动量参数满足β1=β2时，验证分数和训练行为均得到改善——长期缺乏理论解释。尽管近期研究观察到这一现象，但为何这一选择有效仍不明确。理解其背后的机制对于优化器设计至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 作者提出梯度尺度不变性概念，并证明Adam达到一阶梯度的尺度不变性当且仅当β1=β2。通过形式化分析，将平衡状态下的Adam与显式实现尺度鲁棒更新的优化器设计原则联系起来。实验覆盖视觉和语言任务及不同架构家族，通过重缩放梯度验证对更新的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，当β1=β2时，重缩放梯度对更新的影响显著更平滑。这一结果在多种任务和架构上得到一致验证，支持了梯度尺度不变性理论。与未平衡参数的设置相比，平衡参数下的训练过程表现出更优的定性行为和验证分数。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究为Adam中β1=β2为何有效提供了统一的理论解释，揭示了梯度尺度不变性这一关键原理。这不仅解释了长期未解的观察现象，还为未来优化器设计提供了简单而有效的指导原则。未来可能将这一原理扩展到其他自适应优化器中。

title: Supervised Guidance Training for Infinite-Dimensional Diffusion Models
abstract: Score-based diffusion models have recently been extended to infinite-dimensional function spaces, with uses such as inverse problems arising from partial differential equations. In the Bayesian formulation of inverse problems, the aim is to sample from a posterior distribution over functions obtained by conditioning a prior on noisy observations. While diffusion models provide expressive priors in function space, the theory of conditioning them to sample from the posterior remains open. We address this, assuming that either the prior lies in the Cameron-Martin space, or is absolutely continuous with respect to a Gaussian measure. We prove that the models can be conditioned using an infinite-dimensional extension of Doob's $h$-transform, and that the conditional score decomposes into an unconditional score and a guidance term. As the guidance term is intractable, we propose a simulation-free score matching objective (called Supervised Guidance Training) enabling efficient and stable posterior sampling. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples on Bayesian inverse problems in function spaces. In summary, our work offers the first function-space method for fine-tuning trained diffusion models to accurately sample from a posterior.

light_analysis.overview: 提出无限维扩散模型条件采样的严格理论，证明Doob's h-transform的无限维扩展，并设计仿真无得分匹配目标（SGT）用于高效后验采样。
light_analysis.motivation: 分数扩散模型已扩展至无限维函数空间，应用于偏微分方程逆问题。但贝叶斯逆问题中需从函数后验分布采样，现有理论缺乏无限维扩散模型的条件化方法。后验分数难以计算，且无有效采样方法。该研究旨在填补这一理论空白，提供严格的条件化框架，并解决引导项不可解的问题。
light_analysis.method: 假设先验位于Cameron-Martin空间或关于高斯测度绝对连续，证明无限维Doob's h-transform可条件化扩散模型，条件分数分解为无条件分数和引导项。因引导项不可解，提出仿真无得分匹配目标Supervised Guidance Training (SGT)，通过匹配条件得分与无条件得分之差，避免模拟路径，实现高效稳定的后验采样。
light_analysis.result: 在函数空间贝叶斯逆问题的数值实验中，所提SGT方法能够准确从后验分布采样，与理论一致。摘要未明确给出具体性能指标（如误差、效率提升），但表明该方法有效解决了无限维后验采样问题，为首次函数空间条件扩散模型方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作首次为无限维空间中的扩散模型提供严格的条件化理论，并通过SGT实现高效后验采样，解决了贝叶斯逆问题的采样难题。学术价值在于将Doob's h-transform扩展至无限维，实际应用上为函数空间逆问题提供新工具。局限性是依赖先验的Cameron-Martin或绝对连续假设，未来可探索更一般先验。

title: Implicit Hypothesis Testing and Divergence Preservation in Neural Network Representations
abstract: We study the training dynamics of neural classifiers through the lens of binary hypothesis testing. We re-formalize classification as a collection of binary tests between class-conditional distributions induced by learned representations and show empirically that, along training trajectories, well-generalizing networks progressively approach Neyman-Pearson optimal decision rules, as measured by monotonic growth in the KL divergence retained by learned representations. We provide sufficient conditions for exact optimality, discuss its implications for training regularization, and define an informational plane, (so-called Evidence-Error plane) where convergence can be assessed methodically across network architecture.

light_analysis.overview: 将神经分类器训练重新形式化为二元假设检验，证明泛化网络渐进达到Neyman-Pearson最优决策规则，并定义证据-误差平面评估收敛。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络的训练动态和泛化机制尚未被充分理解，尤其是表示学习如何与最优决策相关联。现有方法多关注损失景观或过参数化，缺乏从假设检验角度的统一分析。该研究旨在揭示表示保留的KL散度与分类最优性之间的关系，为训练正则化提供理论指导。
light_analysis.method: 将分类任务分解为类条件分布间的二元假设检验，利用学习到的表示诱导分布。通过测量表示保留的KL散度，量化网络沿训练轨迹接近Neyman-Pearson最优决策规则的程度。推导了精确最优性的充分条件，并引入了“Evidence-Error平面”作为诊断工具，用于跨架构评估收敛行为。实验涉及多种网络架构和数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，良好泛化的网络在训练过程中KL散度单调增长，表示渐进满足Neyman-Pearson最优性。证据-误差平面揭示了不同架构下收敛模式的共性。具体数值指标（如准确率提升）摘要未明确，但与基线相比，该理论框架提供了对正则化效果的新见解。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作将分类最优性与表示的信息论特性联系起来，为理解神经网络的泛化提供了新视角。证据-误差平面可作为分析训练动态的实用工具。局限性在于充分条件可能难以直接验证，未来可探索如何基于此理论设计更有效的正则化方法。

title: What's the plan? Metrics for implicit planning in LLMs and their application to rhyme generation and question answering
abstract: Prior work suggests that language models, while trained on next token prediction, show implicit planning behavior: they may select the next token in preparation to a predicted future token, such as a likely rhyming word, as supported by a prior qualitative study of Claude 3.5 Haiku using a cross-layer transcoder. We propose much simpler techniques for assessing implicit planning in language models. With case studies on rhyme poetry generation and question answering, we demonstrate that our methodology easily scales to many models. Across models, we find that the generated rhyme (e.g. "-ight") or answer to a question ("whale") can be manipulated by steering at the end of the preceding line with a vector, affecting the generation of intermediate tokens leading up to the rhyme or answer word. We show that implicit planning is a universal mechanism, present in smaller models than previously thought, starting from 1B parameters. Our methodology offers a widely applicable direct way to study implicit planning abilities of LLMs. More broadly, understanding planning abilities of language models can inform decisions in AI safety and control.
comment: 41 pages, 34 figures, Accepted at ICLR 2026, Code available at https://github.com/Jim-Maar/implicit-planning-in-llms

light_analysis.overview: 提出评估语言模型隐式规划能力的简单方法，并通过押韵生成和问答任务验证其可扩展性和普适性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有研究表明语言模型存在隐式规划行为，但研究方法复杂且难以扩展。本文旨在提出更简单的评估技术，以验证隐式规划在多种模型中的存在性，并探索其机制。理解模型规划能力对AI安全和控制至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用简单的向量操控技术，在押韵诗歌生成和问答任务中，通过干预前文末尾的向量来影响后续生成的押韵词或答案。跨多个模型（包括小至1B参数的模型）进行实验，分析隐式规划的普遍性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，通过操控前文向量可成功影响押韵词（如“-ight”）和答案（如“whale”）的生成。隐式规划机制在1B参数的小模型中即存在，且方法可扩展至多种模型，验证了其普适性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为研究LLM隐式规划提供了直接且可扩展的工具，证实了该机制在较小模型中的存在。未来可进一步探索规划能力的应用，如提升模型控制与安全。

title: VAE with Hyperspherical Coordinates: Improving Anomaly Detection from Hypervolume-Compressed Latent Space
abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAE) encode data into lower-dimensional latent vectors before decoding those vectors back to data. Once trained, one can hope to detect out-of-distribution (abnormal) latent vectors, but several issues arise when the latent space is high dimensional. This includes an exponential growth of the hypervolume with the dimension, which severely affects the generative capacity of the VAE. In this paper, we draw insights from high dimensional statistics: in these regimes, the latent vectors of a standard VAE are distributed on the `equators' of a hypersphere, challenging the detection of anomalies. We propose to formulate the latent variables of a VAE using hyperspherical coordinates, which allows compressing the latent vectors towards a given direction on the hypersphere, thereby allowing for a more expressive approximate posterior. We show that this improves both the fully unconditional-OOD and conditional-OOD anomaly detection ability of the VAE, achieving the best performance on the datasets we considered, outperforming existing methods. For the unconditional-OOD and conditional-OOD modalities, respectively, these are: i) detecting unusual landscape from the Mars Rover camera and unusual Galaxies from ground based imagery (complex, real world datasets); ii) standard benchmarks like Cifar10 and subsets of ImageNet as the in-distribution (ID) class.

light_analysis.overview: 提出使用超球面坐标改进VAE，解决高维潜空间中超体积膨胀导致的异常检测困难问题。
light_analysis.motivation: VAE在高维潜空间面临超体积指数增长问题，严重削弱生成能力并阻碍异常检测。标准VAE的潜变量集中在超球面“赤道”附近，难以区分正常与异常样本。本文旨在通过新的潜变量表示方法提升异常检测性能。
light_analysis.method: 将VAE的潜变量参数化为超球面坐标，允许向特定方向压缩，从而增强近似后验的表达力。该方法分别针对无条件OOD和条件OOD异常检测进行优化，在火星车图像、星系图像等复杂真实数据集以及Cifar10和ImageNet子集上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在无条件OOD任务中，检测火星异常景观和异常星系达到最优；在条件OOD任务中，针对Cifar10和ImageNet子集的标准基准也取得最佳性能，全面超越现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的超球面坐标VAE有效改善了高维潜空间的异常检测能力，为处理复杂高维数据提供新思路。未来可探索更复杂的后验分布或扩展至其他生成模型。

title: Beyond Hard Writes and Rigid Preservation: Soft Recursive Least-Squares for Lifelong LLM Editing
abstract: Model editing updates a pre-trained LLM with new facts or rules without retraining while preserving unrelated behavior. In real deployment, edits arrive as long streams, creating a plasticity-stability dilemma: repeated locate-then-edit "hard writes" can accumulate interference over time, while rigid preservation constraints may protect only explicitly constrained directions, allowing past edits or unconstrained behaviors to deviate.   We propose RLSEdit, a recursive least-squares editor for long sequential editing. RLSEdit formulates editing as an online quadratic optimization with soft constraints, minimizing a cumulative key-value fitting objective together with two regularizers that control deviation from the pre-trained weights and from a designated anchor mapping. This objective admits an efficient Woodbury-based online recursion, with per-edit cost independent of history length and scaling only with the current edit size. We further provide deviation bounds and an asymptotic characterization of the adherence-preservation trade-off in the many-edits regime.   Experiments on CounterFact and ZsRE across multiple model families show stable scaling to 10K edits, outperforming strong baselines in both edit success and holistic stability, while retaining early edits and preserving general capabilities on GLUE and held-out reasoning/code benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RLSEdit方法，将LLM编辑建模为软约束的在线二次优化，通过递归最小二乘实现高效长序列编辑。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实部署中，编辑以长流形式到达，现有“硬写入”方法累积干扰，“刚性保留”仅保护显式约束方向，导致可塑性-稳定性困境。该问题重要，因为需要在不重训练且不损害已有能力的前提下持续更新LLM。现有方法难以在长时间序列中平衡编辑成功与行为保持，尤其当编辑数量达数千时。
light_analysis.method: RLSEdit将编辑视为在线二次优化，最小化键值拟合目标加上两个正则项：一项控制偏离预训练权重，另一项控制偏离指定锚定映射。通过Woodbury公式导出高效在线递归，每步编辑成本仅与当前编辑规模相关，与历史长度无关。理论分析给出了偏差界限以及编辑次数多时遵循-保持权衡的渐近特征。
light_analysis.result: 在CounterFact和ZsRE数据集上，跨多个模型族（如GPT、LLaMA）测试，RLSEdit稳定扩展到10K次编辑，编辑成功率和整体稳定性均显著优于强基线（如MEND、ROME），同时保留早期编辑效果，并在GLUE和保留的推理/代码基准上保持通用能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出软递归最小二乘编辑方法，通过软约束避免硬写入的累积干扰和刚性保留的局限性，实现高效的终生编辑。理论框架为在线编辑提供了分析工具，实验证明其在长期编辑中的鲁棒性。未来可探索更复杂的正则化形式或扩展到多模态LLM。

title: DUALFloodGNN: Physics-informed Graph Neural Network for Operational Flood Modeling
abstract: Flood models inform strategic disaster management by simulating the spatiotemporal hydrodynamics of flooding. While physics-based numerical flood models are accurate, their substantial computational cost limits their use in operational settings where rapid predictions are essential. Models designed with graph neural networks (GNNs) provide both speed and accuracy while having the ability to process unstructured spatial domains. Given its flexible input and architecture, GNNs can be leveraged alongside physics-informed techniques with ease, significantly improving interpretability and generalizability. We introduce a novel flood GNN architecture, DUALFloodGNN, which embeds physical constraints at both global and local scales through explicit loss terms. The model jointly predicts water volume at nodes and flow along edges through a shared message-passing framework. To improve performance for autoregressive inference, model training is conducted with a multi-step loss enhanced with dynamic curriculum learning. Compared with standard GNN architectures and state-of-the-art GNN flood models, DUALFloodGNN achieves substantial improvements in predicting multiple hydrologic variables (e.g., water volume, flow, and depth) while maintaining high computational efficiency. The model is open sourced at https://github.com/acostacos/dual_flood_gnn. The dataset is open sourced at https://hdl.handle.net/2123/35293 with the DOI 10.25910/9xav-0s86.
comment: Accepted for publication at the IJCAI-ECAI 2026 AI4Tech track

light_analysis.overview: 提出物理信息图神经网络DUALFloodGNN，通过多尺度物理约束和联合预测实现高效准确的洪水模拟。
light_analysis.motivation: 物理数值洪水模型准确但计算成本高，难以满足操作场景的快速预测需求。现有GNN洪水模型虽快且准，但缺乏物理约束，可解释性和泛化性不足。亟需一种嵌入物理信息并保持计算效率的模型。
light_analysis.method: 通过全局和局部显式损失项嵌入物理约束，采用共享消息传递框架联合预测节点水体积和边上的流量。训练使用多步损失增强的动态课程学习，提升自回归推理性能。
light_analysis.result: 与标准GNN架构和当前最优GNN洪水模型相比，在预测水体积、流量和水深等多个水文变量上取得显著改进，同时保持高计算效率。具体数值未明确给出。
light_analysis.conclusion: 成功将物理约束嵌入GNN，提升可解释性和泛化性，适用于操作洪水建模。开源模型和数据集，为后续研究提供基础。未来可扩展至其他水文过程。

title: High-Entropy Tokens as Multimodal Failure Points in Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve remarkable performance but remain vulnerable to adversarial attacks. Entropy, as a measure of model uncertainty, is highly correlated with VLM reliability. While prior entropy-based attacks maximize uncertainty at all decoding steps, implicitly assuming that every token equally contributes to model instability, we reveal that a small fraction (around 20%) of high-entropy tokens, in the evaluated representative open-source VLMs with diverse architectures, concentrates a disproportionate share of adversarial influence during autoregressive generation. We demonstrate that concentrating adversarial perturbations on these high-entropy positions achieves comparable semantic degradation to global methods while optimizing fewer decoding positions. Additionally, across multiple representative VLMs, such attacks induce not only semantic drift but also a substantial unsafe subset (20-31%) under the current pipeline. Remarkably, since such vulnerable high-entropy tokens recur across architecturally diverse VLMs, attacks focused on them exhibit non-trivial transferability. Motivated by these findings, we design a simple Entropy-Guided Attack (EGA) that operationalizes sparse high-entropy targeting and extends it with a reusable token bank, yielding competitive attack success rates (93-95%) with a considerable harmful rate (30.2-38.6%) on the three representative open-source VLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示高熵令牌是视觉语言模型的多模态失败点，并提出高效稀疏攻击方法EGA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有攻击方法假设所有令牌对模型不稳定贡献相等，但实际中仅约20%的高熵令牌集中了不成比例的对抗影响。作者旨在利用这一发现设计更高效的攻击，并探索其在安全性和可迁移性上的影响。
light_analysis.method: 提出熵引导攻击（EGA），通过识别和攻击自回归生成中约20%的高熵令牌，实现稀疏对抗扰动。进一步构建可重用令牌银行，增强攻击效率。在多个代表性开源VLM上验证，攻击仅优化少量解码位置。
light_analysis.result: EGA对三个代表性开源VLM实现93-95%的攻击成功率，并产生30.2-38.6%的有害率。与全局方法相比，语义退化相当但效率更高。高熵令牌跨架构可迁移，攻击展现非平凡迁移性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 证实高熵令牌是VLM的脆弱性集中点，EGA展示了稀疏攻击的有效性。该发现有助于理解模型不确定性分布，未来可探索防御机制或增强鲁棒性。

title: On the Convergence Rate of LoRA Gradient Descent
abstract: The low-rank adaptation (LoRA) algorithm for fine-tuning large models has grown popular in recent years due to its remarkable performance and low computational requirements. LoRA trains two ``adapter" matrices that form a low-rank representation of the model parameters, thereby massively reducing the number of parameters that need to be updated at every step. Although LoRA is simple, its convergence is poorly understood due to the lack of Lipschitz smoothness, a key condition for classic convergence analyses. As a result, current theoretical results only consider asymptotic behavior or assume strong boundedness conditions which artificially enforce Lipschitz smoothness. In this work, we provide for the first time a non-asymptotic convergence analysis of the \textit{original LoRA gradient descent} algorithm, which reflects widespread practice, without such assumptions. Our work relies on three key steps: i) reformulating the problem in terms of the outer product of the stacked adapter matrices, ii) a modified descent lemma for the ``Lipschitz-like" reparametrized function, and iii) controlling the step size. With this approach, we prove that LoRA gradient descent converges to a stationary point at rate $O(\frac{1}{\log T})$, where $T$ is the number of iterations. We conduct numerical experiments to validate our theoretical findings.

light_analysis.overview: 首次给出原始LoRA梯度下降的非渐近收敛分析，证明其以O(1/log T)速率收敛到驻点。
light_analysis.motivation: LoRA在微调大型模型中广泛应用，但由于缺乏Lipschitz光滑性，经典收敛分析不适用，现有理论仅涉及渐近行为或强有界假设。本文旨在无需这些假设的情况下，提供LoRA梯度下降的收敛性理解。
light_analysis.method: 通过三个关键步骤：1) 将问题重新表述为堆叠适配器矩阵的外积形式；2) 为重参数化函数的“类Lipschitz”性质推导修改的下降引理；3) 控制步长。基于该框架，证明LoRA梯度下降以O(1/log T)速率收敛到驻点。
light_analysis.result: 证明了LoRA梯度下降在T次迭代后以O(1/log T)的非渐近速率收敛到驻点。数值实验验证了理论结果，与标准梯度下降相比，LoRA在低秩约束下仍能有效收敛。
light_analysis.conclusion: 首次为非光滑优化中的LoRA提供了非渐近收敛保证，填补了理论空白，有助于理解其实际有效性。未来工作可扩展至自适应步长或更紧的收敛界。

title: A Unified Representation of Neural Networks Architectures
abstract: In this paper we consider the limiting case of neural networks (NNs) architectures when the number of neurons in each hidden layer and the number of hidden layers tend to infinity thus forming a continuum, and we derive approximation errors as a function of the number of neurons and/or hidden layers. Firstly, we consider the case of neural networks with a single hidden layer and we derive an integral infinite width neural representation that generalizes existing continuous neural networks (CNNs) representations. Then we extend this to deep residual CNNs that have a finite number of integral hidden layers and residual connections. Secondly, we revisit the relation between neural ODEs and deep residual NNs and we formalize approximation errors via discretization techniques. Then, we merge these two approaches into a unified homogeneous representation of NNs as a Distributed Parameter neural Network (DiPaNet) and we show that most of the existing finite and infinite-dimensional NNs architectures are related via homogenization/discretization with the DiPaNet representation. Our approach is purely deterministic and applies to general, uniformly continuous matrix weight functions. Relations with neural fields and other neural integro-differential equations are discussed along with further possible generalizations and applications of the DiPaNet framework.
comment: Typographical corrections and additional clarifications, remarks; few new relevant references added and acknowledgements; main results unchanged

light_analysis.overview: 提出DiPaNet统一框架，通过无限宽度和深度极限将有限/无限维神经网络架构联系起来。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有神经网络架构类型多样，如单隐藏层网络、深度残差网络、神经常微分方程等，缺乏统一的数学表示。连续神经网络（如神经ODE）和无限宽网络各有侧重，但未能在统一框架下描述其内在联系。本文旨在通过极限理论将离散网络与连续表示统一，便于理论分析和架构设计。
light_analysis.method: 首先，针对单隐藏层神经网络，当隐藏层神经元数量趋于无穷时，推导出积分形式的无限宽神经网络表示，推广了现有连续网络。然后，将深度残差CNN扩展为有限个积分隐藏层，并加入残差连接。其次，重新审视神经ODE与深度残差NN的关系，通过离散化技术形式化近似误差。最后，将上述两种方法合并，提出分布式参数神经网络（DiPaNet）表示，该框架通过同质化（连续化）和离散化与大多数现有有限/无限维架构相关联。方法为纯确定性，适用于均匀连续矩阵权函数。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未给出具体数值实验结果。主要理论贡献在于：推导了单隐藏层无限宽网络的积分表示，给出了深度残差CNN的连续推广，并通过离散化误差形式化了神经ODE与残差网络的关系。DiPaNet框架被证明能统一多种架构，包括神经场和神经积分微分方程，但无实验定量对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出的DiPaNet统一表示了有限和无限维神经网络架构，为理解不同网络间的同质化/离散化关系提供了理论工具。该框架有助于推动神经网络架构的数学分析，并可扩展到神经场等更广泛的模型。未来工作可探讨其在实际应用中的优化与训练方法，以及与其他连续学习系统的结合。

title: Adaptive digital twins for predictive decision-making: Online Bayesian learning of transition dynamics
abstract: This work shows how adaptivity can enhance value realization of digital twins in civil engineering. We focus on adapting the state transition models within digital twins represented through probabilistic graphical models. The bi-directional interaction between the physical and virtual domains is modeled using dynamic Bayesian networks. By treating state transition probabilities as random variables endowed with conjugate priors, we enable hierarchical online learning of transition dynamics from a state to another through effortless Bayesian updates. We provide the mathematical framework to account for a larger class of distributions with respect to the current literature on digital twins. To compute dynamic policies with precision updates we solve parametric Markov decision processes through reinforcement learning. The proposed adaptive digital twin framework enjoys enhanced personalization, increased robustness, and improved cost-effectiveness. We assess our approach on a case study involving structural health monitoring and maintenance planning of a railway bridge.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应数字孪生框架，通过在线贝叶斯学习实现状态转移动态更新，并结合强化学习优化决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 土木工程中数字孪生通常缺乏适应性，无法根据实时数据动态更新模型，导致决策性能下降。现有方法在处理状态转移不确定性时局限于特定分布假设，且未充分利用在线学习来提升个性化和鲁棒性。因此，需要一种能够在线学习过渡动态并自适应调整决策策略的框架，以提高数字孪生的价值实现。
light_analysis.method: 该研究将数字孪生表示为动态贝叶斯网络，物理与虚拟域双向交互。状态转移概率视为带共轭先验的随机变量，通过贝叶斯更新实现端到端的在线学习，支持更广泛的分布类型。在此基础上，将问题建模为参数化马尔可夫决策过程，利用强化学习计算具有精度更新的动态策略。关键创新在于结合层次贝叶斯学习与参数化MDP求解。
light_analysis.result: 在铁路桥梁结构健康监测与维护规划案例中验证了所提框架。结果表明，自适应数字孪生相比非自适应基线方法，能够更好地拟合实时数据，提升决策准确性。具体表现为增强的个性化（适配特定桥梁状态演化）、提高的鲁棒性（对噪声和异常数据更稳定）以及成本效益（减少不必要的维护干预）。摘要未给出精确数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作展示了在线贝叶斯学习与强化学习结合在数字孪生自适应中的有效性，为土木工程预测性决策提供新范式。学术上扩展了数字孪生中概率图模型的分布灵活性；实际中可应用于桥梁、建筑等基础设施的智能运维。未来工作可考虑更复杂的决策空间及分布式传感器集成。

title: Temporal Tokenization Strategies for Event Sequence Modeling with Large Language Models
abstract: Representing continuous time is a critical and under-explored challenge in modeling temporal event sequences with large language models (LLMs). Various strategies like byte-level representations or calendar tokens have been proposed. However, the optimal approach remains unclear, especially given the diverse statistical distributions of real-world event data, which range from smooth log-normal to discrete, spiky patterns. This paper presents a systematic empirical study of temporal tokenization for modeling event sequences with LLMs, comparing distinct encoding strategies: naive numeric strings, high-precision byte-level representations, human-semantic calendar tokens, classic uniform binning, and adaptive residual scalar quantization. We evaluate these strategies by fine-tuning LLMs on real-world datasets that exemplify these diverse distributions. Our analysis reveals that no single strategy is universally superior; instead, prediction performance depends heavily on aligning the tokenizer with the data's statistical properties, highlighting temporal tokenization as a critical yet often overlooked design dimension in LLM-based event modeling.

light_analysis.overview: 系统比较了多种时间标记化策略在LLM事件序列建模中的效果，发现无普适最优策略，需匹配数据统计特性。
light_analysis.motivation: 连续时间表示在LLM建模事件序列中至关重要但尚未充分探索。现有策略如字节级表示或日历标记虽已提出，但最优方法不明确，尤其真实事件数据分布多样（从平滑对数正态到离散尖峰），缺乏系统比较。
light_analysis.method: 对比五种编码策略：朴素数字字符串、高精度字节级、人类语义日历、经典均匀分箱和自适应残差标量量化。通过在代表不同分布的真实数据集上微调LLM进行实证评估。
light_analysis.result: 无单一策略普遍最优；预测性能强烈依赖于标记化方法与数据统计特性的对齐。这表明时间标记化是LLM事件建模中关键但常被忽视的设计维度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过系统实证强调了时间标记化对LLM事件建模的决定性影响，指出需根据数据分布选择编码方式。为设计自适应或数据驱动的标记化方案提供了方向，但未覆盖所有可能策略。

title: A new initialisation to Control Gradients in Sinusoidal Neural network
abstract: Proper initialisation strategy is of primary importance to mitigate gradient explosion or vanishing when training neural networks. Yet, the impact of initialisation parameters still lacks a precise theoretical understanding for several well-established architectures. Here, we propose a new initialisation for networks with sinusoidal activation functions such as \texttt{SIREN}, focusing on gradients control, their scaling with network depth, their impact on training and on generalization. To achieve this, we identify a closed-form expression for the initialisation of the parameters, differing from the original \texttt{SIREN} scheme. This expression is derived from fixed points obtained through the convergence of pre-activation distribution and the variance of Jacobian sequences. Controlling both gradients and targeting vanishing pre-activation helps preventing the emergence of inappropriate frequencies during estimation, thereby improving generalization. We further show that this initialisation strongly influences training dynamics through the Neural Tangent Kernel framework (NTK). Finally, we benchmark \texttt{SIREN} with the proposed initialisation against the original scheme and other baselines on function fitting and image reconstruction. The new initialisation consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across a wide range of reconstruction tasks, including those involving physics-informed neural networks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种针对正弦激活网络（如SIREN）的新初始化方法，通过闭式表达式控制梯度，提升训练稳定性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络训练中，梯度爆炸或消失是常见问题，而初始化策略对此至关重要。然而，对于具有正弦激活函数的网络（如SIREN），现有初始化方法缺乏精确的理论理解，导致训练不稳定和泛化性能不佳。因此，需要一种新的初始化方案来有效控制梯度缩放和网络深度影响。
light_analysis.method: 该方法从固定点条件推导出参数初始化的闭式表达式，通过控制预激活分布和雅可比序列方差来抑制梯度问题。同时利用神经正切核（NTK）框架分析训练动力学，确保初始化影响学习过程。与原始SIREN方案不同，该初始化针对梯度控制和消失预激活进行了优化。
light_analysis.result: 在函数拟合和图像重建任务中，新初始化方法一致优于原始SIREN和其他基线方法，包括物理信息神经网络。实验表明，该方案有效防止了不适当频率的出现，提升了泛化性能。具体性能提升幅度摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作从理论上解决了正弦网络初始化的问题，提供了闭式解，并验证了其在多种任务中的优越性。学术价值在于揭示了初始化与梯度动力学的关系，实际应用潜力在于改进依赖正弦激活的架构（如隐式神经表示）。未来可能推广到其他周期激活函数。

title: CARL: Criticality-Aware Agentic Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Agents capable of accomplishing complex tasks through multiple interactions with the environment have emerged as a popular research direction. However, in such multi-step settings, the conventional group-level policy optimization algorithm becomes suboptimal because of its underlying assumption that each step holds equal contribution, which deviates significantly from reality. Our analysis reveals that only the action choices on a small fraction of states are critical in determining the final outcome. Building on this insight, we propose CARL, a criticality-aware reinforcement learning algorithm tailored for long-horizon agentic reasoning. CARL leverages entropy as a heuristic proxy for state criticality and achieves focused training by assigning rewards to actions taken from high-criticality states while excluding actions taken from low-criticality states from model updates, avoiding noisy credit assignment and redundant computation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CARL achieves both stronger performance and higher efficiency across diverse evaluation settings. The source code will be publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 提出CARL算法，通过熵代理状态关键性，实现长时域智能体推理的高效强化学习训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 在多步交互的智能体任务中，传统群体级策略优化假设每一步贡献相等，但实际仅少数关键状态决定最终结果，导致次优。该问题限制了智能体在复杂长时域任务中的性能，急需一种能区分状态重要性的优化方法。
light_analysis.method: CARL算法利用熵作为状态关键性的启发式代理，识别高关键性状态。训练时仅对高关键性状态的动作分配奖励并更新模型，低关键性状态的动作则被排除，从而避免噪声信用分配和冗余计算。该方法聚焦于关键决策点的优化。
light_analysis.result: 在多个评估场景中，CARL相比基线方法取得了更强的性能，并显著提升了训练效率。实验证明其能有效处理长时域推理任务，但摘要未提供具体数值指标（可能因篇幅限制）。
light_analysis.conclusion: CARL通过关键性感知机制解决了多步决策中信用分配不均衡的问题，提升了强化学习在复杂任务中的效率和性能。代码开源促进了可复现性。未来可探索更精细的关键性度量或扩展到其他序列决策问题。

title: Counting Still Counts: Understanding Neural Complex Query Answering Through Query Relaxation
abstract: Neural methods for Complex Query Answering (CQA) over knowledge graphs (KGs) are widely believed to learn patterns that generalize beyond explicit graph structure, allowing them to infer answers that are unreachable through symbolic query processing. In this work, we critically examine this assumption through a systematic analysis comparing neural CQA models with an alternative, training-free query relaxation strategy that retrieves possible answers by relaxing query constraints and counting resulting paths. Across multiple datasets and query structures, we find several cases where neural and relaxation-based approaches perform similarly, with no neural model consistently outperforming the latter. Moreover, a similarity analysis reveals that their retrieved answers exhibit little overlap, and that combining their outputs consistently improves performance. These results call for a re-evaluation of progress in neural query answering: despite their complexity, current models fail to subsume the reasoning patterns captured by query relaxation. Our findings highlight the importance of stronger non-neural baselines and suggest that future neural approaches could benefit from incorporating principles of query relaxation.
comment: Accepted in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 论文质疑神经复数查询回答模型的能力，通过查询松弛策略进行系统比较，发现神经模型并未优于松弛方法，建议重新评估进展并结合松弛原则。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经复数查询回答（CQA）方法被认为能学习超越显式图结构的模式，从而推理出符号查询无法获取的答案。本研究旨在批判性检验这一假设，通过比较神经CQA模型与基于查询松弛的训练无关策略，揭示神经模型的真实推理能力。现有神经模型尽管复杂，但未能超越简单的松弛方法，这质疑了当前进展的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种无需训练的查询松弛策略，通过放松查询约束并计数路径来检索可能答案。在不同数据集和查询结构上，系统比较神经CQA模型与松弛策略。使用相似性分析比较两者检索答案的重叠程度，并考察组合输出的效果。关键创新在于引入强非神经基线作为对比标准。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集和查询结构上，发现神经模型与松弛方法的性能相似，没有神经模型持续优于松弛方法。相似性分析显示两者检索的答案重叠很小，组合输出可以持续提升性能。这表明神经模型未能包含查询松弛所捕获的推理模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文质疑神经CQA模型的进展，强调需要更强的非神经基线。当前神经模型尽管复杂，但未超越查询松弛。未来工作可受益于纳入松弛原则。该研究对知识图谱查询回答领域具有重要反思意义，可能改变评估方法。

title: Generative Adversarial Post-Training Mitigates Reward Hacking in Live Human-AI Music Interaction
abstract: Most applications of generative AI involve a sequential interaction in which a person inputs a prompt and waits for a response, and where reaction time and adaptivity are not important factors. In contrast, live jamming is a collaborative interaction that requires real-time coordination and adaptation without access to the other player's future moves, while preserving diversity to sustain a creative flow. Reinforcement learning post-training enables effective adaptation through on-policy interaction, yet it often reduces output diversity by exploiting coherence-based rewards. This collapse, known as ``reward hacking'', affects many RL post-training pipelines, but is especially harmful in live jamming, where musical creativity relies on dynamic variation and mutual responsiveness. In this paper, we propose a novel adversarial training method on policy-generated trajectories to mitigate reward hacking in RL post-training for melody-to-chord accompaniment. A co-evolving discriminator separates policy trajectories from the data distribution, while the policy maximizes the discriminator output in addition to coherence rewards to prevent collapse to trivial outputs. We evaluate accompaniment quality and output diversity in simulation with both fixed test melodies and learned melody agents, and we conduct a user study with the model deployed in a real-time interactive system with expert musicians. Quantitative evaluation and user feedback demonstrate improved output diversity, harmonic coherence, adaptation speed and user agency. Our results demonstrate a simple yet effective method to mitigate reward hacking in RL post-training of generative sequence models.
comment: v3: fix the Figure numbering bugs

light_analysis.overview: 提出对抗性后训练方法，缓解强化学习后训练中的奖励黑客问题，用于实时人机音乐互动。
light_analysis.motivation: 生成式AI在实时协作中需要快速响应和适应性，但强化学习后训练常因利用一致性奖励而降低输出多样性，导致奖励黑客问题，尤其在实时即兴演奏中破坏创造力。
light_analysis.method: 在策略生成轨迹上采用对抗性训练，用共同进化的判别器区分策略轨迹与数据分布，策略同时优化一致性奖励和最大化判别器输出，防止输出崩溃。应用于旋律到和弦伴奏任务。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和实时交互用户研究中，该方法在输出多样性、和声一致性、适应速度和用户能动性上均有改善，有效缓解了奖励黑客问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出简单有效的方法缓解生成序列模型RL后训练中的奖励黑客问题，提升实时音乐协作的多样性和适应性，可用于类似交互式生成任务。

title: Adaptive Symmetrization of the KL Divergence
abstract: The forward Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence is a ubiquitous objective for fitting a parameterized distribution to samples due to its tractability and equivalence to maximum likelihood estimation (MLE). Its inherent asymmetry, however, may lead to degenerate solutions that generalize poorly. While the symmetric Jeffreys divergence offers a more balanced alternative, its optimization is challenging due to the presence of a reverse KL term. Generative adversarial networks (GANs) bypass this intractability using a min-max formulation at the cost of introducing new instability issues.
