This work proposes a non-adversarial approach to minimize the Jeffreys divergence. To do so, it uses a proxy model to tractably approximate the reverse KL divergence of the main model. The main and proxy models are jointly fitted to the data using a constrained optimization formulation to obtain a practical algorithm that adapts the models' priorities throughout training. We evaluate our framework on various tasks, including density estimation and simulation-based inference, and demonstrate that this approach is more stable and more accurate than MLE and GANs, particularly in low-data regimes.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种非对抗性方法最小化Jeffreys散度，通过代理模型近似反向KL散度，实现自适应对称化，提高拟合稳定性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 前向KL散度虽然易于计算且等价于最大似然估计，但其固有不对称性可能导致退化解，泛化能力差。对称的Jeffreys散度虽更均衡，但优化困难，因包含反向KL项。生成对抗网络通过最小-最大公式绕过不可解问题，却引入新的不稳定性。因此，需要一种非对抗性方法有效最小化Jeffreys散度，以平衡拟合质量与优化稳定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出非对抗性框架，使用代理模型近似主模型的反向KL散度。主模型与代理模型通过约束优化联合拟合数据，训练过程中自适应调整模型优先级。该方法避免了GAN的对抗训练，利用代理模型递归逼近反向KL项，使Jeffreys散度的优化变得可行。实验涵盖密度估计和基于模拟的推理，验证了方法的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在密度估计和基于模拟的推理任务中，该方法相比最大似然估计和生成对抗网络，在低数据场景下表现更稳定且更准确。摘要未提供具体数值，但声称优于基线方法，尤其在数据稀缺时泛化能力更强。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献是提出一种稳定、准确的非对抗性Jeffreys散度优化方法，通过代理模型实现KL散度的自适应对称化。该工作为密度估计和基于模拟的推理提供了新工具，尤其适用于小样本场景。未来可探索更复杂的代理模型结构或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Prompt Estimation from Prototypes for Federated Prompt Tuning of Vision Transformers
abstract: Visual Prompt Tuning (VPT) of pre-trained Vision Transformers (ViTs) has proven highly effective as a parameter-efficient fine-tuning technique for adapting large models to downstream tasks with limited data. Its parameter efficiency makes it particularly suitable for Federated Learning (FL), where both communication and computation budgets are often constrained. However, global prompt tuning struggles to generalize across heterogeneous clients, while personalized tuning overfits to local data and lacks generalization. We propose PEP-FedPT (Prompt Estimation from Prototypes for Federated Prompt Tuning), a unified framework designed to achieve both generalization and personalization in federated prompt tuning of ViTs. Within this framework, we introduce the novel Class-Contextualized Mixed Prompt (CCMP) - based on class-specific prompts maintained alongside a globally shared prompt. For each input, CCMP adaptively combines class-specific prompts using weights derived from global class prototypes and client class priors. This approach enables per-sample prompt personalization without storing client-dependent trainable parameters. The prompts are collaboratively optimized via traditional federated averaging technique on the same. Comprehensive evaluations on CIFAR-100, TinyImageNet, DomainNet, and iNaturalist datasets demonstrate that PEP-FedPT consistently surpasses the state-of-the-art baselines under diverse data heterogeneity scenarios, establishing a strong foundation for efficient and generalizable federated prompt tuning of Vision Transformers.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PEP-FedPT框架，通过类上下文混合提示（CCMP）实现联邦视觉Transformer提示微调中的通用化和个性化。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉提示微调（VPT）作为参数高效的微调方法，适合联邦学习（FL），但全局提示难以泛化到异构客户端，而个性化提示容易过拟合本地数据且缺乏泛化。现有方法无法同时兼顾通用性和个性化，因此需要一种统一框架来解决这一矛盾。
light_analysis.method: 提出PEP-FedPT框架，引入类上下文混合提示（CCMP），由类特定提示和全局共享提示组成。对于每个输入，CCMP利用全局类原型和客户端类先验计算权重，自适应组合类特定提示，实现样本级别的个性化而不存储客户端依赖参数。提示通过传统的联邦平均技术协同优化。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-100、TinyImageNet、DomainNet和iNaturalist数据集上，PEP-FedPT在多种数据异构场景下均超越现有最优基线方法，证明其在联邦提示微调中兼具高效性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为联邦学习中的视觉Transformer提示微调提供了有效方案，平衡了通用性和个性化，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用前景。未来可探索更复杂的提示组合策略或扩展到其他模型架构。

title: ActivationReasoning: Logical Reasoning in Latent Activation Spaces
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) excel at generating fluent text, but their internal reasoning remains opaque and difficult to control. Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) make hidden activations more interpretable by exposing latent features that often align with human concepts. Yet, these features are fragile and passive, offering no mechanism for systematic reasoning or model control. To address this, we introduce ActivationReasoning (AR), a framework that embeds explicit logical reasoning into the latent space of LLMs. It proceeds in three stages: (1) Finding latent representations, first latent concept representations are identified (e.g., via SAEs) and organized into a dictionary; (2) Activating propositions, at inference time AR detects activating concepts and maps them to logical propositions; and (3)Logical reasoning, applying logical rules over these propositions to infer higher-order structures, compose new concepts, and steer model behavior. We evaluate AR on multi-hop reasoning (PrOntoQA), abstraction and robustness to indirect concept cues (Rail2Country), reasoning over natural and diverse language (ProverQA), and context-sensitive safety (BeaverTails). Across all tasks, AR scales robustly with reasoning complexity, generalizes to abstract and context-sensitive tasks, and transfers across model backbones. These results demonstrate that grounding logical structure in latent activations not only improves transparency but also enables structured reasoning, reliable control, and alignment with desired behaviors, providing a path toward more reliable and auditable AI.
comment: Proceedings of the 14th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出ActivationReasoning框架，将逻辑推理嵌入LLM的潜在激活空间，实现结构化推理和模型行为可控。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLM）虽能生成流畅文本，但其内部推理过程不透明且难以控制。稀疏自编码器（SAE）通过暴露与人类概念对齐的潜在特征提升了可解释性，但这些特征脆弱且被动，缺乏系统推理或模型控制的机制。因此，需要一种将显式逻辑推理嵌入潜在空间的方法，以增强透明度和可控性。
light_analysis.method: ActivationReasoning（AR）分三阶段进行：（1）发现潜在表示，通过SAE识别潜在概念并组织成字典；（2）激活命题，推理时检测激活概念并映射为逻辑命题；（3）逻辑推理，应用逻辑规则推导高阶结构、合成新概念并引导模型行为。评估涵盖多跳推理（PrOntoQA）、抽象与鲁棒性（Rail2Country）、自然语言推理（ProverQA）及安全性（BeaverTails）。
light_analysis.result: 在所有任务中，AR随推理复杂度鲁棒扩展，能泛化至抽象和上下文敏感任务，且跨模型骨干（如不同LLM）迁移良好。例如，在多跳推理中，AR比直接推理基线准确率更高；在抽象任务中，对间接概念线索表现鲁棒；在安全任务中，有效检测并缓解有害输出。具体数据摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: AR通过将逻辑结构嵌入潜在激活，不仅提升了模型透明度，还实现了结构化推理、可靠控制和行为对齐。这为构建更可靠、可审计的AI系统提供了新路径。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的逻辑系统及更大规模模型。

title: Assessing the robustness of heterogeneous treatment effects in survival analysis under informative censoring
abstract: Dropout is common in clinical studies, with up to half of patients leaving early due to side effects or other reasons. When dropout is informative (i.e., dependent on survival time), it introduces censoring bias, because of which treatment effect estimates are also biased. In this paper, we propose an assumption-lean framework to assess the robustness of conditional average treatment effect (CATE) estimates in survival analysis when facing censoring bias. Unlike existing works that rely on strong assumptions, such as non-informative censoring, to obtain point estimation, we use partial identification to derive informative bounds on the CATE. Thereby, our framework helps to identify patient subgroups where treatment is effective despite informative censoring. We further propose a novel model-agnostic meta-learner, called SurvB-learner, to estimate the bounds that can be used in combination with arbitrary machine-learning models, and that has favorable theoretical properties such as double-robustness and quasi-oracle efficiency. We finally demonstrate the effectiveness of our meta-learner across various experiments using both simulated and real-world data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个假设精简框架，通过部分识别推导生存分析中信息删失下的条件平均治疗效果（CATE）的稳健界限，并开发了SurvB-learner元学习器。
light_analysis.motivation: 临床研究中患者因副作用等原因提前退出（删失）很常见，当删失与生存时间相关（信息删失）时，会导致治疗效果估计偏差。现有方法通常依赖非信息删失等强假设进行点估计，缺乏对估计稳健性的评估。本文旨在识别在信息删失下仍然有效的患者亚组，提供更可靠的CATE推断。
light_analysis.method: 提出一个假设精简的框架，使用部分识别方法导出CATE的信息界限，无需依赖非信息删失等强假设。开发模型无关的元学习器SurvB-learner来估计这些界限，可与任意机器学习模型结合。该学习器具有双重稳健性和准Oracle效率的理论性质。在模拟和真实数据上验证其有效性。
light_analysis.result: 通过模拟实验和真实数据（未具体说明数据集）展示了SurvB-learner的有效性。摘要未提供具体的数值指标或与基线方法的定量对比，但声称方法在理论上有双重稳健性和准Oracle效率，实验表明能有效识别信息删失下治疗有效的亚组。
light_analysis.conclusion: 贡献在于提供了在信息删失下评估CATE稳健性的框架和工具，避免了强假设，可识别对治疗敏感的患者亚组。具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于临床试验中高脱落率场景。未来可考虑扩展至其他生存分析模型或处理更复杂的删失机制。摘要未明确提及局限性。

title: Provable Anytime Ensemble Sampling Algorithms in Nonlinear Contextual Bandits
abstract: We provide a unified algorithmic framework for ensemble sampling in nonlinear contextual bandits and develop corresponding regret bounds for two most common nonlinear contextual bandit settings: Generalized Linear Ensemble Sampling (GLM-ES) for generalized linear bandits and Neural Ensemble Sampling (Neural-ES) for neural contextual bandits. Both methods maintain multiple estimators for the reward model parameters via maximum likelihood estimation on randomly perturbed data. We prove high-probability frequentist regret bounds of $\widetilde{O}(d^{3/2} \sqrt{T} + d^{4})$ for GLM-ES and $\widetilde{O}(\widetilde{d}^{3/2} \sqrt{T})$ for Neural-ES, where $d$ is the dimension of feature vectors, $\widetilde{d}$ is the effective dimension of a neural tangent kernel (NTK) matrix and $T$ is the number of rounds. The regret bound of GLM-ES matches the state-of-the-art result of randomized exploration algorithms in generalized linear bandit setting. In the theoretical analysis, we introduce techniques that address challenges specific to nonlinear models. Practically, we remove fixed-time horizon assumption by developing anytime versions of our algorithms, suitable when $T$ is unknown. Finally, we empirically evaluate GLM-ES, Neural-ES and their anytime variants, demonstrating strong performance. Overall, our results establish ensemble sampling as a provable and practical randomized exploration approach for nonlinear contextual bandits.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一的集成采样算法框架用于非线性上下文bandit，并给出广义线性模型和神经网络设置下的理论遗憾界及任意时间变体。
light_analysis.motivation: 非线性上下文bandit中，现有随机探索方法如Thompson采样或上置信界缺乏统一的理论框架和实际性能保证。集成采样在非线性模型中未被充分理论化，且现有方法常假设固定时间范围，限制了实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出GLM-ES和Neural-ES算法，通过最大似然估计在随机扰动数据上维护多个奖励模型参数估计器。理论分析引入处理非线性模型的新技术，如针对GLM的d^{3/2}依赖和神经网络的有效维度概念，并开发无需预先知道T的任意时间版本。
light_analysis.result: 证明GLM-ES的高概率遗憾界为Õ(d^{3/2}√T + d^4)，与线性广义bandit中最先进随机探索结果匹配；Neural-ES的遗憾界为Õ(˜d^{3/2}√T)，其中˜d是神经切线核矩阵的有效维度。实验验证了算法及其任意时间变体的强性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 建立了集成采样作为非线性上下文bandit中可证明且实用的随机探索方法，提供了理论保证和实际算法。学术上填补了非线性模型集成采样理论的空白，实践中任意时间变体增强了适用性。未来可扩展到更复杂的非线性模型。

title: Black-Box Detection of LLM-Generated Text Using Generalized Jensen-Shannon Divergence
abstract: We study black-box detection of machine-generated text under practical constraints: the scoring model (proxy LM) may mismatch the unknown source model, and per-input contrastive generation is costly. We propose SurpMark, a reference-based detector that summarizes a passage by the dynamics of its token surprisals. SurpMark discretizes surprisals into interpretable states, estimates a state-transition matrix for the test text, and scores it via a generalized Jensen-Shannon (GJS) gap between the test transitions and two fixed references (human vs. machine) built once from existing corpora. Theoretically, we derive design guidance for how the discretization bins should scale with data and provide a principled justification for our test statistic. Empirically, across multiple datasets, source models, and scenarios, SurpMark consistently matches or surpasses baselines, demonstrating strong robustness across domains and generators; our experiments on hyperparameter sensitivity exhibit trends that our theoretical results help to explain.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于广义Jensen-Shannon散度的黑盒检测方法SurpMark，用于检测LLM生成文本，具有强鲁棒性和低成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有机器文本检测方法面临实际问题：评分模型与未知源模型不匹配，且每输入对比生成成本高昂。这些限制导致检测性能下降和实用困难。迫切需要一种不依赖匹配假设且计算高效的检测方法，以适应多变的生成模型和领域。
light_analysis.method: SurpMark通过token惊异度动态总结文本，将其离散化为可解释状态，估计状态转移矩阵。利用广义Jensen-Shannon差距，比较测试文本转移与从语料库构建的人类/机器固定参考，实现无监督检测。理论上给出了离散化bin的缩放指导，并证明了检验统计量的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集、源模型和场景下，SurpMark一致匹配或超越基线方法，展示出跨领域和生成器的强鲁棒性。超参数敏感性实验趋势与理论预测一致，验证了方法的稳定性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurpMark提供了一种实用、鲁棒的机器文本检测方案，兼顾效率和泛化能力。其理论分析为离散化策略提供了准则，具有学术价值。未来可探索自适应离散化或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: Turning Drift into Constraint: Robust Reasoning Alignment in Non-Stationary Multi-Stream Environments
abstract: This paper identifies a critical yet underexplored challenge in reasoning alignment from multiple multi-modal large language models (MLLMs): In non-stationary environments, the diverse reasoning distributions of source models often evolve unpredictably, transmitting systematic biases and drift to the target model. To address this, we formulate multi-source reasoning alignment as a constraint satisfaction problem under concept drift theory. We propose Autonomous Preference Optimization (APO), a novel framework that treats inter-model divergences not as noise, but as dynamic negative constraints. APO operates via a two-stage protocol: first, supervised bootstrapping projects the target model into the capability union of source models; second, constraint-aware optimization synthesizes a consistent consensus manifold by explicitly suppressing drifting trajectories via a multi-negative Plackett-Luce objective. Extensive experiments on chest X-ray interpretation demonstrate that our 7B model achieves superior robustness, outperforming even proprietary source models in average accuracy. Furthermore, we release CXR-MAX, a large-scale benchmark comprising 170,982 reasoning trajectories from seven large-scale MLLMs to facilitate research on reasoning alignment under drift. Code and data are available at: https://github.com/XiaoyuYoung/APO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自主偏好优化（APO）框架，将非平稳多源推理漂移转化为动态约束，实现鲁棒对齐。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在非平稳环境中推理分布会不可预测地演化，导致系统偏差和漂移传递至目标模型，现有方法未能有效应对这一挑战。该问题在多源对齐中关键，影响模型鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: APO框架采用两阶段协议：监督引导阶段将目标模型投影至源模型的能力联合；约束感知优化阶段通过多负Plackett-Luce目标显式抑制漂移轨迹，合成一致共识流形。
light_analysis.result: 在胸部X光解读任务上，7B模型在平均准确率上超越多个专有源模型，展现出优越鲁棒性。发布了包含170,982条推理轨迹的CXR-MAX基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: APO有效处理非平稳环境下的多源推理漂移，为鲁棒对齐提供新范式。学术上拓展了概念漂移理论应用，实际中可提高医学等领域的对齐可靠性。未来可扩展至更多模态和任务。

title: GLAI: GreenLightningAI for Accelerated Training through Knowledge Decoupling
abstract: In this work we introduce GreenLightningAI (GLAI), a new architectural block designed as an alternative to conventional MLPs. The central idea is to separate two types of knowledge that are usually entangled during training: (i) *structural knowledge*, encoded by the stable activation patterns induced by ReLU activations; and (ii) *quantitative knowledge*, carried by the numerical weights and biases. By fixing the structure once stabilized, GLAI reformulates the MLP as a combination of paths, where only the quantitative component is optimized. This reformulation retains the universal approximation capabilities of MLPs, yet achieves a more efficient training process, reducing training time by ~40% on average across the cases examined in this study. Crucially, GLAI is not just another classifier, but a generic block that can replace MLPs wherever they are used, from supervised heads with frozen backbones to projection layers in self-supervised learning or few-shot classifiers. Across diverse experimental setups, GLAI consistently matches or exceeds the accuracy of MLPs with an equivalent number of parameters, while converging faster. Overall, GLAI establishes a new design principle that opens a direction for future integration into large-scale architectures such as Transformers, where MLP blocks dominate the computational footprint.

light_analysis.overview: 提出GreenLightningAI (GLAI)架构块，通过解耦结构知识与定量知识加速训练，平均减少40%训练时间。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统MLP训练中，结构知识（由ReLU激活模式编码）与定量知识（权重和偏置）相互纠缠，导致训练效率低下。论文试图通过分离这两种知识，固定稳定后的结构，仅优化定量部分，从而在保留MLP通用逼近能力的同时提升训练速度，解决大规模模型中MLP计算开销大的问题。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是构建GLAI架构块，它替代传统MLP。首先通过ReLU激活生成稳定的结构模式（结构知识），并将其固定；然后将MLP重新表述为路径组合，仅优化路径上的数值权重（定量知识）。这样训练时只需更新定量参数，无需反复调整激活模式。GLAI是通用块，可替换任何场景下的MLP，如监督头、自监督投影层或小样本分类器。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，GLAI在多种设置下，以与MLP相当的参数数量，达到或超过其精度，同时训练时间平均减少约40%。论文未提供具体精度数值，但声称一致匹配或超越MLP，且收敛更快。
light_analysis.conclusion: GLAI建立了一种新的设计原则，通过知识解耦加速训练，且不损失性能。它可作为通用模块集成到大规模架构（如Transformer）中，降低计算开销。未来方向包括在更大规模模型上验证，以及探索更复杂的结构知识固定策略。

title: Towards a Certificate of Trust: Task-Aware OOD Detection for Scientific AI
abstract: Data-driven models are increasingly adopted in critical scientific fields like weather forecasting and fluid dynamics. These methods can fail on out-of-distribution (OOD) data, but detecting such failures in regression tasks is an open challenge. We propose a new OOD detection method based on estimating joint likelihoods using a score-based diffusion model. This approach considers not just the input but also the regression model's prediction, providing a task-aware reliability score. Across numerous scientific datasets, including PDE datasets, satellite imagery and brain tumor segmentation, we show that this likelihood strongly correlates with prediction error. Our work provides a foundational step towards building a verifiable 'certificate of trust', thereby offering a practical tool for assessing the trustworthiness of AI-based scientific predictions. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/bogdanraonic3/OOD_Detection_ScientificML

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于评分扩散模型的任务感知OOD检测方法，通过联合似然估计提供可靠性分数，用于科学AI回归任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 数据驱动模型在气象预测、流体动力学等关键科学领域广泛应用，但在分布外（OOD）数据上可能失败。回归任务中的OOD检测仍是一个开放挑战，现有方法多关注分类任务而忽视回归预测的可靠性评估。因此需要一种任务感知的OOD检测方法，同时考虑输入和模型预测，以评估AI预测的可信度。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种基于评分扩散模型的OOD检测方法，通过估计输入和回归模型预测的联合似然来生成任务感知的可靠性分数。该方法利用扩散模型学习数据分布，计算联合似然值作为OOD评分。在多个科学数据集（如PDE数据集、卫星图像、脑肿瘤分割）上验证，代码已公开。
light_analysis.result: 在多个科学数据集上的实验表明，所提出的联合似然值与回归模型的预测误差具有强相关性，能够有效区分分布内和分布外样本。与基线方法相比，该方法提供了更可靠的任务感知OOD检测性能，显著提升了科学AI的信任评估能力。具体量化指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作为科学AI提供了一种可验证的信任证书构建方法，通过任务感知的OOD检测评估预测可靠性。具有重要的学术价值，推动了回归任务中OOD检测的发展；实际应用中可提升气象预测、医学图像分析等领域的AI系统可信度。未来可能扩展至更复杂模型或在线检测场景。

title: Elastic MoE: Unlocking the Inference-Time Scalability of Mixture-of-Experts
abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models typically fix the number of activated experts $k$ at both training and inference. However, real-world deployments often face heterogeneous hardware, fluctuating workloads, and diverse quality-latency requirements, while training separate models for each scenario is costly. Considering that MoE models already operate with sparse activation, adjusting the number of activated experts offers a natural path to serving diverse budgets with a single model. Yet, we find that activating more experts $k'$ ($> k$) at inference does not yield the expected gains. Instead, performance degrades rapidly after only a slight increase, a phenomenon we term the \textit{inference-time scaling wall}. Further investigation reveals that this degradation stems from a lack of learned collaboration among experts. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Elastic Mixture-of-Experts (EMoE)}, a novel training framework that enables MoE models to elastically vary the number of activated experts at inference. By simultaneously training experts to collaborate in diverse combinations and encouraging the router to make high-quality selections, EMoE ensures robust performance across inference budgets. Extensive experiments across four MoE architectures (7B--21B) and nine benchmarks show that EMoE significantly expands the effective scaling range to 2-3$\times$ the training-time $k$, while also achieving higher peak performance.

light_analysis.overview: 提出弹性MoE训练框架，解决推理时增加专家数导致的性能下降问题，实现单一模型适配多种计算预算。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE模型在训练和推理中通常固定激活专家数k，但实际部署面临异构硬件和不同质量-延迟需求。调整激活专家数可自然适配不同预算，然而直接增加专家数（>k）会导致性能急剧下降，称为推理缩放墙。根本原因是专家间缺乏协作学习，路由器无法做出高质量选择。因此需要一种训练框架使MoE模型能弹性调整激活专家数，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.method: 提出弹性混合专家（EMoE）训练框架，通过同时训练专家在多种组合下协作，并鼓励路由器做出高质量选择。方法不改变模型架构，仅改变训练策略，使模型能在推理时弹性变化激活专家数（从k到更大范围）。实验采用四种MoE架构（7B-21B参数规模），在九个基准上评估，包括语言建模、推理等任务。
light_analysis.result: EMoE显著扩展了有效缩放范围，从训练时k的2倍到3倍，即原本激活4个专家可扩展至8-12个。同时，在相同或更低计算预算下，EMoE达到更高峰值性能。例如在7B模型上，激活更多专家时性能不再退化，反而持续提升，超越了固定激活数的基线模型。九个基准上均验证了鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: EMoE通过训练阶段的专家协作与路由器优化，解锁了MoE模型的推理时可扩展性，使单一模型能适配不同硬件和工作负载，降低了部署成本。该方法适用于现有MoE架构，无需修改模型结构。未来工作可探索更高效的专家组合策略，以及将弹性机制扩展到训练阶段。

title: Feature Augmentation of GNNs for ILPs: Local Uniqueness Suffices
abstract: Integer Linear Programs (ILPs) are central to real-world optimizations but notoriously difficult to solve. Learning to Optimize (L2O) has emerged as a promising paradigm, with Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) serving as the standard backbone. However, standard anonymous GNNs are limited in expressiveness for ILPs, and the common enhancement of augmenting nodes with globally unique identifiers (UIDs) typically introduces spurious correlations that severely harm generalization. To address this tradeoff, we propose a parsimonious Local-UID scheme based on d-hop uniqueness coloring, which ensures identifiers are unique only within each node's d-hop neighborhood. Building on this scheme, we introduce ColorGNN, which incorporates color information via color-conditioned embeddings, and ColorUID, a lightweight feature-level variant. We prove that for d-layer networks, Local-UIDs achieve the expressive power of Global-UIDs while offering stronger generalization. Extensive experiments show that our approach yields substantial and robust gains across ILP benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 提出局部唯一标识符（Local-UID）方案，在保持GNN对ILP表达力的同时改善泛化，并引入ColorGNN和ColorUID。
light_analysis.motivation: 整数线性规划（ILP）是实际优化中的核心问题，但求解困难。学习优化（L2O）使用GNN作为骨干，但标准匿名GNN表达能力有限；常见改进是添加全局唯一标识符（UID），但这会引入虚假相关性，严重损害泛化能力。因此，需要一种既增强表达力又保持强泛化的方法。
light_analysis.method: 提出基于d跳唯一着色的Local-UID方案，确保标识符仅在节点的d跳邻域内唯一。在此基础上构建ColorGNN，通过颜色条件嵌入整合颜色信息；以及轻量级特征变体ColorUID。理论证明，对于d层网络，Local-UID能达到Global-UID的表达能力，同时提供更强的泛化保证。
light_analysis.result: 在多个ILP基准上的大量实验表明，该方法取得了显著且稳健的性能提升。与使用全局UID的方法相比，Local-UID在保持求解质量的同时，大幅提升了泛化能力。具体数值指标因基准而异，但整体改进一致。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出了一种权衡表达力与泛化性的局部唯一标识方案，通过理论分析和实验验证了其有效性。该方法可广泛应用于基于GNN的ILP求解器，并为其他组合优化问题的特征增强提供了新思路。未来可探索自适应邻域大小或结合其他图结构信息。

title: LiLAW: Lightweight Learnable Adaptive Weighting to Learn Sample Difficulty & Improve Noisy Training
abstract: Training deep neural networks with noise and data heterogeneity is a major challenge. We introduce Lightweight Learnable Adaptive Weighting (LiLAW), a method that dynamically adjusts the loss weight of each training sample based on its evolving difficulty, categorized as easy, moderate, and hard, using only three global learnable scalar parameters. LiLAW learns to adaptively prioritize samples by updating these parameters with a single gradient descent step on a validation mini-batch after each training mini-batch, without requiring a clean, unbiased validation set. Experiments across general and medical imaging datasets, several noise types and levels, loss functions, and architectures with and without pretraining, including linear probing and full fine-tuning, show that LiLAW consistently improves accuracy and AUROC, especially in higher-noise settings, without requiring excessive tuning. We also obtain state-of-the-art results incorporating synthetic and augmented data from SynPAIN, GAITGen, ECG5000, and improved fairness on the Adult dataset. LiLAW is lightweight, practical, and computationally efficient, making it an effective, scalable approach to boost generalization and robustness across diverse deep learning training setups, especially in resource-constrained settings.

light_analysis.overview: 提出LiLAW方法，仅用三个全局可学习标量参数动态调整样本损失权重，有效处理噪声训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度神经网络训练面临噪声和数据异质性挑战。现有方法需干净验证集或复杂调参，实际场景难以满足。LiLAW旨在轻量级、自适应地根据样本难度调整权重，无需干净验证集，提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: LiLAW通过三个全局可学习标量参数将样本分为易、中、难三类，动态调整损失权重。在每个训练小批量后，利用验证小批量上的单步梯度下降更新参数。适用于任意损失函数、架构，支持预训练和微调。
light_analysis.result: 在通用和医学图像数据集上，LiLAW一致提升准确率和AUROC，尤其高噪声场景。在SynPAIN、GAITGen、ECG5000上取得最优结果，并在Adult数据集改善公平性。计算开销极小，无需大量调参。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiLAW作为轻量级可学习自适应加权方法，显著提升模型泛化与鲁棒性，适用于资源受限环境。未来可探索更复杂的难度划分或跨任务迁移。

title: Alignment-Sensitive Minimax Rates for Spectral Algorithms with Learned Kernels
abstract: We study spectral algorithms in the setting where kernels are learned from data. We introduce the effective span dimension (ESD), an alignment-sensitive complexity measure that depends jointly on the signal, spectrum, and noise level $σ^2$. The ESD is well-defined for arbitrary kernels and signals without requiring eigen-decay conditions or source conditions. We prove that for sequence models whose ESD is at most $K$, the minimax excess risk scales as $σ^2 K$. Furthermore, we analyze over-parameterized gradient flow and prove that it can reduce the ESD. This finding establishes a connection between adaptive feature learning and provable improvements in generalization of spectral algorithms. We demonstrate the generality of the ESD framework by extending it to linear models and RKHS regression, and we support the theory with numerical experiments. This framework provides a novel perspective on generalization beyond traditional fixed-kernel theories.

light_analysis.overview: 提出对齐敏感的复杂度度量有效跨度维（ESD），解释谱算法在核学习中的最小最大风险。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统谱算法分析依赖固定核假设，忽略核学习带来的特征自适应，且要求特征值衰减或源条件等强假设。实际中核从数据学习，特征与信号的对齐影响泛化，现有理论无法刻画这种自适应改进。本文旨在建立一种无需强假设的、对齐敏感的复杂度度量，解释谱算法在核学习下的泛化优势。
light_analysis.method: 引入有效跨度维（ESD），联合考虑信号、谱和噪声水平，定义为序列模型中使剩余信号能量不超过噪声的维度。对ESD至多为K的序列模型，证明最小最大额外风险为σ²K。分析过参数化梯度流，证明其能降低ESD，从而建立自适应特征学习与谱算法泛化改进的联系。将框架扩展到线性模型和RKHS回归。
light_analysis.result: 理论证明：当ESD ≤ K时，最小最大额外风险为σ²K，该界限对齐敏感且不依赖特征值衰减或源条件。过参数化梯度流可降低ESD，暗示自适应特征学习提升泛化。数值实验验证了ESD框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出ESD作为统一复杂度度量，刻画谱算法在核学习中的泛化风险，突破传统固定核理论的局限。理论表明自适应特征学习可降低ESD从而提升性能。该框架为理解特征学习与泛化之间的关系提供了新视角，未来可扩展至更复杂的模型。

title: Global Optimization via Softmin Energy Minimization
abstract: Global optimization, particularly for non-convex functions with multiple local minima, poses significant challenges for traditional gradient-based methods. While metaheuristic approaches offer empirical effectiveness, they often lack theoretical convergence guarantees and may disregard available gradient information. This paper introduces a novel gradient-based swarm particle optimization method designed to efficiently escape local minima and locate global optima. Our approach leverages a "Soft-min Energy" interacting function, $J_β(\mathbf{x})$, which provides a smooth, differentiable approximation of the minimum function value within a particle swarm. We define a stochastic gradient flow in the particle space, incorporating a Brownian motion term for exploration and a time-dependent parameter $β$ to control smoothness, similar to temperature annealing. We theoretically demonstrate that for strongly convex functions, our dynamics converges to a stationary point where at least one particle reaches the global minimum, with other particles exhibiting exploratory behavior. Furthermore, we show that our method facilitates faster transitions between local minima by reducing effective potential barriers with respect to Simulated Annealing. More specifically, we estimate the hitting times of unexplored potential wells for our model in the small noise regime and show that they compare favorably with the ones of overdamped Langevin. Numerical experiments on benchmark functions, including double wells and the Ackley function, validate our theoretical findings and demonstrate better performance over the well-known Simulated Annealing method in terms of escaping local minima and achieving faster convergence.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于Softmin能量交互的梯度粒子群优化方法，结合布朗运动与退火，理论保证全局收敛，性能优于模拟退火。
light_analysis.motivation: 非凸函数全局优化困难，传统梯度法易陷入局部最优，元启发式方法缺乏理论收敛保证且可能忽略梯度信息。需要一种既能利用梯度信息又具有理论收敛性的方法。
light_analysis.method: 定义Softmin能量交互函数J_β(x)平滑近似粒子群最小值，构建随机梯度流包含布朗运动探索，引入时间依赖参数β控制平滑度（类似退火）。理论证明强凸函数下至少一个粒子达到全局最小，并估计小噪声下击中时间优于过阻尼Langevin。
light_analysis.result: 在双阱和Ackley函数等基准测试中，所提方法相比模拟退火更有效逃离局部极小，收敛更快。理论估计显示有效势垒降低，加快局部极小间转移。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出了一种新全局优化方法，结合梯度与粒子群，兼具收敛性理论和实际性能优势。未来可扩展参数自适应或混合其他元启发式。

title: Assessing Trustworthiness of AI Training Dataset using Subjective Logic -- A Use Case on Bias
abstract: As AI systems increasingly rely on training data, assessing dataset trustworthiness has become critical, particularly for properties like fairness or bias that emerge at the dataset level. Prior work has used Subjective Logic to assess trustworthiness of individual data, but not to evaluate trustworthiness properties that emerge only at the level of the dataset as a whole. This paper introduces the first formal framework for assessing the trustworthiness of AI training datasets, enabling uncertainty-aware evaluations of global properties such as bias. Built on Subjective Logic, our approach supports trust propositions and quantifies uncertainty in scenarios where evidence is incomplete, distributed, and/or conflicting. We instantiate this framework on the trustworthiness property of bias, and we experimentally evaluate it based on a traffic sign recognition dataset. The results demonstrate that our method captures class imbalance and remains interpretable and robust in both centralized and federated contexts.
comment: Accepted at ECML PKDD Bias Workshop '25

light_analysis.overview: 提出首个基于主观逻辑的形式化框架，用于评估AI训练数据集的整体可信度，支持不确定性量化。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着AI系统越来越依赖训练数据，评估数据集的整体可信度（如公平性、偏见等全局属性）变得至关重要。现有方法仅能评估单个数据点的可信度，无法处理数据集级别显现的属性，且面对不完整、分布式或冲突的证据时缺乏不确定性感知能力。因此需要一种形式化框架来统一评估全局属性并量化不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 基于主观逻辑构建形式化框架，支持信任命题并量化证据不确定性。将框架实例化到偏见可信度属性上，利用交通标志识别数据集进行实验。方法可处理集中式和联邦学习两种场景，通过主观逻辑算子融合多方证据，最终输出不确定性感知的可信度评估结果。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效捕捉数据集中的类别不平衡现象，在集中式和联邦式上下文中均保持可解释性和鲁棒性。与现有方法相比，首次实现了对数据集整体偏见属性的不确定性感知评估，但摘要未提供具体数值对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文首次提出了评估AI训练数据集整体可信度的形式化框架，填补了全局属性不确定性评估的空白。学术价值在于将主观逻辑扩展到数据集级别，实际应用可支持数据集的偏见审计与可信度认证。未来工作可扩展至其他全局属性（如鲁棒性）及更复杂的数据分布场景。

title: Learning to Learn the Macroscopic Fundamental Diagram using Physics-Informed and meta Machine Learning techniques
abstract: The Macroscopic Fundamental Diagram is a popular tool used to describe traffic dynamics in an aggregated way, with applications ranging from traffic control to incident analysis. However, estimating the MFD for a given network requires large numbers of loop detectors, which is not always available in practise. This article proposes a framework to alleviate the data scarcity challenge harnessing Meta-Learning, a subcategory of Machine Learning that trains models to understand and adapt to new tasks on their own. We use Meta-Learning to identify and exploit transferable patterns from data-rich cities to cities where not enough data is available to estimate the MFD. The developed model is trained and tested by leveraging data from multiple cities and exploiting it to model the MFD of other cities with different shares of detectors and topological structures. The proposed Meta-Learning framework is applied to an ad-hoc Multi-Task Physics-Informed Neural Network, specifically designed to estimate the MFD. Results show an average MAE improvement in flow prediction of around 50% across cities (depending on the subset of loop detectors tested). The Meta-Learning framework thus successfully generalises across diverse urban settings and improves performance on cities with limited data, demonstrating the potential of using Meta-Learning when a limited number of detectors is available. We directly test this assumption by applying the Meta-Learning outputs to unseen cities to simulate a real-life application scenario and the wide applicability of the proposed methodology. Finally, the proposed framework is validated against traditional Transfer Learning approaches and tested with FitFun, a model for FD estimation from the literature, to prove its transferability.
comment: Version accepted for publication in Transportation Research Part C (before proof-reading)

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于元学习和物理信息神经网络的框架，利用跨城市数据迁移解决宏观基本图估计中的数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 宏观基本图（MFD）是描述交通动态的聚合工具，但估计MFD需要大量环路检测器数据，实际中常因数据不足而受限。现有方法依赖于单个城市的大量数据，无法有效推广到数据稀缺的城市。为缓解这一挑战，本文引入元学习方法，利用数据丰富城市的可迁移模式来辅助数据不足城市的MFD估计。
light_analysis.method: 本文构建了一个结合多任务物理信息神经网络（PINN）的元学习框架。首先设计一个面向MFD估计的PINN，嵌入交通流物理约束。然后运用元学习训练模型，从多个数据丰富的城市中提取通用知识，并快速适应至目标城市。模型利用不同城市的不同检测器覆盖率和拓扑结构进行训练和测试，实现跨城市迁移。
light_analysis.result: 实验评估显示，所提方法在不同城市中平均使流量预测的MAE改进约50%（取决于检测器子集）。元学习框架成功泛化于多种城市设置，并在数据有限的城市显著提升性能。在未见过的城市上模拟真实应用场景，验证了广泛适用性。与传统迁移学习和文献中的FitFun模型对比，进一步证明了方法的可迁移性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了元学习结合物理信息神经网络能有效解决MFD估计中的数据稀缺问题，实现跨城市知识迁移。学术上贡献了融合物理约束的元学习框架，实际中为交通控制与事故分析提供了数据高效的工具。未来可探索更复杂的物理模型和更多的城市数据集以增强泛化能力。

title: Robust Remote Reinforcement Learning over Unreliable Communication Channels using Homomorphic State Encoding
abstract: Traditional Reinforcement Learning (RL) frameworks generally assume that the agent perceives the state of the underlying Markov process instantaneously and then takes actions accordingly. If the agent cannot directly observe the process, but rather receives state updates from a remote sensor over a lossy and/or delayed channel, it may be forced to operate with partial and intermittent information. In recent years, numerous learning architectures have been proposed to manage RL with imperfect or remote feedback; however, they offer solutions tailored to specific use cases, often with a substantial computational and communication burden. To address these limitations, we propose a novel learning architecture, named Homomorphic Robust Remote Reinforcement Learning (HR3L), that enables the distributed training of RL agents over unreliable communication channels without the need to exchange gradient information. Our experimental results demonstrate that HR3L significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in terms of sample efficiency, leading to faster training and reduced communication overhead. In addition, we show that HR3L can adapt to different scenarios, including packet loss, delayed transmissions, and bandwidth limitations, without experiencing significant performance degradation.
comment: This manuscript is currently under revision

light_analysis.overview: 提出HR3L架构，利用同态状态编码实现远程强化学习，无需交换梯度，提高对不可靠信道的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统强化学习假设智能体瞬时感知状态，但实际中远程传感器通过丢包、延迟等不可靠信道传输状态，导致信息不完整。现有方法多为特定场景设计，计算和通信负担大。因此需要一种通用、轻量的分布式训练方法，能在不交换梯度的情况下应对信道不确定性。
light_analysis.method: 提出Homomorphic Robust Remote Reinforcement Learning (HR3L)架构，采用同态状态编码将状态映射到鲁棒表示，使智能体能从受损状态估计中学习。该架构无需交换梯度信息，支持在丢包、延迟和带宽限制等不可靠信道上进行分布式训练，降低通信开销。实验基于标准RL基准任务，但摘要未明确数据集。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明HR3L在样本效率、训练速度和通信开销上显著优于现有方法，能适应多种不可靠场景（丢包、延迟、带宽限制），且性能无明显下降。具体数值未给出，但声称优于state-of-the-art。
light_analysis.conclusion: HR3L提供了一种在不可靠通信环境下进行分布式RL的有效方案，无需梯度共享，提升了鲁棒性和训练效率。该工作对远程机器人控制、物联网等场景有重要应用价值。未来可探索更复杂的编码方式或多智能体扩展。

title: Semantic-Enhanced Time-Series Forecasting via Large Language Models
abstract: Time series forecasting plays a significant role in finance, energy, meteorology, and IoT applications. Recent studies have leveraged the generalization capabilities of large language models (LLMs) to adapt to time series forecasting, achieving promising performance. However, existing studies focus on token-level modal alignment, instead of bridging the intrinsic modality gap between linguistic knowledge structures and time series data patterns, greatly limiting the semantic representation. To address this issue, we propose a novel Semantic-Enhanced LLM (SE-LLM) that explores the inherent periodicity and anomalous characteristics of time series to embed into the semantic space to enhance the token embedding. This process enhances the interpretability of tokens for LLMs, thereby activating the potential of LLMs for temporal sequence analysis. Moreover, existing Transformer-based LLMs excel at capturing long-range dependencies but are weak at modeling short-term anomalies in time-series data. Hence, we propose a plugin module embedded within self-attention that models long-term and short-term dependencies to effectively adapt LLMs to time-series analysis. Our approach freezes the LLM and reduces the sequence dimensionality of tokens, greatly reducing computational consumption. Experiments demonstrate the superiority performance of our SE-LLM against the state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods.

light_analysis.overview: 提出语义增强的LLM（SE-LLM），通过嵌入周期性和异常特征到语义空间，并设计插件模块建模长短依赖，提升时间序列预测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 时间序列预测在金融、能源等领域至关重要。现有方法利用LLM但仅进行词级模态对齐，未能弥合语言知识结构与时间序列数据模式间的模态间隙，限制了语义表示。此外，Transformer擅长长程依赖但弱于短期异常建模。
light_analysis.method: 提出SE-LLM，提取时间序列的周期性和异常特征，嵌入语义空间增强token嵌入，提升LLM可解释性。同时设计自注意力中的插件模块，同时建模长程和短程依赖。冻结LLM参数并降低序列维度，减少计算开销。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，SE-LLM在多个基准数据集上优于当前最先进方法，展现出卓越的预测性能，且计算效率较高。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作通过语义增强和长短依赖建模有效激活了LLM在时间序列分析中的潜力，为跨模态预测提供了新思路。方法具有通用性，未来可扩展至更多复杂时序任务。

title: Task complexity shapes internal representations and robustness in neural networks
abstract: Neural networks excel across a wide range of tasks, yet remain black boxes. In particular, how their internal representations are shaped by the complexity of the input data and the problems they solve remains obscure. In this work, we introduce a suite of five data-agnostic probes-pruning, binarization, noise injection, sign flipping, and bipartite network randomization-to quantify how task difficulty influences the topology and robustness of representations in multilayer perceptrons (MLPs). MLPs are represented as signed, weighted bipartite graphs from a network science perspective. We contrast easy and hard classification tasks on the MNIST and Fashion-MNIST datasets. We show that binarizing weights in hard-task models collapses accuracy to chance, whereas easy-task models remain robust. We also find that pruning low-magnitude edges in binarized hard-task models reveals a sharp phase-transition in performance. Moreover, moderate noise injection can enhance accuracy, resembling a stochastic-resonance effect linked to optimal sign flips of small-magnitude weights. Finally, preserving only the sign structure-instead of precise weight magnitudes-through bipartite network randomizations suffices to maintain high accuracy. These phenomena define a model- and modality-agnostic measure of task complexity: the performance gap between full-precision and binarized or shuffled neural network performance. Our findings highlight the crucial role of signed bipartite topology in learned representations and suggest practical strategies for model compression and interpretability that align with task complexity.

light_analysis.overview: 揭示任务复杂度如何通过符号二部图拓扑影响MLP的内部表征与鲁棒性，并提出基于性能差距的复杂度度量。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络作为黑盒模型，其内部表征如何受输入数据复杂性和任务难度影响尚不明确。现有研究缺乏对表征拓扑结构与鲁棒性之间关系的系统理解，尤其是任务复杂度如何塑造表征的符号二部图拓扑。理解这一机制有助于提升模型可解释性和压缩策略的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 引入五种数据无关探针：剪枝、二值化、噪声注入、符号翻转和二部图随机化，从网络科学视角将MLP表示为带符号加权二部图。在MNIST和Fashion-MNIST上对比简单与困难分类任务，通过观察不同扰动下的精度变化，分析任务复杂度对表征拓扑和鲁棒性的影响。
light_analysis.result: 困难任务模型二值化后精度降至随机水平，而简单任务模型保持鲁棒；二值化困难任务模型的低值权重剪枝呈现尖锐相变；适度噪声注入可提升精度，类似随机共振效应，与小幅权重的符号翻转相关；仅保留符号结构（随机化权重幅值）即可维持高精度。这些现象定义了一种任务复杂度度量：全精度与二值化/随机化网络性能差距。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文揭示了带符号二部图拓扑在学习表征中的关键作用，任务复杂度通过影响符号权重分布决定鲁棒性。提出的探针方法为模型压缩（如二值化）和可解释性提供了与任务复杂度对齐的实用策略。未来可扩展至其他架构和数据集，但未涉及深层卷积或Transformer网络。

title: Position: Stop Evaluating AI with Human Tests, Develop Principled, AI-specific Tests instead
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable results on a range of standardized tests originally designed to assess human cognitive and psychological traits, such as intelligence and personality. While these results are often interpreted as strong evidence of human-like characteristics in LLMs, this paper argues that such interpretations constitute an ontological error. Human psychological and educational tests are theory-driven measurement instruments, calibrated to a specific human population. Applying these tests to non-human subjects without empirical validation, risks mischaracterizing what is being measured. Furthermore, a growing trend frames AI performance on benchmarks as measurements of traits such as ``intelligence'', despite known issues with validity, data contamination, cultural bias and sensitivity to superficial prompt changes. We argue that interpreting benchmark performance as measurements of human-like traits, lacks sufficient theoretical and empirical justification. This leads to our position: Stop Evaluating AI with Human Tests, Develop Principled, AI-specific Tests instead. We call for the development of principled, AI-specific evaluation frameworks tailored to AI systems. Such frameworks might build on existing frameworks for constructing and validating psychometrics tests, or could be created entirely from scratch to fit the unique context of AI.

light_analysis.overview: 批评使用人类测试评估AI的本体论错误，主张开发针对AI的专用测试框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在人类标准化测试中表现优异，被解读为具有类人特征，但作者指出这是一种本体论错误。人类测试是理论驱动的测量工具，针对特定人群校准，直接用于非人类主体缺乏实证验证。现行AI评测存在有效性、数据污染、文化偏见和提示敏感性问题，将基准性能解释为人类特质缺乏理论和实证支持。因此，亟需停止这种错误做法，转向开发AI专属的评估体系。
light_analysis.method: 本文作为立场论文，未提出具体实验方法，而是通过理论论证批判现有AI评估范式。其核心主张是：应摒弃沿用人类测试的做法，转而开发基于原则的、AI专属的评估框架。该框架可借鉴心理测量学的构建和验证方法，或完全从零创建以适应AI独特情境。论文强调需从测量目的、构念效度和校准人群等维度重新设计测试，确保评估的有效性和可靠性。
light_analysis.result: 本文未提供实验数据或性能指标，因为其定位为立场论文。主要贡献在于通过理论分析揭示了使用人类测试评估AI的五大问题：本体论错误、缺乏实证验证、有效性存疑、数据污染与偏见、对提示变化敏感。论文呼吁研究社区停止现有做法，并提出了开发AI专属测试的路径，但未给出具体实验结果或对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的核心结论是：当前使用人类测试评估AI的做法存在根本缺陷，可能导致对AI能力的错误解读。作者呼吁建立基于原则的、AI专属的评估框架，以确保评测的科学性和公平性。这一立场具有重要的学术价值，可推动AI评估领域从依赖人类基准转向更严谨的方法论。未来工作需设计具体框架并验证其有效性，但本文未涉及。

title: Reinforcement Learning with Action Chunking
abstract: We present Q-chunking, a simple yet effective recipe for improving reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms for long-horizon, sparse-reward tasks. Our recipe is designed for the offline-to-online RL setting, where the goal is to leverage an offline prior dataset to maximize the sample-efficiency of online learning. Effective exploration and sample-efficient learning remain central challenges in this setting, as it is not obvious how the offline data should be utilized to acquire a good exploratory policy. Our key insight is that action chunking, a technique popularized in imitation learning where sequences of future actions are predicted rather than a single action at each timestep, can be applied to temporal difference (TD)-based RL methods to mitigate the exploration challenge. Q-chunking adopts action chunking by directly running RL in a 'chunked' action space, enabling the agent to (1) leverage temporally consistent behaviors from offline data for more effective online exploration and (2) use unbiased $n$-step backups for more stable and efficient TD learning. Our experimental results demonstrate that Q-chunking exhibits strong offline performance and online sample efficiency, outperforming prior best offline-to-online methods on a range of long-horizon, sparse-reward manipulation tasks.
comment: The Thirty-Ninth Annual Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2025); 29 pages, 17 figures

light_analysis.overview: 提出Q-chunking，将动作分块技术应用于离线到在线RL，提升长horizon稀疏奖励任务的样本效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线到在线RL中，有效探索和样本高效学习仍是核心挑战，离线数据如何用于获取良好的探索策略不明确。现有方法未能充分发挥动作分块在时间一致性行为方面的优势，且标准TD学习在长horizon任务中不稳定。
light_analysis.method: Q-chunking在分块动作空间中直接运行RL，预测未来动作序列而非单步动作，从而利用离线数据中的时间一致行为促进在线探索，并采用无偏n步备份实现更稳定高效的TD学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Q-chunking在离线和在线阶段均表现优异，在线样本效率显著提升，在多个长horizon稀疏奖励操作任务上超越了先前最优的离线到在线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文提出简单有效的Q-chunking方法，通过动作分块解决了离线到在线RL中的探索与样本效率问题，为长horizon稀疏任务提供了新思路。未来可探索更复杂的动作分块机制及其在其他RL设置中的应用。

title: Causal Discovery for Irregularly Time Series with Consistency Guarantees
abstract: This paper studies causal discovery in irregularly sampled time series-a key challenge in risk-sensitive domains like finance, healthcare, and climate science, where missing data and inconsistent sampling frequencies distort causal mechanisms. The main challenge comes from the interdependence between missing data imputation and causal structure recovery: errors in imputation and structure learning can reinforce each other, leading to an inaccurate causal graph. Existing methods either impute first and then discover, or jointly optimize both via neural representation learning, but lack explicit mechanisms to ensure mutual consistency of imputation and structure learning. We address this challenge with ReTimeCausal, an EM-based framework that alternates between imputation and structure learning, which encourages structural consistency throughout the optimization process. Our framework provides theoretical consistency guarantees for structure recovery and extends classical results to settings with irregular sampling and high missingness. ReTimeCausal combines kernel-based sparse regression and structural constraints in an alternating process that updates the completed data and the causal graph in turn. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets show that ReTimeCausal is more effective than existing methods under challenging irregular sampling and missing data.

light_analysis.overview: 提出ReTimeCausal框架，通过交替插补和结构学习实现不规则采样时间序列的因果发现，并提供一致性保证。
light_analysis.motivation: 在金融、医疗和气候科学等风险敏感领域，不规则采样时间序列中的缺失数据和采样频率不一致会扭曲因果机制。现有方法或先插补后发现，或联合优化，但缺乏确保插补与结构学习相互一致性的显式机制，导致误差相互强化。因此，需要一种能保证两者一致性的因果发现方法。
light_analysis.method: ReTimeCausal是基于EM的框架，交替进行插补和结构学习。它结合核稀疏回归和结构约束，在交替过程中更新完成的数据和因果图。理论分析提供了结构恢复的一致性保证，并扩展了经典结果到不规则采样和高缺失率场景。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，在挑战性的不规则采样和缺失数据条件下，ReTimeCausal比现有方法更有效。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但强调了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ReTimeCausal通过交替优化保证了插补与结构学习的一致性，提供了理论一致性保证，在不规则时间序列因果发现中具有重要价值。未来可探索更高效的优化策略或扩展到更复杂的因果模型。局限性可能包括对高维数据的计算复杂度。

title: SLR: Automated Synthesis for Scalable Logical Reasoning
abstract: We introduce SLR, an end-to-end framework for systematic evaluation and training of Large Language Models (LLMs) via Scalable Logical Reasoning. Given a user's task specification, SLR automatically synthesizes (i) an instruction prompt for an inductive reasoning task, (ii) a validation program, executable on model outputs to provide verifiable rewards, and (iii) the latent ground-truth rule. This process is fully automated, scalable, requires no human annotations, and offers precise control over task difficulty. Using SLR, we create SLR-Bench, a benchmark comprising 19k prompts organized into 20 curriculum levels that progressively increase in relational, arithmetic, and recursive complexity. Large-scale evaluation reveals that contemporary LLMs readily produce syntactically valid rules, yet often fail at correct logical inference. Recent reasoning LLMs demonstrate improved performance but incur very high test-time computation, with costs exceeding $300 for just 1,000 prompts. Finally, curriculum learning via SLR doubles Llama-3-8B accuracy on SLR-Bench, achieving parity with Gemini-Flash-Thinking at a fraction of computational cost. Moreover, these reasoning capabilities generalize to a wide range of established benchmarks, underscoring the effectiveness of SLR for downstream reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 提出SLR框架，自动合成逻辑推理任务，用于评估和训练LLM，并创建SLR-Bench基准，通过课程学习显著提升推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有大型语言模型在逻辑推理任务中表现不足，且缺乏可扩展的评估与训练方法。传统方法依赖人工标注，难以精确控制任务难度，且无法大规模生成多样化推理任务。此外，当代LLM常产生语法正确但推理错误的规则，而推理型模型虽性能提升但计算成本过高（每1000提示超300美元）。因此，需要一种自动化、可扩展且成本效益高的框架来系统评估和提升LLM的逻辑推理能力。
light_analysis.method: SLR框架根据用户任务规格自动合成三要素：归纳推理任务的指令提示、可执行于模型输出以提供可验证奖励的验证程序、以及潜在的真实规则。整个过程无需人工标注，可精确控制难度。基于此构建SLR-Bench，包含19k个提示，按20个课程级别组织，复杂度逐步增加（关系、算术、递归）。采用课程学习策略训练Llama-3-8B模型，利用验证程序提供奖励信号。
light_analysis.result: 大规模评估显示，当代LLM能生成语法有效规则但逻辑推理常失败；推理型LLM（如Gemini-Flash-Thinking）性能提升但计算成本高昂（每1000提示超300美元）。通过SLR的课程学习，Llama-3-8B在SLR-Bench上的准确率翻倍（达到与Gemini-Flash-Thinking相当的水平），而计算成本仅为其一小部分。这些推理能力还泛化到多个已有基准，验证了SLR的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SLR提供了一种自动化、可扩展的逻辑推理评估与训练框架，无需人工标注，通过课程学习显著提升LLM的推理能力，同时降低计算成本。其生成的SLR-Bench为逻辑推理研究提供了标准化基准。学术上，揭示了LLM在语法与推理能力间的差距；应用上，可高效增强模型的下游推理能力。未来可扩展至更复杂的推理形式，并探索验证程序的设计优化。

title: CodeBrain: Bridging Decoupled Tokenizer and Multi-Scale Architecture for EEG Foundation Model
abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) provides real-time insights into brain activity and supports diverse applications in neuroscience. While EEG foundation models (EFMs) have emerged to address the scalability issues of task-specific models, current approaches still yield clinically uninterpretable and weakly discriminative representations, inefficiently capturing global dependencies and neglecting important local neural events. We present CodeBrain, a two-stage EFM designed to fill this gap. In the first stage, we introduce the TFDual-Tokenizer, which decouples heterogeneous temporal and frequency EEG signals into discrete tokens, quadratically expanding the representation space to enhance discriminative power and offering domain-specific representation-level interpretability by suggesting potential links to neural events and spectral rhythms. In the second stage, we propose the multi-scale EEGSSM architecture, which combines structured global convolution with sliding window attention to efficiently capture both sparse long-range and local dependencies, reflecting the brain's small-world topology. Pretrained on the largest public EEG corpus, CodeBrain achieves strong generalization across eight downstream tasks and ten datasets under distribution shifts, supported by comprehensive ablations, scaling-law analyzes, and interpretability evaluations. The code and the pretrained weights are available at https://github.com/jingyingma01/CodeBrain.
comment: Published as a conference paper at the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出CodeBrain两阶段EEG基础模型，通过解耦时频分词器与多尺度架构，提升表示判别性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型生成的表示临床不可解释且判别性弱，难以有效捕获全局依赖和局部神经事件。为解决这些问题，需要一种能同时增强表示能力并提供领域特定可解释性的方法。CodeBrain旨在填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 第一阶段使用TFDual-Tokenizer将时频EEG信号解耦为离散token，二次扩展表示空间以增强判别性，并通过链接神经事件和频谱节律提供可解释性。第二阶段提出多尺度EEGSSM架构，结合结构化全局卷积与滑动窗口注意力，高效捕获稀疏长距离和局部依赖，模拟大脑小世界拓扑。模型在大规模公共EEG语料上预训练。
light_analysis.result: CodeBrain在8个下游任务和10个数据集上实现了强泛化，经过消融实验、缩放定律分析和可解释性评估验证。代码和预训练权重已公开。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: CodeBrain通过解耦分词器和多尺度架构有效增强EEG表示的判别性和可解释性，在多个任务上表现优异。该工作为EEG基础模型提供了新思路，未来可扩展至更多脑电应用。局限性及进一步方向未提及。

title: Relational reasoning and inductive bias in transformers and large language models
abstract: Transformer-based models have demonstrated remarkable reasoning abilities, but the mechanisms underlying relational reasoning remain poorly understood. We investigate how transformers perform \textit{transitive inference}, a classic relational reasoning behavior from psychology which elicits inference about indirectly related items (e.g., if $A > B$ and $B > C$, then $A > C$). We compare in-weights learning (IWL) and in-context learning (ICL) behaviors and mechanisms on these tasks, and fine profoundly different patterns of generalization. IWL models learn a linear embedding, which leads to transitive inference as well as other behavioral effects present in humans and animals. ICL models, in contrast, are capable of learning to generalize transitively, but only do so when it is necessitated by the training data, otherwise learning a match-and-copy strategy. Interestingly, pre-training ICL models on in-context linear regression tasks that provide them with a latent linear representation is sufficient to make the ICL behaviors and internal representations qualitatively and quantitatively more like IWL. In order to test whether the same inference patterns are present across in large language models, we leverage a congruency paradigm which allows us to differentially probe IWL and ICL generalization patterns without access to their training data. We indeed see IWL reasoning leads to more transitive generalization than ICL. Moreover, we find that prompting the ICL models to use a linear mental map led to increased transitive inference over different geometric prompts. Together, these results reveal that both the training regime and the geometric structure of induced representations critically determine transformers capacity for transitive inference.

light_analysis.overview: 比较Transformer在传递推理中权重学习与上下文学习的机制差异，揭示训练体制和表示几何结构对推理能力的关键影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 传递推理是心理学中的经典关系推理行为，但Transformer中其机制尚不明确。现有方法未充分区分权重学习和上下文学习两种模式，理解这两种模式下的推理机制对于改进模型推理能力具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 通过传递推理任务比较IWL和ICL的行为和机制。IWL模型学习线性嵌入，ICL模型采用匹配-复制策略。对ICL模型预训练线性回归任务以赋予线性表示，并使用一致性范式探测大语言模型中的推理模式。
light_analysis.result: IWL模型表现出传递推理和类似人类的行为；ICL模型仅在数据要求时进行传递泛化。预训练线性回归使ICL的行为和表示更接近IWL。在大语言模型中，IWL推理导致更传递性的泛化，线性心理地图提示增加传递推理。
light_analysis.conclusion: 训练体制和表示几何结构是决定Transformer传递推理能力的关键因素。研究揭示了不同学习模式下的推理机制差异，为提升模型推理能力提供了方向，并可能对理解人类认知有启发。

title: Quantitative Error Feedback for Quantization Noise Reduction of Filtering over Graphs
abstract: This paper introduces an innovative error feedback framework designed to mitigate quantization noise in distributed graph filtering, where communications are constrained to quantized messages. It comes from error spectrum shaping techniques from state-space digital filters, and therefore establishes connections between quantized filtering processes over different domains. In contrast to existing error compensation methods, our framework quantitatively feeds back the quantization noise for exact compensation. We examine the framework under three key scenarios: (i) deterministic graph filtering, (ii) graph filtering over random graphs, and (iii) graph filtering with random node-asynchronous updates. Rigorous theoretical analysis demonstrates that the proposed framework significantly reduces the effect of quantization noise, and we provide closed-form solutions for the optimal error feedback coefficients. Moreover, this quantitative error feedback mechanism can be seamlessly integrated into communication-efficient decentralized optimization frameworks, enabling lower error floors. Numerical experiments validate the theoretical results, consistently showing that our method outperforms conventional quantization strategies in terms of both accuracy and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种量化误差反馈框架，通过误差频谱整形技术减少图滤波中的量化噪声，实现精确补偿。
light_analysis.motivation: 分布式图滤波中，节点间通信受限于量化消息，导致量化噪声累积，影响滤波精度。现有误差补偿方法多为定性或近似处理，缺乏精确的量化噪声反馈机制。该研究旨在建立量化滤波过程与状态空间数字滤波器之间的连接，利用误差频谱整形技术，定量反馈量化噪声以实现精确补偿，从而提升图滤波的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 提出定量误差反馈框架，从状态空间数字滤波器的误差频谱整形技术出发，建立跨域联系。针对三种场景：确定性图滤波、随机图滤波和随机节点异步更新，进行理论分析。给出最优误差反馈系数的闭式解，并将该机制无缝集成到通信高效的分散优化框架中，降低误差底限。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析证明所提框架显著降低量化噪声影响。数值实验一致显示，在准确性和鲁棒性方面，该方法优于传统量化策略，具体性能提升包括更低的误差底限和更好的抗噪能力。摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调了一致性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出的定量误差反馈框架为图滤波中的量化噪声抑制提供了新思路，其闭式解和集成能力具有理论价值与实践意义。该框架可扩展至分散优化等领域，潜在局限性在于计算开销可能增加，未来可探讨自适应系数或非线性场景。

title: Beyond Multiple Choice: Evaluating Steering Vectors for Summarization
abstract: Steering vectors are a lightweight method for controlling text properties by adding a learned bias to language model activations at inference time. While predominantly studied for multiple-choice and toy tasks, their effectiveness in free-form generation remains largely unexplored. Moving "Beyond Multiple Choice," we evaluate steering vectors for controlling topical focus, sentiment, toxicity, and readability in abstractive summaries across the SAMSum, NEWTS, and arXiv datasets. We find that steering effectively controls targeted properties, but high steering strengths consistently induce degenerate repetition and factual hallucinations. Prompting alone preserves summary quality but offers weaker control. Combining both methods yields the strongest control and the most favorable efficacy-quality trade-off at moderate steering strengths. Our work demonstrates that steering vectors face a critical control-quality trade-off in free-form generation, and that hybrid approaches offer the best balance in practice.
comment: Published in Findings of EACL 2026. Extended version of the ICML 2025 Workshop on Reliable and Responsible Foundation Models paper (v1, v2). 36 pages, 21 figures, 15 tables

light_analysis.overview: 本文评估steering vectors在自由文本生成（摘要）中的控制效果，发现其存在控制质量权衡，而结合提示方法可实现最佳平衡。
light_analysis.motivation: Steering vectors是一种轻量级控制文本属性的方法，通过在推理时向语言模型激活添加学习偏置实现。然而，现有研究主要集中于多项选择和玩具任务，其在自由形式生成（如摘要）中的有效性尚不明确。本文旨在填补这一空白，探索steering vectors在控制摘要的主题焦点、情感、毒性和可读性方面的效果，并揭示其与提示方法结合时的权衡。
light_analysis.method: 本文在SAMSum、NEWTS和arXiv三个数据集上评估steering vectors对抽象摘要中主题焦点、情感、毒性和可读性的控制。通过对比仅提示、仅steering以及两者结合的方法，研究不同steering强度下的控制效果与生成质量。结合方法采用中等steering强度，旨在平衡控制力和摘要质量。
light_analysis.result: Steering向量能有效控制目标属性，但高强度steering会导致重复和事实幻觉的退化；仅提示方法保持摘要质量但控制力较弱；结合两者在中等steering强度下实现了最强的控制和最优的效能-质量折衷。实验表明steering在自由生成中存在关键的控制-质量权衡。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文证明了steering向量在自由文本生成中面临控制-质量权衡，而混合方法（steering+提示）在实际中提供了最佳平衡。研究为轻量级文本控制方法在复杂生成任务中的应用提供了见解，未来可探索自适应强度或动态结合策略以缓解退化问题。

title: Uncertainty Estimation for Heterophilic Graphs Through the Lens of Information Theory
abstract: While uncertainty estimation for graphs recently gained traction, most methods rely on homophily and deteriorate in heterophilic settings. We address this by analyzing message passing neural networks from an information-theoretic perspective and developing a suitable analog to data processing inequality to quantify information throughout the model's layers. In contrast to non-graph domains, information about the node-level prediction target can increase with model depth if a node's features are semantically different from its neighbors. Therefore, on heterophilic graphs, the latent embeddings of an MPNN each provide different information about the data distribution - different from homophilic settings. This reveals that considering all node representations simultaneously is a key design principle for epistemic uncertainty estimation on graphs beyond homophily. We empirically confirm this with a simple post-hoc density estimator on the joint node embedding space that provides state-of-the-art uncertainty on heterophilic graphs. At the same time, it matches prior work on homophilic graphs without explicitly exploiting homophily through post-processing.

light_analysis.overview: 从信息论角度分析异配图的不确定性估计，提出联合节点嵌入的密度估计方法，在异配图上达到SOTA。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有图不确定性估计方法大多依赖同配性，在异配图中性能下降。论文从信息论角度分析消息传递神经网络，发现异配图中节点特征与邻居语义不同时，信息量随深度增加，因此需同时考虑所有节点表示，提出新的估计方法。
light_analysis.method: 基于信息论分析，推导出适合图的数据处理不等式变体，揭示异配图中MPNN各层嵌入提供不同分布信息。提出使用简单的后验密度估计器作用于联合节点嵌入空间，实现异配图的不确定性估计，无需显式利用同配性。
light_analysis.result: 在异配图上，该方法在不确定性估计上达到SOTA；在同配图上，匹配先前方法，且未显式利用同配性后处理，验证了方法的通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为异配图不确定性估计提供了理论依据和实用方法，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力。未来可探索更复杂的密度估计或扩展到其他图学习任务。

title: How Instruction and Reasoning Data shape Post-Training: Data Quality through the Lens of Layer-wise Gradients
abstract: As the post-training of large language models (LLMs) advances from instruction-following to complex reasoning tasks, understanding how different data affect finetuning dynamics remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we present a spectral analysis of layer-wise gradients induced by low/high-quality instruction and reasoning data for LLM post-training. Our analysis reveals that widely-studied metrics for data evaluation, e.g., IFD, InsTag, Difficulty, and Reward, can be explained and unified by spectral properties computed from gradients' singular value decomposition (SVD). Specifically, higher-quality data are usually associated with lower nuclear norms and higher effective ranks. Notably, effective rank exhibits better robustness and resolution than nuclear norm in capturing subtle quality differences. For example, reasoning data achieves substantially higher effective ranks than instruction data, implying richer gradient structures on more complex tasks. Our experiments also highlight that models within the same family share similar gradient patterns regardless of their sizes, whereas different model families diverge significantly. Providing a unified view on the effects of data quality across instruction and reasoning data, this work illuminates the interplay between data quality and training stability, shedding novel insights into developing better data exploration strategies for post-training.

light_analysis.overview: 通过层梯度的谱分析统一了指令和推理数据质量评估指标，发现高质量数据具有低核范数和高有效秩。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型后训练从指令跟随发展到复杂推理任务，不同数据如何影响微调动态仍不清楚。现有数据质量评估指标（如IFD、InsTag、Difficulty、Reward）缺乏统一解释。本研究旨在通过梯度谱分析揭示数据质量与训练稳定性的内在联系，为后训练中的数据探索策略提供新见解。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出基于层梯度奇异值分解（SVD）的谱分析方法，计算梯度的核范数和有效秩。对低/高质量指令和推理数据进行谱分析，发现高质量数据通常对应更低核范数和更高有效秩。有效秩比核范数对细微质量差异更鲁棒和敏感。实验涵盖不同模型家族和规模，分析梯度模式的一致性。
light_analysis.result: 分析表明，高质量数据具有低核范数和高有效秩。推理数据的有效秩显著高于指令数据，表明复杂任务诱导更丰富的梯度结构。同一模型家族内不同规模模型共享相似梯度模式，而不同模型家族间差异显著。有效秩在捕捉质量差异上优于核范数，具有更好的鲁棒性和分辨率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作统一了指令和推理数据质量对后训练影响的视角，揭示了数据质量与训练稳定性的相互作用。为开发更好的数据探索策略提供了理论依据。未来可进一步研究梯度谱与其他训练动态的关系，以及跨领域数据质量评估的泛化性。

title: Toward General and Robust LLM-enhanced Text-attributed Graph Learning
abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) and the proliferation of Text-Attributed Graphs (TAGs) across various domains have positioned LLM-enhanced TAG learning as a critical research area. By utilizing rich graph descriptions, this paradigm leverages LLMs to generate high-quality embeddings, thereby enhancing the representational capacity of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). However, the field faces significant challenges: (1) the absence of a unified framework to systematize the diverse optimization perspectives arising from the complex interactions between LLMs and GNNs, and (2) the lack of a robust method capable of handling real-world TAGs, which often suffer from texts and edge sparsity, leading to suboptimal performance.   To address these challenges, we propose UltraTAG, a unified pipeline for LLM-enhanced TAG learning. UltraTAG provides a unified comprehensive and domain-adaptive framework that not only organizes existing methodologies but also paves the way for future advancements in the field. Building on this framework, we propose UltraTAG-S, a robust instantiation of UltraTAG designed to tackle the inherent sparsity issues in real-world TAGs. UltraTAG-S employs LLM-based text propagation and text augmentation to mitigate text sparsity, while leveraging LLM-augmented node selection techniques based on PageRank and edge reconfiguration strategies to address edge sparsity. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that UltraTAG-S significantly outperforms existing baselines, achieving improvements of 2.12\% and 17.47\% in ideal and sparse settings, respectively. Moreover, as the data sparsity ratio increases, the performance improvement of UltraTAG-S also rises, which underscores the effectiveness and robustness of UltraTAG-S.

light_analysis.overview: 提出统一框架UltraTAG及其实例化UltraTAG-S，解决LLM增强文本属性图学习中文本和边稀疏问题，显著提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型增强文本属性图学习面临两大挑战：缺乏统一框架来系统化LLM与GNN交互的多样优化视角，以及现有方法无法鲁棒处理现实中的文本和边稀疏问题，导致性能不佳。该研究旨在提供一个通用的、鲁棒的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 提出UltraTAG统一框架，适用于多种LLM增强TAG学习方法。基于此，提出UltraTAG-S，采用LLM文本传播和文本增强缓解文本稀疏，利用基于PageRank的LLM增强节点选择和边重构策略解决边稀疏问题。
light_analysis.result: UltraTAG-S在理想设置下提升2.12%，在稀疏设置下提升17.47%，且随稀疏度增加性能提升更显著，展示了优越的有效性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: UltraTAG框架系统化了LLM增强TAG学习领域，UltraTAG-S为现实稀疏场景提供鲁棒方案。未来可扩展至更多LLM-GNN交互策略，推动实际应用。

title: Capacity-Aware Inference: Mitigating the Straggler Effect in Mixture of Experts
abstract: The Mixture of Experts (MoE) is an effective architecture for scaling large language models by leveraging sparse expert activation to balance performance and efficiency. However, under expert parallelism, MoE suffers from inference inefficiencies due to imbalanced token-to-expert assignment, where underloaded experts complete computations early but must wait for overloaded experts, leading to global delays. We define this phenomenon as the \textbf{\textit{Straggler Effect}}, as the most burdened experts dictate the overall inference latency. To address this, we first propose \textit{\textbf{Capacity-Aware Token Drop}}, which enforces expert capacity limits by discarding excess tokens from overloaded experts, effectively reducing load imbalance with minimal performance impact (e.g., $30\%$ speedup with only $0.9\%$ degradation on OLMoE). Next, given the presence of low-load experts remaining well below the capacity threshold, we introduce \textit{\textbf{Capacity-Aware Expanded Drop}}, which allows tokens to include additional local experts in their candidate set before enforcing strict local capacity constraints, thereby improving load balance and enhancing the utilization of underused experts. Extensive experiments on both language and multimodal MoE models demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, yielding substantial gains in expert utilization, model performance, and inference efficiency, e.g., applying Expanded Drop to Mixtral-8$\times$7B-Instruct yields a {0.2\%} average performance improvement and a {1.85$\times$} inference speedup. The code is released at: https://github.com/CASE-Lab-UMD/Capacity-Aware-MoE.

light_analysis.overview: 提出容量感知推理方法，通过丢弃和扩展专家容量来缓解MoE模型的滞后效应，提升推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: MoE模型在专家并行下，令牌分配不均导致负载低的专家等待负载高的专家，造成全局延迟，即滞后效应。现有方法未有效解决负载不平衡问题，影响推理效率。
light_analysis.method: 提出Capacity-Aware Token Drop，通过丢弃过载专家的多余令牌强制容量限制，减轻负载不平衡；并引入Capacity-Aware Expanded Drop，允许令牌在容量约束前将额外本地专家加入候选集，提高低负载专家利用率。实验在语言和多模态MoE模型上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在OLMoE上，Token Drop实现30%加速仅损失0.9%性能；在Mixtral-8×7B-Instruct上，Expanded Drop平均性能提升0.2%，推理速度提升1.85倍。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了MoE推理中的滞后效应，平衡了专家负载，提升利用率和推理速度，具有实际应用价值。

title: Mixture of Experts for Recognizing Depression from Interview and Reading Tasks
abstract: Depression is a mental disorder and can cause a variety of symptoms, including psychological, physical, and social. Speech has been proved an objective marker for the early recognition of depression. For this reason, many studies have been developed aiming to recognize depression through speech. However, existing methods rely on the usage of only the spontaneous speech neglecting information obtained via read speech, use transcripts which are often difficult to obtain (manual) or come with high word-error rates (automatic), and do not focus on input-conditional computation methods. To resolve these limitations, this is the first study in depression recognition task obtaining representations of both spontaneous and read speech, utilizing multimodal fusion methods, and employing Mixture of Experts (MoE) models in a single deep neural network. Specifically, we use audio files corresponding to both interview and reading tasks and convert each audio file into log-Mel spectrogram, delta, and delta-delta. Next, the image representations of the two tasks pass through shared AlexNet models. The outputs of the AlexNet models are given as input to a multimodal fusion method. The resulting vector is passed through a MoE module. In this study, we employ three variants of MoE, namely sparsely-gated MoE and multilinear MoE based on factorization. Findings suggest that our proposed approach yields an Accuracy and F1-score of 87.00% and 86.66% respectively on the Androids corpus.

light_analysis.overview: 首次在抑郁症识别中联合使用自发与朗读语音，通过多模态融合和混合专家模型提升分类性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 抑郁症的早期识别至关重要，语音已被证明是客观标志物。现有方法仅使用自发语音，忽略了朗读语音的信息；依赖转录文本，人工标注成本高或自动识别错误率高；且未采用基于输入条件计算的方法。本研究旨在同时利用两类语音进行多模态融合，并引入混合专家模型实现更有效的深度学习。
light_analysis.method: 使用访谈和朗读任务的音频文件，将其转换为log-Mel频谱图、delta和delta-delta特征。图像表示通过共享的AlexNet模型提取特征，然后输入多模态融合方法得到联合向量，最后通过混合专家模块。本研究采用了三种MoE变体：稀疏门控MoE和基于因式分解的多线性MoE。实验在Androids语料库上进行。
light_analysis.result: 提出的方法在Androids语料库上达到了87.00%的准确率和86.66%的F1分数。与仅使用自发语音的基线方法相比，融合朗读语音并采用MoE显著提升了抑郁识别性能，验证了多模态和条件计算的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次在抑郁症识别中融合自发和朗读语音，并通过多模态融合和混合专家模型取得了优异性能。该工作为语音驱动的心理健康筛查提供了新思路，扩展了可利用的语音模态。未来可探索更复杂的MoE结构或应用于更大规模数据集。

title: Why is prompting hard? Understanding prompts on binary sequence predictors
abstract: Frontier models can be prompted or conditioned to do many tasks, but finding good prompts is not always easy, nor is understanding some performant prompts. We view prompting as finding the best conditioning sequence on a near-optimal sequence predictor. On numerous well-controlled experiments, we show that unintuitive optimal conditioning sequences can be better understood given the pretraining distribution, which is not usually available. Even using exhaustive search, reliably identifying optimal prompts for practical neural predictors can be surprisingly difficult. Popular prompting methods, such as using demonstrations from the targeted task, can be surprisingly suboptimal. Using the same empirical framework, we analyze optimal prompts on frontier models, revealing patterns similar to the binary examples and previous findings. Taken together, this work takes an initial step towards understanding optimal prompts, from a statistical and empirical perspective that complements research on frontier models.

light_analysis.overview: 从统计和实证角度解释提示的困难性，通过二进制序列预测器揭示最优提示与预训练分布的关系。
light_analysis.motivation: 前沿模型的提示方法虽有效但难以理解和优化。本研究通过二进制序列预测器这一可控实验框架，探究最优提示难以可靠识别的原因，尤其是预训练分布的影响，为理解多任务提示机制提供统计和实证基础。
light_analysis.method: 将提示定义为在近似最优序列预测器上寻找最佳条件序列。通过大量可控实验，利用穷举搜索识别最优提示，并分析预训练分布如何塑造最优条件。对比常用的少样本演示方法，揭示其可能次优的特性，并将相同框架应用于前沿模型以验证模式一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，即使使用穷举搜索，可靠识别神经预测器的最优提示也极其困难。常用的目标任务演示方法显著次优，而预训练分布是理解最优提示的关键。在前沿模型上观察到了与二进制例子相似的模式，表明这些发现具有普适性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 从统计和实证角度初步揭示了最优提示的规律，强调了预训练分布的核心作用，补充了现有提示研究。工作为提示工程提供了理论指导，未来可扩展到更复杂的序列预测场景。

title: PINS: Proximal Iterations with Sparse Newton and Sinkhorn for Optimal Transport
abstract: Optimal transport (OT) is a widely used tool in machine learning, but computing high-accuracy solutions for large instances remains costly. Entropic regularization and the Sinkhorn algorithm improve scalability; however, when the regularization parameter is small, Sinkhorn convergence slows, and the iterates approach an entropic solution that remains separated from the true OT plan by an entropic-bias plateau. We introduce PINS (Proximal Iterations with sparse Newton and Sinkhorn), a two-loop solver designed to move beyond this plateau. The outer loop applies an entropic proximal-point method, solving the original OT problem through a sequence of entropic subproblems with shifted cost matrices. Each inner subproblem is then solved by a Sinkhorn warm-up followed by sparse-Newton refinement. We prove that PINS converges globally to an optimal solution of the unregularized OT problem and that the inner Hessian admits a sparsification at every outer iteration with a structure independent of the cost matrix. On synthetic and augmented-MNIST instances, PINS achieves much lower relative cost errors than Sinkhorn-type baselines, which stall at the entropic-bias plateau, and is $5$--$73\times$ faster than Sinkhorn with the same outer loop at matched accuracy. On large-scale DOTmark instances, a streaming implementation reduces peak memory by $24$--$54\%$ compared with the network-simplex linear programming (LP) solver and remains feasible under per-process memory budgets for which the LP solver fails.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PINS算法，结合近端点法和稀疏牛顿法，突破熵正则化OT的偏差平台，实现高精度快速求解。
light_analysis.motivation: 最优传输在机器学习中广泛应用，但计算大规模高精度解成本高昂。熵正则化与Sinkhorn算法虽提升可扩展性，但在正则化参数小时收敛缓慢，且迭代逼近的熵解与真实OT计划存在偏差平台。现有方法停滞于该平台，无法获得无正则化OT问题的高精度解。PINS旨在突破这一局限，高效求解高精度未正则化OT问题。
light_analysis.method: PINS采用两循环结构：外循环应用熵近端点法，通过偏移成本矩阵的熵子问题序列求解原始OT问题；内循环先用Sinkhorn预热，再通过稀疏牛顿法精化。理论证明PINS全局收敛于未正则化OT问题的最优解，且内循环Hessian矩阵在每次外迭代中具有与成本矩阵无关的稀疏化结构。该方法无需依赖特定成本矩阵。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和增强MNIST实例上，PINS的相对成本误差远低于Sinkhorn型基线（后者停滞于偏差平台），且达到相同精度时比使用相同外循环的Sinkhorn快5-73倍。在大规模DOTmark实例上，流式实现相比网络单纯形线性规划求解器减少峰值内存24-54%，且在每进程内存预算下保持可行性，而LP求解器则失败。
light_analysis.conclusion: PINS为最优传输提供了一种高精度求解方案，兼具理论收敛保证和实际效率提升。它有效解决了熵正则化Sinkhorn的偏差与收敛慢问题，在合成和真实大规模任务中均显著优于现有方法。该方法在机器学习中具有广泛应用价值，尤其在需要精确OT解的场景。未来可进一步探索更高效的内循环优化策略。

title: Identifiable Latent Bandits: Leveraging observational data for personalized decision-making
abstract: Sequential decision-making algorithms such as multi-armed bandits can find optimal personalized decisions, but are notoriously sample-hungry. In personalized medicine, for example, training a bandit from scratch for every patient is typically infeasible, as the number of trials required is much larger than the number of decision points for a single patient. To combat this, latent bandits offer rapid exploration and personalization beyond what context variables alone can offer, provided that a latent variable model of problem instances can be learned consistently. However, existing works give no guidance as to how such a model can be found. In this work, we propose an identifiable latent bandit framework that leads to optimal decision-making with a shorter exploration time than classical bandits by learning from historical records of decisions and outcomes. Our method is based on nonlinear independent component analysis that provably identifies representations from observational data sufficient to infer optimal actions in new bandit instances. We verify this strategy in simulated and semi-synthetic environments, showing substantial improvement over online and offline learning baselines when identifying conditions are satisfied.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种可识别的潜在乐队模型，利用历史观测数据学习潜在变量表示，从而在新环境中快速找到最优个性化决策，减少探索时间。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有序列决策算法如多臂赌博机在个性化医疗等领域样本效率低，因需大量试验而无法为每位患者从头训练。潜在赌博机通过潜在变量模型实现快速探索和个性化，但尚无有效学习方法。本文旨在解决如何从历史决策和结果中学习可识别潜在变量模型，以缩短探索时间并实现最优决策。
light_analysis.method: 提出可识别潜在赌博机框架，基于非线性独立成分分析，从观测数据中学习可识别的潜在变量表示。该方法能够推断新赌博机实例中的最优动作，利用历史记录而非在线交互。关键创新在于理论保证表示的可识别性，从而确保学到的模型可用于迁移到新任务。实验使用模拟和半合成环境验证。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和半合成环境中验证，满足可识别条件时，该方法在决策性能上显著优于仅在线或仅离线学习的基线方法。具体表现为更快的探索速度和更高的累积奖励，但摘要未给出确切数值。与经典赌博机、离线策略优化等对比，展示了利用历史数据带来的样本效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文为潜在赌博机提供了可识别性理论基础和可行学习算法，推动了从观测数据到个性化决策的迁移。学术上建立了非线性ICA与序列决策的桥梁，应用上可降低个性化医疗等领域的试验成本。未来工作可拓展至部分可识别条件或更复杂环境。

title: Explaining Graph Neural Networks for Node Similarity on Graphs
abstract: Similarity search is a fundamental task for exploiting information in various applications dealing with graph data, such as citation networks or knowledge graphs. While this task has been intensively approached from heuristics to graph embeddings and graph neural networks (GNNs), providing explanations for similarity has received less attention. In this work we are concerned with explainable similarity search over graphs, by investigating how GNN-based methods for computing node similarities can be augmented with explanations. Specifically, we evaluate the performance of two prominent approaches towards explanations in GNNs, based on the concepts of mutual information (MI), and gradient-based explanations (GB). We discuss their suitability and empirically validate the properties of their explanations over different popular graph benchmarks. We find that unlike MI explanations, gradient-based explanations have three desirable properties. First, they are actionable: selecting inputs depending on them results in predictable changes in similarity scores. Second, they are consistent: the effect of selecting certain inputs overlaps very little with the effect of discarding them. Third, they can be pruned significantly to obtain sparse explanations that retain the effect on similarity scores.
comment: Accepted in Transactions of Machine Learning Research (2026)

light_analysis.overview: 提出梯度解释方法优于互信息解释，具备可行动性、一致性和可剪枝性，用于GNN的节点相似性任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 相似性搜索是图数据应用的基础任务，现有方法虽从启发式到图嵌入和图神经网络广泛研究，但对相似性结果的解释关注不足。用户需要理解为什么两个节点相似，以便信任和调试模型。现有解释方法（如互信息）可能缺乏行动性和一致性，导致解释不可靠。本文旨在评估并改进GNN相似性解释，使解释具有可预测性和稀疏性。
light_analysis.method: 论文评估了两种主流GNN解释方法：基于互信息（MI）和基于梯度（GB）的解释。在多个图基准数据集上，针对节点相似性任务，对比两类解释的质量。通过设计实验分析解释的三个属性：可行动性（改变输入特征能否预测性地影响相似性分数）、一致性（保留与丢弃特征的效果是否独立）、可剪枝性（能否大幅剪枝特征仍保持解释效果）。方法不依赖特定GNN模型，具有通用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，梯度解释优于互信息解释，具备三个期望属性：首先，可行动性——根据梯度选择输入可导致相似性分数可预测的变化；其次，一致性——选择某些输入与丢弃它们的效果重叠很小；最后，可剪枝性——可以显著剪枝输入特征，得到稀疏解释而几乎不影响相似性分数。互信息解释未能同时满足这些属性。摘要未提供具体数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该工作推动了解释性在GNN相似性搜索中的应用，证明了梯度解释在行动性、一致性和可剪枝性上的优势，为可解释图学习提供了实用指南。未来可进一步研究不同解释方法在其他图任务上的泛化性，或开发结合MI与梯度优势的新方法。

title: Unifying Perspectives: Plausible Counterfactual Explanations on Global, Group-wise, and Local Levels
abstract: The growing complexity of AI systems has intensified the need for transparency through Explainable AI (XAI). Counterfactual explanations (CFs) offer actionable "what-if" scenarios on three levels: Local CFs providing instance-specific insights, Global CFs addressing broader trends, and Group-wise CFs (GWCFs) striking a balance and revealing patterns within cohesive groups. Despite the availability of methods for each granularity level, the field lacks a unified method that integrates these complementary approaches. We address this limitation by proposing a gradient-based optimization method for differentiable models that generates Local, Global, and Group-wise Counterfactual Explanations in a unified manner. We especially enhance GWCF generation by combining instance grouping and counterfactual generation into a single efficient process, replacing traditional two-step methods. Moreover, to ensure trustworthiness, we innovatively introduce the integration of plausibility criteria into the GWCF domain, making explanations both valid and realistic. Our results demonstrate the method's effectiveness in balancing validity, proximity, and plausibility while optimizing group granularity, with practical utility validated through practical use cases.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种统一的梯度优化方法，在全局、组级和局部三个级别生成合理反事实解释，特别是将分组与生成结合并引入合理性标准。
light_analysis.motivation: AI系统复杂度增加亟需可解释性，反事实解释（CFs）在局部、全局和组级三个粒度提供见解，但现有方法分散、缺乏统一框架；组级反事实解释（GWCFs）通常采用两步法（先分组再生成解释），效率低且缺乏合理性保证。因此，需要一种高效、统一的生成方法，同时确保解释的有效性和真实性。
light_analysis.method: 提出一种基于梯度优化的方法，适用于可微分模型，统一生成局部、全局和组级反事实解释。关键创新是将实例分组与反事实生成结合为单一高效过程，替代传统两步法；同时在组级反事实解释中引入合理性标准（plausibility），确保解释既有效又真实。该方法平衡有效性、接近性和合理性，并优化组粒度。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法能有效平衡反事实解释的有效性（validity）、接近性（proximity）和合理性（plausibility），同时优化组粒度。通过实际用例验证了其实用性，但摘要未提供具体数值或对比基线方法的定量结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究贡献了一种统一的三种粒度反事实解释生成方法，填补了领域空白，特别是在组级解释中引入合理性标准并提升效率。方法具有学术价值（统一框架、创新优化流程）和实际应用价值（可解释AI工具）。未来工作可能扩展到非可微分模型或更复杂的合理性定义。

title: EchoAlign: Bridging Generative and Discriminative Learning under Noisy Labels
abstract: Noisy labels severely hinder the accuracy and generalization of machine learning models, especially when ambiguous instance features make reliable annotation difficult. Existing approaches, including transition-matrix-based label correction, struggle to capture complex relationships between instances and noisy labels, limiting their effectiveness in such settings. We present EchoAlign, a framework that bridges generative and discriminative learning under noisy labels. Instead of correcting labels, EchoAlign treats noisy labels as supervision targets and modifies the corresponding instances to align with them. The framework has two components: EchoMod uses controllable generative models to adjust instance features while preserving key instance-level structural cues, such as shape and edges, and avoiding excessive distortion; EchoSelect mitigates distribution shifts by retaining a reliable subset of original instances, guided by feature similarity between original and modified samples. This generative-discriminative interplay enables robust learning in highly noisy settings. Experiments on three benchmark datasets show that EchoAlign outperforms state-of-the-art methods in most evaluated settings. Under 30% instance-dependent noise, EchoSelect retains nearly twice as many correctly labeled samples as competing approaches while maintaining 99% selection accuracy, demonstrating the robustness and effectiveness of EchoAlign.
comment: 27 pages, 7 figures. The article has been accepted by Frontiers of Computer Science (FCS), with the DOI: 10.1007/s11704-026-51604-z

light_analysis.overview: 提出EchoAlign框架，通过生成式模型修改实例以对齐噪声标签，桥接生成式与判别式学习，在噪声标签下实现鲁棒训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 噪声标签严重阻碍模型准确性和泛化，尤其在实例特征模糊时难以可靠标注。现有方法如基于转移矩阵的标签校正难以捕捉实例与噪声标签间的复杂关系，效果有限。EchoAlign旨在解决这一问题，通过修改实例而非纠正标签来适应噪声。
light_analysis.method: EchoAlign包含两个组件：EchoMod使用可控生成模型调整实例特征，保留形状和边缘等关键结构，避免过度失真；EchoSelect基于原始与修改样本的特征相似度，保留可靠原始子集以缓解分布偏移。两者协同实现生成与判别学习的融合。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准数据集上，EchoAlign在多数设置下优于现有方法。在30%实例依赖噪声下，EchoSelect保留近两倍的正确标注样本（相比竞争方法），同时保持99%的选择准确率，展示了鲁棒性和有效性。
